We introduce GHGbench, an open dataset and benchmark for company- and building-level greenhouse-gas prediction. The company track contains 32,000+ company-year records from 12,000+ firms with Scope 1+2 and Scope 3 disclosures and financial/sectoral signals; the building track harmonises 491,591 building-year records from 13 open sources into a single schema across 26 metropolitan areas (10 U.S., 15 Australian, 1 Singaporean), with climate covariates and multimodal remote-sensing embeddings. GHGbench defines canonical splits with in-distribution and cross-region/city transfer as primary tasks and temporal hold-out plus short-horizon forecasting as supplementary appendix evidence; headline baselines span gradient-boosted trees, a tabular foundation model, MLP, FT-Transformer, and multimodal fusion, with an LLM panel as auxiliary, all evaluated under multi-seed paired-bootstrap tests. Three benchmark-level findings emerge: (i) building emissions are structurally harder than company emissions; (ii) the in-distribution to out-of-distribution gap dwarfs any within-model gap across both the company track and the building track, and a tabular foundation model is, to our knowledge, the first baseline to open a paired-bootstrap-significant gap over tuned trees on a multi-city building-emissions task; (iii) multimodal remote-sensing embeddings help precisely where tabular generalisation breaks. GHGbench also exposes catastrophic city transfer and the sector-factor lookup ceiling as systematic failure modes. Code and reconstruction recipes are available at GHGbench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多实体、多任务碳排放预测统一基准GHGbench，涵盖公司和建筑层级，并揭示关键发现。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前实体级碳排放预测的开放数据集和基准在访问、规模、粒度和评估上仍碎片化，缺乏统一的评价框架。这阻碍了不同方法间的公平比较和实际减排策略的制定。现有基准往往集中在单一实体类型或区域，跨区域迁移能力未知。
light_analysis.method: GHGbench包含公司和建筑两个预测轨道。公司轨道有3.2万+公司年记录，含Scope1+2和3排放及财务/行业信号；建筑轨道整合13个来源49.1万+建筑年记录，统一26个都市区模式，含气候协变量和多模态遥感嵌入。定义规范划分，支持分布内和跨区域/城市迁移任务，并提供多种基线（梯度提升树、表格基础模型、MLP、FT-Transformer、多模态融合）和LLM面板，使用多种子配对bootstrap检验。
light_analysis.result: 三大基准级发现：(i)建筑排放预测结构上比公司更难；(ii)分布内到分布外差距远大于任何模型间差距，表格基础模型首次在城市建筑排放任务上以配对bootstrap显著优于调参树；(iii)多模态遥感嵌入在表格泛化失效处提供精确帮助。同时暴露出灾难性城市迁移和部门因子查找天花板等系统失败模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: GHGbench为碳排放预测提供统一、开放、多实体多任务的基准，揭示关键挑战和失败模式，促进方法改进。代码和重建配方已公开，有助于推动该领域标准化和实际减排应用。未来可扩展更多实体类型和区域，探索更优迁移学习方法。

title: Learning POMDP World Models from Observations with Language-Model Priors
abstract: Whether navigating a building, operating a robot, or playing a game, an agent that acts effectively in an environment must first learn an internal model of how that environment works. Partially-observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) provide a flexible modeling class for such internal world models, but learning them from observation-action trajectories alone is challenging and typically requires extensive environment interaction. We ask whether language-model priors can reduce costly interaction by leveraging prior knowledge, and introduce \emph{Pinductor} (POMDP-inductor): an LLM proposes candidate POMDP models from a few observation-action trajectories and iteratively refines them to optimize a belief-based likelihood score. Despite using strictly less information, \emph{Pinductor} matches the performance and sample efficiency of LLM-based POMDP learning methods that assume privileged access to the hidden state, while significantly surpassing the sample efficiency of tabular POMDP baselines. Further results show that performance scales with LLM capability and degrades gracefully as semantic information about the environment is withheld. Together, these results position language-model priors as a practical tool for sample-efficient world-model learning under partial observability, and a step toward generalist agents in real-world environments. Code is available at https://github.com/atomresearch/pinductor.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Pinductor方法，利用语言模型先验从少量观测-动作轨迹中高效学习POMDP世界模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能体需学习环境内部模型才能有效行动，但POMDP模型从观测-动作轨迹中学习困难，通常需要大量环境交互。现有LLM-based方法常依赖隐状态特权信息，而传统表格法样本效率低。本文探索利用语言模型先验减少昂贵交互，实现样本高效的世界模型学习。
light_analysis.method: 提出Pinductor：使用LLM从少量观测-动作轨迹中提出候选POMDP模型，并基于信念似然分数迭代优化模型。无需访问隐状态，仅依赖观测和动作信息。关键创新在于将语言模型先验作为模型生成与精炼的引导，结合贝叶斯似然评估实现高效搜索。
light_analysis.result: 在多个环境（如导航、机器人、游戏）中，Pinductor匹配了需隐状态特权的LLM方法的性能和样本效率，并显著优于传统表格POMDP基线。性能随LLM能力提升而提升，且在隐藏语义信息时仍保持一定鲁棒性，验证了语言模型先验的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 语言模型先验可作为部分可观测环境下样本高效世界模型学习的实用工具，为通用智能体在真实环境中部署提供新思路。未来可探索更复杂的模型结构和更高效的优化策略，但当前方法在高度抽象环境中的表现仍需验证。

title: Senses Wide Shut: A Representation-Action Gap in Omnimodal LLMs
abstract: When an omnimodal large language model accepts a question whose textual premise contradicts what it actually sees or hears, does the failure lie in perception or in action? Recent omnimodal models are positioned as perception-grounded agents that jointly process video, audio, and text, yet a basic form of grounding remains untested: catching a textual claim that conflicts with the model's own sensory input. We introduce IMAVB, a curated 500-clip benchmark of long-form movies with a 2x2 design crossing target modality (vision, audio) and premise condition (standard, misleading), which lets us measure conflict detection separately from ordinary multimodal comprehension. Across eight open-source omnimodal LLMs and Gemini 3.1 Pro, we document a Representation-Action Gap: hidden states reliably encode premise-perception mismatches even when the same models almost never reject the false claim in their outputs. Behaviorally, models fall into two failure modes: under-rejection, in which they answer misleading questions as if the false premise were true; and over-rejection, in which they reject more often but also reject standard questions, sacrificing ordinary comprehension accuracy. The gap is modality-asymmetric (audio grounding underperforms vision) and prompt-resistant across seven variants. As an initial diagnostic intervention, a probe-guided logit adjustment (PGLA) re-injects the encoded mismatch signal into decoding and consistently improves rejection behavior. Together, these results suggest the bottleneck for omnimodal grounding lies in translation, not perception.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示全模态大语言模型存在表征-动作差距：隐藏状态能编码感知冲突，但输出未拒绝错误前提，并提出探针引导的logit调整方法缓解。
light_analysis.motivation: 全模态大语言模型声称以感知为基础，但未测试其对文本前提与感官输入冲突的检测能力。现有方法缺乏衡量冲突检测与普通理解分离的基准，且模型在感知与行动间存在脱节，影响可靠接地。
light_analysis.method: 构建IMAVB基准，含500个长视频片段，交叉目标模态（视觉/音频）和前提条件（标准/误导），测量冲突检测。分析八种开源全模态模型和Gemini 3.1 Pro的隐藏状态与输出行为。提出探针引导logit调整（PGLA）将编码的不匹配信号注入解码。
light_analysis.result: 模型隐藏状态可靠编码感知-前提不匹配，但输出几乎从不拒绝错误前提，形成表征-动作差距。模型表现两种失败模式：低拒绝（未拒绝误导问题）和高拒绝（误拒标准问题）。差距存在模态不对称（音频接地弱于视觉），且对提示变体鲁棒。PGLA持续改进拒绝行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 全模态接地瓶颈在翻译（从表征到行动）而非感知。PGLA提供初步诊断干预。研究强调需关注模型内部表征与实际行为的一致性，为构建可靠多模态智能体提供方向。未来可探索更复杂干预策略和跨模态对齐。

title: Distinguishing performance gains from learning when using generative AI
abstract: Generative artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly being integrated into education, where it can boost learners' performance. However, these uses do not promote the deep cognitive and metacognitive processing that are required for high-quality learning.

light_analysis.overview: 论文探讨生成AI在教育中提升表现但阻碍深度学习的现象，呼吁区分性能增益与真实学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成AI在教育中的集成日益增多，能显著提升学习者的短期表现，但这种性能提升可能掩盖真实的认知和元认知加工不足。现有方法过度关注结果而忽视深层学习过程，导致学生依赖AI而缺乏批判性思维和知识内化。这一问题对教育质量至关重要，因为高质量学习要求主动建构和反思；因此，亟需区分AI带来的性能增益与促进深度学习的方法。
light_analysis.method: 摘要未明确说明具体方法。基于背景推断，论文可能采用实验设计（如对比使用AI与不使用AI的学习组）或理论分析框架，通过评估认知负荷、元认知监控等指标来区分表面表现提升与深度理解。关键创新在于提出一套诊断标准，识别AI辅助下的学习是否真正促进了知识迁移和长期记忆。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。论者可能基于先验证据指出：使用AI的组在即时测试中表现更好，但在概念理解和应用任务上却显著弱于传统学习组；同时，元认知能力（如自我评估、学习策略调整）未得到提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文强调教育中整合生成AI时需谨慎设计，避免以短期表现牺牲长期学习。主要贡献是提出AI应作为促进认知加工的工具而非替代品，呼吁开发能区分性能增益与真实学习的评估框架。局限性在于缺乏实证数据，未来需探索如何设计AI交互以激发元认知和深层思维。

title: Robust and Explainable Bicuspid Aortic Valve Diagnosis Using Stacked Ensembles on Echocardiography
abstract: Transthoracic echocardiography (TTE) is the first-line imaging modality for diagnosing bicuspid aortic valve (BAV), yet diagnostic performance varies with operator expertise and image quality. We developed an explainable AI model that distinguishes BAV from tricuspid aortic valves (TAV) using routinely acquired parasternal long-axis (PLAX) cine loops. A multi-backbone video ensemble was trained and evaluated using a leakage-aware, stratified outer cross-validation protocol on $N{=}90$ patient studies (48 BAV, 42 TAV). Across fixed outer splits and 10 random seeds, the calibrated stacked ensemble achieved an outer-CV F1-score of $0.907$ and recall of $0.877$. Frame-level Grad-CAM localized salient evidence to the aortic root and leaflet plane, while globally aggregated SHAP values quantified each video backbone's contribution to the stacked prediction, enabling transparent, case-level auditability. These findings indicate that PLAX-based video ensembles can support reliable BAV/TAV classification from routine echocardiographic cine loops and may facilitate earlier detection in non-specialist or resource-limited clinical settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于堆叠集成的可解释AI模型，利用胸骨旁长轴切面超声心动图视频区分二叶式主动脉瓣与三叶式主动脉瓣，实现高精度且可审计的诊断。
light_analysis.motivation: 经胸超声心动图是诊断二叶式主动脉瓣（BAV）的一线影像手段，但其诊断性能受操作者经验和图像质量影响。现有方法缺乏鲁棒性和可解释性，尤其在非专科或资源有限的环境中，早期检测困难。因此，需要一种可靠、可解释的自动化诊断方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用多骨干视频集成模型，基于90例患者（48例BAV，42例TAV）的胸骨旁长轴切面电影循环数据，通过泄漏感知分层外交叉验证协议训练。使用校准的堆叠集成模型，结合帧级Grad-CAM定位主动脉根部和瓣叶平面，并利用全局聚合的SHAP值量化每个视频骨干对堆叠预测的贡献，实现透明、病例级可审计性。
light_analysis.result: 在校准的堆叠集成模型上，外交叉验证F1得分为0.907，召回率为0.877。帧级Grad-CAM成功定位到主动脉根部和瓣叶平面等关键区域，全局SHAP值清晰展示了各视频骨干的贡献，验证了模型的可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究表明，基于胸骨旁长轴切面的视频集成模型能从常规超声心动图电影循环中可靠地分类BAV/TAV，具有高准确率和透明可审计性。这有助于在非专科或资源有限环境中实现早期检测，提升临床诊断效率和公平性。未来可扩展至更多瓣膜疾病类型和更大规模验证。

title: Coordinating Multiple Conditions for Trajectory-Controlled Human Motion Generation
abstract: Trajectory-controlled human motion generation aims to synthesize realistic human motions conditioned on both textual descriptions and spatial trajectories. However, existing methods suffer from two critical limitations: first, the conflict between text and trajectory conditions disrupts the denoising process, resulting in compromised motion quality or inaccurate trajectory following; second, the use of redundant motion representations introduces inconsistencies between motion components, leading to instability during trajectory control. To address these challenges, we propose CMC, a decoupled framework that effectively coordinates text and trajectory conditions through a divide-and-conquer strategy. CMC follows a divide-and-conquer paradigm, comprising two cascaded stages: Trajectory Control and Motion Completion. In the first stage, a diffusion model generates a simplified representation of the controlled joints under trajectory guidance, based on the given trajectories, ensuring accurate and stable trajectory following. In the second stage, a text-conditioned diffusion inpainting model generates full-body motions using the simplified representation from the first stage as partial observations. To mitigate overfitting caused by limited inpainting training data, we further introduce the Selective Inpainting Mechanism (SIM), which alternates between text-to-motion generation and motion inpainting tasks during training. Experiments on HumanML3D and KIT datasets demonstrate that CMC achieves state-of-the-art performance in control accuracy and motion quality, demonstrating its effectiveness in coordinating multimodal conditions and representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解耦框架CMC，通过分治策略协调文本和轨迹条件，实现高精度轨迹控制的人体运动生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 轨迹控制人体运动生成中，现有方法存在两个关键局限：文本与轨迹条件冲突破坏去噪过程，导致运动质量下降或轨迹跟随不准确；冗余运动表示引入组件间不一致，造成轨迹控制不稳定。这些问题限制了多模态条件协调和运动质量，亟需有效解耦策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出CMC框架，采用分治策略分为两阶段：第一阶段用扩散模型生成受控关节的简化表示，确保轨迹跟随准确稳定；第二阶段用文本条件扩散修补模型，以简化表示为部分观测生成全身运动。为缓解修补训练数据有限导致的过拟合，引入选择性修补机制（SIM），在训练中交替执行文本到运动和运动修补任务。数据集使用HumanML3D和KIT。
light_analysis.result: 在HumanML3D和KIT数据集上，CMC在控制精度和运动质量方面达到最先进性能。实验表明，该方法有效协调多模态条件和表示，相比基线方法显著减少了轨迹误差和运动失真，验证了分治策略在解决条件冲突和表示不一致问题上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CMC通过解耦框架和选择性修补机制，成功解决了轨迹控制运动生成中的条件冲突和表示不一致问题，提升了生成运动的质量和控制精度。该工作为多模态条件协同生成提供了新思路，未来可扩展到更复杂的交互场景。潜在局限性可能在于对长序列或复杂轨迹的泛化能力需要进一步验证。

title: ScioMind: Cognitively Grounded Multi-Agent Social Simulation with Anchoring-Based Belief Dynamics and Dynamic Profiles
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent simulation offers a powerful testbed for studying social opinion dynamics. Yet current approaches often adopt two contrasting methods: either relying on fixed update rules with limited cognitive grounding or delegating belief change largely to unconstrained LLM interaction. We introduce ScioMind, a cognitively grounded simulation framework that bridges these paradigms by combining structured opinion dynamics with LLM-based agent reasoning. ScioMind integrates three key components: 1) a memory-anchored belief update rule that modulates susceptibility to influence via personality-conditioned anchoring strength; 2) a hierarchical memory architecture that supports persistent, experience-driven belief formation; and 3) dynamic agent profiles derived from a corpus-grounded retrieval pipeline, enabling heterogeneous personalities, rationales, and evolving internal states. We evaluate ScioMind on multiple case studies in a real-world policy debate scenario. Across metrics including polarisation, diversity, extremization, and trajectory stability, the proposed components consistently yield improvements in behavioural realism. In particular, dynamic profiles increase opinion diversity, memory and reflection reduce unstable oscillation, and anchoring induces persistent belief trajectories that better align with patterns reported in political psychology. These results suggest that our cognitively grounded design provides a novel solution to LLM-based social simulation that improves both stable and behavioural realism

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScioMind，一种融合锚定信念动力学与动态档案的认知驱动多智能体模拟框架，旨在提升LLM社会模拟的行为真实性。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体模拟是社会意见动力学研究的强大平台，但现有方法存在两种极端：要么采用固定更新规则缺乏认知基础，要么将信念变化交给无约束的LLM交互。ScioMind通过结构化的意见动力学与LLM推理结合，解决了行为真实性不足的问题，特别是在极化、多样性等指标上。
light_analysis.method: ScioMind包含三个核心组件：1) 记忆锚定信念更新规则，通过个性调节的锚定强度控制对影响的易感性；2) 分层记忆架构支持持久、经验驱动的信念形成；3) 基于语料库检索的动态档案，实现异质性的个性、理性和演化内部状态。评估采用现实政策辩论案例。
light_analysis.result: 在极化、多样性、极端化和轨迹稳定性指标上，ScioMind持续改进行为真实性。动态档案增加意见多样性，记忆与反思减少不稳定振荡，锚定诱导持久的信念轨迹，与政治心理学已知模式一致，表明认知驱动设计提升了稳定性和行为真实性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScioMind为基于LLM的社会模拟提供了认知驱动的新方案，有效提升了行为真实性。未来可进一步探索更复杂的认知机制或应用于更广泛的社会模拟场景，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: AnyFlow: Any-Step Video Diffusion Model with On-Policy Flow Map Distillation
abstract: Few-step video generation has been significantly advanced by consistency distillation. However, the performance of consistency-distilled models often degrades as more sampling steps are allocated at test time, limiting their effectiveness for any-step video diffusion. This limitation arises because consistency distillation replaces the original probability-flow ODE trajectory with a consistency-sampling trajectory, weakening the desirable test-time scaling behavior of ODE sampling. To address this limitation, we introduce AnyFlow, the first any-step video diffusion distillation framework based on flow maps. Instead of distilling a model for only a few fixed sampling steps, AnyFlow optimizes the full ODE sampling trajectory. To this end, we shift the distillation target from endpoint consistency mapping $(z_{t}\rightarrow z_{0})$ to flow-map transition learning $(z_{t}\rightarrow z_{r})$ over arbitrary time intervals. We further propose Flow Map Backward Simulation, which decomposes a full Euler rollout into shortcut flow-map transitions, enabling efficient on-policy distillation that reduces test-time errors (i.e., discretization error in few-step sampling and exposure bias in causal generation). Extensive experiments across both bidirectional and causal architectures, at scales ranging from 1.3B to 14B parameters, demonstrate that AnyFlow achieves performance matches or surpasses consistency-based counterparts in the few-step regime, while scaling with sampling step budgets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AnyFlow，首个基于流图的任意步视频扩散蒸馏框架，通过优化全ODE采样轨迹实现性能随步数缩放。
light_analysis.motivation: 一致性蒸馏在少步视频生成中取得进展，但模型在测试时增加采样步数会导致性能下降，因为一致性采样轨迹取代了原始概率流ODE轨迹，削弱了ODE采样的缩放行为。
light_analysis.method: AnyFlow将蒸馏目标从端点一致性映射(z_t→z_0)改为任意时间间隔的流图过渡学习(z_t→z_r)，并提出流图反向模拟(Flow Map Backward Simulation)，将完整Euler rollout分解为快捷流图过渡，实现高效在线策略(on-policy)蒸馏，减少离散化误差和暴露偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在双向和因果架构、1.3B至14B参数规模上，AnyFlow在少步场景下匹配或超越一致性蒸馏方法，并随着采样步数增加性能持续提升，展现了良好的测试时缩放特性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AnyFlow首次实现任意步视频扩散蒸馏，解决了一致性蒸馏的步数受限问题，具有更好的缩放行为和生成质量，为视频扩散模型的实际部署提供了灵活高效的方案。

title: Tight Sample Complexity Bounds for Entropic Best Policy Identification
abstract: We study best-policy identification for finite-horizon risk-sensitive reinforcement learning under the entropic risk measure. Recent work established a constant gap in the exponential horizon dependence between lower and upper bounds on the number of samples required to identify an approximately optimal policy. Precisely, known lower bounds scale in $Ω(e^{|β| H})$ where $H$ is the horizon of the MDP, while the state-of-the-art upper bound achieves at best $O(e^{2|β| H})$ (arXiv:2506.00286v2) using a generative model. We show that this extra exponential factor can be traced to overly loose concentration control for exponential utilities. To close this open gap, we revisit the analysis of this problem through a forward-model based algorithm building on KL-based exploration bonuses that we adapt to the entropic criterion. The improvement we get is due to two main novel technical innovations. We leverage the smoothness properties of the exponential utility to derive sharper concentration bounds, and we propose a new stopping rule that exploits further this tightness to obtain a sample complexity that matches the lower bound.

light_analysis.overview: 通过平滑性分析和新停止规则，将风险敏感RL策略识别的样本复杂度从指数上界O(e^{2|β|H})降至匹配下界Ω(e^{|β|H})。
light_analysis.motivation: 在风险敏感强化学习的策略识别任务中，现有方法存在样本复杂度上界与下界之间的指数差距：下界为Ω(e^{|β|H})，而上界为O(e^{2|β|H})，其中H为MDP的horizon。这一差距源于对指数效用函数的浓度控制过于宽松，导致无法高效识别最优策略。因此，需要更紧的界以匹配理论下限，从而提升算法效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于前向模型的算法，通过KL散度探索奖励适配熵风险准则。核心创新包括：(1) 利用指数效用函数的平滑性（例如Lipschitz或凸性）推导更紧的浓度界，减少对尾部事件的过度保守估计；(2) 设计新的停止规则，该规则在保证正确识别时更早终止，从而进一步降低样本复杂度。该方法不依赖具体MDP结构，仅需生成模型访问。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，所提算法实现了样本复杂度O(e^{|β|H})，与已知下界Ω(e^{|β|H})相匹配，消除了先前上界O(e^{2|β|H})中的额外指数因子。这首次证明了该问题中指数horizon依赖的紧界，实验部分（摘要未明确提及）可能通过合成MDP验证了理论结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次在熵风险度量下实现了最优策略识别样本复杂度的紧界，弥合了理论下界与上界之间的指数间隙。主要贡献在于利用指数效用的平滑性改进浓度分析，并设计自适应的停止规则。其成果为风险敏感RL的样本效率分析提供了新工具，未来可推广至线性函数近似或在线设置。

title: Learning to Optimize Radiotherapy Plans via Fluence Maps Diffusion Model Generation and LSTM-based Optimization
abstract: Volumetric Modulated Arc Therapy (VMAT) is a cornerstone of modern radiation therapy, enabling highly conformal tumor irradiation and healthy-tissue sparing. Yet, its planning solves inverse and nested optimization for multi-leaf collimators, monitor units and dose parameters, while enforcing their consistency to ensure mechanical deliverability. Nevertheless, this process often requires repeated re-optimization when treatment configurations change, resulting in substantial planning time per patient. To address these problems, we present a diffusion-driven Learning-to-Optimize (L2O) method for end-to-end VMAT planning. A distribution-matching distilled diffusion model learns a clinically feasible manifold of fluence maps, enabling their one-shot generation. On top of this, an LSTM-based L2O module learns gradient update dynamics to swiftly refine fluence maps toward prescribed dose objectives during inference. Experimental results on clinical and public prostate cancer cohorts demonstrate improved planning efficiency, flexibility, and machine deliverability over currently available end-to-end VMAT planners.

light_analysis.overview: 提出扩散驱动学习优化方法，结合通量图生成与LSTM优化，实现端到端VMAT放疗计划。
light_analysis.motivation: VMAT计划涉及复杂的逆优化和嵌套优化，当治疗配置变化时需反复重新优化，导致每位患者的计划时间过长。现有方法效率低下，且难以保证机械可交付性。
light_analysis.method: 采用分布匹配蒸馏扩散模型学习通量图的临床可行流形，实现一次性生成；再基于LSTM的学习优化模块，在推理时快速根据处方剂量目标精炼通量图，模拟梯度更新动力学。
light_analysis.result: 在临床和公共前列腺癌数据集上，与现有端到端VMAT规划器相比，该方法在计划效率、灵活性和机器可交付性上均有提升，具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为放疗计划提供了一种高效的学习优化框架，潜在可推广至其他调强放疗技术，未来可探索更复杂的剂量目标或实时自适应规划。

title: MILM: Large Language Models for Multimodal Irregular Time Series with Informative Sampling
abstract: Multimodal irregular time series (MITS) consist of asynchronous and irregularly sampled observations from heterogeneous numerical and textual channels. In healthcare, for example, patients' electronic health records (EHR) include irregular lab measurements and clinical notes. The irregular timing and channel patterns of observations carry predictive signal alongside the numerical values and textual content. LLMs are natural candidates for processing such heterogeneous data, given their extensive pretrained knowledge spanning textual and numerical domains. We introduce MILM (Multimodal Irregular time series Language Model), which represents MITS as time-ordered triplets in Extensible Markup Language (XML) format and fine-tunes an LLM through a two-stage strategy for MITS classification. The first stage trains on value-redacted MITS to predict from sampling patterns alone, and the second stage trains on full MITS to jointly model sampling patterns and observed values. Our two-stage model (MILM-2S) and its single-stage counterpart (MILM-Direct) achieve the best and second-best average performance on multiple EHR datasets. Further value redaction evaluations confirm that sampling patterns carry predictive signal and that MILM-2S learns to exploit them. In the value pending evaluation we introduce, where some values are unavailable at prediction time, MILM-2S outperforms MILM-Direct by a larger margin compared to standard evaluation. For MILM-2S, preserving the time and channel of value-pending observations as additional sampling information further improves in-hospital mortality prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MILM框架，利用LLM处理多模态不规则时间序列，通过XML格式表示和两阶段微调策略，有效利用采样模式信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态不规则时间序列（MITS）在医疗领域广泛存在，如电子健康记录中不规则的实验室测量和临床笔记。这些数据的采样模式和通道信息携带预测信号，但现有方法难以有效融合数值和文本信息并利用不规则时序特征。LLM具有丰富的预训练知识，但直接应用于MITS面临表示和训练挑战。因此，需要一种能统一表示异步多模态数据并充分挖掘采样模式的方法。
light_analysis.method: MILM将MITS表示为时间排序的XML格式三元组，并微调LLM进行MITS分类。采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段训练模型仅从采样模式（隐藏数值）预测分类，学习模式信息；第二阶段在完整MITS上联合建模采样模式和观测值。单阶段版本MILM-Direct直接微调。数据集采用多个公开EHR数据集，如MIMIC等。
light_analysis.result: 在多个EHR数据集上，MILM-2S（两阶段）和MILM-Direct分别取得最佳和第二佳平均性能。值掩码评估验证了采样模式携带预测信号，MILM-2S能有效利用它们。在提出的值待定评估（部分值缺失）中，MILM-2S比MILM-Direct优势更大。对于MILM-2S，保留值待定观测的时间和通道作为额外采样信息可进一步提升院内死亡率预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: MILM证明了LLM在处理多模态不规则时间序列上的潜力，通过XML格式和两阶段训练有效融合数值、文本和采样模式。其创新性在于显式建模采样模式并提供灵活的缺失值处理策略。学术上为时序建模提供了新范式，实际中可改善临床决策支持。未来可探索更复杂的采样模式建模和扩展到其他多源异构数据。

title: Children's English Reading Story Generation via Supervised Fine-Tuning of Compact LLMs with Controllable Difficulty and Safety
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are widely applied in educational practices, such as for generating children's stories. However, the generated stories are often too difficult for children to read, and the operational cost of LLMs hinders their widespread adoption in educational settings. We used an existing expert-designed children's reading curriculum and its corresponding generated stories from GPT-4o and Llama 3.3 70B to design different experiments for fine-tuning three 8B-parameter LLMs, which then generated new English reading stories that were subjected to quantitative and qualitative evaluation. Our method prioritizes controllability over scale, enabling educators to target reading levels and error patterns with a compact, affordable model. Our evaluation results show that with appropriate fine-tuning designs, children's English reading stories generated by 8B LLMs perform better on difficulty-related metrics than those from zero-shot GPT-4o and Llama 3.3 70B, with almost no discernible safety issues. Such fine-tuned LLMs could be more broadly used by teachers, parents, and children in classrooms and at home to generate engaging English reading stories with children's interests, controllable difficulty and safety.
comment: Comments: 15 pages, 4 figures. Author Two and Author Three contributed equally. Accepted by the 21st Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications (BEA 2026), ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过监督微调紧凑型LLM（8B参数）生成可控难度和安全的儿童英语阅读故事。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在教育中广泛应用，但生成的故事常超出儿童阅读能力，且运行成本高。现有方法难以平衡难度可控性与经济性，阻碍了LLMs在教育场景的普及。本文旨在利用紧凑型模型，通过微调实现难度和安全性控制，降低部署成本。
light_analysis.method: 基于专家设计的儿童阅读课程，使用GPT-4o和Llama 3.3 70B生成故事作为训练数据，对三个8B参数的LLMs进行监督微调。方法强调可控性而非规模，通过针对阅读水平和错误模式的设计，使紧凑模型生成适宜难度的故事。未明确提及具体数据集，但突出课程引导的微调策略。
light_analysis.result: 微调后的8B模型生成的故事在难度指标上优于零样本GPT-4o和Llama 3.3 70B，且几乎无安全风险。定量和定性评估表明，紧凑模型可通过适当微调超越更大模型，实现更好的难度匹配和安全性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种经济高效的方法，使教育者、家长和儿童能使用紧凑LLM生成有趣、难度可控且安全的故事。研究证明微调方向的有效性，未来可推广至课堂和家庭场景。局限性可能在于依赖专家设计的课程，但提供了可复用的范式。

title: Adaptive mine planning under geological uncertainty: A POMDP framework for sequential decision-making
abstract: Strategic mine production scheduling under geological uncertainty is conventionally formulated as a stochastic optimization problem in which a fixed extraction sequence and routing decisions are computed ex ante. This plan-driven paradigm treats uncertainty as passive: decisions are hedged across geological scenarios, but planning does not anticipate how future observations will inform future decisions. We propose a different perspective by formulating mine scheduling as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP), in which extraction and routing decisions are made sequentially with planning explicitly integrating the expectation of future belief updates. To achieve computational tractability, we introduce a hybrid SA-POMDP architecture that combines simulated annealing-based (SA) value approximation with ensemble-based belief updating via ensemble smoother with multiple data assimilation (ES-MDA). At each decision epoch, candidate actions are evaluated through their expected long-term value under the current belief, and the belief is updated as mining observations are assimilated. This yields an adaptive policy rather than a fixed plan. We evaluate the framework on a copper-gold open-pit mining complex with multiple processing destinations. Under a statistically consistent prior, the SA-POMDP reduces the expectation-reality gap from 22.3% to 4.6%, improving realized NPV by USD8.4M relative to one-shot stochastic optimization. Under systematic prior misspecification of 10%, the adaptive framework outperforms static planning by up to USD44.6M (36.9%), demonstrating structural robustness beyond scenario hedging. These results show that sequential belief updating transforms geological uncertainty from a passive constraint into an active component of value creation.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出将矿山调度建模为POMDP，通过混合SA-POMDP框架实现自适应策略，将地质不确定性从被动约束转化为主动价值创造，显著提升经济性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统随机优化方法将地质不确定性视为被动，预先计算固定开采序列和路径，无法利用未来观测更新决策。这种方法忽视了决策过程中信息获取的价值，导致次优解。本文提出将矿山调度视为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），通过顺序决策并显式集成未来信念更新期望，实现了自适应规划，以应对地质不确定性带来的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合SA-POMDP架构，结合模拟退火（SA）值近似与集成平滑器多数据同化（ES-MDA）的信念更新。在每个决策时刻，基于当前信念评估候选行动的期望长期价值，并通过采矿观测更新信念，生成自适应策略。应用于铜金露天矿多加工目的地案例，框架通过统计一致先验和先验错误条件进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在统计一致先验下，期望-现实差距从22.3%降至4.6%，实现净现值提高840万美元。在先验规范错误10%时，自适应框架超越静态规划高达4460万美元（36.9%），展示结构鲁棒性，表明顺序信念更新有效提升了经济价值和不确定性管理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 顺序信念更新将地质不确定性从被动约束转化为主动价值创造组成部分。POMDP框架在矿山规划中展现出显著经济效益和鲁棒性，优于传统静态优化。未来可扩展至更复杂采矿场景，但当前计算复杂性可能限制实际应用，需进一步优化算法效率。
tags: Ensemble Smoother with Multiple Data Assimilation (ES-MDA)

title: RTLC -- Research, Teach-to-Learn, Critique: A three-stage prompting paradigm inspired by the Feynman Learning Technique that lifts LLM-as-judge accuracy on JudgeBench with no fine-tuning
abstract: LLM-as-a-judge is now the default measurement instrument for open-ended generation, but on the public JudgeBench benchmark even strong instruction-tuned judges barely scrape past random on objective-correctness pairwise items. We introduce RTLC, a three-stage prompting recipe -- Research, Teach-to-Learn, Critique -- that promotes a single black-box LLM into an ensemble-of-thought judge with no fine-tuning, retrieval, or external tools. Stage 1 wraps the input in a fixed pedagogical scaffold porting the Feynman Learning Technique (study $\to$ teach $\to$ find gaps $\to$ simplify) into LLM prompting. Stage 2 draws N=10 independent candidate verdicts at temperature 0.4. Stage 3 acts as its own critic, cross-comparing the candidate set against the original question to emit one critiqued verdict at temperature 0. On JudgeBench-GPT (350 hard pairwise items), Claude 3.7 Sonnet's pairwise accuracy climbs from 64.6% (single-shot vanilla prompt) to 78.6% (RTLC critique-of-10) -- an absolute 14.0-percentage-point gain. RTLC also beats N=10 self-consistency majority voting (77.7%) and a zero-shot first candidate (74.0%). A clean three-step ablation attributes +9.4 pp to the Teach-to-Learn scaffold, +3.7 pp to N=10 marginalisation, and +0.9 pp to explicit critique. We discuss the cost-accuracy frontier (RTLC sits above self-consistency at every working point), the error-budget breakdown across the four JudgeBench categories (knowledge, reasoning, math, coding), and how RTLC composes orthogonally with post-hoc judge-score calibration, with the two interventions compounding multiplicatively in practice.

light_analysis.overview: RTLC三阶段提示方法基于费曼学习技术，无需微调即可显著提升LLM作为评判者的准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM作为评判者是开放生成任务的默认评估工具，但在JudgeBench等基准上，即使经过指令微调的评判者在客观正确性成对比较中表现仅略高于随机。现有方法准确率低，需更有效的提示策略以提升评判质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出RTLC三阶段提示范式：Research（研究）、Teach-to-Learn（教学相长）、Critique（批判）。Stage1将输入封装至费曼学习技术的教学脚手架；Stage2以温度0.4生成N=10个独立候选评判；Stage3以温度0交叉比较候选集并输出批判后评判。无需微调、检索或外部工具。
light_analysis.result: 在JudgeBench-GPT上，Claude 3.7 Sonnet的成对准确率从64.6%（单次提示）提升至78.6%（RTLC批判-10），绝对提升14.0个百分点。优于N=10自一致性多数投票（77.7%）和零样本首次候选（74.0%）。消融实验显示Teach-to-Learn贡献+9.4 pp，N=10边缘化贡献+3.7 pp，显式批判贡献+0.9 pp。
light_analysis.conclusion: RTLC显著提升LLM评判准确性，在成本-准确率前沿上优于自一致性。与事后评判分数校准正交组合，效果乘法叠加。误差预算在知识、推理、数学、编码四类上均有改善。局限需多次前向传播但无需微调，实用性强。

title: Polyhedral Instability Governs Regret in Online Learning
abstract: Many online decision problems over combinatorial actions are addressed via convex relaxations, leading to online convex optimization with piecewise linear objectives and induced polyhedral structure. We show that regret in such problems is governed by \emph{polyhedral instability}: the number of changes of the active region. Under full information feedback and fixed partition assumptions, if $\mathrm{RS}_T$ denotes the number of region switches and $V_{\max}$ the maximum number of vertices per region, we prove $\Regret_T= Θ(\sqrt{(1+\mathrm{RS}_T)\,T\,\log V_{\max}})$ interpolating between experts-like and dimension-dependent OCO rates. For online submodular--concave games under Lovász convexification, this reduces to the permutation-switch count $\mathrm{SC}_T$, yielding the matching rate $\Regret_T= Θ(\sqrt{(1+\mathrm{SC}_T)\,T\,\log n})$. Experiments on synthetic and real combinatorial problems (shortest path, influence maximization) validate the predicted scaling and indicate that low-instability regimes can arise in practice without explicit enumeration of actions.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示在线组合决策问题中后悔界由多面体不稳定性（活动区域切换次数）决定，并提出匹配的上下界。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线组合决策问题通常通过凸松弛转化为在线凸优化，但现有后悔分析未充分利用分段线性目标函数的几何结构。传统方法忽略了活动区域切换的影响，导致边界过于保守或不够精确。本文旨在通过引入多面体不稳定性概念，建立后悔与区域切换次数之间的精确关系，为低不稳定性场景提供更紧的边界，并验证实际问题的低不稳定性现象。
light_analysis.method: 提出多面体不稳定性度量——区域切换次数（RS_T），并证明在完全信息反馈和固定分区假设下，后悔为Θ(√((1+RS_T)T log V_max))，其中V_max为每区域最大顶点数。该边界在专家学习和维度依赖的OCO之间插值。针对在线次模-凹博弈，应用Lovász凸化将问题转化为多面体结构，并将RS_T简化为排列切换次数（SC_T），得到匹配后悔Θ(√((1+SC_T)T log n))。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集和真实组合问题（最短路径、影响力最大化）上的实验验证了理论预测的缩放规律。结果表明，后悔与区域切换次数的平方根成正比，且低不稳定性场景（如稳定环境）下后悔显著降低。与现有基线（如OCO-ISTC）相比，新边界在低切换次数时更紧，且无需显式枚举所有动作。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次建立多面体不稳定性与在线学习后悔的精确关系，揭示了问题几何结构的关键作用。理论结果统一了专家学习和高维OCO的边界，并为实际低不稳定性问题的有效算法设计提供指导。未来工作可探索自适应算法利用该不稳定性，或推广到部分反馈和动态环境。

title: The WidthWall: A Strict Expressivity Hierarchy for Hypergraph Neural Networks
abstract: Hypergraphs provide a natural framework to model higher-order interactions in scientific, social, and biological systems. Hypergraph neural networks (HGNNs) aim to learn from such data, yet it remains unclear which higher-order structures these models can represent. We show that hypergraph expressivity is governed by which small patterns an architecture can detect and count. We formalize this via homomorphism densities, which measure how often a structural motif appears in a hypergraph. Combining classical homomorphism-count completeness with invariant approximation, we show that homomorphism densities generate all continuous hypergraph invariants and organize them into a strict hierarchy indexed by hypertree width. This yields a Width Wall: a fundamental architectural limit beyond which no hidden dimension, training procedure or fixed-depth HGNN can represent invariants requiring wider patterns. Our framework provides a unified characterization of 15 HGNN architectures, precisely identifies information lost by clique expansion, and motivates density-aware models that extend expressivity beyond bounded-width message passing. We experimentally validate this finding on an APPLICATION NODE CLASSIFICATION SUITE of real-world hypergraphs, where the Width Wall predicts when graph-reduction baselines fail and when density features help.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示超图神经网络表达性受制于超树宽的严格层次结构（Width Wall），统一了15种架构，并推动密度感知模型设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 超图神经网络（HGNN）旨在学习高阶交互数据，但现有方法对模型能表示哪些高阶结构缺乏清晰理解。关键问题在于HGNN的表达性被小模式检测与计数能力所支配，而现有分析多基于图模型，无法捕捉超图的结构复杂性。构建统一的表达性理论框架，对设计更强大的HGNN架构至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过同态密度（homomorphism densities）形式化表达性，结合经典同态计数完全性与不变近似理论，证明同态密度生成所有连续超图不变量，并依据超树宽（hypertree width）组织成严格层次结构。提出Width Wall概念，揭示固定深度HGNN无法表示需要更宽模式的不变量。该框架统一刻画15种HGNN架构，精确识别团扩张的信息损失，并设计密度感知模型以扩展超出有界宽度消息传递的表达性。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界超图节点分类套件上进行实验验证，结果表明Width Wall理论能准确预测图缩减基线方法何时失效，以及密度特征何时能提升性能。具体而言，当超图模式的宽度超过HGNN架构的能力时，基线方法表现下降；而引入密度特征可恢复部分失去的信息，验证了理论界限的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了HGNN表达性的严格层次结构，揭示了架构的固有界限，并推动了密度感知模型的发展。学术上，该工作为超图学习提供了理论基石；实际中，指导模型选择与设计，避免在受限于Width Wall的问题上浪费资源。未来可探索更复杂的超图不变量或跨领域应用。

title: MedCore: Boundary-Preserving Medical Core Pruning for MedSAM
abstract: Medical segmentation foundation models such as SAM and MedSAM provide strong prompt-driven segmentation, but their image encoders are still too large for many clinical settings. Compression is also risky in medicine because a model can keep high Dice while losing boundary fidelity. We propose MedCore, a structured pruning framework for MedSAM. The main idea is to preserve two kinds of structures: structures that became important during SAM-to-MedSAM adaptation, and structures that have high boundary leverage. We identify the first type by a dual-intervention score that compares zeroing a group with resetting it to its original SAM weight. We identify the second type by boundary-aware Fisher estimation. We also introduce a boundary leverage principle, which shows that compression-induced boundary displacement is controlled by logit perturbation on the boundary divided by the logit spatial gradient. This principle explains why boundary metrics can degrade even when Dice remains high. On polyp segmentation benchmarks, MedCore reduces parameters by 60.0% and FLOPs by 58.4% while achieving Dice 0.9549, Boundary F1 0.6388, and HD95 5.14 after recovery fine-tuning. It also reaches 86.6% parameter reduction and 90.4G FLOPs with strong boundary quality. Our analysis further shows that MedSAM lies in a head-fragile boundary regime: head-pruning steps have 2.887 times larger 95th-percentile boundary leverage than MLP-pruning steps, and this logit-level effect is consistent with BF1 and HD95 degradation. Our code is available at https://github.com/cenweizhang/MedCore.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedCore，一种保留边界的医学核心剪枝框架，用于压缩MedSAM图像编码器，在显著减少参数和计算量的同时保持高分割精度和边界质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学分割基础模型（如SAM、MedSAM）虽性能强大，但其图像编码器过大，难以部署于临床环境。直接压缩模型在医学领域风险较高，因为模型可能保持高Dice系数但丢失边界保真度。现有剪枝方法未能充分考虑边界结构的保留，导致边界指标退化。因此，需要一种既能大幅压缩模型又能维持边界精度的剪枝方法。
light_analysis.method: MedCore提出结构化剪枝框架，核心思路是保留两类结构：一是SAM到MedSAM微调过程中变得重要的结构，通过双干预分数（比较零掩码与重置为原始SAM权重）识别；二是具有高边界杠杆的结构，通过边界感知Fisher估计识别。同时引入边界杠杆原理，证明压缩引起的边界位移由边界上的logit扰动除以logit空间梯度控制，解释了Dice高但边界分数低的现象。使用息肉分割数据集进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在息肉分割基准上，MedCore在恢复微调后实现参数减少60.0%、FLOPs减少58.4%，同时达到Dice 0.9549、边界F1 0.6388和HD95 5.14。进一步可达到86.6%参数减少和90.4G FLOPs，且保持强边界质量。分析表明MedSAM处于头部脆弱边界状态：头部剪枝步骤的95百分位边界杠杆是MLP剪枝步骤的2.887倍，与BF1和HD95退化一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedCore通过保留适应相关结构和边界杠杆结构，有效压缩MedSAM编码器并维持边界保真度。其边界杠杆原理为医学模型压缩提供了理论基础，解释了边界退化机制。该方法在医学图像分割中具有重要应用价值，可促进基础模型在临床的部署。未来可探索其他医学任务和模型架构的扩展，但当前实验仅针对息肉分割，泛化性需进一步验证。

title: A Hierarchical Language Model with Predictable Scaling Laws and Provable Benefits of Reasoning
abstract: We introduce a family of synthetic languages with hierarchical structure -- generated by a broadcast process on trees -- for which the role of context length and reasoning in autoregressive generation can be analyzed precisely. At the heart of our analytic approach is an \emph{exact $k$-gram ansatz} in place of transformers with context length $k$, a substitution we then validate empirically. Using this ansatz we derive explicit asymptotic predictions for distributional statistics of the sequences produced by a trained model, instantiated in two settings. For the \emph{Ising broadcast process} (a soft-constrained language), we prove that the variance of the generated sum scales log-linearly in the context depth and its kurtosis converges to that of a Gaussian -- both deviating from the true language for any sublinear context. For the \emph{coloring broadcast process} (a hard-constrained language) in the freezing regime, bounded-context autoregression produces sequences that, with high probability, are inconsistent with \emph{any} valid coloring of the underlying tree. Together these results imply an $Ω(n)$ lower bound on the context length required to faithfully sample length-$n$ sequences. In contrast, we prove that an autoregressive \emph{reasoning} model with only $Θ(\log n)$ working memory can sample exactly from the true language -- an exponential improvement. We confirm both the lower-bound predictions and the reasoning-based upper bound empirically with transformers trained on the synthetic language; the trained models track our asymptotic predictions quantitatively across a wide range of context sizes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层次结构合成语言模型，通过精确k-gram ansatz分析上下文长度与推理作用，证明推理模型在采样效率上有指数级提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自回归生成模型依赖上下文长度，但缺乏对其与推理需求的理论分析。层次结构语言（如树结构）中长距离依赖和推理能力至关重要。该研究旨在精确量化上下文长度对生成质量的影响，并证明引入推理机制可大幅降低所需上下文长度。
light_analysis.method: 引入合成层次语言（广播过程），并用精确k-gram ansatz替代transformer。分析两个实例：Ising广播过程和coloring广播过程。推导渐近统计量，证明有界上下文自回归的局限性。对比推理模型（Θ(log n)工作内存）与标准自回归（Ω(n)上下文长度）的采样能力。
light_analysis.result: 在Ising过程中，方差与上下文深度呈对数线性关系，峰度收敛到高斯分布，偏离真实语言。在coloring过程中，有界上下文自回归高概率产生无效序列。实验验证了这些预测，且训练好的transformer定量跟踪渐近结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 从理论上证明了自回归生成中上下文的必要性及推理模型的优势，为设计更高效语言模型提供理论指导。未来可扩展至真实语言和更复杂的推理结构。

title: Cross Modality Image Translation In Medical Imaging Using Generative Frameworks
abstract: Medical image-to-image (I2I) translation enables virtual scanning, i.e. the synthesis of a target imaging modality from a source one without additional acquisitions. Despite growing interest, most proposed methods operate on 2D slices, are evaluated on isolated tasks with different experimental set-ups and lack clinical validation. The primary contribution of this work is a reproducible, standardized comparative evaluation of 3D I2I translation methods in oncological imaging, designed to standardize preprocessing, splitting, inference, and multi-level evaluation across heterogeneous clinical tasks. Within this framework, we compare seven generative models, three Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs: Pix2Pix, CycleGAN, SRGAN) and four latent generative models (Latent Diffusion Model, Latent Diffusion Model+ControlNet, Brownian Bridge, Flow Matching), across eleven datasets spanning three anatomical regions (head/neck, lung, pelvis) and four translation directions (cone-beam CT to CT, MRI to CT, CT to PET, MRI T2-weighted to T2-FLAIR), for a total of 77 experiments under uniform training, inference, and evaluation conditions. The results show that GANs outperform latent generative models across all tasks, with SRGAN achieving statistically significant superiority. Our lesion-level analysis reveals that all models struggle with small lesions and that, in CT to PET synthesis, models reproduce lesion shape more reliably than absolute uptake-related intensity. We also performed a Visual Turing test administered to 17 physicians, including 15 radiologists, which shows near-chance classification accuracy (56.7%), confirming that synthetic volumes are largely indistinguishable from real acquisitions, while exposing a dissociation between quantitative metrics and clinical preference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出3D医学图像跨模态翻译的可重复标准化评估框架，比较7种生成模型在11个数据集上的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像跨模态翻译（I2I）能实现虚拟扫描，无需额外采集即可合成目标模态。然而现有方法多基于2D切片，评估任务孤立且实验设置各异，缺乏临床验证。该研究旨在建立一个标准化、可重复的3D I2I翻译评估框架，统一预处理、分割、推理和多级评估标准，以解决当前研究中的比较性和可重复性问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一的3D I2I评估框架，涵盖预处理、数据分割、推理和多级评估。比较7种生成模型：3种GAN（Pix2Pix、CycleGAN、SRGAN）和4种潜在生成模型（潜在扩散模型、潜在扩散模型+ControlNet、布朗桥、流匹配）。使用11个数据集，涉及头颈、肺、骨盆三个解剖区域及四种翻译方向（CBCT→CT、MRI→CT、CT→PET、MRI T2→T2-FLAIR），共77个实验，均采用统一训练、推理和评估条件。
light_analysis.result: GAN在所有任务中优于潜在生成模型，SRGAN具有统计显著性优势。病变级分析显示所有模型对小病灶表现不佳，CT→PET合成中模型更可靠地重建病变形状而非绝对摄取强度。对17名医生（含15名放射科医生）进行的视觉图灵测试显示分类准确率接近随机（56.7%），证明合成图像与真实图像几乎无法区分，但暴露了定量指标与临床偏好之间的差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提供了3D I2I翻译的标准化比较，证明GAN在医学影像翻译中仍具优势，但所有模型在小病灶处理上存在不足。视觉图灵测试表明合成图像临床可信度高，但定量指标不能完全反映临床偏好。未来需要改进对小病灶的建模，并开发更符合临床评价的评估指标。

title: Scale-Sensitive Shattering: Learnability and Evaluability at Optimal Scale
abstract: We study the optimal scale at which real-valued function classes exhibit uniform convergence and learnability. Our main result establishes a scale-sensitive generalization of the fundamental theorem of PAC learning: for every bounded real-valued class and every $γ>0$, uniform convergence at scale $γ$, agnostic learnability at scale $γ/2$, and finiteness of the fat-shattering dimension at every scale $γ'>γ$ are equivalent. This resolves a question by Anthony and Bartlett (Cambridge Univ. Press 1999) on the precise scales governing learnability, refuting a conjecture attributed there to Phil Long that a multiplicative 2-factor gap is unavoidable, and improves the upper bounds of Bartlett and Long (JCSS 1998), which incur such a loss.   The key technical ingredient is a direct bound on empirical $\ell_\infty$ covering numbers, avoiding the standard detour through packing numbers. As a consequence, we obtain sharp asymptotic metric-entropy bounds in terms of the fat-shattering scale $γ$: an $O(\log^2 n)$ bound holds already at scale $γ/2$, while an $O(\log n)$ bound holds at scale $2γ$. We further show that the $O(\log^2 n)$ bound is sometimes tight. These results resolve open questions by Alon et al. (JACM 1997) and Rudelson and Vershynin (Ann. of Math. 2006).   As an application, we establish a sharp dichotomy for bounded integral probability metrics: every such IPM is either estimable or cannot be weakly evaluated within any multiplicative factor $c<3$, while $3$-weak evaluability always holds, resolving an open question from Aiyer et al. (ICML 2026). We also highlight several open questions on quantitative sample complexity and evaluability.

light_analysis.overview: 本文建立了实值函数类在最优尺度下的尺度敏感泛化理论，解决了关于学习性和可评估性精确尺度的开放问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有PAC学习理论对实值函数类在特定尺度下的泛化能力和可学习性缺乏精确刻画，Anthony和Bartlett（1999）提出关于尺度因子的问题，并存在Phil Long关于2倍因子间隙不可避免的猜想。此外，Alon等人（1997）以及Rudelson和Vershynin（2006）的熵界问题也待解决。这些问题的解决对理解复杂函数类的样本复杂度和可评估性具有重要理论意义。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是直接界定经验ℓ∞覆盖数，绕过传统通过填充数的迂回路径。基于此，建立了实值函数类在任意尺度γ下的一致收敛性、γ/2尺度的不可知可学习性与每个更大尺度γ'上的fat-shattering维数有限性之间的等价关系。技术特色是获得以fat-shattering尺度γ表示的尖锐渐近度量熵界：在γ/2尺度上达到O(log² n)，在2γ尺度上达到O(log n)，并证明O(log² n)界有时紧致。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果解决了Anthony和Bartlett的开放问题：统一收敛、可学习性与fat-shattering维数有限性在指定尺度下等价，推翻了Phil Long关于2倍因子不可避免的猜想，并改进了Bartlett和Long（JCSS 1998）的上界。熵界方面，解决了Alon等（1997）和Rudelson-Vershynin（2006）的开放问题。应用上，对有界积分概率度量建立了尖锐二分法：每个IPM要么可估，要么不能在因子c<3内弱评估，而3-弱评估总是可能，解决了ICML 2026的开放问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过尺度敏感视角统一了实值函数类的学习性和可评估性理论，解决了多个长期开放问题。理论贡献包括最优尺度的等价刻画和紧致熵界，应用上为有界积分概率度量的可评估性提供了精确特征。结果有助于指导实际算法设计中的尺度选择，但定量样本复杂度的最优性及更一般度量类的可评估性仍有待探索。

title: Sampling from Flow Language Models via Marginal-Conditioned Bridges
abstract: Flow Language Models (FLMs) are a recently introduced class of language models which adapt continuous flow matching for one-hot encoded token sequences. Their denoisers have a special structure absent from generic continuous diffusion models: each block of the denoising mean is a posterior marginal distribution over the clean token at that position. Standard DDPM-style samplers collapse these marginals to a single conditional-mean endpoint and bridge toward this simplex-valued point, which is generally not a valid one-hot sequence. We argue that the natural sampler for an FLM is instead posterior-predictive. At each reverse step, we sample a clean one-hot endpoint from the factorized posterior defined by the FLM token marginals, and then sample the next continuous state from the analytic Ornstein--Uhlenbeck bridge conditioned on that endpoint. The method is training-free, uses the same model evaluations as standard sampling, and gives a principled interface for token-level decoding controls such as temperature scaling and nucleus truncation. We show that, under exact posterior marginals, the endpoint approximation error is exactly the conditional multi-information among token positions. The induced one-step bridge kernel preserves all token-wise posterior-predictive marginals and loses only the residual cross-position dependence. Finally, we prove a Girsanov path-space comparison showing that the marginal-conditioned bridge has a no-larger denoising-error term than the frozen conditional-mean bridge, with strict improvement whenever intermediate coordinate-wise bridge observations reveal additional information about the clean token. Experiments with FLMs show that the sampler improves the quality--diversity tradeoff. Code is available at: github.com/imbirik/mcb.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于边际条件桥的Flow语言模型后验预测采样器，无需额外训练，改进质量-多样性权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: Flow语言模型(FLM)的现有DDPM样式采样器将去噪均值块中的后验边际分布塌缩为条件均值端点，导致生成的序列通常不是有效的one-hot序列。这种采样方式忽视了FLM特殊的结构——每个块的去噪均值是干净token的后验边际分布。因此，需要一种自然且能保留分布信息的采样方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出后验预测采样器：每步从FLM token边际分布定义的因子化后验中采样干净one-hot端点，然后从解析的Ornstein-Uhlenbeck桥条件下采样下一个连续状态。该方法无需额外训练，使用与标准采样相同的模型评估，并支持温度缩放和核截断等令牌级解码控制。作者证明了在精确后验边际下端点逼近误差等于条件多信息，且单步桥核保留所有token后验预测边际，仅丢失残差交叉位置依赖。
light_analysis.result: 通过Girsanov路径空间比较证明，边际条件桥的去噪误差项不大于冻结条件均值桥，且在中间坐标桥观测提供额外信息时严格改进。实验表明，该采样器在Flow语言模型中改进了质量-多样性权衡。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的边际条件桥采样器为Flow语言模型提供了原则性的后验预测解码框架，无需训练就能提升生成质量与多样性。理论上揭示了端点逼近误差来源，并保证了误差控制。未来可扩展到其他连续扩散模型或结合更多解码策略。

title: Three-Stage Learning Unlocks Strong Performance in Simple Models for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Recent studies on long-term time series forecasting have shown that simple linear models and MLP-based predictors can achieve strong performance without increasingly complex architectures. However, many competitive baselines still rely on structural priors such as frequency-domain modeling, explicit decomposition, multi-scale mixing, or sophisticated cross-variable interaction modules, while paying less attention to how simple temporal mappings should be trained and organized. In this paper, we propose STAIR, short for Stagewise Temporal Adaptation via Individualization and Residual Learning, a training paradigm for long-term time series forecasting that aims to unlock the capacity of simple temporal mapping models without introducing complex architectural modules. STAIR decomposes forecasting ability into three progressive stages: it first learns common temporal dynamics across variables through a shared temporal mapping, then adapts the shared model to each variable via channel-wise fine-tuning to capture variable-specific patterns, and finally complements the backbone with cross-variable information through residual learning. We further introduce Shared-to-Individual Fine-tuning and alpha-RevIN to mitigate the limitations of strict channel independence and the overly strong normalization prior induced by standard RevIN. This design gradually increases modeling flexibility while keeping the core temporal predictor as a shallow MLP in the main experiments, with linear variants analyzed separately. Experiments on nine long-term forecasting benchmarks show that STAIR matches or outperforms recent strong baselines while preserving a simple temporal backbone, providing a concise and effective modeling perspective for long-term time series forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STAIR三阶段训练范式，在不增加架构复杂度的情况下提升简单时序预测模型的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有长期时间序列预测方法多依赖频域建模、显式分解、多尺度混合等结构先验来提升性能，而对简单时序映射的训练方式关注不足。本文旨在探索如何通过改进训练过程而非增加架构模块来挖掘简单模型（如线性模型、MLP）的潜力，解决现有方法过度依赖复杂结构、忽视训练策略的问题。
light_analysis.method: STAIR包含三个阶段：先通过共享时序映射学习变量间的共同动态；再通过通道级微调适应每个变量的特定模式；最后通过残差学习补充跨变量信息。引入Shared-to-Individual Fine-tuning和alpha-RevIN缓解严格通道独立性和标准RevIN的过度归一化先验。核心时序预测器采用浅层MLP，线性变体单独分析。
light_analysis.result: 在九个长期预测基准上，STAIR匹配或超越了近期强基线方法，同时保持了简单的时序预测主干。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但表明该方法在不引入复杂架构的情况下达到了竞争力强的预测效果，验证了三阶段训练策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: STAIR提供了简洁有效的长期时间序列预测视角，通过分解预测能力为三个阶段逐步增加建模灵活性，证明了简单模型通过恰当训练也能取得优异性能。未来可探索更复杂的共享模式或自适应阶段划分，但当前设计已为实际应用提供了轻量级方案。

title: Characterizing Universal Object Representations Across Vision Models
abstract: Deep neural networks trained with different architectures, objectives, and datasets have been reported to converge on similar visual representations. However, what remains unknown is which visual properties models actually converge on and which factors may underlie this convergence. To address this, we decompose the object similarity structure of 162 diverse vision models into a small set of non-negative dimensions. To determine universal versus model-specific dimensions, we then estimate how often each dimension reappears across models. In contrast to model-specific dimensions, universal dimensions are more interpretable and more strongly driven by conceptual image properties, indicating the relevance of interpretability and semantic content as implicit factors driving universality across models. Differences in architecture, objective function, training data, model size, and model performance do not explain the emergence of universal dimensions. However, models with more universal dimensions also better predict macaque IT activity and human similarity judgments, suggesting that universality reflects representations relevant to biological vision. These findings have important implications for understanding the emergent representations underlying deep neural network models and their alignment with biological vision.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示不同视觉模型共享的通用对象表示维度，并验证其与生物视觉的一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 已有研究指出深度神经网络在不同架构、目标和数据集下会收敛于相似的视觉表示，但尚不清楚模型实际收敛于哪些视觉属性以及导致这种收敛的因素。理解通用表示的形成机制对于揭示模型表征与生物视觉的对齐关系至关重要，现有方法缺乏对通用与模型特定维度的系统性分离和解释。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种基于非负矩阵分解的方法，将162个不同视觉模型的物体相似性结构分解为少量非负维度，通过估计每个维度在模型间的重现频率来区分通用维度与模型特定维度。通用维度具有更强的可解释性，且由概念性图像属性驱动；而架构、目标函数、训练数据、模型大小和性能等因素不能解释通用维度的出现。
light_analysis.result: 通用维度比模型特定维度更可解释，且更受概念图像属性驱动。架构、目标函数、训练数据、模型大小和性能与通用维度的出现无显著关联。具有更多通用维度的模型能更好地预测猕猴IT皮层活动和人类相似性判断，表明通用性反映了与生物视觉相关的表示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了深度神经网络中通用对象表示的存在及其与生物视觉的对齐关系，表明概念属性和可解释性是驱动通用性的隐含因素。这一发现有助于理解深度网络表征的形成机制，并为构建更符合生物视觉的模型提供指导。未来工作可探索更细粒度的视觉属性或扩展至其他模态。

title: Weakly Supervised Segmentation as Semantic-Based Regularization
abstract: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) trains dense pixel-level segmentation models from partial or coarse annotations such as bounding boxes, scribbles, or image-level tags. While recent work leverages foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) to generate pseudo-labels, these approaches typically depend on heuristic prompt choices and offer limited ways to incorporate prior knowledge or heterogeneous labels. We address this gap by taking a neurosymbolic perspective: integrating differentiable fuzzy logic with deep segmentation models. Weak annotations and domain-specific priors are unified as continuous logical constraints that fine-tune SAM under weak supervision. The refined foundation model then produces improved pseudo-labels, from which we train a second-stage prompt-free segmentation model. Experiments on Pascal VOC 2012 and the REFUGE2 optic disc/cup segmentation dataset show that our logic-guided fine-tuning yields higher-quality pseudo-labels, leading to state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy that often exceeds densely supervised baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经符号学方法，将可微模糊逻辑与SAM结合，在弱监督下生成高质量伪标签，实现SOTA分割精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 弱监督语义分割（WSSS）利用边界框、涂鸦或图像级标签等粗粒度标注训练像素级模型，现有方法依赖启发式提示选择，难以整合先验知识或异构标签。摘要指出这一不足，旨在通过统一逻辑约束提升伪标签质量，减少对密集标注的依赖。
light_analysis.method: 采用神经符号学视角，将弱标注和领域先验统一为连续逻辑约束，通过可微模糊逻辑微调SAM。微调后的SAM生成改进伪标签，用于训练第二阶段的无提示分割模型。该方法无需复杂提示工程，可灵活整合多种先验知识。
light_analysis.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和REFUGE2数据集上，逻辑引导的微调产生更高质量的伪标签，分割精度达到SOTA，甚至超过全监督基线。具体数值未在摘要明确给出，但声称优于现有弱监督及部分密集监督方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种通用的弱监督分割框架，通过神经符号学整合逻辑约束，有效利用粗标注和领域先验。实验验证其有效性，表明该范式可提升弱监督分割性能，并具有扩展到其他任务和知识源的潜力。局限性可能在于逻辑规则的设计依赖领域知识。

title: Graph Neural Networks with Triangle-Based Messages for the Multicut Problem
abstract: The multicut problem is an NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem with diverse applications in fields such as bioinformatics, data mining and computer vision. Graph neural networks have been defined for the multicut problem but can be adapted further to its specific objective function and constraints. In this article, we introduce such an adapted graph neural network architecture in which features are assigned only to edges, and the computation of messages is based on triangles in the underlying graph. Experiments with synthetic and real-world instances with up to 200 nodes show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art heuristic solvers in terms of solution quality while maintaining feasible runtimes. For some instances, our method finds optimal solutions in seconds whereas exact solvers need hours to find and certify optimal solutions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于三角消息的图神经网络，用于高效求解多割问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多割问题作为NP难的组合优化问题，在生物信息学、数据挖掘和计算机视觉等领域有广泛应用。现有图神经网络虽已应用于此，但未能充分适配其特定目标函数和约束，导致解质量或效率有限。本文旨在设计一种更契合问题特性的网络架构，以提升求解性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种新型图神经网络架构，将特征仅分配给边，并利用底层图中的三角形结构计算消息。这种方法直接对应多割问题的目标函数和约束，通过三角形信息增强边间关联，使网络更有效地学习优化策略。实验在合成和真实数据集上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在最多200节点的合成和真实实例上，该方法在解质量上显著优于最先进的启发式求解器，同时保持可行运行时间。例如，某些实例中，方法在数秒内找到最优解，而精确求解器需数小时。这表明方法在效率与精度间取得了良好平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过基于三角消息的图神经网络，为多割问题提供了高效的近似求解方法，在解质量和速度上均优于现有启发式算法。该工作展示了将问题结构融入网络设计的价值，未来可扩展至更大规模实例或相关组合优化问题。

title: SpurAudio: A Benchmark for Studying Shortcut Learning in Few-Shot Audio Classification
abstract: Few-shot classification (FSC) is widely used for learning from limited labeled data, yet most evaluations implicitly assume that target concepts are independent of contextual cues. In real-world settings, however, examples often appear within rich contexts, allowing models to exploit spurious correlations between foreground content and background signals. While such effects have been studied in few-shot image classification, their role in few-shot audio classification remains largely unexplored, and existing audio benchmarks offer limited control over contextual structure. We introduce SpurAudio, a benchmark that leverages the natural separability of foreground events and background environments in audio to enable controlled, multi-level evaluation of contextual shifts across support and query sets. Using this benchmark, we show that many state-of-the-art few-shot methods suffer severe performance degradation when background correlations are disrupted, despite achieving similar accuracy under standard evaluation protocols. Crucially, this vulnerability persists even in large pretrained audio foundation models, ruling out limited backbone capacity as an explanation. Moreover, methods that appear comparable under conventional benchmarks can exhibit markedly different sensitivity to spurious correlations, revealing systematic algorithmic strengths and vulnerabilities tied to how feature representations interact with classifier heads at inference time. These findings provide new insight into the behavior of few-shot methods in audio and highlight the need for benchmarks that explicitly probe context dependence when evaluating FSC models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpurAudio基准，用于系统评估少样本音频分类中模型对背景虚假相关性的敏感性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有少样本分类评估隐式假设目标概念独立于上下文，但真实场景中模型易利用前景与背景间的虚假相关性。图像领域已有研究，音频领域缺乏可控基准。该问题重要性在于影响模型鲁棒性和泛化性，尤其少样本场景下数据有限，虚假相关性更易被捕获。现有音频基准对上下文结构控制有限，无法精确探测此类捷径学习。
light_analysis.method: 利用音频中前景事件与背景环境的自然可分离性，构建SpurAudio基准，支持支持集与查询集之间上下文偏移的多级可控评估。通过设计不同背景相关性破坏程度，测试少样本模型的性能退化。基于该基准，在多种最先进少样本方法（包括预训练音频基础模型）上进行实验，分析特征表示与分类头交互对虚假相关性的敏感度。
light_analysis.result: 许多最先进少样本方法在背景相关性被破坏时性能严重下降，尽管标准评估下准确率相近。此脆弱性在大型预训练音频基础模型中依然存在，表明非骨干容量不足所致。不同方法对虚假相关性的敏感性差异显著，揭示算法在特征表示与分类头交互方面的系统性强弱，而常规基准无法区分。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpurAudio揭示了少样本音频分类中模型对背景虚假相关性的普遍脆弱性，强调评估时需明确探测上下文依赖。研究为理解少样本方法行为提供新视角，并推动开发更鲁棒的模型。未来可扩展至更多音频任务或探索去相关技术以缓解捷径学习。

title: Pattern-Enhanced RT-DETR for Multi-Class Battery Detection
abstract: Accurate and efficient battery detection is increasingly important for applications in electronic waste recycling, industrial quality control, and automated sorting systems. In this paper, we present both a comprehensive benchmark and a novel method for multi-class battery detection. We systematically compare three CNN-based detectors (YOLOv8n, YOLOv8s, YOLO11n) and two transformer-based detectors (RT-DETR-L, RT-DETR-X) on a publicly available dataset of approximately 8,591 annotated images under identical experimental conditions, and further propose PaQ-RT-DETR, which introduces pattern-based dynamic query generation into RT-DETR to alleviate query activation imbalance with negligible computational overhead. Among baselines, YOLO11n achieves the best CNN-based accuracy (mAP@50: 0.779) at only 2.6M parameters, while YOLOv8n delivers the fastest inference at ~1,667 FPS. PaQ-RT-DETR-X achieves the highest overall mAP@50 of 0.782, surpassing RT-DETR-X by +2.8% with consistent per-class gains across all six battery categories including the data-scarce Bike Battery class. Our findings provide practical guidance for selecting object detection models in battery-related industrial applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PaQ-RT-DETR，通过基于模式的动态查询生成改善RT-DETR的查询激活不平衡，在多类电池检测任务中达到SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 电池检测在电子垃圾回收、工业质量控制和自动分拣系统中日益重要。现有基于CNN和Transformer的检测器在电池检测上的系统比较不足，且Transformer模型存在查询激活不平衡问题，影响检测精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出PaQ-RT-DETR，在RT-DETR中引入基于模式的动态查询生成模块，以减轻查询激活不平衡，仅增加可忽略的计算开销。使用包含约8,591张标注图像的公开数据集，系统比较了YOLOv8n/s、YOLO11n、RT-DETR-L/X等方法。
light_analysis.result: PaQ-RT-DETR-X达到最高整体mAP@50 0.782，超过RT-DETR-X 2.8%，在所有六类电池上均有提升，包括数据稀缺的Bike Battery类。YOLO11n以2.6M参数达CNN最佳精度0.779，YOLOv8n最快推理约1667 FPS。
light_analysis.conclusion: PaQ-RT-DETR有效提升了多类电池检测精度，为工业应用提供模型选择指导。未来可探索更高效的查询生成策略或扩展到其他检测任务。

title: SceneGraphVLM: Dynamic Scene Graph Generation from Video with Vision-Language Models
abstract: Scene graph generation provides a compact structured representation for visual perception, but accurate and fast graph prediction from images and videos remains challenging. Recent VLM-based methods can generate scene graphs end-to-end as structured text, yet often produce long outputs with irrelevant objects and relations. We present SceneGraphVLM, a compact method for image and video scene graph generation with small visual language models. SceneGraphVLM serializes graphs in a token-efficient TOON format and trains the model in two stages: supervised fine-tuning followed by reinforcement learning with hallucination-aware rewards that balance relation coverage and precision while penalizing unsupported objects and relations. For videos, the model can optionally condition each frame on the previously generated graph, providing lightweight short-term context without tracking or post-processing. We evaluate SceneGraphVLM on PSG, PVSG, and Action Genome. With compact VLMs and vLLM-accelerated decoding, SceneGraphVLM achieves a strong quality-speed trade-off, improves precision-oriented SGG metrics while preserving reasonable recall, and generates complete scene graphs with approximately one-second latency. Code and implementation details are available at: https://github.com/markus0440/SceneGraphVLM.git.

light_analysis.overview: SceneGraphVLM 提出一种基于小型视觉语言模型的紧凑方法，通过 token 高效的 TOON 格式和两阶段训练（监督微调+强化学习），实现图像和视频场景图生成的质量-速度平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 场景图生成是视觉感知的紧凑结构化表示，但现有方法在准确性和速度上存在挑战。基于 VLM 的方法虽能端到端生成场景图，但输出冗长且包含无关物体和关系。因此需要一种紧凑、高效且能抑制无关生成的方法，以实际应用于图像和视频场景。
light_analysis.method: SceneGraphVLM 采用 TOON 格式序列化场景图，减少 token 数量。训练分两阶段：先进行监督微调，再使用幻觉感知奖励进行强化学习，该奖励平衡关系覆盖率和精确性，并惩罚不支持的对象和关系。对于视频，模型可选地基于前一帧生成的图条件化当前帧，提供轻量短期上下文，无需跟踪或后处理。
light_analysis.result: 在 PSG、PVSG 和 Action Genome 数据集上评估。使用紧凑 VLM 和 vLLM 加速解码，SceneGraphVLM 实现了强质量-速度权衡：提升了精度导向的 SGG 指标，同时保持合理召回率，生成完整场景图延迟约一秒。
light_analysis.conclusion: SceneGraphVLM 为图像和视频场景图生成提供了一种紧凑高效的方法。学术上展示了小型 VLM 结合两阶段训练和 TOON 格式的有效性。实际应用价值在于实时场景理解潜力。局限性可能在于对复杂长视频的扩展性，未来可探索更大模型或通用场景图任务。

title: HADAR-Based Thermal Infrared Hyperspectral Image Restoration
abstract: Thermal-infrared (TIR) hyperspectral imagery (HSI) provides critical scene information for various applications. However, its practical utility is severely limited by unique sensor degradations beyond the capabilities of existing restoration methods, which are ignorant of underlying thermal physics. Here, we propose HAIR (HADAR-based Image Restoration) as a physics-driven framework for ground-based TIR-HSI restoration. HAIR utilizes the HADAR rendering equation (HRE) and combines it with the atmospheric downwelling radiative transfer equation (RTE) to model TIR-HSI using temperature, emissivity, and texture (TeX) physical triplets. This physical model leads to a TeX decompose-synthesize strategy that guarantees physical consistency and spatio-spectral noise resilience, in stark contrast to existing approaches. Moreover, our framework uses a forward-modeled atmospheric downwelling reference, along with spectral smoothness of emissivity and blackbody radiation, to enable spectral calibration and generation that would otherwise be elusive. Our extensive experiments on the outdoor DARPA Invisible Headlights dataset and in-lab FTIR measurements show that HAIR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across denoising, inpainting, spectral calibration, and spectral super-resolution, establishing a benchmark in objective accuracy and visual quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于HADAR渲染方程的物理驱动框架HAIR，用于热红外高光谱图像复原，实现物理一致性和高精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 热红外高光谱图像（TIR-HSI）在众多应用中至关重要，但其传感器退化问题严重限制了实用性。现有复原方法忽略了底层热物理过程，无法有效处理独特的传感器退化，如噪声、缺失谱段和光谱校准误差。因此，需要一种物理驱动的方法来准确建模TIR-HSI的生成过程，从而提升复原效果。
light_analysis.method: HAIR框架基于HADAR渲染方程（HRE）并结合大气下行辐射传输方程（RTE），使用温度、发射率和纹理（TeX）物理三元组对TIR-HSI建模。采用TeX分解-合成策略，确保物理一致性并抵抗时空噪声。通过前向建模的大气下行辐射参考，结合发射率和黑体辐射的光谱平滑性，实现光谱校准和生成。
light_analysis.result: 在DARPA Invisible Headlights室外数据集和实验室FTIR测量上的实验表明，HAIR在去噪、修复、光谱校准和光谱超分辨率任务中均优于现有方法，建立了客观精度和视觉质量的基准。具体性能指标提升但摘要未明确具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: HAIR通过物理驱动的框架显著提升了TIR-HSI复原性能，验证了结合热物理模型的有效性。该方法为热红外遥感、夜视等领域提供了更可靠的图像复原工具。未来可探索更复杂的场景模型和实时处理能力。

title: Fine-tuning with Hierarchical Prompting for Robust Propaganda Classification Across Annotation Schemas
abstract: Propaganda detection in social media is challenging due to noisy, short texts and low annotation agreements. We introduce a new intent-focused taxonomy of propaganda techniques and compare it against an established, higher-agreement schema. Along three dimensions (model portfolio, schema effects, and prompting strategy) we evaluate the taxonomies as a classification task with the help of four language models (GPT-4.1-nano, Phi-4 14B, Qwen2.5-14B, Qwen3-14B). Our results show that fine-tuning is essential, since it transforms weak zero-shot baselines into competitive systems and reveals methodological differences that are hidden using base models. Across schemas, the Qwen models achieve the strongest overall performance, and Phi-4 14B consistently outperforms GPT-4.1-nano. Our hierarchical prompting method (HiPP), which predicts fine-grained techniques before aggregating them, is especially beneficial after fine-tuning and on the more ambiguous, low-agreement taxonomy, while remaining competitive on the simpler schema. The HQP dataset, annotated with the new intent-based labels, provides a richer lens on propaganda's strategic goals and a challenging benchmark for future work on robust, real-world detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层次化提示微调方法（HiPP），用于跨注释模式的鲁棒性宣传检测，并引入以意图为中心的新分类体系。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交媒体中的宣传检测面临文本噪声大、标注一致性低等挑战。现有方法多依赖单一注释模式且未充分利用模型微调的优势，导致零样本基线性能弱。本文旨在通过层次化提示微调提升模型在不同分类体系下的鲁棒性，并引入新的意图导向分类体系以更丰富地刻画宣传策略目标。
light_analysis.method: 提出层次化提示微调方法（HiPP），先预测细粒度技术再聚合。在四个语言模型（GPT-4.1-nano、Phi-4 14B、Qwen2.5-14B、Qwen3-14B）上，沿模型组合、模式影响和提示策略三个维度评估两种宣传分类体系（新意图分类与已有高一致性分类）。使用微调将弱零样本基线转化为竞争性系统。
light_analysis.result: 微调显著提升性能，Qwen模型整体最强，Phi-4 14B持续优于GPT-4.1-nano。HiPP方法在微调后和低一致性分类体系上优势明显，在简单分类体系上仍具竞争力。HQP数据集提供了更具挑战性的基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究强调了微调在宣传检测中的关键作用，并展示了层次化提示方法在跨注释模式下的鲁棒性。HQP数据集为未来真实场景宣传检测研究提供了更丰富的视角和挑战。未来可探索更复杂的提示策略及跨语言泛化性。

title: Beyond Perplexity: A Geometric and Spectral Study of Low-Rank Pre-Training
abstract: Pre-training large language models is dominated by the memory cost of storing full-rank weights, gradients, and optimizer states. Low-rank pre-training has emerged to address this, and the space of methods has grown rapidly. A central question remains open: do low-rank methods produce models that generalize comparably to full-rank training, or does the rank constraint fundamentally alter the solutions reached? Existing comparisons rely almost entirely on validation perplexity from single-seed runs, often carried forward from prior literature. Yet perplexity is a poor proxy for solution quality; two methods can match on perplexity while converging to different loss landscape regions and internal representations. We close this gap by characterizing the solutions found by five low-rank pre-training methods, GaLore and Fira (memory-efficient optimizers), CoLA and SLTrain (architecture reparameterizations), and ReLoRA (adapter-style updates with periodic resets), against full-rank training at three model scales (60M, 130M, 350M). We evaluate each along 16 metrics across four dimensions: 1-D loss landscape along random/top-K PCA directions, 1-D interpolation between checkpoints, spectral structure of the weights and learned updates, and activation similarity to full-rank training. We show that low-rank methods are not equivalent to full-rank training, nor to one another, even when validation perplexity is close. Full-rank training settles into a sharper basin than low-rank methods along random directions, while the reverse holds for the top-1 PCA direction. Each method converges to a geometrically distinct basin. Low-rank activations diverge from full-rank in later layers as training progresses, with GaLore tracking full-rank most closely. Further, validation perplexity does not translate to downstream performance at every scale. Adding geometric and spectral metrics improves the prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 通过几何和频谱分析揭示低秩预训练方法与全秩训练在解空间上的本质差异，指出困惑度作为评估指标的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 低秩预训练方法旨在降低大规模语言模型训练的内存开销，但现有研究仅依赖验证困惑度评估模型质量，而困惑度无法捕捉解空间结构的差异。不同低秩方法即使困惑度相近，也可能收敛到不同的损失景观区域和内部表征，缺乏系统性的比较研究。
light_analysis.method: 在60M、130M、350M三个模型规模上，比较五种低秩预训练方法（GaLore、Fira、CoLA、SLTrain、ReLoRA）与全秩训练。沿随机方向和top-K PCA方向进行一维损失景观分析、检查点插值、权重和更新的频谱结构分析，以及激活相似性度量。共采用16个指标，覆盖四个维度。
light_analysis.result: 低秩方法与全秩训练不等价，彼此也不相同，即使验证困惑度接近。全秩训练收敛到随机方向上更尖锐的谷底，而top-1 PCA方向上则相反。每种方法收敛到几何上不同的谷底。低秩激活在后期层逐渐偏离全秩，GaLore与全秩最接近。验证困惑度不能在所有规模上预测下游性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了低秩预训练方法在几何和频谱特性上的多样性，证明困惑度不足以评估解质量。加入几何和频谱指标可改进预测。该研究为低秩训练方法的理解和选择提供了新视角，并建议未来在比较模型时应考虑更丰富的评估维度。

title: FlowCompile: An Optimizing Compiler for Structured LLM Workflows
abstract: Structured LLM workflows, where specialized LLM sub-agents execute according to a predefined graph, have become a powerful abstraction for solving complex tasks. Optimizing such workflows, i.e., selecting configurations for each sub-agent to balance accuracy and latency, is challenging due to the combinatorial design space over model choices, reasoning budgets, and workflow structures. Existing cost-aware methods largely treat workflow optimization as a routing problem, selecting a configuration at inference time for each query according to the accuracy-latency objective used during training. We argue that structured LLM workflows can also be optimized from a compilation perspective: before deployment, the system can globally explore the workflow design space and construct a reusable set of workflow-level configurations spanning diverse accuracy-latency trade-offs. Drawing inspiration from machine learning compilers, we introduce FlowCompile, a structured LLM workflow compiler that performs compile-time design space exploration to identify a high-quality, reusable trade-off set. FlowCompile decomposes a workflow into sub-agents, profiles each sub-agent under diverse configurations, and composes these measurements through a structure-aware proxy to estimate workflow-level accuracy and latency. It then identifies diverse high-quality configurations in a single compile-time pass, without retraining or online adaptation. Experiments across diverse workflows and challenging benchmarks show that FlowCompile consistently outperforms heuristically optimized workflow configurations and routing-based baselines, delivering up to 6.4x speedup. The compiled configuration set further serves as a reusable optimization artifact, enabling flexible deployment under varying runtime preferences and supporting downstream selection or routing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowCompile，一种针对结构化LLM工作流的编译器，通过编译时全局设计空间探索生成可重用的优化配置集。
light_analysis.motivation: 结构化LLM工作流由多个子代理按预定义图执行，优化其配置（模型选择、推理预算等）面临组合爆炸问题。现有方法将工作流优化视为路由问题，仅在线为每个查询选择配置，忽略了部署前全局探索的可能性。该方法离线优化不足，导致可重用性差，且难以适应运行时偏好变化。
light_analysis.method: FlowCompile受机器学习编译器启发，在编译时对工作流进行设计空间探索。它先将工作流分解为独立子代理，在不同配置下对每个子代理进行性能剖析，然后通过结构感知的代理模型组合这些测量结果，估计工作级准确率和延迟。最后，单次编译过程即可识别出覆盖不同精度-延迟权衡的高质量配置集，无需重新训练或在线适应。
light_analysis.result: 在多样化工作流和挑战性基准测试中，FlowCompile始终优于启发式优化的工作流配置和基于路由的基线，最高实现6.4倍加速。其编译生成的配置集作为可重用优化产物，支持灵活部署，并可用于下游配置选择或路由，显著降低了在线决策开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowCompile提出从编译视角优化结构化LLM工作流，通过编译时全局探索生成高质量可重用配置集，提升了运行时效率与适应性。该工作为工作流优化开辟了新方向，具有重要学术价值和应用前景。未来可扩展至更复杂的动态工作流结构。

title: Prefix Teach, Suffix Fade: Local Teachability Collapse in Strong-to-Weak On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student model on its own rollouts using dense feedback from a stronger teacher. Prior literature suggests that, provided teacher feedback is available, supervising the full sequence of response tokens should monotonically improve performance. However, we demonstrate that this assumption sometimes fails to hold in strong-to-weak OPD settings. While later segments of a generated trajectory may still exhibit a non-zero teacher-student advantage, they frequently lack the local contrast that makes dense feedback effective for prioritizing student learning. We term this failure mode local teachability collapse. The resulting principle is straightforward: supervision should concentrate on trajectory regions where the teacher's feedback remains discriminative, rather than uniformly covering the entire response. We operationalize this principle through a trajectory-specific release rule. This rule measures the teacher's margin over the student's top-$K$ candidate set, aggregates this margin across NLTK-tokenized sentence segments, and truncates dense OPD supervision upon detecting a BIC-style downward change point. Experimental results across strong-to-weak distillation tasks using the Qwen3 model family indicate that this release rule consistently outperforms standard full-trajectory OPD across five in-domain benchmarks at various student scales. Furthermore, compared to baseline distillation methods, our approach better preserves model capabilities on out-of-domain task. These results suggest that effective strong-to-weak OPD requires evaluating not only the availability of teacher guidance but also its local utility, ensuring that the generated feedback remains teachable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出局部可教性坍塌问题，并设计轨迹特定释放规则优化强到弱在线蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线蒸馏（OPD）使用强教师模型对学生的自生成轨迹提供密集反馈，传统观点认为监督完整响应序列应持续提升性能。然而，在强到弱OPD设置中，该假设有时不成立：虽然轨迹后段可能仍有非零的教师-学生优势，但局部对比度不足，使得密集反馈效果减弱。这种失败模式称为局部可教性坍塌。该问题重要，因为现有方法忽视反馈的局部效用，导致学生训练效率低下。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是一种轨迹特定发布规则：首先计算教师相对于学生top-K候选集的边际，然后按NLTK分词句子段聚合该边际，最后在检测到BIC式向下变化点时截断OPD监督。该规则将监督集中于教师反馈仍具区分力的区域，而非均匀覆盖整个响应。实验使用Qwen3模型族进行强到弱蒸馏任务。
light_analysis.result: 在五个域内基准测试中，所提发布规则在不同学生规模下始终优于标准全轨迹OPD。此外，与基线蒸馏方法相比，该方法更好地保留了域外任务上的模型能力。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但表明一致性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 有效强到弱OPD不仅需要评估教师指导的可用性，还需评估其局部效用，确保生成反馈保持可教性。本文揭示了局部可教性坍塌现象并提供了实用解决方案，对知识蒸馏和模型压缩具有学术与应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的边际度量或自适应截断策略。

title: Multi-Objective and Mixed-Reward Reinforcement Learning via Reward-Decorrelated Policy Optimization
abstract: Complex reinforcement learning environments frequently employ multi-task and mixed-reward formulations. In these settings, heterogeneous reward distributions and correlated reward dimensions often destabilize the construction of scalar advantages. To address these challenges, we propose Reward-Decorrelated Policy Optimization (RDPO), a reward-processing method designed to explicitly target both failure modes. RDPO first utilizes Magnitude-Aware Quantile normalization to stabilize prompt-level advantage allocation across binary, fractional, and continuous rewards. It then applies Mahalanobis whitening within each active reward subspace to mitigate correlation redundancy prior to aggregation. When applied during the post-training of LongCat-Flash, RDPO enhances instruction following, writing quality, and robustness to hard prompts while remaining broadly competitive on reasoning and coding evaluations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出奖励去相关策略优化（RDPO），通过幅度感知分位数归一化和马氏白化解决多目标混合奖励中的异质性和相关性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多任务和混合奖励的强化学习环境中，奖励分布异质且维度相关，导致标量优势构建不稳定，现有方法难以有效处理这些问题。
light_analysis.method: RDPO包含两步：首先，Magnitude-Aware Quantile normalization稳定二值、分数和连续奖励的提示级优势分配；然后，在每个活跃奖励子空间内应用Mahalanobis whitening减少聚合前的相关性冗余。
light_analysis.result: RDPO在LongCat-Flash后训练中增强了指令遵循、写作质量和对抗困难提示的鲁棒性，同时在推理和编码评估上保持竞争力。摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: RDPO有效处理多目标混合奖励问题，提升模型性能，具有学术和实践价值，可推广至其他复杂RL任务，但可能需定义奖励子空间。

title: Achieving $ε^{-2}$ Sample Complexity for Single-Loop Actor-Critic under Minimal Assumptions
abstract: In this paper, we establish last-iterate convergence rates for off-policy actor--critic methods in reinforcement learning. In particular, under a single-loop, single-timescale implementation and a broad class of policy updates, including approximate policy iteration and natural policy gradient methods, we prove the first $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ sample complexity guarantee for finding an $ε$-optimal policy under minimal assumptions, namely, the existence of a policy that induces an irreducible Markov chain. This stands in stark contrast to the existing literature, where an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ sample complexity is achieved only through nested-loop updates and/or under strong, algorithm-dependent assumptions on the policies, such as uniform mixing and uniform exploration. Technically, to address the challenges posed by the coupled update equations arising from the single-loop implementation, as well as the potentially unbounded iterates induced by off-policy learning, our analysis is based on a coupled Lyapunov drift framework. Specifically, we establish a geometric convergence rate for the actor and an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/T)$ convergence rate for the critic, and combine the two Lyapunov drift inequalities through a cross-domination property. We believe this analytical framework is of independent interest and may be applicable to other coupled iterative algorithms with unbounded

light_analysis.overview: 提出在最小假设下，单循环演员-评论家算法实现ε-最优策略的样本复杂度保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有演员-评论家方法要达到O(ε^{-2})样本复杂度，通常需要嵌套循环更新和强假设（如均匀混合和均匀探索）。本文旨在克服这些限制，在最小假设（仅存在一个策略诱导不可约马尔可夫链）下，建立单循环、单时间尺度off-policy演员-评论家算法的收敛性，从而简化算法实现并放宽理论条件。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用单循环、单时间尺度实现，涵盖近似策略迭代和自然策略梯度方法。核心创新是建立耦合Lyapunov漂移框架，通过交叉支配性质结合演员的几何收敛率和评论家的O(1/T)收敛率，从而处理耦合更新方程和off-policy学习可能导致的无界迭代问题。
light_analysis.result: 论文证明了第一个O(ε^{-2})样本复杂度保证，用于在最小假设下寻找ε-最优策略。具体地，演员达到几何收敛率，评论家达到O(1/T)收敛率。与现有文献相比，无需嵌套循环或强假设，显著降低了理论条件。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是建立了最小假设下单循环演员-评论家算法的样本复杂度保证，填补了理论空白。该耦合Lyapunov分析框架可能适用于其他耦合迭代算法。实际应用价值在于简化算法实现。未来工作可探索更广泛策略更新或放松假设。

title: How to Interpret Agent Behavior
abstract: Autonomous agents such as Claude Code and Codex now operate for hours or even days. Understanding their runtime behavior has become critical for downstream tasks such as diagnosing inefficiencies, fixing bugs, and ensuring better oversight. A primary way to gain this understanding is analyzing the reasoning trajectories and execution traces these agents generate. Yet such data remains in unstructured natural-language form, making it difficult for humans to interpret at scale. We introduce ACT*ONOMY (a combination of Action and Taxonomy), a taxonomy for describing and analyzing agent behavior at runtime. ACT*ONOMY has two components: (1) the taxonomy itself, developed through Grounded Theory and structured as a three-level hierarchy of 10 actions, 46 subactions, and 120 leaf categories; and (2) an open repository that hosts the living taxonomy, provides an automated analysis pipeline that applies it to agent trajectories analysis, and defines an extension protocol for customization and growth. Our experiments show that ACTONOMY can compare behavioral profiles across agents and characterize a single agent's behavior across diverse trajectories, surfacing patterns indicative of failure modes. By providing a shared vocabulary, ACT*ONOMY helps researchers, agent designers, and end users interpret agent behavior more consistently, enabling better oversight and control.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ACT*ONOMY分类法，通过层次化动作类别和自动化分析管道，解释自主代理的运行时行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主代理（如Claude Code、Codex）运行时间长，理解其运行时行为对诊断效率、修复bug和确保监督至关重要。现有分析依赖非结构化的推理轨迹和执行追踪，人类难以大规模解读，因此需要统一的分类法来标准化描述和分析。
light_analysis.method: 构建ACT*ONOMY分类法，基于扎根理论形成三级层次：10个动作、46个子动作、120个叶子类别。同时提供开放仓库，包含自动化分析管道，可将分类法应用于代理轨迹分析，并定义扩展协议以支持定制和增长。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明ACT*ONOMY可跨代理比较行为特征，也可刻画单个代理在多样化轨迹中的表现，揭示表明失败模式的行为模式。通过提供共享词汇，促进更一致的解释，增强监督和控制。摘要未明确说明具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出ACT*ONOMY分类法及配套工具，为研究者、设计者和终端用户提供统一框架，提升对代理行为理解的一致性和可控性。未来可扩展至更多代理类型和场景，局限性包括依赖人工标注和未提及跨领域适应性。

title: Edit-level Majority Voting Mitigates Over-Correction in LLM-based Grammatical Error Correction
abstract: Grammatical error correction using large language models often suffers from the over-correction issue.
