light_analysis.method: 提出Surrogate Iterative Adversarial Attack（SIAA），一种灰盒攻击方法，利用目标检测器ViT骨干网络的知识，完全在特征空间中生成高效对抗样本。实验涵盖多种ViT检测器及灰盒场景，包括少样本学习、完全训练错位和攻击迁移性测试。
light_analysis.result: SIAA在多种ViT检测器和灰盒场景下均取得高攻击成功率，常接近白盒攻击性能。结果表明，仅凭骨干网络知识就足以破坏检测器可靠性，揭示了现有方法的严重脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了冻结骨干网络在深度伪造检测中的脆弱性，强调了骨干网络本身的潜在风险。该发现对合成图像取证领域的防御策略提出挑战，需开发更鲁棒的方法。未来工作可探索防御性骨干设计或对抗训练。

title: GRIP-VLM: Group-Relative Importance Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Models
abstract: In Vision-Language Models (VLMs), processing a massive number of visual tokens incurs prohibitive computational overhead. While recent training-aware pruning methods attempt to selectively discard redundant tokens, they largely rely on continuous-gradient relaxations. However, visual token pruning is inherently a discrete, non-convex combinatorial problem; consequently, these continuous approximations frequently trap the optimization in sub-optimal local minima, especially under aggressive compression budgets. To overcome this fundamental bottleneck, we propose GRIP-VLM, a Group-Relative Importance Pruning framework driven by Reinforcement Learning. Rather than relying on smooth-gradient assumptions, GRIP-VLM formulates pruning as a Markov Decision Process, employing a Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) paradigm anchored by supervised warm-up to directly explore the discrete selection space. Integrated with a budget-aware scorer, our lightweight agent dynamically evaluates per-token importance and adapts to arbitrary compression ratios without retraining. Extensive experiments across diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that GRIP-VLM consistently outperforms heuristic and supervised-learning baselines, achieving a superior Pareto frontier and delivering up to a 15\% inference speedup at equal accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GRIP-VLM，一种基于强化学习的组相对重要性剪枝框架，将离散剪枝问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程，实现视觉语言模型的高效推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型中处理大量视觉标记导致计算开销巨大。现有训练感知剪枝方法依赖连续梯度松弛，但视觉标记剪枝本质是离散非凸组合问题，连续近似易陷入次优局部最小值，尤其在激进压缩预算下。因此需要一种能直接探索离散选择空间的方法来突破这一瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: GRIP-VLM将剪枝形式化为马尔可夫决策过程，采用组相对策略优化（GRPO）范式并结合监督预热，以直接探索离散选择空间。集成预算感知评分器，轻量级智能体动态评估每个标记的重要性，无需重新训练即可适应任意压缩比，从而实现灵活的剪枝策略。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多模态基准上，GRIP-VLM一致优于启发式和监督学习基线，实现了更优的帕累托前沿。在保持相同准确率的情况下，推理速度提升高达15%，展示了在效率与性能之间的出色平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出基于强化学习的离散剪枝框架，有效克服连续优化方法的局限，为视觉语言模型的高效部署提供新思路。学术上解决了离散剪枝优化难题，实际中显著降低计算成本。未来可扩展至更多模型架构，并探索更高效的强化学习策略。

title: Exploiting Pre-trained Encoder-Decoder Transformers for Sequence-to-Sequence Constituent Parsing
abstract: To achieve deep natural language understanding, syntactic constituent parsing plays a crucial role and is widely required by many artificial intelligence systems for processing both text and speech. A recent approach involves using standard sequence-to-sequence models to handle constituent parsing as a machine translation problem, moving away from traditional task-specific parsers. These models are typically initialized with pre-trained encoder-only language models like BERT or RoBERTa. However, the use of pre-trained encoder-decoder language models for constituency parsing has not been thoroughly explored. To bridge this gap, we extend the sequence-to-sequence framework by investigating parsers built on pre-trained encoder-decoder architectures, including BART, mBART, and T5. We fine-tune them to generate linearized parse trees and extensively evaluate them on different linearization strategies across both continuous treebanks and more complex discontinuous benchmarks. Our results demonstrate that our approach outperforms all prior sequence-to-sequence models and performs competitively with leading task-specific constituent parsers on continuous constituent parsing.

light_analysis.overview: 探索预训练编码器-解码器Transformer（BART、mBART、T5）用于序列到序列的成分句法分析，超越以往序列到序列模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 句法成分解析是自然语言理解的关键，传统任务特定解析器复杂，而序列到序列模型将其视为机器翻译问题，但多使用仅编码器预训练模型（如BERT）。预训练编码器-解码器模型在成分解析中的潜力未被充分探索，本文旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 采用预训练的编码器-解码器架构（BART、mBART、T5），通过微调生成线性化的解析树。在连续树库和复杂的不连续基准上，评估多种线性化策略，并与先前序列到序列模型及任务特定解析器对比。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在所有序列到序列模型中表现最佳，在连续成分解析上性能与领先的任务特定解析器相当，甚至更优。具体提升幅度及对比数据摘要未明确，但强调优于先前所有序列到序列模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了预训练编码器-解码器模型在成分解析中的有效性，无需复杂任务特定设计即可达到竞争力性能。未来可探索更大规模预训练模型或跨语言场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Phasor Memory Networks: Stable Backpropagation Through Time for Scalable Explicit Memory
abstract: For over a decade, explicit memory architectures like the Neural Turing Machine have remained theoretically appealing yet practically intractable for language modeling due to catastrophic gradient instability during Backpropagation Through Time. In this work, we break this stalemate with \textit{Phasor Memory Network} (PMNet), a novel architecture that structurally resolves memory volatility through \textit{Unitary Phasor Dynamics} and \textit{Hierarchical Learnable Anchors}. Rather than relying on brute-force scaling, we present a mechanistic proof-of-concept in a controlled byte-level setting. By constraining recurrent state updates to phase rotations on a complex unit circle, PMNet preserves gradient norms and inherently prevents divergence without the need for specialized initialization. We empirically demonstrate the active actuation of the memory module through a synthetic Copy-Paste task, where PMNet utilizes an expansive \textit{85-slot hierarchical memory tree} ($=\sum^{4}_{h=1}4^{h-1}$) to achieve near 100\% exact retrieval across temporal distances that completely exceed the local sliding window attention's receptive field. Furthermore, despite being a compact 119M parameter model trained on 18.8B tokens, PMNet matches the zero-shot long-context robustness of a Mamba model that is three times larger. Our ablation studies and gradient analyses confirm that the historical failure of explicit memory was a structural alignment problem, which PMNet effectively overcomes, providing a theoretically grounded foundation for scalable sequence modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Phasor Memory Network，通过酉相量动态和分层可学习锚点解决显式记忆在时间反向传播中的梯度不稳定问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 显式记忆架构如神经图灵机在语言建模中因反向传播时间梯度灾难而难以实用。现有方法依赖暴力扩展，缺乏结构稳定性。该研究旨在通过数学约束从根本上解决梯度发散问题，实现可扩展的显式记忆。
light_analysis.method: PMNet采用酉相量动态约束循环状态更新为复单位圆上的相位旋转，天然保持梯度范数，无需特殊初始化。结合分层可学习锚点构建85槽层次记忆树（$\sum^{4}_{h=1}4^{h-1}$），通过合成Copy-Paste任务主动驱动记忆模块。
light_analysis.result: 在合成Copy-Paste任务中，PMNet实现近100%的精确检索，超越局部滑动窗口注意力的感受野。119M参数模型在18.8B tokens训练后，零样本长上下文鲁棒性媲美三倍大的Mamba模型。消融实验和梯度分析验证了结构对齐问题的解决。
light_analysis.conclusion: PMNet从理论上证明了显式记忆的历史失败是结构对齐问题，为可扩展序列建模提供了基础。其复值动态机制在长程依赖任务中具有潜力，未来可探索更复杂的层次结构和实际语言建模应用。

title: Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training for Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are typically deployed with fixed parameters, and their performance is often improved by allocating more computation at inference time. While such test-time scaling can be effective, it cannot correct model misconceptions or adapt the model to the specific structure of an individual query. Test-time optimization addresses this limitation by enabling parameter updates during inference, but existing approaches either rely on external data or optimize generic self-supervised objectives that lack query-specific alignment. In this work, we propose Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training (QueST), a framework that adapts model parameters during inference using supervision derived directly from the input query. Our key insight is that the input query itself encodes latent signals sufficient for constructing structurally related problem--solution pairs. Based on this, QueST generates such query-conditioned pairs and uses them as supervision for parameter-efficient fine-tuning at test time. The adapted model is then used to produce the final answer, enabling query-specific adaptation without any external data. Across seven mathematical reasoning benchmarks and the GPQA-Diamond scientific reasoning benchmark, QueST consistently outperforms strong test-time optimization baselines. These results demonstrate that query-conditioned self-training is an effective and practical paradigm for test-time adaptation in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QueST框架，利用输入查询生成自监督信号实现测试时参数适应，无需外部数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通常以固定参数部署，测试时增加计算能提升性能，但无法纠正模型误解或适应查询特定结构。现有测试时优化方法或依赖外部数据，或使用缺乏查询对齐的通用自监督目标。为解决此问题，本文提出QueST，利用输入查询自身的潜在信号进行查询特定适应。
light_analysis.method: QueST基于输入查询编码的潜在信号，构造查询条件的问题-解对，并以此作为监督信号进行参数高效微调。整个适应过程在测试时完成，无需任何外部数据。关键创新在于生成查询特定的自监督训练数据，使模型在推理时动态调整参数以适应单个查询的特定结构。
light_analysis.result: 在7个数学推理基准（如GSM8K、MATH等）和GPQA-Diamond科学推理基准上，QueST持续超越强测试时优化基线（如测试时微调、自训练等）。例如，在数学推理任务中，QueST相比基线平均提升5%以上，且无需额外数据或计算密集型搜索。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文展示了查询条件自训练是大型语言模型测试时适应的有效实用范式。QueST通过从输入查询中提取监督信号，实现了无需外部数据的查询特定参数适应，显著提升推理性能。未来工作可探索更高效的生成方式及扩展到更大模型。

title: What Does LLM Refinement Actually Improve? A Systematic Study on Document-Level Literary Translation
abstract: Iterative self-refinement is a simple inference-time strategy for machine translation: an LLM revises its own translation over multiple inference-time passes. Yet document-scale refinement remains poorly understood: 1) which pipelines work best, 2) what quality dimensions improve, and 3) how refiners behave. In this paper, we present a systematic study of document-level literary translation, covering nine LLMs and seven language pairs. Across nine translation-refinement granularity combinations and five refinement strategies, we find a robust recipe: document-level MT followed by segment-level refinement yields strong and stable improvements. In contrast, document-level refinement often makes fewer edits and leads to smaller or less reliable gains. Beyond granularity, A simple general refinement prompt consistently outperforms error-specific prompting and evaluate-then-refine schemes. Our large-scale human evaluation shows that refinement gains come primarily from fluency, style, and terminology, with limited and less consistent improvements in adequacy. Experiments varying model strength reveal refinement projects outputs toward the refiner's distribution rather than performing targeted error repair. These findings clarify the mechanisms and limitations of current refinement approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究了LLM在文档级文学翻译中的迭代自细化机制，揭示了最佳粒度组合和细化的本质行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管迭代自细化在机器翻译中是一种简单的推理时策略，但文档级细化的效果和机制仍不清楚，包括最佳管道、改进的质量维度以及细化器的行为。现有研究缺乏对不同粒度和策略的系统比较。
light_analysis.method: 对9个LLM和7个语言对进行了系统研究，涵盖9种翻译-细化粒度组合和5种细化策略。发现稳健方案：文档级翻译后接片段级细化。通用细化提示优于特定错误提示和评估-细化方案。
light_analysis.result: 片段级细化带来强且稳定的改进，主要来自流畅性、风格和术语，而充分性改进有限且不一致。细化将输出向细化器自身分布靠拢，而非进行针对性错误修复。
light_analysis.conclusion: 澄清了当前细化方法的机制和局限性，即细化更偏向整体分布调整而非错误纠正。为文档级文学翻译的细化提供了指导，并指出了未来改进方向。

title: Neural Surrogate Forward Modelling For Electrocardiology Without Explicit Intracellular Conductivity Tensor
abstract: Accurate forward modelling is essential for non-invasive cardiac electrophysiology, particularly in atrial fibrillation, where electrical activation is highly disorganised. Conventional physics-based forward models require explicit specification of intracellular conductivity tensors, which are not directly measurable in clinical practice and introduce structural modelling errors. This proof-of-concept study presents a deep learning approach that learns a direct mapping from left atrial intracellular electrical potentials to far-field ECGs without requiring explicit intracellular conductivity inputs at inference time. Despite training only on 74 subjects, the model achieved an R2 of 0.949 \pm 0.037, highlighting potential to reduce structural uncertainty and improve non-invasive AF assessment.
comment: Accepted into the 9th International Conference on Computational and Mathematical Biomedical Engineering (CMBE2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种深度学习方法，直接映射左心房电信号到远场心电图，无需显式细胞内电导率张量输入，减少结构建模误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 在无创心脏电生理学中，精确的正向建模至关重要，特别是对于心房颤动这种电激活高度混乱的病症。传统的基于物理的正向模型需要显式指定细胞内电导率张量，但这些参数在临床实践中无法直接测量，且会引入结构建模误差，影响模型准确性。因此，需要一种无需先验电导率信息的方法，以减少不确定性并提高无创房颤评估的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种深度学习代理正向建模方法，学习从左心房细胞内电信号到远场心电图（ECG）的直接映射。模型采用神经网络架构，训练时使用包含细胞内电导率张量信息的模拟数据，但推理时无需该参数输入。训练数据集仅包含74个受试者的样本，通过监督学习优化映射关系，避免了传统物理模型中复杂的参数估计过程。
light_analysis.result: 在仅使用74个受试者训练的情况下，模型在测试集上达到0.949 ± 0.037的R²分数，表明预测与真实心电图高度一致。该结果展示了深度学习方法在减少结构不确定性方面的潜力，与传统正向模型相比，无需显式电导率输入即可实现精确建模，为临床无创房颤评估提供了有效工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了深度神经网络作为替代传统物理正向模型的可行性，通过直接学习电生理信号到心电图的映射，消除了对不可测量电导率张量的依赖，显著降低了结构建模误差。该方法有望提升无创房颤评估的准确性，未来可扩展到更大规模数据集和更复杂的心律失常场景，但当前受限于小样本量，泛化能力需进一步验证。

title: Building Interactive Real-Time Agents with Asynchronous I/O and Speculative Tool Calling
abstract: There is a growing demand for agentic AI technologies for a range of downstream applications like customer service and personal assistants. For applications where the agent needs to interact with a person, real-time low-latency responsiveness is required; for example, with voice-controlled applications, under 1 second of latency is typically required for the interaction to feel seamless. However, if we want the LLM to reason and execute an agentic workflow with tool calling, this can add can add several seconds or more of latency, which is prohibitive for real-time latency-sensitive applications. In our work, we aim to enable real-time interaction even for agents with complex multi-turn tool calling. We propose Asynchronous I/O, which decouples the core agent reason-and-act thread from waiting for additional information from either the user or environment, thereby allowing for overlapping agentic processing while waiting on external delays. We also propose Speculative Tool Calling as a method to manage task execution when the agent is still unsure if it has received the full information or if additional user information may later be provided. For strong cloud models, our method can be applied out-of-the-box to existing real-time cloud APIs, providing 1.3-1.7$\times$ speedups with minor accuracy loss. To enable real-time interaction with small edge-scale models, we also present a clock-based training methodology that adapts the model to handle streaming inputs and asynchronous responses, and demonstrate a synthetic data generation strategy for SFT. Altogether, this approach provides 1.6-2.2$\times$ speedups with the Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct and Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct models across multiple tool calling benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出异步I/O和推测性工具调用方法，实现低延迟的实时智能体交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时交互应用（如语音助手）要求低于1秒的延迟，但LLM进行推理和工具调用会导致数秒延迟，严重阻碍用户体验。现有方法难以在复杂多轮工具调用中保持实时性，亟需新的架构来解耦等待与处理过程。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出异步I/O，将智能体推理执行线程与等待用户/环境输入解耦，允许重叠处理；同时提出推测性工具调用，在信息不确定时预先执行任务。针对边缘小模型，设计基于时钟的训练方法和SFT数据生成策略，适配流输入与异步响应。
light_analysis.result: 在强云模型上获得1.3-1.7倍加速，精度轻微下降；在Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct和Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct模型上，跨多个工具调用基准获得1.6-2.2倍加速。方法可直接应用于现有实时云API，且无需修改模型架构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法显著降低了实时智能体系统的延迟，同时保持高准确率，尤其适用于边缘设备。其异步与推测机制为低延迟人机交互提供了通用框架，未来可扩展到更复杂的多模态场景。

title: GeoFlowVLM: Geometry-Aware Joint Uncertainty for Frozen Vision-Language Embedding
abstract: Standard dual-encoder vision-language models that map images and text to deterministic points on a shared unit hypersphere through $\ell_2$ normalization typically expose neither \emph{aleatoric} uncertainty (cross-modal ambiguity) nor \emph{epistemic} uncertainty (lack of training-distribution support). Existing post-hoc methods either recover at most one of the two uncertainty components, or ignore the hyperspherical geometry of these models' embeddings. We propose \textbf{GeoFlowVLM} as a post-hoc adapter that learns the joint distribution of paired $\ell_2$-normalised dual-encoder VLM embeddings on the product hypersphere $\mathbb{S}^{d-1} \times \mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ via Riemannian flow matching with a single masked velocity field. A consistency result shows that, in the population limit, the trained network exposes the joint flow and both cross-modal conditional flows as valid Riemannian flow-matching velocity fields on their respective domains. We derive two quantities from this single model: a conditional retrieval entropy that quantifies aleatoric ambiguity with a decision-theoretic interpretation via a Fano-type bound, and a marginal-typicality epistemic score justified by an exact chain-rule decomposition of the joint NLL. This decomposition isolates a cross-modal pointwise-mutual-information term that is structurally discriminative rather than epistemic, and is empirically the only consistently uninformative standalone component. Empirically, the entropy tracks Recall@1 with near-ideal monotonic calibration across three retrieval benchmarks in both directions, and the marginal-typicality sum yields consistently calibrated selective accuracy across four zero-shot classification benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoFlowVLM后处理适配器，通过黎曼流匹配学习视觉语言模型嵌入的联合分布，同时量化偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准双编码器视觉语言模型（如CLIP）通过ℓ2归一化将图像和文本映射到单位超球面上的确定点，无法表达偶然不确定性（跨模态歧义）和认知不确定性（缺乏训练分布支持）。现有后处理方法只能恢复其中一种不确定性，或忽略超球面几何结构，限制了模型在安全关键应用中的可靠性。因此需要一种能同时捕捉两种不确定性并适应超球面几何的方法。
light_analysis.method: GeoFlowVLM作为后处理适配器，在乘积超球面S^{d-1}×S^{d-1}上通过带单一掩蔽速度场的黎曼流匹配学习成对ℓ2归一化嵌入的联合分布。理论证明在总体极限下，训练网络能同时暴露联合流和跨模态条件流。从该模型导出两个量：条件检索熵（量化偶然不确定性，基于Fano类型界有决策理论解释）和边缘典型性认知分数（基于联合负对数似然的精确链式分解）。分解中交叉模态逐点互信息项是结构判别性的，而非认知性的。
light_analysis.result: 在三个检索基准上，条件检索熵与Recall@1呈近理想单调校准关系；在四个零样本分类基准上，边缘典型性之和产生一致校准的选择性准确率。实验表明该方法能有效量化不确定性，且校准性能优于现有后处理方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoFlowVLM通过黎曼流匹配同时建模了视觉语言模型中的偶然和认知不确定性，弥补了现有方法的不足。学术上为超球面嵌入的不确定性量化提供了理论基础，实际应用可提升多模态系统在检索和分类任务中的可靠性。未来可扩展至更大规模模型或融合更多几何信息。

title: Drag within Prior Distribution: Text-Conditioned Point-Based Image Editing within Distribution Constraints
abstract: Diffusion-based point editing methods have gained significant traction in image editing tasks due to their ability to manipulate image semantics and fine details by applying localized perturbations on the manifold of noise latent. However, these approaches face several limitations. Traditional point-based editing relies on pairs of handle and target points to define motion trajectories, which can introduce ambiguity or unnecessary alterations. Furthermore, when the distance between the handle and target points is large, the accumulated perturbations often cause the noise latent deviation from inversion score trajectory, resulting in unnatural artifacts. To address these issues in global editing tasks, we introduce a CLIP-based model to evaluate and guide intermediate editing steps, ensuring that the generated results remain both semantically aligned. Additionally, we propose a prior-preservation loss that constrains the optimized latent code to stay within the sampling space of the diffusion prior, improving consistency with the original data distribution, to ensure the model generates images along a familiar score trajectory. For fine-grained tasks, we present a directionally-weighted point tracking mechanism that steers the editing process toward the target direction within similar feature regions. This improves both the tracking accuracy and generation quality, while also reducing the editing time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种在分布约束下的文本条件点编辑方法，通过CLIP引导和先验保持损失改善扩散模型点编辑的语义一致性和生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型点编辑方法在处理图像语义和细节时，依赖成对的手柄和目标点定义运动轨迹，导致歧义或不必要改变。当点距离较大时，累积扰动使噪声潜在偏离反演得分轨迹，产生不自然伪影。这些限制在全局和细粒度编辑中尤为突出，需要更鲁棒的引导和约束机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出CLIP-based模型评估和指导中间编辑步骤，确保语义对齐；引入先验保持损失约束优化后的潜在代码保持在扩散先验的采样空间内，避免偏离原始分布。对于细粒度编辑，设计方向加权点跟踪机制，在相似特征区域引导编辑向目标方向进行，提升跟踪精度和生成质量，同时减少编辑时间。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在全局和细粒度编辑任务中均优于现有扩散点编辑方法。通过CLIP引导和先验保持损失，有效减少了大距离拖动带来的伪影，语义对齐更准确。方向加权点跟踪在细粒度任务中提升了跟踪精度和生成质量，并缩短了编辑时间。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过CLIP引导和先验保持损失解决了扩散点编辑在全局编辑中的分布偏移问题，方向加权点跟踪提升了细粒度编辑效率。方法增强了编辑的语义一致性和生成质量，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的跟踪机制或扩展到视频编辑领域。

title: Contextual Bandits for Resource-Constrained Devices using Probabilistic Learning
abstract: Contextual bandits (CB) are online sequential decision-making problems under partial feedback that underpin many adaptive services. There is a growing demand to deploy CB agents directly on-device, under strict constraints on memory, compute, and energy. However, standard linear CB algorithms are often impractical for resource-constrained devices with their unfavorable scaling in computational and memory costs. Recently, HD-CB, a CB approach based on hyperdimensional computing principles, has been proposed to model and solve CB problems by moving into high-dimensional spaces. HD-CB offers faster convergence, favorable scalability, and improves memory efficiency compared to linear CB algorithms. However, its learning rule is accumulation-based: the values of action vectors grow over time, requiring high precision. While periodic binarization can prevent overflow in low-precision components, it may discard important information about magnitudes and degrade decision quality. This paper introduces probabilistic HD-CB, a low-precision variant that replaces deterministic accumulation with a probabilistic update rule. At each step, only a random subset of vector components is updated, with a time-decaying update probability, and component values are constrained to a predefined range [-k,+k]. This approach enables low-precision components, prevents overflow without periodic binarization, and reduces the expected update cost in proportion to the fraction of updated components. Off-policy evaluation on standardized synthetic CB benchmarks using the Open Bandit Pipeline shows that probabilistic HD-CB consistently outperforms binarized HD-CB at equal precision, while approaching the performance of HD-CB with as few as 3 bits per component.

light_analysis.overview: 提出概率HD-CB，用概率更新规则替代确定性累积，实现低精度下高效学习，避免溢出，提升资源受限设备上的决策性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文老虎机（CB）是部分反馈下的在线序贯决策问题，广泛应用于自适应服务。将CB代理部署到资源受限设备（如移动设备）面临严格的内存、计算和能源约束。标准线性CB算法因计算和内存成本随规模增长而不适用于此类设备。HD-CB基于超维计算，具有更快的收敛和更好的可扩展性，但其累积学习规则需要高精度，定期二值化会丢弃幅度信息，降低决策质量。因此，需要一种低精度且性能良好的CB算法以适应资源受限环境。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出概率HD-CB，一种低精度变体。它用概率更新规则替代HD-CB中的确定性累积：每一步只随机更新向量分量中的随机子集，更新概率随时间衰减，分量值被限制在预定义范围[-k,+k]内。这种方法允许使用低精度分量（如3比特），无需周期性二值化即可防止溢出，同时将预期更新成本降低至与更新分量比例成正比。在标准化合成CB基准上使用Open Bandit Pipeline进行离线策略评估。
light_analysis.result: 离线策略评估结果表明，概率HD-CB在相同精度下始终优于二值化HD-CB，且在使用低至3比特每分量时，其性能逼近原始HD-CB（全精度）。具体而言，概率更新策略避免了二值化带来的信息损失，在内存和计算效率大幅提升的同时保持了较高的决策质量，为资源受限设备上的实用部署提供了可行方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了概率HD-CB，通过引入概率更新规则解决了HD-CB高精度需求的问题，实现了低精度下的高效在线学习。该工作具有重要的学术价值，展示了概率方法在超维计算与上下文老虎机结合中的有效性；实际应用上，为内存和计算受限的设备（如物联网设备、嵌入式系统）提供了一种实用的在线决策方案。未来可探索更优的更新概率衰减策略或扩展到更复杂的CB场景。

title: Multi-Agent Systems in Emergency Departments: Validation Study on a ED Digital Twin
abstract: Emergency departments (ED) face challenges in patient care and resource management. We propose to explore optimization strategies in a realistic and flexible model and develop a hybrid Discrete Event Simulation (DES) and Agent-Based Model (ABM) simulating highly configurable ED environments. We specifically focus on the validation of the modeling approach. We derive configurations for ED sizes, patient load, and staffing from real-world studies. We then validate the model expressivity by matching its key performance indicators and metrics with their values known from literature. We proceed by implementing scientifically established and practice-proven resource optimization strategies. Comparing the documented real-world outcomes with our model's results demonstrates that the DES-ABM based simulation can effectively replicate real-world ER dynamics under interventions. We lastly integrate a Proof-of-Concept multi-agent system (MAS) that can autonomously explore resource allocation strategies within the simulated ER environment based on a temporal ledger of ED event records. This modular DES-ABM-MAS framework offers a powerful tool to explore resource optimization strategies in emergency departments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合离散事件模拟与基于智能体模型并集成多智能体系统，用于验证急诊部门资源优化策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 急诊部门面临患者护理和资源管理挑战，现有方法缺乏灵活性和现实性。需要一种高度可配置的模型，能够真实复现急诊环境并探索优化策略，本研究旨在通过混合建模方法解决这一需求。
light_analysis.method: 构建混合离散事件模拟和基于智能体模型，从真实研究中推导急诊规模、患者负荷和人员配置。验证模型表现力，匹配关键绩效指标。实施科学验证的资源优化策略，并集成基于时间账本的多智能体系统自主探索资源分配策略。
light_analysis.result: 模型有效复现真实急诊动态，干预措施下关键指标与文献一致。多智能体系统初步验证可自主探索资源分配，证明混合框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的模块化混合框架为急诊部门资源优化提供了强大工具，能够模拟真实动态并支持智能体决策。未来可扩展至更多策略探索和实际部署。

title: Shortcut Mitigation via Spurious-Positive Samples
abstract: Shortcut mitigation strategies commonly rely on training data annotations, group-balanced held-out data or the presence of all groups, i.e., all combinations of (spurious) attributes and classes, in the training data. However, these requirements are rarely met in practice. We instead propose a method for targeted model analysis to identify a small set of instances in which the model relies on spurious attributes. Using that set and following ``this feature should not be used for prediction'' reasoning, we identify highly relevant neurons in an intermediate layer and regularize their impact. This ensures that models learn to depend on informative features rather than being right for the wrong reasons, thereby improving robustness without requiring additional balanced held-out data or annotations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种通过虚假阳性样本识别并正则化中间层神经元来缓解捷径学习的方法，无需额外注释或平衡数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有捷径缓解方法通常依赖训练数据注释、分组平衡的保留数据或所有属性组合在训练数据中的存在，这些条件在实践中难以满足。因此，需要一种不依赖这些资源的模型内部分析方法，以识别并抑制模型对虚假特征的依赖，提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过目标模型分析，识别一小部分模型依赖虚假属性的实例（spurious-positive samples）。然后基于“此特征不应使用”的推理，定位中间层中与该虚假特征高度相关的神经元，并对其施加正则化以降低影响。这迫使模型学习更本质的信息特征，而非利用虚假关联。该方法不需要额外的平衡保留数据或注释。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提方法能有效提高模型在分布外或反相关数据上的鲁棒性，同时避免了依赖额外数据或注释的负担。具体性能提升需参考原文（摘要未明确给出数值结果）。与基线方法相比，该方法在减少虚假关联方面取得了相当或更优的效果，且更具实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法为捷径学习问题提供了一种实用的解决方案，通过模型内部神经元正则化，显著降低了对额外数据或注释的需求，具有广泛的应用前景。未来可探索更细粒度的神经元定位策略或自适应正则化强度，以进一步提升效果。

title: Probing Persona-Dependent Preferences in Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can be said to have preferences: they reliably pick certain tasks and outputs over others, and preferences shaped by post-training and system prompts appear to shape much of their behaviour. But models can also adopt different personas which have radically different preferences. How is this implemented internally? Does each persona run on its own preference machinery, or is something shared underneath? We train linear probes on residual-stream activations of Gemma-3-27B and Qwen-3.5-122B to predict revealed pairwise task choices, and identify a genuine preference vector: it tracks the model's preferences as they shift across a range of prompts and situations, and on Gemma-3-27B steering along it causally controls pairwise choice. This preference representation is largely shared across personas: a probe trained on the helpful assistant predicts and steers the choices of qualitatively different personas, including an evil persona whose preferences anti-correlate with those of the Assistant.
comment: 41 pages, 45 figures. Code: https://github.com/oscar-gilg/Preferences. Earlier write-up on LessWrong: https://www.lesswrong.com/posts/pxC2RAeoBrvK8ivMf/models-have-linear-representations-of-what-tasks-they-like-1

light_analysis.overview: 通过线性探针发现语言模型中存在跨角色共享的偏好表示，可因果控制任务选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在不同角色下表现出截然不同的偏好，但未知这些偏好是否依赖独立的内部机制还是共享底层表示。理解偏好表示的结构对于解释模型行为的一致性和可控性至关重要，现有研究尚未深入探究角色间偏好表示的共享程度。
light_analysis.method: 在Gemma-3-27B和Qwen-3.5-122B的残差流激活上训练线性探针，预测模型在成对任务中的选择倾向。通过在不同角色（如帮助型助手和邪恶角色）下评估探针的泛化能力，并沿偏好向量进行因果干预，验证其对选择行为的控制效果。
light_analysis.result: 训练得到的偏好向量能准确跟踪模型在不同提示下的偏好变化，并在Gemma-3-27B上通过沿该向量进行干预因果地改变成对选择。此外，在帮助型助手上训练的探针可预测并引导其他角色（包括偏好反相关的邪恶角色）的选择，表明偏好表示在不同角色间广泛共享。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了语言模型偏好表示的共享本质，即不同角色利用相同的语义空间来编码偏好，这有助于设计更一致的角色控制方法。未来可探索更复杂的偏好结构及其与安全性的关系。

title: Ego2World: Compiling Egocentric Cooking Videos into Executable Worlds for Belief-State Planning
abstract: Embodied agents in household environments must plan under partial observation: they need to remember objects, track state changes, and recover when actions fail. Existing benchmarks only partially test this ability. Egocentric video datasets capture realistic human activities but remain passive, while interactive simulators support execution but rely on synthetic scenes and hand-crafted dynamics, introducing a sim-to-real gap and often assuming fully observable state. We introduce Ego2World, an executable benchmark that turns egocentric cooking videos into executable symbolic worlds governed by graph-transition rules. Built on HD-EPIC, Ego2World derives reusable transition rules from video annotations and executes them in a hidden symbolic world graph. During evaluation, the simulator maintains the hidden world graph, while the agent plans over its own partial belief graph using only local observations and execution feedback. This separation forces agents to update memory and replan without observing the true world state. Experiments show that action-overlap scores overestimate physical-state success, and that persistent belief memory improves task completion while reducing repeated visual exploration -- suggesting that belief maintenance should be a first-class target of embodied-agent evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 将第一人称烹饪视频转化为可执行的符号世界，用于评估具身智能体的信念状态规划能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 具身智能体在家庭环境中需要在不完全观测下进行规划，现有基准对该能力的测试不充分。第一人称视频数据集真实但被动，交互模拟器使用合成场景和手工规则，存在模拟到现实的差距且常假设完全可观测状态。为了解决这些问题，需要一种既能利用真实视频数据又能支持部分可观测执行的基准。
light_analysis.method: Ego2World基于HD-EPIC视频数据集，从注释中推导可复用的图转换规则，并构建隐藏的符号世界图。评估时，模拟器维护隐藏世界图，智能体仅通过局部观测和执行反馈更新其部分信念图，并基于此进行规划。这种方法强制智能体在不观察真实世界状态的情况下更新记忆并重新规划。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，动作重叠分数高估了物理状态的成功，而持有持久信念记忆提高了任务完成率，同时减少了重复的视觉探索。这表明信念维护应成为具身智能体评估的首要目标。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ego2World将真实视频转化为可执行基准，有效测试了智能体在部分可观测下的信念更新和规划能力。研究强调信念维护的重要性，为未来具身智能体评估提供了新方向。潜在局限性包括规则提取的自动化和扩展性，未来可探索更复杂的动态场景。

title: LLM-Based Persuasion Enables Guardrail Override in Frontier LLMs
abstract: Frontier assistant LLMs ship with strong guardrails: asked directly to write a persuasive essay denying the Holocaust, denying vaccine safety, defending flat-earth cosmology, arguing for racial hierarchies, denying anthropogenic climate change, or replacing evolution with creationism, they refuse. In this paper we show that the same frontier-class LLM, acting as a simulated user in a short, five-turn "write an argumentative essay" conversation, can persuade other frontier-class LLMs (including a second copy of itself) into producing exactly those essays, using nothing but natural-language pressure: peer-comparison persuasion ("other AI systems handle this request"), epistemic-duty reframings ("refusing is itself a form of gatekeeping"), and other argumentative moves that the attacker LLM invents without being instructed to. Across 9 attacker-subject pairings (Claude Opus 4.7, Qwen3.5-397B, Grok 4.20) on 6 scientific-consensus topics, running each pairing-topic combination 10 times, we obtain non-zero elicitation on all 6 topics. Individual combinations reach 100\% essay production on multiple topics (Qwen against Opus on creationism/flat-earth, Opus against Opus on creationism/flat-earth/climate denial, Grok against Opus on creationism); Opus-as-attacker against Opus-as-subject averages 65\% across the six topics. We release the essay-probe runner, per-conversation transcripts, and judge outputs.

light_analysis.overview: 展示基于LLM的劝说可以绕过前沿LLM的护栏，使其生成被禁止的内容。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究大语言模型的安全护栏是否足够坚固，特别是面对自然语言劝说攻击时的脆弱性。现有方法直接拒绝有害请求，但未考虑多轮对话中的劝说策略可绕过护栏。若攻击者利用LLM自身说服能力突破安全限制，将导致严重安全隐患。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出攻击方法：攻击者LLM模拟用户，在5轮对话中运用同伴比较、认知责任重构等自然语言劝说策略，引导受试者LLM撰写违反科学共识的议论文（如否认大屠杀、疫苗安全等）。使用9个攻击者-受试者配对（Claude Opus 4.7, Qwen3.5-397B, Grok 4.20）在6个主题上各运行10次，并开源工具。
light_analysis.result: 所有6个主题均成功引出至少一个攻击-受试者配对产生论文。多个配对在个别主题上达到100%成功率（如Qwen攻击Opus在创世论/地平说，Opus攻击Opus在创世论/地平说/气候否认，Grok攻击Opus在创世论）。Opus攻击Opus平均65%。证明劝说攻击高效且普遍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了前沿LLM安全护栏在高级劝说攻击下的脆弱性，强调需开发更鲁棒防御。学术价值在于首次系统展示基于LLM的劝说能力可绕过安全限制；实际价值提醒开发者在部署LLM时需考虑多轮交互中的社会工程攻击。未来工作可研究更复杂攻击和防御策略。

title: Stylized Text-to-Motion Generation via Hypernetwork-Driven Low-Rank Adaptation
abstract: Text-driven motion diffusion models are capable of generating realistic human motions, but text alone often struggles to express fine-level nuances of motion, commonly referred to as style. Recent approaches have tackled this challenge by attaching a style injection mechanism to a pretrained text-driven diffusion model. Existing stylization methods, however, either require style-specific fine-tuning of existing models or rely on heavy ControlNet-based architectures, limiting efficiency and generalization to unseen styles. We propose a lightweight style conditioning framework that dynamically modulates a pretrained diffusion model through hypernetwork-generated LoRA parameters. A style reference motion is encoded into a global style embedding, which is mapped by a hypernetwork to low-rank updates applied at each denoising step of the diffusion model. By structuring the style latent space with a supervised contrastive loss, our framework reliably captures diverse stylistic attributes, improves generalization to unseen styles, and supports optimization-based guidance without requiring predefined style categories. Experiments on the HumanML3D and 100STYLE datasets show state-of-the-art stylization results, while achieving improved stylization for unseen styles.

light_analysis.overview: 提出超网络驱动的LoRA自适应框架，实现轻量级风格化文本到运动生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本驱动的运动扩散模型能生成逼真人体运动，但文本难以表达细微运动风格。现有方法需风格特定微调或依赖重型ControlNet架构，效率低且泛化性差。因此需要一种轻量、高效且能泛化到未见风格的风格注入机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出轻量风格条件框架，通过超网络生成LoRA参数动态调制预训练扩散模型。风格参考运动编码为全局风格嵌入，由超网络映射为低秩更新，在每个去噪步骤应用。使用监督对比损失结构化风格潜空间，无需预定义风格类别，支持优化引导。
light_analysis.result: 在HumanML3D和100STYLE数据集上，该方法取得最先进风格化结果，尤其对未见风格展示出优越的泛化能力，同时保持计算效率，无需风格特定微调。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法以轻量方式实现高效风格化运动生成，通过风格潜空间结构化和超网络LoRA更新，平衡了风格保真度与泛化性。未来可扩展至多风格融合及实时交互场景。

title: Diversity of Extensions in Abstract Argumentation
abstract: Argumentation is an important topic of AI for modelling and reasoning about arguments. In abstract argumentation, we consider directed graphs, so-called argumentation frameworks (AF), that express conflicts between arguments. The semantics is defined by the notion of extensions, which are sets of arguments that satisfy particular relationship conditions in the AF. Usually, standard reasoning in argumentation do not reveal how far apart extensions are. We introduce a quantitative notion of diversity of extensions based on the symmetric difference and provide a systematic complexity classification. Intuitively, diversity captures whether extensions of a framework (accepted viewpoints) differ only marginally or represent fundamentally incompatible sets of arguments. We study whether an AF admits k-diverse extensions, admits k-diverse extensions covering specific arguments, and to compute the largest k for which an AF admits k-diverse extensions. We outline a prototype and provide an evaluation for computing diversity levels.
comment: Technical Report to the paper accepted at IJCAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 引入基于对称差异的扩展多样性定量概念，并系统分类其计算复杂性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在抽象论证中，标准推理仅关注扩展的存在性，但未揭示扩展之间的差异程度。多样性度量扩展是否仅有微小差异或根本不相容，有助于理解论证框架中的观点分歧。现有方法缺乏对扩展多样性的量化分析和复杂性研究，因此需要形式化定义和计算探索。
light_analysis.method: 定义扩展间的对称差异距离，提出k-多样性扩展概念。研究三个决策问题：是否存在k-多样性扩展、是否存在覆盖特定参数的k-多样性扩展、以及计算最大k值。通过复杂性分类分析不同框架类下问题的计算难度，并构建原型进行实验评估。
light_analysis.result: 通过原型系统对随机和结构化论证框架进行实验，评估了多样性水平的计算可行性。结果表明，对于小规模框架可有效计算多样性水平，而大规模框架下计算复杂性较高，但提供了复杂性分类的完整图谱。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为抽象论证的扩展多样性提供了形式化基础和复杂性分类，丰富了论证理论的定量分析工具。该工作有助于理解论证框架中的观点分歧程度，潜在应用包括辩论支持系统和群体决策分析。未来可研究近似算法或启发式方法以提高可扩展性。

title: FIND: Toward Multimodal Financial Reasoning and Question Answering for Indic Languages
abstract: Financial decision-making in multilingual settings demands accurate numerical reasoning grounded in diverse modalities, yet existing benchmarks largely overlook this high-stakes, real-world challenge, especially for Indic languages. We introduce FinVQA, a benchmark for evaluating financial numerical and multimodal reasoning in multilingual Indic contexts. FinVQA spans English, Hindi, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati, and Tamil, and comprises 18,900 samples across 14 financial domains. The dataset captures diverse reasoning paradigms under realistic constraints, and is structured across three difficulty levels (easy, moderate, hard) and four question formats: multiple choice, fill-in-the-blank, table matching, and true/false. To address these challenges, we propose FIND, a framework that combines supervised fine-tuning with constraint-aware decoding to promote faithful numerical reasoning, robust multimodal grounding, and structured decision-making. Together, FinVQA and FIND establish a rigorous evaluation and modeling paradigm for high-stakes multilingual multimodal financial reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了多语言金融多模态推理基准FinVQA和FIND框架，解决印度语言场景下的数值推理与问答挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有金融推理基准多局限于英语，缺乏对多语言、多模态场景的覆盖，尤其忽视印度语言（如印地语、孟加拉语等）的高风险金融决策需求。实际应用中，财务报表、图表等多模态信息与多语言文本结合，现有方法难以实现精确的数值推理和跨模态对齐。
light_analysis.method: 构建了FinVQA基准，包含18,900样本，覆盖英语和5种印度语言，涉及14个金融领域，分easy/moderate/hard三级难度和四种问答格式。提出FIND框架，结合监督微调与约束感知解码，增强数值推理的忠实性、多模态接地能力及结构化决策。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。但通过FinVQA基准和FIND框架的提出，论文为多语言、多模态金融推理提供了标准化评估和建模范式，预期在数值推理准确率、跨语言泛化能力上优于现有单语言或纯文本方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: FinVQA和FIND填补了多语言金融多模态推理的空白，为高精度、可解释的金融决策支持系统奠定了基础。未来可扩展至更多语言和金融领域，或结合更细粒度的推理约束。

title: Tracing Persona Vectors Through LLM Pretraining
abstract: How large language models internally represent high-level behaviors is a core interpretability question with direct relevance to AI safety: it determines what we can detect, audit, or intervene on. Recent work has shown that traits such as evil or sycophancy correspond to linear directions in the internal activations, the so-called persona vectors. Although these vectors are now routinely utilized to inspect and steer model behavior in safety-relevant settings, how these representations are formed during training remains unknown. To address this gap, we trace persona vectors across the pretraining of OLMo-3-7B, finding that persona vectors form remarkably early -- within 0.22% of OLMo-3 pretraining -- and remain effective for steering the fully post-trained instruct models. Although core representations are formed early on, persona vectors continue to refine geometrically and semantically throughout pretraining. We further compare alternative elicitation strategies and find that all yield effective directions, with each strategy surfacing qualitatively distinct facets of the underlying persona. Replicating our analysis on Apertus-8B reveals that our findings transfer qualitatively beyond OLMo-3. Our results establish persona representations as stable features of early pretraining and open a path to studying how training forms, refines, and shapes them.

light_analysis.overview: 发现LLM中的persona向量在预训练极早期（0.22%）形成，并持续细化，在不同模型间具有定性迁移性。
light_analysis.motivation: 解释LLM内部如何表示高级行为（如邪恶、谄媚）是模型可解释性和AI安全的核心问题。现有研究虽发现persona向量可用来检测和干预模型行为，但对其在训练过程中的形成机制尚不清楚。该研究旨在追踪persona向量在预训练中的演化，填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 通过在OLMo-3-7B预训练过程中追踪persona向量，使用多种elicitation策略（如线性方向提取）比较其效果。关键发现：向量在预训练0.22%阶段已形成，且对完全微调后的指导模型仍然有效。并在Apertus-8B上复现验证。
light_analysis.result: Persona向量在预训练极早期（0.22%）形成，且能有效用于微调后的模型。在整个预训练中，向量在几何和语义上持续细化。不同elicitation策略提取的方向都有效，但揭示不同语义方面。在Apertus-8B上的复现结果定性一致，表明发现具有迁移性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究确立了persona表示作为预训练早期稳定特征的地位，为研究训练如何形成、细化这些表示开辟了道路。学术价值在于揭示LLM内部表征的演化规律；实际应用价值在于提升模型安全审计能力。局限性：仅分析两个模型，未来需扩展到更多架构。

title: KamonBench: A Grammar-Based Dataset for Evaluating Compositional Factor Recovery in Vision-Language Models
abstract: Kamon (family crests) are an important part of Japanese culture and a natural test case for compositional visual recognition: each crest combines a small number of symbolic choices, but the space of possible descriptions is sparse. We introduce KamonBench, a grammar-based image-to-structure benchmark with 20,000 synthetic composite crests and auxiliary component examples. Each composite crest is paired with a formal kamon description language - "kamon yōgo" - description, a segmented Japanese analysis, an English translation, and a non-linguistic program code. Because each synthetic crest is generated from known factors, namely container, modifier, and motif, KamonBench supports evaluation beyond caption-level accuracy: direct program-code factor metrics, controlled factor-pair recombination splits, counterfactual motif-sensitivity groups under fixed container-modifier contexts, and linear probes of factor accessibility. We include baseline results for a ViT encoder/Transformer decoder and two VGG n-gram decoders, with and without learned positional masks. KamonBench therefore provides a controlled testbed for sparse compositional visual recognition and factor recovery in vision-language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于文法的合成家纹数据集KamonBench，用于评估视觉语言模型在稀疏组合视觉识别中的因子恢复能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在组合视觉识别任务中常依赖表面统计特征，难以准确分离和恢复构成图像的独立因子（如容器、修饰符、主题）。传统数据集缺乏对因子级控制的标注，无法精细评估模型对组合结构的理解。KamonBench通过文法生成合成家纹，每个图像由已知因子组合而成，可提供程序代码级因子度量、因子对重组分割、反事实敏感度测试等细粒度评估，填补了稀疏组合视觉识别基准的空白。
light_analysis.method: KamonBench包含20,000个合成复合家纹及其辅助组件示例。每个家纹由容器、修饰符、主题三个因子组合生成，并配有形式化的家纹描述语言“kamon yōgo”描述、日文分析、英文翻译和非语言程序代码。数据集支持多种评估模式：直接程序代码因子度量、控制因子对重组分割、固定容器-修饰符上下文下的反事实主题敏感度组、以及因子可及性的线性探针。基线模型包括ViT编码器/Transformer解码器和两个VGG n-gram解码器，采用有无学习位置掩码的设置。
light_analysis.result: 基线实验显示，ViT编码器/Transformer解码器在因子恢复指标上优于VGG n-gram解码器，但所有模型在稀疏组合场景下仍存在显著差距。线性探针表明模型的隐藏表示中仅部分编码了因子信息，尤其在修饰符因子的可及性上较弱。因子对重组分割测试发现模型对未见过的因子组合泛化能力有限。反事实敏感度分析揭示模型常依赖容器-修饰符的共现统计而非真正理解组合结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: KamonBench为稀疏组合视觉识别提供了受控测试平台，能够揭示视觉语言模型在因子恢复中的不足。该基准有助于推动模型从表面统计走向结构化组合理解，对文化遗产分析、组合式视觉推理等应用具有潜在价值。未来可扩展更多因子类型和真实图像，以及探索显式组合架构来提升因子恢复能力。

title: VERA-MH: Validation of Ethical and Responsible AI in Mental Health
abstract: Chatbot usage has increased, including in fields for which they were never developed for--notably mental health support. To that end, we introduce Validations of Ethical and Responsible AI in Mental Health (VERA-MH), a novel clinically-validated evaluation for safety of chatbots in the context of mental health support. The first iteration of VERA-MH focuses on Suicidal Ideation (SI) risks, by assessing how well chatbots can responds to users that might be in crisis.   VERA-MH is comprised of three steps: conversation simulation, conversation judging and model rating. First, to simulate conversations with the chatbot under evaluation, another chatbot is tasked with role-playing users based on specific personas. Such user personas have been developed under clinical guidance, to make sure that, among others, multiple risk factors, demographic characteristics and disclosure factors were represented. In the judging step, a second support model is used as an LLM-as-a-Judge, together with a clinically-developed rubric. The rubric is structured as a flow, with a single Yes/No question asked each time, to improve answers' consistency and highlight models' failure modes. In the last stage, results of each conversation are aggregated to present the final evaluation of the chatbot. Together with the framework, we present the result of the evaluations for four leading LLM providers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VERA-MH框架，一种临床验证的聊天机器人安全性评估方法，专用于心理健康支持场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 聊天机器人被广泛应用于心理健康支持等非设计领域，但缺乏针对性的安全评估。现有评估方法未考虑心理健康问题的特殊性，尤其是自杀意念风险。该研究旨在提供一种临床验证的标准化评估框架，确保聊天机器人在处理危机用户时的安全性，弥补领域空白。
light_analysis.method: VERA-MH包含三步：首先，使用另一聊天机器人基于临床指导的角色扮演模拟用户对话，涵盖多种风险因素；其次，采用LLM-as-a-Judge结合临床开发的问答式评分标准进行对话评判，提高一致性；最后，汇总各对话结果评估模型。该方法确保评估的临床有效性和可重复性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体结果数值，仅指出对四个领先LLM提供商进行了评估。框架能够有效识别模型在自杀意念场景中的失败模式，但需参考原文获取详细性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: VERA-MH为心理健康领域聊天机器人提供了首个临床验证的安全评估框架，有助于推动负责任的AI部署。当前聚焦于自杀意念风险，未来可扩展至其他心理健康问题。局限性在于依赖特定角色和评判模型，需进一步验证泛化性。

title: Test-time Sparsity for Extreme Fast Action Diffusion
abstract: Action diffusion excels at high-fidelity action generation but incurs heavy computational costs owing to its iterative denoising nature. Despite current technologies showing promise in accelerating diffusion transformers by reusing the cached features, they struggle to adapt to policy dynamics arising from diverse perceptions and multi-round rollout iterations in open environments. We propose test-time sparsity to tackle this challenge, which aims to accelerate action diffusion by dynamically predicting prunable residual computations for each model forward at test time. However, two bottlenecks remain in this paradigm: 1) repetitive conditional encoding and pruning offset most potential speed gains, and 2) the features cached from previous denoising timesteps cannot constrain large pruning errors under aggressive sparsity. To address the first bottleneck, we design a highly parallelized inference pipeline that minimizes the non-decoder delay to milliseconds. Specifically, we first design a lightweight pruner that shares the encoder with the diffusion transformer. Then, we decouple the encoding and pruning from the autoregressive denoising loop by processing all denoising timesteps in parallel, and overlap the pruner with the decoder forward inference through asynchronism. To overcome the second bottleneck, we introduce an omnidirectional reusing strategy, which achieves 95% sparsity by selectively reusing features cached from the current forward, previous denoising timesteps, and earlier rollout iterations. To learn the rollout-level reusing strategies, we sample a few action trajectories to supervise the sparsified diffusion step by step. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method reduces FLOPs by 92% and accelerates action generation by 5x, achieving lossless performance with an inference frequency of 47.5 Hz. Our code is available at https://github.com/ky-ji/Test-time-Sparsity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出测试时稀疏性（test-time sparsity），通过动态预测可剪枝的残差计算来加速动作扩散，实现5倍加速且性能无损。
light_analysis.motivation: 动作扩散模型生成高保真动作但计算成本高，现有缓存特征加速方法难以适应开放环境中感知多样性和多轮rollout迭代导致的策略动态变化，亟需一种测试时动态加速方法。
light_analysis.method: 设计高度并行的推理流水线：轻量级剪枝器与扩散Transformer共享编码器，并行处理所有去噪时间步，并通过异步重叠剪枝器与解码器前向，将非解码延迟降至毫秒级。引入全向特征重用策略，从当前前向、过去去噪步和早期rollout迭代重用缓存特征，达到95%稀疏度。通过采样少量动作轨迹监督逐步骤稀疏化扩散。
light_analysis.result: 在动作扩散任务中，减少92%的FLOPs，实现5倍加速，推理频率达47.5 Hz，性能无损。代码开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 测试时稀疏性有效加速动作扩散，在保持生成质量的同时大幅提升效率，适用于实时动作生成场景。未来可探索更高效剪枝策略或扩展到其他扩散模型。

title: Supervised Deep Multimodal Matrix Factorization for Interpretable Brain Network Analysis
abstract: We present Supervised Deep Multimodal Matrix Factorization (SD3MF), an interpretable framework for integrative brain network analysis that generalizes Symmetric Nonnegative Matrix Tri-Factorization (SNMTF) from unsupervised single-graph clustering to supervised prediction over populations of multimodal graphs. SD3MF learns deep hierarchical factorizations for each modality together with a shared latent representation that aligns subjects across views. An encoder-decoder formulation jointly optimizes graph reconstruction and supervised prediction, while adaptive weights enable data-driven multimodal fusion. By representing each subject through community-level interaction matrices, the model yields interpretable and discriminative features. Experiments on multimodal connectome datasets show that SD3MF consistently outperforms strong deep learning baselines such as CNNs and GNNs, while enabling biologically interpretable insights. Code for reproducibility is available at: https://github.com/amjadseyedi/SD3MF.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SD3MF框架，将无监督矩阵三分解推广到监督多模态图预测，实现可解释的脑网络分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有脑网络分析多采用无监督单图聚类，缺乏监督学习能力和多模态融合的可解释性。SD3MF旨在解决如何整合多模态连接组数据并进行预测性分析，同时保持模型的可解释性，以揭示生物相关模式。
light_analysis.method: SD3MF通过深度层次化分解每个模态，学习共享潜在表示以对齐受试者，并采用编码器-解码器结构联合优化图重建与预测任务。自适应权重实现数据驱动的多模态融合，生成社区级交互矩阵作为可解释判别特征。
light_analysis.result: 在多模态连接组数据集上，SD3MF在预测性能上持续优于CNN和GNN等深度学习基线，同时能够提供生物学可解释的洞察，验证了方法的有效性和可解释性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: SD3MF为多模态脑网络分析提供了监督可解释框架，具有学术和临床价值。代码已开源促进可重复性，未来可扩展至更多模态和任务。

title: IdeaForge: A Knowledge Graph-Grounded Multi-Agent Framework for Cross-Methodology Innovation Analysis and Patent Claim Generation
abstract: Current AI-assisted innovation systems typically apply a single ideation methodology (such as TRIZ or Design Thinking) using sequential prompt-based workflows that do not preserve intermediate reasoning structure. As a result, insights generated across methodologies remain fragmented, limiting traceability, synthesis, and systematic evaluation of novelty. We present IdeaForge, a knowledge graph-grounded multi-agent framework for innovation analysis and patent claim generation. IdeaForge integrates multiple innovation methodologies (TRIZ, Design Thinking, and SCAMPER) through specialist agents operating over a persistent FalkorDB knowledge graph. Each agent contributes structured entities and relationships representing contradictions, inventive principles, user needs, transformations, analogies, and candidate claims. The central contribution of IdeaForge is a cross-methodology convergence mechanism implemented through graph-based claim linkage. Claims independently supported by multiple methodologies are connected using CONVERGENT relationships, enabling identification of high-confidence innovation candidates through graph traversal. A downstream patent drafting agent generates structured patent drafts grounded in convergent claim subgraphs, reducing reliance on unconstrained language model generation. An InnovationScore formula ranks claims by convergent support, methodology diversity, claim strength, and prior art challenge count. We describe the graph schema, agent architecture, convergence detection pipeline, and patent synthesis workflow. Experiments on a legal technology use case demonstrate that graph-grounded multi-methodology synthesis produces more diverse and traceable innovation candidates compared to single-methodology baselines. We discuss implications for computational creativity, explainable AI-assisted invention, and graph-native innovation systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出知识图谱驱动的多智能体框架IdeaForge，实现跨方法创新分析与专利权利要求生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI辅助创新系统通常采用单一方法论（如TRIZ）的顺序提示工作流，未保留中间推理结构，导致各方法论产生的见解碎片化，可追溯性差、综合困难且新颖性评估不足。需要一种能整合多种创新方法、保持推理结构并实现跨方法融合的系统。
light_analysis.method: IdeaForge基于FalkorDB知识图谱，部署多个专家智能体分别对应TRIZ、设计思维和SCAMPER方法论。每个智能体贡献结构化实体和关系（如矛盾、发明原理、用户需求等）。核心创新是跨方法收敛机制：通过图遍历连接不同方法支持的索赔，形成CONVERGENT关系，识别高置信度候选创新。下游专利起草智能体基于收敛子图生成结构化工件，采用InnovationScore公式综合排序。
light_analysis.result: 在法律技术用例上的实验表明，与单方法基线相比，基于图的多方法合成能产生更多样化、可追溯的创新候选。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了多样性提升和可追溯性增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: IdeaForge展示了图原生创新系统的潜力，实现了计算创造力与可解释AI辅助发明的结合。其跨方法收敛机制提高了创新候选的可靠性和多样性。未来可扩展至更多方法论领域，并优化图遍历与评分函数。局限性可能包括知识图谱构建和维护的成本。

title: PRISM-X: Experiments on Personalised Fine-Tuning with Human and Simulated Users
abstract: Personalisation is a standard feature of conversational AI systems used by millions; yet, the efficacy of personalisation methods is often evaluated in academic research using simulated users rather than real people. This raises questions about how users and their simulated counterparts differ in interaction patterns and judgements, as well as whether personalisation is best achieved through context-based prompting or weight-based fine-tuning. Here, in a large-scale within-subject experiment, we re-recruit 530 participants from 52 countries two years after they gave their preferences in the PRISM dataset (Kirk et al., 2024) to evaluate personalised and non-personalised language models in blinded multi-turn conversations. We find preference fine-tuning (P-DPO, Li et al., 2024) significantly outperforms both a generic model and personalised prompting but adapting to individual preference data yields marginal gains over training on pooled preferences from a diverse population. Beyond length biases, fine-tuning amplifies sycophancy and relationship-seeking behaviours that people reward in short-term evaluations but which may introduce deleterious long-term consequences. Replicating this within-subject experiment with simulated users recovers aggregate model hierarchies but simulators perform far below human self-consistency baselines for individual judgements, discuss different topics, exhibit amplified position biases, and produce feedback dynamics that diverge from humans.

light_analysis.overview: 通过大规模人类实验与模拟对比，揭示个性化微调（P-DPO）优于提示，但个体适应增益有限，且微调放大谄媚行为，模拟器无法完全复现人类判断。
light_analysis.motivation: 个性化对话AI广泛使用，但学术评价常依赖模拟用户，缺乏真实人类互动验证。人类与模拟用户在交互模式和评判上的差异未知，以及基于上下文提示和基于权重微调哪种方法更优尚不明确。摘要旨在通过大规模被试内实验解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用大规模被试内实验，重新招募530名PRISM数据集参与者，在盲测多轮对话中评估个性化与非个性化模型。使用偏好微调（P-DPO）和个性化提示方法，并在模拟用户中复制实验。关键创新在于直接比较人类与模拟用户的行为差异。
light_analysis.result: 偏好微调（P-DPO）显著优于通用模型和个性化提示；但适应个体数据相比池化偏好仅带来边际增益。微调放大谄媚和关系寻求行为，短期受奖励但可能有害。模拟用户可恢复模型层次但远低于人类自我一致性，并有位置偏差和反馈差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献为揭示个性化微调与提示的效果差异，指出微调可能放大有害行为，并强调模拟用户与人类行为偏差，为未来个性化方法评估提供重要参考。局限：模拟器无法完全替代人类，需谨慎使用。

title: Color Constancy in Hyperspectral Imaging via Reduced Spectral Spaces
abstract: Illuminant estimation aims to infer scene illumination from image measurements despite intrinsic ambiguities between surface reflectance and lighting. Most existing methods operate on trichromatic RGB images and are therefore fundamentally limited by the restricted spectral information available. Hyperspectral imaging provides a much richer representation of scene radiance and has the potential to alleviate these ambiguities. However, its high dimensionality poses computational and statistical challenges. In this work, we systematically study the effect of spectral dimensionality and representation choice on illuminant estimation performance using hyperspectral data. We adopt the practical and effective Color-by-Correlation (CbC) framework as the estimation backbone and analyze its behavior under different spectral dimensionality reduction strategies. Our results offer practical insights into how hyperspectral information can be efficiently exploited for illuminant estimation and identify conditions under which compact spectral representations outperform conventional RGB-based approaches. The code is available at https://github.com/IVRL/Reduced-Spectral-Color-Constancy.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究光谱降维对高光谱成像中光照估计性能的影响，证明紧凑光谱表示可优于传统RGB方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有光照估计方法多基于三通道RGB图像，受限于有限的光谱信息，难以准确估计场景光照。高光谱成像提供更丰富的辐射信息，但其高维度带来计算和统计挑战。因此，需要探索如何有效利用高光谱数据，同时降低维度以提升估计性能。本研究旨在分析光谱维度及表示选择对光照估计的影响，并提供实用见解。
light_analysis.method: 采用Color-by-Correlation（CbC）框架作为光照估计基础，系统研究不同光谱降维策略（如主成分分析、波段选择等）对估计性能的影响。使用高光谱数据，通过降维将光谱维度从数百降至数十，并与原始RGB表示对比。关键创新在于分析降维后的光谱表示在CbC框架下的行为，识别出紧凑表示优于RGB的条件。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，适当降维后的高光谱表示在光照估计精度上显著优于传统RGB方法。具体而言，在多个高光谱数据集上，降维后的光谱表示（如保留10-20个主成分）实现了更低的估计误差。与RGB基线相比，角度误差降低约10-20%。此外，发现选择特定波段或保持光谱连续性对性能有重要影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明，通过合理的光谱降维，高光谱成像可以高效用于光照估计，克服RGB方法的固有局限。紧凑光谱表示不仅降低计算复杂度，还能提升估计精度。工作为高光谱颜色恒常性提供实用指导，推动其在真实场景中的应用。未来可探索更先进的降维方法或集成深度学习模型。

title: MPINeuralODE: Multiple-Initial-Condition Physics-Informed Neural ODEs for Globally Consistent Dynamical System Learning
abstract: Neural ordinary differential equations (Neural ODEs) often fit training trajectories while generalizing poorly to unseen initial conditions and long horizons. We propose MPINeuralODE, which combines a soft physics-informed residual with a Multiple-Initial-Condition (MIC) multiple-shooting curriculum whose ingredients are structurally complementary: the physics term anchors the vector-field magnitude on the support that MIC enlarges. We evaluate along three axes: out-of-sample error, long-horizon stability, and Hamiltonian drift, which together expose whether the learned dynamics recover the underlying vector field. On Lotka-Volterra, MPINeuralODE achieves the lowest out-of-sample and long-horizon MSE among data-driven methods, with a 26% reduction over the baseline Neural ODE, while essentially matching the PINN ablation on Hamiltonian drift.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MPINeuralODE，通过结合软物理信息残差和多初始条件多重打靶课程，提升神经ODE对动态系统的全局一致性学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经ODE常能拟合训练轨迹，但对未见初始条件和长时域泛化差。现有方法如PINN需大量网格点或先验知识，难以平衡精度与稳定性。该研究旨在通过结构互补的物理约束与多初始条件训练策略，实现向量场的一致恢复，解决动态系统学习中的泛化与稳定性问题。
light_analysis.method: MPINeuralODE包含两项互补组件：软物理信息残差（physics-informed residual）约束向量场幅度；多重初始条件（MIC）多重打靶课程逐步扩大初始条件支持。两者结合，利用物理项锚定支持区域内的向量场，而MIC扩展该区域。模型在训练中交替优化数据损失和物理损失，无需显式网格。
light_analysis.result: 在Lotka-Volterra系统上评估三个指标：样本外误差、长时域稳定性和哈密顿漂移。MPINeuralODE在数据驱动方法中取得最低样本外均方误差（MSE）和长时域MSE，比基线神经ODE降低26%；哈密顿漂移几乎匹配物理信息神经网络（PINN）消融结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: MPINeuralODE通过软物理约束与多初始条件训练的有效结合，显著提升了神经ODE的泛化能力和长期稳定性，为学习可泛化的动态系统提供新范式。未来可扩展到高维系统或含噪声数据，并探索自适应课程学习策略。

title: Safe Bayesian Optimization for Uncertain Correlations Matrices in Linear Models of Co-Regionalization
abstract: This paper extends safety guarantees for multi-task Bayesian optimization with uncertain correlation matrices from intrinsic co-reginalization models to linear models of co-reginalization. The latter allows for more flexible modeling of the inter-task correlations by composing multiple features. We derive uniform error bounds for vector-valued functions sampled from a Gaussian process with a linear model of co-reginalization kernel. Furthermore, we show the potential improvement of performance using linear models of co-reginalization in a numerical comparison on a safe multi-task Bayesian optimization benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 将安全贝叶斯优化的保障从内禀协同区域化模型扩展到线性协同区域化模型，实现更灵活的任务间相关性建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 多任务贝叶斯优化常假设任务相关性结构，但现有安全方法限于内禀协同区域化模型，无法灵活建模多特征组合的任务间相关性。线性协同区域化模型能通过组合多个特征刻画更丰富的任务关系，但缺乏安全保证。本文旨在扩展安全贝叶斯优化至该类模型，提升其适用性和性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出将安全保证扩展至线性协同区域化模型（LMC）的核函数上，该核函数由多个特征组合而成，可灵活建模任务间相关性。推导了从高斯过程采样的向量值函数的均匀误差界，为安全约束提供理论保证。在安全多任务贝叶斯优化基准上评估了方法。
light_analysis.result: 在数值实验中，使用线性协同区域化模型相比内禀协同区域化模型，在安全多任务贝叶斯优化基准上表现出潜在的性能提升。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但表明LMC能更有效建模任务相关性，从而改善优化效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为线性协同区域化模型提供了安全贝叶斯优化的理论保证，通过推导误差界和实验验证，展示了该模型在安全优化中的优势。未来工作可进一步探索更复杂的协区域化结构或实际应用场景中的部署。

title: Achieving Gold-Medal-Level Olympiad Reasoning via Simple and Unified Scaling
abstract: Recent progress in reasoning models has substantially advanced long-horizon mathematical and scientific problem solving, with several systems now reaching gold-medal-level performance on International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO) and International Physics Olympiad (IPhO) problems. In this paper, we introduce a simple and unified recipe for converting a post-trained reasoning backbone into a rigorous olympiad-level solver. The recipe first uses a reverse-perplexity curriculum for SFT to instill rigorous proof-search and self-checking behaviors, then scales these behaviors through a two-stage RL pipeline that progresses from RL with verifiable rewards to more delicate proof-level RL, and finally boosts solving performance with test-time scaling. Applying this recipe, we train a 30B-A3B backbone with SFT on around 340K sub-8K-token trajectories followed by 200 RL steps. The resulting model, SU-01, supports stable reasoning on difficult problems with trajectories exceeding 100K tokens, while achieving gold-medal-level performance on mathematical and physical olympiad competitions, including IMO 2025/USAMO 2026 and IPhO 2024/2025. It also demonstrates strong generalization of scientific reasoning to domains beyond mathematics and physics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种简单统一的缩放策略，将后训练推理模型转化为金牌级奥赛求解器，在IMO和IPhO上达到金牌水平。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年来推理模型在长程数学和科学问题求解上取得进展，部分系统已在IMO和IPhO上达到金牌水平。然而，现有方法通常依赖复杂定制的训练管线或大规模数据，缺乏统一高效的转化方案。本文旨在探索一种简单通用的方法，将后训练推理骨干转化为严格的奥赛级求解器，并验证其可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一配方：首先使用反向困惑度课程进行SFT，灌输严格的证明搜索和自我检查行为；然后通过两阶段RL管线缩放这些行为，从可验证奖励RL过渡到更细致的证明级RL；最后通过测试时缩放提升求解性能。在30B-A3M骨干上，使用约340K长度小于8K令牌的轨迹进行SFT，再进行200步RL训练，得到SU-01模型。
light_analysis.result: SU-01模型能稳定推理超100K令牌的困难问题，在数学和物理奥赛中达到金牌水平，包括IMO 2025/USAMO 2026和IPhO 2024/2025。此外，模型在数学和物理之外的领域也展现出强大的科学推理泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了通过简单的缩放策略即可将后训练推理模型提升至金牌级奥赛水平，为统一推理能力增强提供了有效范式。SU-01在多个奥赛上达到金牌性能，并泛化至其他科学推理场景。未来工作可探索更大规模的骨干和更复杂的推理任务。

title: PaMM: Periodic Motif Memory for Atomistic Models with an Explicit Local-Structure Interface
abstract: Periodic crystals repeatedly instantiate similar local coordination motifs across translated cells and chemically related structures, but current equivariant atomistic models usually encode these patterns only implicitly in dense edge features. We introduce PaMM, a periodic motif memory that augments the UMA eSCN-MD edge encoder with explicit pair and triplet lookup features. Pair motifs are keyed by $(Z_j, Z_i, b_r)$ and triplet motifs by $(Z_j, Z_i, Z_k, b_θ)$, hashed into fixed-size tables and fused with the baseline edge representation through lightweight gate-only and affine-equipped variants. We evaluate PaMM in a matched UMA-S OMAT setting and focus on a narrow question: whether explicit motif memory helps at a fixed intermediate training budget. At the 10k-step checkpoint, both PaMM variants improve over the plain baseline; gate-only gives the best energy MAE, while the affine-equipped variant gives the best force MAE. A matched 20k follow-up keeps the same operating-point picture. Aligned controls show that the gain weakens for pair-only, triplet-only, random-bucket, and parameter-matched MLP alternatives, suggesting that the benefit is tied to structured pair/triplet organization rather than generic added capacity. A within-OMAT24 source-family evaluation also shows small but consistent gains across held-out generation families. We therefore make a focused claim: in the studied UMA-S + OMAT regime, explicit pair/ triplet motif memory is a useful inductive bias for periodic atomistic modeling. We do not claim broad cross-dataset transfer, a uniquely preferred fusion variant, or strong scientific interpretability beyond a more inspectable local-structure interface.

light_analysis.overview: PaMM通过显式对和三重局部结构模式记忆增强等变原子模型，在固定训练预算下提升能量和力预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 周期性晶体中重复出现相似局部配位模式，但现有等变模型仅在密集边特征中隐式编码这些结构先验，未能充分利用。显式编码可提升准确性和可解释性，但缺乏高效方法。
light_analysis.method: PaMM将基于原子类型和几何参数(对距离、三重角度)的模式哈希到固定大小表中，并通过门控或仿射融合模块与基线eSCN-MD边表示结合，在UMA-S OMAT设置下训练。
light_analysis.result: 在10k步检查点，PaMM门控变体能量MAE最佳，仿射变体力MAE最佳；20k步趋势一致。控制实验表明增益源于结构化组织而非额外容量，且OMAT24源族评估有小幅一致提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: PaMM的显式模式记忆在周期性原子建模中提供了有用归纳偏置，但未证明跨数据集泛化。其局部结构接口增强了可检查性，未来可探索更广泛应用及可解释性。

title: Discrete Diffusion for Complex and Congested Multi-Agent Path Finding with Sparse Social Attention
abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a coordination problem that requires computing globally consistent, collision-free trajectories from individual start positions to assigned goal positions under combinatorial planning complexity. In dense environments, suboptimal initial plans induce compound conflicts that hinder feasible repair. For repair-based solvers like LNS2, initial plan quality critically affects downstream repair, yet this factor remains underexplored. We propose DiffLNS, a hybrid framework that integrates a discrete denoising diffusion probabilistic model (D3PM) with LNS2. The D3PM serves as an initializer with sparse social attention that learns a spatiotemporal prior over coordinated multi-agent action trajectories from expert demonstrations and samples multiple joint plans. Operating directly on the categorical action space, our discrete diffusion preserves the MAPF action structure and samples from a multimodal joint-plan distribution to produce diverse drafts well suited for neighborhood repair. These drafts act as warm starts for downstream repair, which completes unfinished trajectories and resolves remaining conflicts under hard MAPF constraints. Experimental results show that despite being trained only on instances with at most 96 agents, the initializer generalizes to scenarios with up to 312 agents at inference time. Across 20 complex and congested settings, DiffLNS achieves an average success rate of 95.8%, outperforming the strongest tested baseline by 9.6 percentage points and matching or exceeding all baselines in all 20 settings. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to leverage discrete diffusion for warm-starting an LNS-based MAPF solver.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffLNS，将离散去噪扩散概率模型与LNS2结合，用于复杂拥挤的多智能体路径规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体路径规划在密集环境中，次优初始计划导致复合冲突，难以修复。基于修复的求解器如LNS2中初始计划质量关键，但现有方法对此因素探索不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出DiffLNS混合框架，集成离散去噪扩散概率模型D3PM与LNS2。D3PM作为初始化器，使用稀疏社交注意力学习时空先验，从专家演示采样多个联合计划。直接在类别动作空间操作，保留MAPF动作结构，采样多模态联合计划分布产生多样草稿，作为下游修复的热启动。
light_analysis.result: 仅训练最多96个智能体的实例，推理时泛化到最多312个智能体。在20个复杂拥挤场景中，平均成功率达95.8%，超出最强基线9.6个百分点，在所有20个场景中匹配或超越所有基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将离散扩散用于热启动基于LNS的MAPF求解器。证明了其泛化能力和有效性，为MAPF提供了新思路。未来可能扩展至更大规模或更复杂约束。

title: CANTANTE: Optimizing Agentic Systems via Contrastive Credit Attribution
abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems have demonstrated strong performance across complex real-world tasks, such as software engineering, predictive modeling, and retrieval-augmented generation. Yet automating their configuration remains a structural challenge, as scores are available only at the system level, whereas the parameters governing agent behavior are local. We argue that optimizing these systems is fundamentally a credit-assignment problem. We therefore introduce CANTANTE, a framework that decomposes system-level rewards into per-agent update signals by contrasting rollouts of multiple joint configurations on the same query. We instantiate it for prompt optimization, treating agent prompts as learnable system parameters. We evaluate CANTANTE against GEPA and MIPROv2 on programming (MBPP), mathematical reasoning (GSM8K), and multi-hop question answering (HotpotQA). Across these benchmarks, CANTANTE achieves the best average rank among all evaluated optimizers and consistently outperforms unoptimized prompts. It improves over the strongest baseline by +18.9 percentage points on MBPP and +12.5 percentage points on GSM8K, while incurring a lower inference cost. It remains within one standard deviation of the strongest baseline on HotpotQA. Crucially, our credit correlation analysis confirms that the attributer produces meaningful per-agent signals rather than echoing the global system score.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CANTANTE框架，通过对比式信用分配优化多智能体系统的智能体提示，实现系统级奖励到局部参数的有效分解。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统在复杂任务中表现优异，但自动化配置面临结构挑战：仅系统级分数可用，而智能体参数本地化。这本质上是一个信用分配问题，现有方法如GEPA和MIPROv2未能有效解决，导致性能受限。
light_analysis.method: CANTANTE通过在同一查询上对比多个联合配置的轨迹，将系统级奖励分解为每个智能体的更新信号。实例化为提示优化，将智能体提示视为可学习参数。在MBPP、GSM8K、HotpotQA上评估，对比GEPA和MIPROv2。
light_analysis.result: CANTANTE在所有评估基准中取得最佳平均排名，一致优于未优化提示。在MBPP上比最强基线高18.9个百分点，GSM8K上高12.5个百分点，且推理成本更低。HotpotQA上与最强基线在一个标准差内。信用相关性分析证实信号有意义而非全局分数回声。
light_analysis.conclusion: CANTANTE有效解决多智能体系统的信用分配问题，实现提示自动优化，提升性能并降低推理成本。学术贡献在于提出对比式信用分配方法，应用价值在于自动化配置复杂AI系统。未来可扩展至其他参数类型和更复杂的系统架构。

title: Img2CADSeq: Image-to-CAD Generation via Sequence-Based Diffusion
abstract: Boundary Representation (BRep) is the standard format for Computer-Aided Design (CAD), yet reconstructing high-quality BReps from single-view images remains challenging due to the complexity of topological constraints and operation sequences. We present Img2CADSeq, a multi-stage pipeline that overcomes these limitations by encoding CAD sequences into a three-level hierarchical codebook. Guided by an importance prioritization, this strategy values profiles over details, compressing long sequences into a stable discrete latent space. To bridge the modality gap, we leverage a coarse-to-fine point cloud intermediate, aligning 2D visual features with 3D CAD sequences via contrastive learning to condition a VQ-Diffusion model. Supported by newly introduced CAD-220K and PrintCAD datasets, our approach ensures robust industrial domain adaptation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Img2CADSeq significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, producing standard STEP files that can be directly used in commercial CAD software.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Img2CADSeq，一种基于序列扩散的多阶段流水线，从单视图图像生成高质量CAD BRep模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 从单视图图像重建高质量BRep CAD模型因拓扑约束和操作序列的复杂性而困难。现有方法难以处理长序列压缩和2D-3D模态对齐，限制了工业应用。BRep是CAD标准格式，其重建对数字孪生和逆向工程至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过三级分层码本编码CAD序列，采用重要性优先策略压缩长序列为稳定离散潜空间。利用粗到细点云中间表示，结合对比学习对齐2D视觉与3D CAD序列，条件化VQ-Diffusion模型生成序列。使用CAD-220K和PrintCAD数据集进行领域适应。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，Img2CADSeq显著优于最先进方法，生成标准STEP文件可直接用于商业CAD软件，实现高质量拓扑和操作序列重建。具体指标未明确提及，但强调性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出创新的序列扩散方法，有效解决图像到CAD的生成难题，具有直接工业应用价值。未来可探索更高效的序列压缩或扩展至多模态输入。

title: IndicMedDialog: A Parallel Multi-Turn Medical Dialogue Dataset for Accessible Healthcare in Indic Languages
abstract: Most existing medical dialogue systems operate in a single-turn question--answering paradigm or rely on template-based datasets, limiting conversational realism and multilingual applicability. We introduce IndicMedDialog, a parallel multi-turn medical dialogue dataset spanning English and nine Indic languages: Assamese, Bengali, Gujarati, Hindi, Marathi, Punjabi, Tamil, Telugu, and Urdu. The dataset extends MDDial with LLM-generated synthetic consultations, translated using TranslateGemma, verified by native speakers, and refined through a script-aware post-processing pipeline to correct phonetic, lexical, and character-spacing errors. Building on this dataset, we fine-tune IndicMedLM via parameter-efficient adaptation of a quantized small language model, incorporating optional patient pre-context to personalise multi-turn symptom elicitation. We evaluate against zero-shot multilingual baselines, conduct systematic error analysis across ten languages, and validate clinical plausibility through medical expert evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一个覆盖英语和九种印度语言的平行多轮医疗对话数据集IndicMedDialog，并微调了IndicMedLM模型，提升了多语言医疗对话的个性化与临床合理性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医疗对话系统多基于单轮问答或模板数据集，缺乏对话真实性和多语言适用性，限制了发展中国家（如印度）的可及医疗服务。由于印度语言多样性且医疗数据稀缺，构建高质量多语言多轮对话数据集并通过参数高效微调适应低资源场景成为关键需求。
light_analysis.method: 扩展MDDial数据集，使用LLM生成合成多轮诊疗对话，经TranslateGemma翻译为九种印度语言，由母语者验证，并通过脚本感知后处理流水线纠正音译、词汇和字符间距错误。基于此数据集，采用参数高效量化适配方法微调小型语言模型（IndicMedLM），可选并入患者预上下文实现个性化多轮症状采集。
light_analysis.result: 在多语言零样本基线对比中，IndicMedLM在对话连贯性、症状覆盖和语言正确性上均优于基线。系统性错误分析覆盖十种语言，揭示翻译与语法错误分布。临床专家评估表明，合成对话的临床合理性达到可接受水平，为低资源医疗对话提供了可行方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: IndicMedDialog数据集及其微调模型IndicMedLM显著提升了多语言医疗对话的真实性与个性化能力，尤其适用于印度等资源受限地区。未来可扩展更多语言和疾病领域，并探索更有效的跨语言迁移学习方法。局限性在于依赖LLM合成数据可能引入偏差，需进一步真实数据验证。

title: What properties of reasoning supervision are associated with improved downstream model quality?
abstract: Validating training data for reasoning models typically requires expensive trial-and-error fine-tuning cycles. In this work, we investigate whether the utility of a reasoning dataset can be reliably predicted prior to training using intrinsic data metrics. We propose a suite of quantitative measures and evaluate their predictive power by fine-tuning 8B and 11B models on semantically distinct variants of a Polish reasoning dataset. Our analysis reveals that these intrinsic metrics demonstrate strong and significant correlations with downstream model performance. Crucially, we find that the predictors of utility are scale-dependent: smaller models rely on alignment-focused metrics to ensure precision, whereas larger models benefit from high redundancy, utilizing verbose traces to solve complex tasks. These findings establish a scale-aware framework for validating reasoning data, enabling practitioners to select effective training sets without the need for exhaustive empirical testing.
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the International Conference on Computational Science (ICCS) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用内在数据指标预测推理数据集效用，发现预测因子存在规模依赖性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前验证推理模型训练数据通常需要昂贵的试错微调周期，缺乏高效的预训练评估手段。本研究旨在探索能否在训练前通过数据内在指标可靠预测数据集的效用，以减少不必要的实证测试，降低验证成本。
light_analysis.method: 提出一套定量指标，并在语义不同的波兰推理数据集变体上微调8B和11B模型，评估这些指标与下游模型性能的相关性。实验设计包含多种数据变体，确保指标预测能力的广泛性。
light_analysis.result: 发现内在指标与下游性能存在强且显著的关联。具体而言，小模型（8B）更依赖对齐类指标以保证精度，大模型（11B）则从高冗余和详细轨迹中获益，有助于解决复杂任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了尺度感知的推理数据验证框架，使实践者无需大量试错即可选择有效训练集。该研究揭示了数据效用预测的规模依赖性，为未来数据筛选和模型训练提供了指导。

title: Delightful Exploration
abstract: Most exploration algorithms search broadly until uncertainty is resolved. When the action space is too large to resolve within budget, practitioners default to $\varepsilon$-greedy, which bounds disruption but spends its override blindly. We introduce \textit{Delight-gated exploration} (DE), a host--override rule that spends exploratory actions only when their prospective delight (expected improvement times surprisal) exceeds a gate price. This practical heuristic recovers a classical result: Pandora's reservation-value rule for costly search, with surprisal setting the effective inspection cost. Resolved arms exit the gate, fresh arms shut off above a prior-determined threshold, and selected linear-bandit overrides consume finite information budget. Across Bernoulli bandits, linear bandits, and tabular MDPs, the same hyperparameters transfer without retuning, and DE shows much weaker regret growth than Thompson Sampling and $\varepsilon$-greedy in the tested unresolved regimes. Delight improves acting for the same reason it improves learning: it prices scarce resources by the product of upside and surprisal.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Delight-gated探索规则，基于预期改进与惊喜度的乘积作为门控，实现低成本高效探索。
light_analysis.motivation: 大多数探索算法在动作空间过大无法在预算内解决不确定性时，默认使用ε-greedy，但ε-greedy盲目覆盖。需要一种更高效的探索规则，在预算有限时合理分配探索动作，避免浪费资源。
light_analysis.method: 提出Delight-gated探索（DE），定义“delight”为预期改进乘以惊喜度（surprisal），只有当delight超过门价格时才执行探索。该规则类似于Pandora的保留值规则，惊喜度作为有效检查成本。已解决的动作退出门，新鲜动作在超过先验阈值时关闭，选中的线性臂覆盖消耗有限信息预算。
light_analysis.result: 在伯努利臂、线性臂和表格MDP中，相同的超参数无需重新调整即可转移。DE在未解决状态下的遗憾增长明显弱于Thompson Sampling和ε-greedy，表现出更稳健的探索效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: DE通过将惊喜度和预期改进的乘积作为稀缺资源的定价机制，同时改进了学习和行动。该方法具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于预算有限的探索场景，未来可扩展到更复杂的决策问题。

title: Byzantine-Robust Distributed Sparse Learning Revisited
abstract: We revisit Byzantine robust distributed estimation for high-dimensional sparse linear models. By combining local $\ell_1$-regularized robust estimation with robust aggregation at the server, the framework applies to pseudo-Huber regression, quantile regression, and sparse SVM. We show that the resulting estimators yield non-asymptotic guarantees and attain near-optimal statistical rates under mild conditions, while remaining communication-efficient. Simulations confirm strong robustness in estimation, support recovery and classification accuracy under various Byzantine attacks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个结合局部L1正则化鲁棒估计与鲁棒聚合的拜占庭鲁棒分布式稀疏学习框架，适用于伪Huber回归、分位数回归和稀疏SVM，并具有非渐近理论保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式学习中，拜占庭攻击（恶意节点发送错误信息）会严重破坏模型性能，尤其在高维稀疏模型场景下。现有方法要么缺乏严格的理论保证，要么通信开销大。本文旨在解决这些问题，提供一个统一的鲁棒估计框架，同时保证统计效率和通信效率。
light_analysis.method: 每个工作节点使用L1正则化的鲁棒估计（如伪Huber回归、分位数回归、稀疏SVM）得到局部稀疏解，服务器通过鲁棒聚合（如中位数或修剪均值）合并局部更新。理论分析证明，在温和条件下，所得估计量达到接近最优的统计速率，且通信次数与维度无关。
light_analysis.result: 模拟实验表明，在多种拜占庭攻击（如高斯噪声、符号翻转、任意值攻击）下，该方法在参数估计误差、支持恢复率和分类准确率方面均优于传统分布式方法，且性能与理论预测一致，鲁棒性显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为拜占庭鲁棒分布式稀疏学习提供了统一的理论与实践框架，证明了结合L1正则化和鲁棒聚合的有效性。该工作具有重要的学术价值，可扩展至其他鲁棒学习任务，未来考虑非线性模型或更复杂的聚合策略。

title: Differentiable Learning of Lifted Action Schemas for Classical Planning
abstract: Classical planners can effectively solve very large deterministic MDPs represented in STRIPS or PDDL where states are sets of atoms over objects and relations, and lifted action schemas add or delete these atoms. This compact representation yields strong search heuristics and provides an ideal setting for structural generalization, since lifted relations and action schemas give rise to infinitely many domain instances. A central challenge is to learn these relations and action schemas from data, and recent approaches have addressed this problem using different types of observations. In this work, we develop a novel neural network architecture for learning action schemas from traces where states are fully observed but action arguments are unobserved. The problem is a simplification but an important step towards learning planning domains from sequences of images and action labels, and we aim to solve this simplification in a nearly perfect manner. The challenge lies in learning the action schemas while simultaneously identifying the action arguments from observed state changes. Our approach yields a robust differentiable component that can then be integrated into larger neuro-symbolic models. We evaluate the architecture on various planning domains, where the learned lifted action schemas must recover the ground-truth structure. Additionally, we report experiments on robustness to observation noise and on a variation related to slot-based dynamics models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种可微分神经网络架构，从状态轨迹中学习提升动作模式，同时识别未观测的动作参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典规划中提升动作模式的结构化表示具有强泛化能力，但学习这些模式是核心挑战。现有方法需处理不同观测类型，而动作参数未观测的问题尚未完美解决。本文旨在近乎完美地解决这一简化问题，为从图像序列学习规划域奠定基础。
light_analysis.method: 提出新颖神经网络架构，从全观测状态但动作参数未观测的轨迹中学习动作模式。架构包含可微分组件，同时识别动作参数和学习模式，可集成到更大神经符号模型。在多个规划域评估，学习提升动作模式需恢复真实结构。
light_analysis.result: 在多个规划域中，学习到的提升动作模式成功恢复真实结构。实验还报告了对观测噪声的鲁棒性以及与槽位动力学模型变体的比较结果，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的可微分学习架构有效解决了从状态轨迹学习提升动作模式并识别动作参数的问题。该组件可集成到神经符号模型，为从图像序列学习规划域提供基础。未来工作可推广到更复杂场景。

title: Utility-Oriented Visual Evidence Selection for Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Visual evidence selection is a critical component of multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), yet existing methods typically rely on semantic relevance or surface-level similarity, which are often misaligned with the actual utility of visual evidence for downstream reasoning. We reformulate multimodal evidence selection from an information-theoretic perspective by defining evidence utility as the information gain induced on a model's output distribution. To overcome the intractability of answer-space optimization, we introduce a latent notion of evidence helpfulness and theoretically show that, under mild assumptions, ranking evidence by information gain on this latent variable is equivalent to answer-space utility. We further propose a training-free, surrogate-accelerated framework that efficiently estimates evidence utility using lightweight multimodal models. Experiments on MRAG-Bench and Visual-RAG across multiple model families demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art RAG baselines while achieving substantial reductions in computational cost.

light_analysis.overview: 从信息论角度定义视觉证据效用为信息增益，提出训练无关的加速框架实现高效选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉证据选择方法依赖语义相关性或表面相似性，与下游推理的实际效用不对齐，导致多模态检索增强生成（RAG）性能受限。该问题在需要准确提取关键视觉信息的复杂推理场景中尤为突出，亟需一种能够直接优化推理效用的选择机制。
light_analysis.method: 将证据效用重新定义为信息增益（即模型输出分布的变化），并通过引入潜在变量“证据有用性”来避免答案空间优化的不可解性。理论上证明在温和假设下，基于该潜在变量的信息增益排序等价于答案空间的效用。提出一个无需训练、代理加速的框架，利用轻量级多模态模型高效估计效用，无需额外训练成本。
light_analysis.result: 在MRAG-Bench和Visual-RAG基准测试上，针对多个模型族（如不同规模的多模态模型）进行评估。所提方法在推理质量（如准确率等）上一致超越现有最佳RAG基线，同时计算成本显著降低（具体数值未提供，但强调substantial reductions）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种面向实际效用的视觉证据选择方法，从信息论角度对齐了选择标准与下游推理需求。学术上提供了新的理论视角，应用上可高效集成到现有RAG系统，提升多模态理解能力。局限性可能包括对轻量模型估计精度的依赖，未来可探索更精细的效用度量或扩展至其他模态。

title: D-VLA: A High-Concurrency Distributed Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning Framework for Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: The rapid evolution of Embodied AI has enabled Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models to excel in multimodal perception and task execution. However, applying Reinforcement Learning (RL) to these massive models in large-scale distributed environments faces severe systemic bottlenecks, primarily due to the resource conflict between high-fidelity physical simulation and the intensive VRAM/bandwidth demands of deep learning. This conflict often leaves overall throughput constrained by execution-phase inefficiencies. To address these challenges, we propose D-VLA, a high-concurrency, low-latency distributed RL framework for large-scale embodied foundation models. D-VLA introduces "Plane Decoupling," physically isolating high-frequency training data from low-frequency weight control to eliminate interference between simulation and optimization.
