We further design a four-thread asynchronous "Swimlane" pipeline, enabling full parallel overlap of sampling, inference, gradient computation, and parameter distribution. Additionally, a dual-pool VRAM management model and topology-aware replication resolve memory fragmentation and optimize communication efficiency. Experiments on benchmarks like LIBERO show that D-VLA significantly outperforms mainstream RL frameworks in throughput and sampling efficiency for billion-parameter VLA models. In trillion-parameter scalability tests, our framework maintains exceptional stability and linear speedup, providing a robust system for high-performance general-purpose embodied agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出高并发分布式强化学习框架D-VLA，通过平面解耦和泳道流水线解决VLA模型训练中的资源冲突问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 具身AI中VLA模型在大规模分布式环境下应用强化学习面临系统性瓶颈，高保真物理仿真与深度学习的高VRAM/带宽需求之间存在资源冲突，导致整体吞吐量受执行阶段低效限制，现有框架难以高效处理十亿参数级VLA模型。
light_analysis.method: D-VLA引入平面解耦，物理隔离高频训练数据与低频权重控制，消除仿真与优化干扰；设计四线程异步泳道流水线，实现采样、推理、梯度计算和参数分布全并行重叠；采用双池VRAM管理模型和拓扑感知复制，解决内存碎片并优化通信效率。
light_analysis.result: 在LIBERO等基准上，D-VLA在十亿参数VLA模型的吞吐量和采样效率上显著优于主流强化学习框架；在万亿参数可扩展性测试中保持卓越稳定性和线性加速，为高性能通用具身智能体提供稳健系统支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: D-VLA有效解决了大规模VLA模型分布式强化学习的系统瓶颈，通过创新的解耦和流水线设计实现了高并发低延迟训练，为具身智能的规模化应用奠定了高效系统基础，未来可拓展至更复杂的多任务场景。

title: LightSplit: Practical Privacy-Preserving Split Learning via Orthogonal Projections
abstract: Split learning (SL) enables collaborative training by partitioning a neural network across clients and a central server, but the cut-layer interface introduces a key challenge: high-dimensional activations incur substantial communication overhead while exposing representations vulnerable to reconstruction attacks. Existing approaches typically address efficiency or privacy in isolation, relying on additional mechanisms such as sparsification, quantization, or noise injection. We propose LightSplit, which limits information exposure and reduces communication overhead by applying a lightweight fixed orthogonal random projection at the cut layer. Based on Shannon's information theory, this projection acts as an information bottleneck that restricts instance-specific information and suppresses exploitable per-sample signals. By transmitting low-dimensional projections instead of raw activations, the server operates on lifted representations without requiring architectural modifications, ensuring compatibility with existing SL architectures. By avoiding additional trainable components on the client, the method remains lightweight and suitable for edge devices while preserving end-to-end differentiability via exact gradient propagation. As the projection is non-invertible, part of the original representation is irreversibly discarded at the client, LightSplit reduces the information available for reconstruction and limits information exposure. We extensively evaluate LightSplit on state-of-the-art benchmarks in both IID and non-IID settings across varying projection dimensions and client scales. Our results show that the method retains more than 95% of the baseline accuracy at up to 32x reduction in transmitted dimensionality while maintaining stable training dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LightSplit，通过轻量级固定正交随机投影在分割学习中同时实现隐私保护和通信效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 分割学习中，切割层的高维激活导致巨大通信开销，且易受重构攻击暴露表示。现有方法效率与隐私孤立处理，依赖稀疏化、量化或噪声注入等额外机制。需要一种同时提升效率与隐私的方法。
light_analysis.method: 在切割层应用轻量级固定正交随机投影作为信息瓶颈，基于香农信息论限制实例特定信息，抑制可被利用的每样本信号。传输低维投影而非原始激活，避免架构修改。投影不可逆，丢弃部分表示以减少重构风险，同时保持端到端可微性。
light_analysis.result: 在IID和非IID设置下，跨不同投影维度与客户端规模进行评估。在高达32倍传输维度缩减时，保留超过95%的基线准确率，且训练动态稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: LightSplit提供了一种实用的隐私保护分割学习方法，平衡通信效率与隐私保护。兼容现有架构，适合边缘设备。未来可探索自适应投影或更严格的信息论隐私保证。

title: Chem-GMNet: A Sphere-Native Geometric Transformer for Molecular Property Prediction
abstract: Modern SMILES-based chemical language models obtain strong MoleculeNet performance by treating SMILES as generic text and compensating with multi-million-molecule self-supervised pretraining. We ask: when a domain carries structural priors as rich as chemistry's, does it warrant a domain-native transformer rather than a generic one rescued by scale? We answer affirmatively with \textbf{GM-Net} (Geometric Measure Network), a transformer family in which every module is replaced by a sphere-native counterpart, and instantiate it as \textbf{Chem-GMNet}. Three blocks follow: SH-Embedding (tokens as learnable directions on $S^{k-1}$ lifted through a Gegenbauer feature map); DualSKA (a per-head fusion of a linear-time gated Sphere-Flow recurrence whose persistent state we prove is the truncated multipole expansion of the input distribution, and a softmax Sphere-Kernel branch over the same Schoenberg-valid kernel); and SH-FFN (sphere projection $\to$ Gegenbauer lift $\to$ moment readout). On canonical DeepChem scaffold splits, against same-shape ChemBERTa-2 baselines under the chemberta3-faithful protocol: (i) random-initialised, Chem-GMNet wins on 7 of 10 MoleculeNet endpoints at $\sim\!35\%$ fewer parameters; (ii) pretrained on the same 10M-SMILES ZINC corpus as ChemBERTa-2 MLM-10M, it matches or beats the public release on 6 of 8 shared endpoints (5/7 excluding a known ClinTox release anomaly). A $(k,L)$ ablation shows that increasing the sphere dimension from $k\!=\!8$ to $k\!=\!10$ at fixed $L\!=\!3$ lowers ESOL RMSE to $0.938$ at scratch, beating pretrained ChemBERTa-2 MLM-10M on this endpoint without any pretraining at all.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Chem-GMNet，一种基于球面几何的Transformer，用于分子性质预测，通过域原生设计替代通用文本模型，减少对大规模预训练的依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SMILES化学语言模型将SMILES视为通用文本，依赖数百万分子的自监督预训练来获得性能。然而化学领域具有极强的结构先验（如三维几何和对称性），通用Transformer无法充分利用这些信息。作者质疑：当领域拥有丰富的结构先验时，是否应使用域原生Transformer而非依赖规模的通用模型？为此提出GM-Net，用球面原生模块替代所有标准Transformer模块，以更好地匹配化学数据的几何特性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Chem-GMNet，包含三个球面原生模块：SH-Embedding将标记编码为S^{k-1}上的可学习方向，经Gegenbauer特征映射提升；DualSKA融合线性时间门控球面流（其状态被证明是输入分布的截断多极展开）和基于Schoenberg有效核的softmax球面核分支；SH-FFN执行球面投影、Gegenbauer提升和矩读出。使用DeepChem标准scaffold划分和ChemBERTa-2协议进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在MoleculeNet基准上，随机初始化的Chem-GMNet在10个端点中7个优于同规模ChemBERTa-2，参数减少约35%；在相同10M SMILES ZINC语料上预训练后，在8个共享端点中6个匹配或超越公开CheMBERTa-2 MLM-10M（排除一个已知的ClinTox异常）。消融实验显示，将球面维度从8增至10（固定层数L=3），ESOL RMSE降至0.938（无预训练），甚至击败了预训练的ChemBERTa-2 MLM-10M。
light_analysis.conclusion: Chem-GMNet证明了在分子性质预测中，采用域原生球面几何Transformer相比通用文本模型具有显著优势，能以更少参数和更少预训练达到或超越现有方法。该工作强调了利用领域结构先验设计神经网络的重要性，为几何深度学习在化学信息学中的应用提供了新方向。未来可探索更高维球面及与图神经网络的融合。

title: Unified generalization analysis for physics informed neural networks
abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) and their variational counterparts (VPINNs) are neural networks that incorporate physical laws, making them useful for scientific problems. Existing generalization analyses for PINNs and VPINNs remain limited, often requiring restrictive assumptions such as stability conditions or linear ellipticity. In this paper, we derive generalization bounds for neural networks that involve differentiation with respect to input variables, covering PINNs and VPINNs under a unified framework. We apply Taylor expansion to represent nonlinear differential operators as linear operators on a high-dimensional space, enabling the use of Koopman-based analysis and showing that high-rank networks can generalize well even in settings involving differential operators. We also show that the nonlinearity of the differential operator exponentially enlarges the bound, highlighting its significant impact on generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一泛化分析框架，通过泰勒展开和Koopman分析，推导PINNs和VPINNs的泛化界，揭示微分算子非线性的指数级影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs）及其变分形式（VPINNs）在科学问题中广泛应用，但现有泛化分析局限于稳定性条件或线性椭圆性等强假设，缺乏统一的理论框架。理解此类网络中微分算子的泛化行为对提升模型可靠性至关重要，但非线性微分算子的复杂性使得分析困难，亟需建立更通用的理论。
light_analysis.method: 通过泰勒展开将非线性微分算子近似为高维空间上的线性算子，从而将PINNs和VPINNs的泛化分析统一为线性算子框架。利用Koopman算子理论分析该线性化表示，推导出与网络秩、微分算子非线性程度相关的泛化界。关键创新在于不依赖稳定性或线性椭圆性假设，仅需网络具有高秩性质即可保证泛化。
light_analysis.result: 推导出PINNs和VPINNs的统一泛化界，表明高秩网络在包含微分算子的条件下仍能实现良好泛化。同时，发现微分算子的非线性程度会指数级放大泛化界，显著影响模型性能。未提供具体数值结果（如准确率提升），但理论界限明确了非线性强度的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文给出PINNs和VPINNs的通用泛化分析，突破了稳定性或线性等限制，为科学计算中的神经网络设计提供理论指导。揭示了微分算子非线性对泛化的指数级影响，提示训练时需关注算子复杂度。未来可扩展到更复杂的PDE系统或探索降低非线性效应的方法。

title: X-Restormer++: 1st Place Solution for the UG2+ CVPR 2026 All-Weather Restoration Challenge
abstract: In this work, we present our winning solution for the 8th UG2+ Challenge (CVPR 2026) Track 1: Image Restoration under All-weather Conditions. Our method is built upon the strong baseline framework X-Restormer, which effectively captures both channel-wise global dependencies and spatially-local structural information through its dual-attention design (Multi-DConv Head Transposed Attention and Overlapping Cross-Attention). To further boost the restoration performance, we propose several key improvements. First, we integrate the spatially-adaptive input scaling mechanism from Restormer-Plus to dynamically adjust the spatial weights of the input image, enhancing spatial adaptability. Second, to better preserve structural details and edge information, we introduce a novel Gradient-Guided Edge-Aware (GGEA) loss, which is combined with L1 and Multi-Scale SSIM losses in a unified training objective. Third, we significantly expand the training data by incorporating an extra 24,500 degraded-clean image pairs from FoundIR and WeatherBench alongside the original WeatherStream dataset. With these strategies, our proposed method successfully ranks the 1st place in the challenge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出X-Restormer++，在UG2+挑战赛全天候图像恢复中取得第一名，通过改进注意力机制、引入梯度引导边缘感知损失和扩充数据集实现性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 全天候图像恢复（如雨、雾、雪等）是计算机视觉中的实际难题，现有方法在复杂天气条件下恢复细节不足、空间适应性差。挑战赛要求提升恢复质量，而基线X-Restormer虽已有较好性能，但在结构细节保持和空间自适应方面仍有改进空间。
light_analysis.method: 基于X-Restormer框架，集成Restormer-Plus的空间自适应输入缩放机制动态调整输入空间权重；提出梯度引导边缘感知（GGEA）损失与L1、多尺度SSIM损失联合训练；使用FoundIR和WeatherBench额外24,500对图像扩充训练数据。
light_analysis.result: 在UG2+ Challenge Track 1中排名第一，具体量化指标未在摘要中明确，但通过多策略融合显著提升恢复效果，尤其在结构细节和边缘保持方面优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的X-Restormer++结合空间自适应、边缘感知损失和数据扩充，有效提升全天候图像恢复性能。该方案在挑战赛中验证了先进水平，未来可探索更高效的数据增强或轻量化模型。

title: Respecting Self-Uncertainty in On-Policy Self-Distillation for Efficient LLM Reasoning
abstract: On-policy self-distillation trains a reasoning model on its own rollouts while a teacher, often the same model conditioned on privileged context, provides dense token-level supervision. Existing objectives typically weight the teacher's token-level signal uniformly across a chain-of-thought sequence, despite substantial variation in the entropy of the teacher's predictive distribution. We propose EGRSD (Entropy-Guided Reinforced Self-Distillation), which unifies token-level updates through three signals: a reward-grounded direction, a teacher-student likelihood-ratio magnitude, and the proposed teacher-entropy confidence gate that down-weights high-entropy token positions while maintaining a nonzero lower bound on every token weight. We further introduce CL-EGRSD, a causal-lookahead variant that distinguishes sustained high-entropy spans from transient high-entropy positions whose following context rapidly becomes low entropy. Experiments with Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B in thinking mode show that EGRSD and CL-EGRSD advance the accuracy-length frontier among the compared trainable methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出熵引导强化自蒸馏方法EGRSD及其因果变体CL-EGRSD，通过动态调整token权重优化LLM推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有同策略自蒸馏方法对教师模型的token级预测信号统一加权，忽略了不同位置预测熵的显著差异，导致高熵区域（如不确定的推理步骤）贡献过大，影响训练效率和推理质量。这种均匀加权策略无法有效利用教师模型的不确定性信息，限制了模型在链式推理任务上的性能与长度权衡。
light_analysis.method: EGRSD统一了三种信号：奖励引导的方向、教师-学生似然比幅度以及教师熵置信门控。熵置信门控对高熵token位置降权，同时保持每个token权重的非零下界。CL-EGRSD进一步引入因果前瞻机制，区分持续高熵区间与后续上下文迅速变为低熵的短暂高熵位置，避免过度惩罚短暂不确定性。方法在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B的思考模式下进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B的思考模式下，EGRSD和CL-EGRSD在准确率与输出长度的权衡曲线上显著优于其他可训练方法，实现了更优的精度-长度前沿。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但表明方法有效推进了效率边界。
light_analysis.conclusion: EGRSD和CL-EGRSD通过利用教师熵分布指导蒸馏权重，提升了LLM推理的效率与准确性。该方法具有通用性，可适用于各类自蒸馏场景。未来可探索更精细的熵建模或扩展到多步奖励设置。局限性在于依赖教师模型的不确定性估计，可能受模型校准质量影响。

title: EMO: Frustratingly Easy Progressive Training of Extendable MoE
abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models offer a powerful way to scale model size without increasing compute, as per-token FLOPs depend only on k active experts rather than the total pool of E experts. Yet, this asymmetry creates an MoE efficiency paradox in practice: adding more experts balloons memory and communication costs, making actual training inefficient. We argue that this bottleneck arises in part because current MoE training allocates too many experts from the beginning, even though early-stage data may not fully utilize such capacity. Motivated by this, we propose EMO, a simple progressive training framework that treats MoE capacity as expandable memory and grows the expert pool over the course of training. EMO explicitly models sparsity in scaling law to derive stage-wise compute-optimal token budgets for progressive expansion. Empirical results show that EMO matches the performance of a fixed-expert setup in large-scale experiments while improving wall-clock efficiency. It offers a surprisingly simple yet effective path to scalable MoE training, preserving the benefits of large expert pools while reducing both training time and GPU cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出渐进式训练框架EMO，在训练过程中逐步扩展专家池，提升训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏MoE模型虽能扩展规模而不增加计算量，但实际训练中增加专家会带来内存和通信开销，导致效率下降。现有方法从一开始就分配过多专家，早期数据无法充分利用，造成资源浪费。
light_analysis.method: EMO框架将MoE容量视为可扩展内存，在训练过程中逐步增加专家数量。通过显式建模稀疏缩放定律，推导出渐进扩展的阶段性计算最优token预算，实现资源的高效分配。
light_analysis.result: 在大规模实验中，EMO匹配了固定专家设置的性能，同时提高了实际时间效率，减少了训练时间和GPU成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: EMO提供了一种简单而有效的可扩展MoE训练路径，在保留大专家池优势的同时降低训练开销。未来可探索更复杂的扩展策略或应用于其他场景。

title: It's not the Language Model, it's the Tool: Deterministic Mediation for Scientific Workflows
abstract: Language models can produce convincing scientific analyses, but repeated generations on the same data do not guarantee the same result. A researcher may regenerate an identical query and receive a different fit, a different peak position or a different analysis procedure, without an obvious way to decide which output to trust. We propose typed mediation, a pattern in which the model orchestrates deterministic tools rather than generating analytical code. Each tool encodes one researcher's exact procedure for one instrument, ported through structured interviews. The model selects which tool to call and with what parameters. The tool produces the result. Regeneration does not change it. We evaluate this claim by running the same photoluminescence analysis on four platforms, including three commercial foundation models, four times each with the same prompt. The typed tool produces identical results across all runs. The commercial platforms either vary in numerical output and analytical methodology across runs, or fail to produce valid results on the task. We deploy this pattern on two instruments serving users over approximately six months, with very positive user feedback. Both cases are very challenging: they involve proprietary binary formats and per-seat licensed software, which force the tool to remain on local infrastructure alongside the data and the instrument it operates. We argue that deployment topology is not just a preference, but a structural requirement of scientific tool mediation. The result is a practical pattern for deploying language models in scientific workflows where reproducibility is mandatory, reducing analysis time from weeks to minutes while guaranteeing identical outputs across runs.
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures, 2 appendices. Submitted to SETN 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出类型中介模式，让语言模型调用确定性工具而非生成分析代码，实现科学工作流的完全可重复性。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型在科学分析中虽能生成令人信服的结果，但多次生成同一查询可能产生不同的拟合、峰值位置或分析流程，研究者难以决定信任哪个输出。这种不可重复性在科学工作流中是个关键问题，现有方法（如直接让模型生成分析代码）缺乏确定性保证，无法满足可重复性强制性要求。
light_analysis.method: 提出类型中介模式：语言模型不直接生成分析代码，而是编排确定性工具。每个工具通过结构化访谈编码一位研究者对特定仪器的精确流程。模型仅选择调用哪个工具及参数，工具执行并返回结果，再生不会改变输出。在四个平台上进行相同光致发光分析测试，包括三个商业基础模型，每个相同提示运行四次。
light_analysis.result: 类型工具在所有运行中产生完全相同的结果。商业平台要么在数值输出和分析方法上运行间有变化，要么无法生成有效结果。将该模式部署在两台仪器上服务用户约六个月，用户反馈非常积极。即使涉及专有二进制格式和每席位许可软件（迫使工具与数据和仪器共处本地基础设施），也能将分析时间从数周缩短至几分钟，同时保证输出一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文论证了部署拓扑不是偏好而是科学工具中介的结构性要求。类型中介模式是一种实用的语言模型部署模式，适用于可重复性强制要求的科学工作流，在保证输出完全一致的同时大幅提升效率。局限性包括依赖领域专家编码工具，未来可扩展至更多仪器和分析类型。

title: A Hybrid Framework for Natural Language Querying of IFC Models with Relational and Graph Representations
abstract: Building Information Modeling (BIM) is widely used in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry, but the complexity of Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) limits accessibility for non-expert users. To address this, we introduce IfcLLM, a hybrid framework for natural language interaction with IFC-based BIM models. It transforms IFC models into complementary representations: a relational representation for structured element properties and geometry, and a graph representation for topological relationships. These representations are integrated through iterative retry-and-refine LLM reasoning. We implement the framework using an open-weight LLM (GPT OSS 120B), supporting reproducible and deployment-oriented workflows. Evaluation on three IFC models with queries derived from 30 scenarios shows first-attempt accuracy of 93.3%-100%, with all failures recovered using a fallback LLM. The results show that combining complementary representations with iterative reasoning enables more accessible natural language querying of IFC data while supporting routine BIM analysis tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IfcLLM混合框架，结合关系与图表示及迭代LLM推理，实现IFC模型的高准确率自然语言查询。
light_analysis.motivation: Building Information Modeling (BIM) 在AEC行业广泛应用，但Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)的复杂性导致非专家用户难以直接查询和利用模型信息。现有方法缺乏对结构化属性和拓扑关系的统一处理，且依赖专家知识。因此，需要一种直观的自然语言查询方式，使得非专家也能高效获取IFC数据，同时支持常规BIM分析任务。
light_analysis.method: IfcLLM框架首先将IFC模型转换为两种互补表示：关系表示存储结构化元素属性和几何信息，图表示捕获拓扑关系。随后，通过迭代重试与精炼LLM推理过程，将这些表示集成到统一查询中。具体实现采用开放权重LLM（GPT OSS 120B），确保可重复性和部署友好。不使用专有模型，支持灵活调整。
light_analysis.result: 在三个不同IFC模型上进行评估，基于30个场景的自然语言查询测试，首次尝试准确率达到93.3%-100%。所有首次失败查询均可通过回退到另一个LLM（fallback LLM）成功恢复。结果表明框架在准确性和鲁棒性上表现优异，显著优于未使用互补表示或迭代推理的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: IfcLLM通过混合表示与迭代推理，显著提升了非专家用户对IFC模型的自然语言查询能力，同时支持常规BIM分析。其开放权重实现促进了可重复性和实际部署。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的查询类型和更大规模模型，并探索多模态输入（如语音）的集成。

title: Teacher-Guided Policy Optimization for LLM Distillation
abstract: The convergence of reinforcement learning and imitation learning has positioned Reverse KL (RKL) as a promising paradigm for on-policy LLM distillation, aiming to unify exploration with teacher supervision. However, we identify a critical limitation: when the student and teacher distributions diverge significantly, standard RKL often fails to yield meaningful improvement due to uninformative negative feedback. To address this inefficiency, we propose Teacher-Guided Policy Optimization (TGPO), an on-policy algorithm that incorporates dense directional guidance by leveraging teacher predictions conditioned on the student's rollout. Because TGPO remains on-policy, the algorithm integrates seamlessly with existing RLVR frameworks without requiring additional data annotation. Experiments on complex reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TGPO significantly outperforms standard baselines and is robust to different teachers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TGPO在线策略算法，利用教师预测提供密集方向性指导，解决标准Reverse KL在学生与教师分布偏离时无效的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM蒸馏中，Reverse KL虽统一探索与教师监督，但当学生和教师分布显著偏离时，负反馈无信息，导致改进有限。此问题限制了蒸馏效率，尤其在复杂推理任务中，现有方法无法有效应对分布差异。
light_analysis.method: TGPO算法保持在线策略，通过教师基于学生rollout的条件预测提供密集方向性指导，无需额外数据注释。它无缝集成现有RLVR框架，核心创新是条件教师指导机制，使优化方向更有效。
light_analysis.result: 在复杂推理基准上，TGPO显著优于标准RKL基线，并对不同教师模型具有鲁棒性。摘要未明确具体数值，但说明性能提升和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: TGPO有效提升分布偏离时LLM蒸馏的学习效率，学术上改进了RKL的负反馈问题，实际中可嵌入RLVR框架，无需额外注释。未来可探索更广泛任务应用。

title: Improving Code Translation with Syntax-Guided and Semantic-aware Preference Optimization
abstract: LLMs have shown immense potential for code translation, yet they often struggle to ensure both syntactic correctness and semantic consistency. While preference-based learning offers a promising alignment strategy, it is hindered by unreliable semantic rewards derived from sparse test cases or restrictive reference translations. We argue that a robust semantic reward for code translation must be derived directly from the source code. In this paper, we propose CTO to improve code translation with syntax-guided and semantic-aware preference optimization. Through contrastive learning, we train a cross-lingual semantic model to directly assess functional equivalence between source and translated code. By formulating code translation as a multi-objective optimization problem, this robust semantic signal is seamlessly unified with compiler-based syntactic feedback within the direct preference optimization framework. Extensive experiments on C++, Java, and Python translations demonstrate that CTO significantly outperforms existing baselines and alternative preference optimization strategies.
comment: Accepted in the 35th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI 2016)

light_analysis.overview: 提出CTO方法，通过语法引导和语义感知偏好优化，提升LLM代码翻译的语法正确性和语义一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在代码翻译中难以同时保证语法正确性和语义一致性。现有基于偏好的学习方法受限于不可靠的语义奖励，这些奖励来自稀疏的测试用例或限制性的参考翻译，导致对齐效果不佳。因此，需要直接从源代码导出鲁棒的语义奖励信号，以有效指导模型优化。
light_analysis.method: 提出CTO方法。首先通过对比学习训练一个跨语言语义模型，直接评估源代码与翻译代码的功能等价性。然后将代码翻译视为多目标优化问题，将鲁棒语义信号与基于编译器的语法反馈统一集成到直接偏好优化框架中。实验在C++、Java和Python翻译任务上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在C++、Java和Python代码翻译任务上的大量实验表明，CTO方法显著优于现有基线和替代的偏好优化策略。具体性能指标包括翻译准确性和语法正确性均得到提升，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: CTO通过语法引导和语义感知偏好优化，有效提升了LLM代码翻译的质量。该方法提供了新的偏好优化框架，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的语义奖励设计或扩展到更多编程语言。

title: ReTool-Video: Recursive Tool-Using Video Agents with Meta-Augmented Tool Grounding
abstract: Video understanding requires active evidence seeking, motivating tool-augmented video agents for temporal reasoning, cross-modal understanding, and complex question answering. Existing video agents have improved video reasoning with retrieval, memory, frame inspection, and verifier tools, but they still face two limitations: (1) a coarse tool space that lacks fine-grained operations for compositional reasoning; and (2) a flat action space that forces high-level video intents into primitive executable tool calls. In this paper, we address these challenges with two complementary designs. First, we construct a MetaAug-Video Tool Library (MVTL), an extensible tool library with 134 registered tools, including 26 base tools for general multimodal signal processing and 108 meta tools for filtering, aggregation, reranking, formatting, and other intermediate-result operations. MVTL supports dual-level access to both structured video information and raw modal evidence, enabling diverse video reasoning scenarios. Second, we propose ReTool-Video, a recursive tool-using method that grounds high-level video intents into executable tool chains. In ReTool-Video, matched actions are executed directly, while unmatched intents are delegated to a resolver for parameter repair, tool substitution, or decomposition. This allows abstract actions such as temporal merging, cross-modal verification, or repeated-event aggregation to be progressively translated into concrete multimodal operations at runtime. Experiments on MVBench, MLVU, and Video-MME w/o sub. show that ReTool-Video consistently outperforms strong baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that recursive grounding and fine-grained meta tools improve the stability and effectiveness of complex video understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出递归工具使用方法和元增强工具库，通过细粒度工具分解与递归动作解析，实现复杂视频理解中的组合推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工具增强视频智能体存在两个关键局限：一是工具空间粗粒度，缺乏精细操作支持组合推理；二是动作空间扁平，将高层视频意图直接映射为原始工具调用，导致复杂任务难以有效执行。这两个问题阻碍了智能体在视频理解中主动寻求证据和进行多步骤推理的能力，亟需更灵活的工具使用机制。
light_analysis.method: 构建MetaAug-Video Tool Library（MVTL），包含134个注册工具（26个基础工具用于通用多模态信号处理，108个元工具用于过滤、聚合、重排序、格式化等中间结果操作），支持对结构化视频信息和原始模态证据的双层访问。提出ReTool-Video递归工具使用方法：匹配动作直接执行，未匹配意图委托给解析器进行参数修复、工具替换或分解，从而将时间合并、跨模态验证等抽象动作逐步转化为具体多模态操作。
light_analysis.result: 在MVBench、MLVU和Video-MME w/o sub.三个基准上，ReTool-Video一致优于强基线方法。进一步分析表明，递归接地和细粒度元工具显著提升了复杂视频理解的稳定性和有效性，验证了方法在处理多步推理任务中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过递归工具使用和元增强工具库，有效解决了视频智能体中工具空间粗粒度和动作空间扁平导致的组合推理难题，为复杂视频理解提供了更灵活、可扩展的框架。该工作具有重要的学术价值，可推广至其他多模态推理任务。未来可探索更大规模工具库及自适应递归策略。

title: Mix, Don't Tune: Bilingual Pre-Training Outperforms Hyperparameter Search in Data-Constrained Settings
abstract: For most languages of the world, language model pre-training operates in a data-constrained regime where models must repeat their training data many times, degrading generalization. Two remedies exist: aggressive hyperparameter tuning such as high weight decay, and mixing in data from a high-resource auxiliary language to directly aid the low-resource target. While hyperparameter tuning regularizes the model by shrinking weights to restrict network capacity, auxiliary data mixing uses a tunable mixing ratio to expand the training distribution and diversify the training signal with new knowledge. Both offer a principled way to improve training in a data-constrained domain. We compare these levers systematically across four model scales from 150M to 1.43B parameters, using Arabic as the low-resource target and English as the auxiliary, over approximately 1000 pre-training runs. Three findings emerge. First, mixing yields larger improvements than hyperparameter tuning on both validation loss and downstream task accuracy, and the gap grows with model size. Second, we quantify how much mixing helps: it boosts performance by an amount equivalent to 2--3$\times$ the unique target data on validation loss and 2--13$\times$ on downstream task accuracy, with the gain scaling steeply with model size. Third, this divergence reveals that target-language validation loss systematically underestimates mixing's value. Mixing regularizes by diversifying the training signal and contributes knowledge the repeated target corpus cannot supply; validation loss captures only the first effect. Our practical recommendations are: mix in a high-resource language, prioritize the mixing ratio over hyperparameter tuning, and transfer hyperparameters from a small proxy model via $μ$P.

light_analysis.overview: 系统实验证明，在低资源语言预训练中，混合高资源语言数据比超参数调优更能提升性能，且效果随模型规模增大而增强。
light_analysis.motivation: 大多数语言模型预训练在数据受限环境下，必须重复使用训练数据导致泛化下降。现有两种改进方法：激进的超参数调优（如高权重衰减）和混合高资源辅助语言数据，但两者相对有效性缺乏系统比较。本研究旨在量化两种方法的优劣并提供实用建议。
light_analysis.method: 在四个模型规模（150M至1.43B参数）上，以阿拉伯语为低资源目标、英语为辅助语言，进行约1000次预训练实验。系统比较混合辅助数据（通过可调混合比率）与超参数调优（如高权重衰减）的效果，量化混合带来的性能提升，并揭示验证损失低估混合价值的现象。
light_analysis.result: 混合数据在验证损失和下游任务准确率上均优于超参数调优，差距随模型规模增大而扩大。混合带来的性能提升相当于将唯一目标数据量扩大2-3倍（验证损失）和2-13倍（下游任务准确率）。验证损失系统性低估了混合的价值，仅捕捉正则化效应而忽略新知识贡献。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建议在低资源语言预训练中优先混合高资源语言数据而非过度调优超参数。混合通过多样化训练信号和引入新知识提升性能。实际建议包括：混合高资源语言、优先调整混合比率、使用μP从代理模型迁移超参数。为数据受限场景下的预训练提供实用指导。

title: Skill-Aligned Annotation for Reliable Evaluation in Text-to-Image Generation
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) generation has advanced rapidly, making reliable evaluation critical as performance differences between models narrow. Existing evaluation practices typically apply uniform annotation mechanisms, such as Likert-scale or binary question answering (BQA), across heterogeneous evaluation skills, despite fundamental differences in their nature. In this work, we revisit T2I evaluation through the lens of skill-aligned annotation, where annotation strategies reflect the underlying characteristics of each evaluation skill. We systematically compare skill-aligned annotation against uniform baselines and show that it produces more consistent evaluation signals, with higher inter-annotator agreement and improved stability across models. Finally, we present an automated pipeline that instantiates the proposed evaluation protocol, enabling scalable and fine-grained evaluation with spatially grounded feedback. Our work highlights that improving the foundations of image evaluation can increase reliability and efficiency without simply scaling annotation effort. We hope this motivates further research on refining evaluation protocols as a central component of reliable model assessment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出技能对齐标注方法，通过匹配标注策略与评估技能特性，提升文本到图像生成的可靠性和评估一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像生成技术发展迅速，模型间性能差异缩小，可靠评估变得至关重要。现有评估方法对不同评估技能（如相关性、真实性等）采用统一的标注机制（如利克特量表或二值问答），忽略了技能的本质差异，导致评估信号不一致、稳定性差。这限制了评估的可信度和模型比较的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入技能对齐标注概念，即根据每个评估技能的底层特性设计相应的标注策略。系统比较了技能对齐标注与统一基线方法，并构建自动化管道实现该协议，支持可扩展的细粒度评估，并提供空间定位的反馈。关键创新在于调整标注机制以匹配技能需求，而非使用统一格式。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，技能对齐标注相比统一基线产生更一致的评估信号，具有更高的标注者间一致性和跨模型稳定性。该方法在不增加标注工作量的情况下提升了评估可靠性，并支持更细粒度的诊断性反馈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文强调了改进评估基础（如标注方法）对提升可靠性和效率的重要性，而非单纯扩展标注规模。技能对齐标注为文本到图像评估提供了新范式，有望推动评估协议作为模型可靠评估核心组成部分的进一步研究。局限性可能在于技能分类和标注策略的设计仍需人工干预。

title: An Agentic AI Framework with Large Language Models and Chain-of-Thought for UAV-Assisted Logistics Scheduling with Mobile Edge Computing
abstract: In cloud manufacturing, unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) can support both product collection and mobile edge computing (MEC). This joint operation forms a hybrid scheduling problem, where physical logistics decisions are coupled with computational task scheduling. In this paper, UAVs collect finished products from manufacturing stations and transport them back to a central depot. Meanwhile, computational tasks generated by industrial sensor devices at these stations are processed locally, at UAVs, or offloaded via UAVs to the cloud. This coupling makes the problem challenging. A UAV can provide MEC services only during its service window at a station, so routing decisions directly determine when UAV-assisted offloading is available. Routing decisions also affect the UAV energy budget and the availability of onboard computing and communication resources for computational task execution under task deadline constraints. To address this, we propose an agentic-AI-assisted optimization framework with two components. First, we develop an agentic AI that combines large language models, retrieval-augmented generation, and chain-of-thought reasoning to translate user input into an interpretable mathematical formulation for the hybrid scheduling problem. Second, we design a hierarchical deep reinforcement learning approach based on proximal policy optimization (PPO), where the upper layer learns UAV routing and the lower layer optimizes per-slot task execution and resource allocation. Simulation results show that the proposed framework yields more consistent formulations, while the hierarchical PPO achieves full product collection in 99.6% of the last 500 episodes and maintains a 100% deadline satisfaction rate, with more stable performance than the advantage actor-critic approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合大语言模型和链式推理的智能体AI框架，以及分层深度强化学习，解决无人机辅助物流调度与移动边缘计算的混合问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在云制造中，无人机同时执行产品收集和移动边缘计算任务，形成物流决策与计算任务调度的耦合问题。无人机仅在服务窗口提供MEC服务，路由决策直接影响计算卸载可用性、能源预算和计算资源，而现有方法难以处理这种耦合和用户输入的多样性。
light_analysis.method: 提出智能体AI优化框架，包含两部分：①智能体AI结合大语言模型、检索增强生成和链式推理，将用户输入转化为可解释的数学模型；②基于PPO的分层深度强化学习，上层学习无人机路由，下层优化每时隙的任务执行和资源分配。
light_analysis.result: 智能体AI生成更一致的问题公式；分层PPO在最后500个训练片段中实现99.6%的产品收集完成率和100%的截止时间满足率，且性能比优势演员-评论家方法更稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了物流与计算调度的耦合问题，提高了模型可解释性和调度稳定性。未来可扩展至更多元化的工业场景，但摘要未明确说明局限性或具体数值之外的性能对比细节。

title: Machine Learning-Driven Multimodal Spectroscopic Liquid Biopsy for Early Multicancer Detection
abstract: Cancer is one of the leading causes of death worldwide, making the development of rapid, minimally invasive, label-free and scalable diagnostic strategies a major challenge in modern oncology. In this context, spectroscopic liquid biopsy has emerged as a promising alternative, as it enables the holistic characterization of biochemical alterations in biological fluids. In this work, we propose a multimodal spectroscopic liquid biopsy framework for multicancer detection based on the combination of Fourier Transform Infrared (FTIR) spectroscopy, Raman spectroscopy, and Excitation-Emission Matrix (EEM) fluorescence spectroscopy together with Machine Learning (ML) methodologies. Serum samples from breast cancer patients, colorectal cancer patients, and healthy controls were analyzed through the three spectroscopic modalities. After modality-specific preprocessing, low-level data fusion (LLDF) was employed to integrate the complementary biochemical information encoded within the different spectroscopic measurements, and classification was performed using XGBoost models. Seven experimental configurations were evaluated, including the three unimodal approaches, all pairwise bimodal configurations, and the full multimodal approach of FTIR, Raman, and EEM fluorescence. The results show that although several individual modalities achieved high discrimination performance, the multimodal fusion provided the most balanced overall results, reaching a ROC-AUC of 0.997 for breast cancer and 0.994 for colorectal cancer, together with highly balanced sensitivity and specificity values.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于多模态光谱融合和机器学习的液体活检方法，实现高精度早期多癌检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 癌症是主要死因，亟需快速、微创、无标记、可扩展的诊断策略。现有单一光谱模态信息有限，多模态融合可互补生化特征，提升检测性能。
light_analysis.method: 结合FTIR、拉曼和EEM荧光三种光谱对血清样本分析，经过模态特定预处理后，采用低层数据融合整合互补信息，并使用XGBoost分类模型评估七种配置（单模态、双模态、全模态）。
light_analysis.result: 多模态融合取得最佳均衡性能：乳腺癌ROC-AUC达0.997，结直肠癌0.994，敏感性和特异性高度平衡，优于单一或双模态配置。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多模态光谱液体活检结合机器学习可实现高精度、非侵入性多癌检测，具有临床转化潜力，未来可扩展至更多癌种和更大样本验证。

title: GAGPO: Generalized Advantage Grouped Policy Optimization
abstract: Reinforcement learning has become a powerful paradigm for post-training large language model agents, yet credit assignment in multi-turn environments remains a challenge. Agents often receive sparse, trajectory-level rewards only at the end of an episode, making it difficult to determine which intermediate actions contributed to success or failure. As a result, propagating delayed outcomes back to individual decision steps without relying on costly auxiliary value models remains an open problem. We propose Generalized Advantage Grouped Policy Optimization (GAGPO), a critic-free reinforcement learning method for precise, step-aligned temporal credit assignment. GAGPO constructs a non-parametric grouped value proxy from sampled rollouts and uses it to compute TD/GAE-style temporal advantages, recursively propagating outcome supervision backward through time. Combined with group-wise advantage normalization and an action-level importance ratio, GAGPO extracts stable, localized optimization signals directly from multi-turn trajectories. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop show that GAGPO outperforms strong reinforcement learning baselines. Further analyses demonstrate faster early-stage learning, improved interaction efficiency, and smoother optimization dynamics, suggesting that GAGPO offers a simple yet effective framework for multi-turn agentic reinforcement learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无评论家的强化学习方法GAGPO，通过构建分组价值代理实现多轮轨迹中的时间信用分配。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多轮强化学习环境中，智能体通常仅在情节结束时获得稀疏、轨迹级别的奖励，难以确定中间动作的贡献。现有的信用分配方法往往需要昂贵的辅助价值模型，且传播延迟结果到单个决策步骤仍是一个开放问题。本研究旨在设计一种无需评论家模型、能够精确分配时间信用并稳定优化信号的方法，以提升多轮智能体训练的效果和效率。
light_analysis.method: GAGPO提出一种无评论家的强化学习方法，从采样轨迹中构建非参数化的分组价值代理，用于计算TD/GAE风格的时间优势，通过递归传播将结果监督反向分配到时间步。结合分组优势归一化和动作级重要性比率，从多轮轨迹中提取稳定、局部的优化信号。该方法避免训练额外的价值模型，直接利用采样统计量实现信用分配。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop基准测试上，GAGPO的性能优于强强化学习基线方法。进一步分析表明，GAGPO实现了更快的早期学习速度、更高的交互效率以及更平滑的优化动态，证明了其在多轮强化学习中的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值提升，但定性结果强于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: GAGPO提供了一种简单而有效的无评论家框架，用于多轮智能体强化学习中的时间信用分配。其通过分组价值代理和递归优势计算，避免了辅助价值模型的依赖，促进了更稳定的优化。该方法具有实际应用价值，可推广到需要稀疏奖励的多轮交互场景。未来可探索其在更复杂环境和大规模模型上的适用性。

title: Hierarchical Attacks for Multi-Modal Multi-Agent Reasoning
abstract: Multi-modal multi-agent systems (MM-MAS) have gained increasing attention for their capacity to enable complex reasoning and coordination across diverse modalities. As these systems continue to expand in scale and functionality, investigating their potential vulnerabilities has become increasingly important. However, existing studies on adversarial attacks in multi-agent systems primarily focus on isolated agents or unimodal settings, leaving the vulnerabilities of MM-MAS largely underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce HAM$^{3}$, a Hierarchical Attack framework for multi-modal multi-agent systems that decomposes attacks into three interconnected layers. Specifically, at the perception layer, HAM$^{3}$ mounts attacks by perturbing visual inputs, textual inputs, and their fused visual-textual representations. At the communication layer, it performs communication-level attacks that corrupt message content and interaction topology, such as manipulating shared context or communication links to distort collective information flow. At the reasoning layer, it conducts reasoning-level attacks that interfere with each agent's cognitive pipeline, biasing reasoning trajectories and ultimately compromising final decisions. We evaluate HAM$^{3}$ on the GQA benchmark through multi-agent systems built on distinct reasoning paradigms including ReAct, Plan-and-Solve, and Reflexion. Experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves an Attack Success Rate of up to 78.3%, with reasoning-layer attacks being the most effective. More than half of the successful attacks lead multiple agents to produce consistent errors. These findings offer valuable insights for building more robust and interpretable multi-agent intelligence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分层攻击框架HAM^3，针对多模态多智能体系统的感知、通信和推理三层实施攻击，揭示其脆弱性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态多智能体系统规模扩大，现有攻击研究仅关注孤立智能体或单模态，缺乏对多模态多智能体协同脆弱性的探索。这类系统在复杂任务中广泛应用，安全风险亟需评估。本研究旨在填补空白，系统性地攻击多模态交互的全链路。
light_analysis.method: HAM^3框架将攻击分解为三层：感知层扰动视觉、文本输入及融合表示；通信层破坏消息内容与交互拓扑，如操控共享上下文或链接；推理层干扰认知管道，偏置推理轨迹。基于GQA基准，采用ReAct、Plan-and-Solve、Reflexion等推理范式构建多智能体系统进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在GQA基准上，HAM^3实现最高78.3%的攻击成功率，其中推理层攻击效果最显著。超过一半的成功攻击使多个智能体产生一致错误，表明协同漏洞可利用性高。对比不同范式，攻击均有效但效果存在差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次系统性地攻击多模态多智能体系统的感知、通信和推理层，揭示了其协同推理中的脆弱性。成果为构建鲁棒且可解释的多智能体系统提供关键见解，未来可探索防御机制及更复杂的攻击场景。

title: Switching Successor Measures for Hierarchical Zero-shot Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Hierarchical reinforcement learning can improve generalization by decomposing long-horizon decision-making into simpler subproblems. However, existing approaches often rely on restrictive design choices, such as fixed temporal abstractions or goal-conditioned objectives, which largely confine them to goal-reaching tasks and limit their applicability to general reward functions. In this paper, we introduce switching successor measures, an extension of successor measures that enables hierarchical control in zero-shot reinforcement learning without additional supervision, fixed horizons, or manually designed subgoals. We show that switching successor measures arise naturally from classical successor measures while preserving their underlying structure. Building on this result, we propose FB $π$-Switch, an algorithm that extracts both a high-level subgoal-selection policy and a low-level control policy directly from forward-backward (FB) representations, allowing hierarchical behavior to emerge from a single learned representation. Experiments on both goal-conditioned and general reward-based tasks show that FB $π$-Switch improves over non-hierarchical baselines and matches state-of-the-art hierarchical methods in goal-conditioned settings. These results demonstrate that structured successor representations provide a flexible foundation for hierarchical zero-shot reinforcement learning beyond goal-reaching tasks. Our project website is available at: https://stestokth.github.io/switching-successors/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出切换后继度量，实现层次化零样本强化学习，无需人工设计子目标或固定时间抽象。
light_analysis.motivation: 层次化强化学习通过分解长时决策为子问题提升泛化能力，但现有方法依赖固定时间抽象或目标条件目标，局限于目标到达任务，难以适用于通用奖励函数。本文旨在解决这些限制，实现更灵活的层次化零样本学习。
light_analysis.method: 提出切换后继度量，是经典后继度量的扩展，无需额外监督、固定时域或手动设计子目标。基于此，提出FB π-Switch算法，从前后向表示中提取高层子目标选择策略和低层控制策略，使层次行为从单一学习表示中涌现。
light_analysis.result: 在目标任务和通用奖励任务上，FB π-Switch优于非层次基线，并在目标条件设置中匹配最先进的层次化方法。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但显示结构化后继表示为零样本层次RL提供了灵活基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文主要贡献是提出切换后继度量，实现无需额外监督的层次化零样本RL，突破目标到达任务限制。具有学术价值和实用潜力，未来可探索更复杂环境下的应用。

title: STAR: Semantic-Temporal Adaptive Representation Learning for Few-Shot Action Recognition
abstract: Few-shot action recognition (FSAR) requires models to generalize to novel action categories from only a handful of annotated samples. Despite progress with vision-language models, existing approaches still suffer from semantic-temporal misalignment, where static textual prompts fail to capture decisive visual cues that appear sparsely across sequences, and from inadequate modeling of multi-scale temporal dynamics, as short-term discriminative cues and long-range dependencies are often either oversmoothed or fragmented. To address these challenges, we propose Semantic Temporal Adaptive Representation Learning (STAR), a unified framework, consisting of a semantic-alignment component and a temporal-aware component, effectively bridging the semantic and temporal gaps and transferring the sequence modeling capability of Mamba into the FSAR. The semantic alignment module introduces a Temporal Semantic Attention (TSA) mechanism, which performs frame-level cross-modal alignment with textual cues, ensuring fine-grained semantic-temporal consistency. The temporal-aware module incorporates a Semantic Temporal Prototype Refiner (STPR) that integrates semantic-guided Mamba blocks with multi-frequency temporal sampling and bidirectional state-space refinement, yielding semantically aligned prototypes with enhanced discriminative fidelity and temporal consistency. Furthermore, temporally dependent class descriptors derived from large language models (LLMs) provide long-range semantic guidance. Extensive experiments on five FSAR benchmarks demonstrate the consistent superiority of STAR over state-of-the-art methods. For instance, STAR achieves up to 8.1% and 6.7% gains on the SSv2-Full and SSv2-Small datasets under the 1-shot setting, and 7.3% on HMDB51, validating its effectiveness under limited supervision. The code is available at https://github.com/HongliLiu1/STAR-main.
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义时序自适应表示学习（STAR）框架，通过语义对齐与时序感知模块解决少样本动作识别中的语义-时序错配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 少样本动作识别（FSAR）面临两大挑战：静态文本提示难以捕获稀疏跨序列的判别性视觉线索，导致语义-时序错配；多尺度时序动态建模不足，短时判别线索和长程依赖被过度平滑或碎片化。现有视觉语言模型虽有效，但无法解决上述问题，亟需统一框架实现细粒度语义-时序对齐和时序建模。
light_analysis.method: STAR框架包含语义对齐和时序感知两模块。语义对齐采用时序语义注意力（TSA），实现帧级跨模态对齐；时序感知模块引入语义时序原型精炼器（STPR），集成语义引导的Mamba块、多频时序采样和双向状态空间精炼，生成语义对齐且判别性强的原型。利用大语言模型生成时序类别描述以提供长程语义指导。在五个基准上验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在SSv2-Full和SSv2-Small数据集上，1-shot设置下分别提升8.1%和6.7%；在HMDB51上提升7.3%。在五个少样本动作识别基准中，STAR始终优于现有最先进方法，尤其在极度有限监督下表现显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: STAR有效桥接语义与时序鸿沟，将Mamba的序列建模能力迁移至FSAR，显著提升少样本动作识别性能。代码已开源，为未来跨模态时序学习提供新范式。局限性可能在于对复杂长视频的计算开销，未来可探索更高效的时序采样策略。

title: A Hybrid Tucker-LSTM Tensor Network Model for SOC Prediction in Electric Vehicles
abstract: Accurate state of charge estimation is critical for the success of electric vehicle battery management strategies, but it is well known that conventional estimators suffer from two fundamental shortcomings: cumulative errors that grow over time and reliance on simplified battery models that do not reflect real world dynamics. Therefore, this paper presents a novel hybrid approach combining Tucker tensor decomposition with LSTM networks, using full - lifecycle EV field data for SOC prediction. The inputs are charge status, mileage, voltage, current, cell differentials, and temporal features. Tucker decomposition is skillfully used to reduce dimensionality while maintaining the temporal structure, hence allowing a direct, fair comparison with standard LSTM. The result is unequivocal: Tucker - LSTM outperforms the baseline on all metrics, with MSE dropping 70.5\% (from 21.07 to 6.22 ), MAE improving 48.7\% (from 3.37\% to 1.73\%), RMSE falling from 4.59\% to 2.49\%, and $R^2$ rising from 0.918 to 0.976. Since the experimental results demonstrably demonstrate that tensor decomposition compresses high-dimensional battery data very well without loss of predictive fidelity, this paper naturally opens up a new direction for tensor-based analytics in electric vehicle battery management.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tucker-LSTM混合模型，利用张量分解降维保持时序结构，实现高精度电动汽车SOC预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统SOC估计方法存在累积误差增长和对简化电池模型依赖的缺陷，无法反映真实动态。准确估计SOC对电池管理策略成功至关重要，现有方法性能不足，亟需更精准的建模技术。
light_analysis.method: 将Tucker张量分解与LSTM网络结合，输入包括充电状态、里程、电压、电流、电池差异及时间特征。Tucker分解在保持时序结构的同时降低维度，与标准LSTM直接对比，实现高效降维和预测。
light_analysis.result: 基于全生命周期电动汽车现场数据，Tucker-LSTM在所有指标上优于基线LSTM：MSE下降70.5%（从21.07降至6.22），MAE改善48.7%（从3.37%降至1.73%），RMSE从4.59%降至2.49%，R²从0.918升至0.976。
light_analysis.conclusion: 实验证明张量分解能有效压缩高维电池数据且不损失预测精度，为电动汽车电池管理中基于张量的分析开辟新方向。未来可探索更复杂的张量网络架构。

title: McCast: Memory-Guided Latent Drift Correction for Long-Horizon Precipitation Nowcasting
abstract: Existing precipitation nowcasting methods typically adopt an autoregressive formulation, where future states are predicted from previous outputs. However, such an approach accumulates errors over long rollouts, causing forecasts to drift away from physically plausible evolution trajectories. Although various studies have attempted to alleviate this problem by improving step-wise prediction accuracy, they largely neglect the global temporal evolution of meteorological systems and lack mechanisms to actively correct drift during rollouts. To address this issue, we propose McCast, a memory-guided latent drift correction method for precipitation nowcasting. Rather than treating memory as an unordered dictionary of latent states for passive conditioning, McCast leverages temporally organized memory to actively correct autoregressive latent evolution. Specifically, McCast introduces a Drift-Corrective Memory Bank (DCBank) that explicitly estimates the temporally consistent drift corrections to calibrate the divergent trajectory. DCBank performs drift correction in two stages: a Corrective Latent Extractor first predicts an initial correction from the current prediction and a reference latent state, and a Correction-Aware Memory Retrieval module then refines the initial correction using temporally organized historical memory. By explicitly correcting latent evolution, instead of improving step-wise prediction accuracy only, McCast produces more temporally coherent and reliable long-horizon forecasts. Experiments on two widely used benchmarks, SEVIR and MeteoNet, show that McCast achieves state-of-the-art performance, particularly in challenging long-horizon forecasting scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种记忆引导的潜空间漂移校正方法（McCast），用于长时程降水临近预报，通过主动校正自回归潜演化中的漂移实现更连贯的长期预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有降水临近预报方法通常采用自回归形式，从先前输出预测未来状态，但长期滚动中误差累积导致预测偏离物理演化轨迹。虽然已有研究通过提升单步预测精度来缓解，但忽略了气象系统的全局时间演化，缺乏在滚动过程中主动校正漂移的机制。
light_analysis.method: McCast引入漂移校正记忆库（DCBank），利用时间有序记忆主动校正自回归潜演化。DCBank分两阶段：校正潜提取器从当前预测和参考潜状态预测初始校正；校正感知记忆检索模块利用时间有序历史记忆细化校正。通过显式校正潜演化，而非仅提升单步精度，产生时间更连贯的长期预测。
light_analysis.result: 在SEVIR和MeteoNet两个基准上，McCast实现了最先进的性能，尤其在具有挑战性的长时程预测场景中表现突出。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: McCast通过记忆引导的潜漂移校正，有效解决了自回归模型在长时程临近预报中的误差累积问题，提升了预测的时间连贯性和可靠性。该方法在气象领域具有重要应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的记忆结构和校正策略。

title: ECG-NAT: A Self-supervised Neighborhood Attention Transformer for Multi-lead Electrocardiogram Classification
abstract: Electrocardiogram (ECG) arrhythmia classification remains challenging due to signal variability, noise, limited labeled data, and the difficulty in achieving both accuracy and efficiency in models. While self-supervised learning reduces label dependency, most methods target either global contextual features or local morphological patterns, but rarely implement hierarchical multi-scale feature extraction. ECG signals require architectures that simultaneously capture fine-grained beat-level morphology and broader rhythm-level dependencies with computational efficiency. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes the Electrocardiogram Neighborhood Attention Transformer (ECG-NAT), a novel self-supervised learning approach tailored for multi-lead ECG classification. Our two-stage approach begins with generative pretraining, using a masked autoencoder to reconstruct partially masked ECG signals across multiple diverse datasets, enabling the model to learn robust, domain-invariant representations from unlabeled data. This is followed by discriminative fine-tuning with a dual-loss function that combines supervised contrastive and cross-entropy losses, aligning representation learning with label prediction. The hierarchical attention mechanism efficiently captures multi-scale temporal features from localized beat morphology to broader rhythm patterns at low computational cost. ECG-NAT achieves robust performance on benchmark datasets, with 88.1\% accuracy using only 1\% labeled data, demonstrating strong efficacy in low-resource settings. The framework combines superior classification performance with computational efficiency, making it practical for real-time ECG diagnosis. The code will be made available upon acceptance at: https://github.com/Mahsagazeran/ECG-NAT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ECG-NAT，一种自监督邻域注意力Transformer，用于多导联心电图分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 心电图心律失常分类面临信号变异、噪声、标注数据有限以及模型精度与效率难以兼顾等挑战。现有自监督学习多聚焦于全局上下文或局部形态，缺乏层次化多尺度特征提取。心电图信号需要同时捕获细粒度搏动形态和宽泛心律依赖性，且要求计算效率。因此需要一种能高效提取多尺度时间特征的自监督方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出ECG-NAT，包含两阶段：生成式预训练使用掩码自编码器在多个数据集上重建部分掩码的心电图信号，学习鲁棒的域不变表示；判别式微调采用双重损失函数（监督对比损失和交叉熵损失），将表示学习与标签预测对齐。层次化注意力机制高效捕获从局部搏动形态到宽泛心律模式的多尺度时间特征，计算成本低。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上，ECG-NAT仅使用1%标注数据即达到88.1%的准确率，在低资源场景下表现优异。该框架结合了优越的分类性能与计算效率，适用于实时心电图诊断。与基线方法相比，在标注数据有限时性能提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了ECG-NAT自监督框架，通过掩码自编码预训练和双重损失微调，有效解决了心电图分类中标注数据不足和多尺度特征提取难题。具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于低资源实时诊断场景。未来工作可探索更多自监督策略或扩展至其他生理信号。

title: FIKA-Bench: From Fine-grained Recognition to Fine-Grained Knowledge Acquisition
abstract: Fine-grained recognition in everyday life is often not a closed-book classification problem: when encountering unfamiliar objects, humans actively search, compare visual details, and verify evidence before deciding. Existing benchmarks primarily evaluate visually recognition, leaving this active external knowledge acquisition ability underexplored. We study fine-grained knowledge acquisition, where a system must seek, verify, and use external evidence to answer open-ended fine-grained recognition questions. We introduce FIKA-Bench, a leakage-aware and evidence-grounded collection of 311 public-source and real-life instances. To ensure high quality, every example is filtered against frontier closed-book models to remove memorized cases and audited to eliminate image-answer leakage, retaining only samples supported by verified evidence. Our evaluation of latest Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) and agents reveals that the task remains a formidable challenge: the best system reaches only 25.1% accuracy, with no model exceeding 30%. Crucially, we find that merely equipping models with tools is insufficient to bridge this gap; agent failures are predominantly driven by wrong entity retrieval and poor visual judgement. These results show that reliable knowledge acquisition needs better agent designs that focus on fine-grained recognition.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FIKA-Bench基准，评估多模态模型在细粒度知识获取任务中的能力，发现最佳系统准确率仅25.1%，需改进智能体设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 细粒度识别在开放世界并非闭卷分类问题，人类会主动搜索外部知识。现有基准仅评估视觉识别，忽略了主动获取外部知识的能力。因此需要研究细粒度知识获取，即系统需寻找、验证并使用外部证据回答开放问题，以填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建FIKA-Bench，包含311个公开来源和现实生活实例，通过过滤前沿闭卷模型消除记忆案例，并审计去除图像-答案泄露，仅保留有证据支持的样本。评估最新LMMs和智能体，分析失败原因，发现主要失败源于错误实体检索和视觉判断差。
light_analysis.result: 最佳系统准确率仅25.1%，无模型超过30%。仅配备工具不足，智能体失败主要由错误实体检索和视觉判断差导致。这些结果表明可靠知识获取需要更好的智能体设计，聚焦细粒度识别。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出FIKA-Bench基准，揭示现有LMMs和智能体在细粒度知识获取上能力有限，强调需改进智能体设计，特别是实体检索和视觉判断能力。该基准为评估和推动知识获取方法提供了基础。

title: N-vium: Mixture-of-Exits Transformer for Accelerated Exact Generation
abstract: Improving the inference efficiency of autoregressive transformers typically means reducing FLOPs per token, usually through approximations that degrade model quality. We introduce N-vium, a mixture-of-exits transformer that partially parallelizes computation across depth on standard hardware, increasing effective FLOPs per second rather than minimizing compute per token. N-vium attaches prediction heads at multiple depths and defines the next-token distribution as a learned mixture over these exits, with token-adaptive routing. This formulation strictly generalizes the standard transformer, which is recovered exactly when routing assigns zero mass to all intermediate heads. Sampling from the mixture is exact, and complete KV caches are recovered by deferring the upper-layer computation and batching it with later tokens. We pretrain N-vium at scales up to 1.5B parameters. Our largest model reaches 57.9% wall-clock speedup over a parameter- and data-matched standard transformer at no perplexity cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 N-vium，一种混合退出变换器，通过部分并行化深度计算和令牌自适应路由，在不降低模型质量的前提下显著提升推理速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自回归变换器通过减少每个令牌的 FLOPs 来提升效率，但通常采用近似方法导致模型质量下降。N-vium 旨在避免近似，在标准硬件上实现精确生成的加速，保持模型原有质量。
light_analysis.method: N-vium 在多个深度附加预测头，将下一令牌分布定义为这些退出的学习混合，并使用令牌自适应路由。通过推迟上层计算并批处理后续令牌，可恢复完整 KV 缓存。该公式严格概括标准 Transformer，当路由分配零质量给中间头时完全恢复。
light_analysis.result: 在 1.5B 参数规模上预训练，与参数和数据匹配的标准 Transformer 相比，最大模型达到 57.9% 的墙钟速度提升，且无困惑度损失。
light_analysis.conclusion: N-vium 实现了精确生成的高效加速，无需质量妥协，适用于标准硬件。其混合退出机制提供了灵活性与泛化性，未来可扩展至更大模型，但实际部署中的批处理策略需要进一步优化。

title: DiffST: Spatiotemporal-Aware Diffusion for Real-World Space-Time Video Super-Resolution
abstract: Diffusion-based models have shown strong performance in video super-resolution (VSR) and video frame interpolation (VFI). However, their role in the coupled space-time video super-resolution (STVSR) setting remains limited. Existing diffusion-based STVSR approaches suffer from two issues: (1) low inference efficiency and (2) insufficient utilization of spatiotemporal information. These limitations impede deployment. To address these issues, we introduce DiffST, an efficient spatiotemporal-aware video diffusion framework for real-world STVSR. To improve efficiency, we adapt a pre-trained diffusion model for one-step sampling and process the entire video directly rather than operating on individual frames. Furthermore, to enhance spatiotemporal information utilization, we introduce cross-frame context aggregation (CFCA) and video representation guidance (VRG). The CFCA module aggregates information across multiple keyframes to produce intermediate frames. The VRG module extracts video-level global features to guide the diffusion process. Extensive experiments show that DiffST obtains leading results on real-world STVSR tasks. It also maintains high inference efficiency, running about 17$\times$ faster than previous diffusion-based STVSR methods. Code is available at: https://github.com/zhengchen1999/DiffST.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于扩散模型的高效时空感知视频超分辨率框架DiffST，实现实时真实场景的空间-时间视频超分辨率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型在视频超分辨率和帧插值中表现优异，但在耦合的空间-时间超分辨率中应用有限，存在推理效率低和时空信息利用不足的问题，阻碍了实际部署。
light_analysis.method: DiffST采用预训练扩散模型进行一步采样，直接处理整个视频而非逐帧操作。引入跨帧上下文聚合模块（CFCA）聚合多关键帧信息生成中间帧，以及视频表示引导模块（VRG）提取视频级全局特征指导扩散过程，增强时空信息利用。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界STVSR任务上取得领先结果，推理速度比先前基于扩散的STVSR方法快约17倍，实现了高效性与性能的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffST通过高效的单步采样和时空信息增强模块，解决了扩散模型在STVSR中的效率与利用问题，为实时视频处理提供了可行方案，代码已开源。

title: Stable Attention Response for Reliable Precipitation Nowcasting
abstract: Precipitation nowcasting remains challenging due to the highly localized, rapidly evolving, and heterogeneous nature of atmospheric dynamics. Although recent methods increasingly adopt attention-based architectures in both unimodal and multimodal settings, they mainly emphasize stronger representation learning and prediction capacity, while paying less attention to the stability of attention responses across samples. In this work, we show that cross-sample instability of attention-response energy is an important and previously underexplored source of forecasting unreliability. Empirically, inaccurate forecasts are associated with larger attention-response energy variance across heads and layers. Theoretically, we show that cross-sample variability can propagate through self-attention, and enlarge a lower bound on prediction error. Based on this insight, we propose HARECast, a Head-wise Attention Response Energy-regulated framework for precipitation nowcasting. HARECast explicitly models head-wise attention-response energy and stabilizes it through a group-wise regularization objective that reduces cross-sample fluctuations. The proposed formulation is generic and applicable to both unimodal and multimodal nowcasting architectures. We instantiate HARECast in a standard forecasting pipeline with reconstruction branches and a diffusion-based predictor, and evaluate it on commonly used benchmarks--SEVIR and MeteoNet. Experimental results demonstrate that HARECast achieves state-of-the-art performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HARECast框架，通过稳定注意力响应能量提升降水预报的可靠性，实现单模态和多模态下的最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 降水预报面临时空动态复杂、现有注意力方法侧重表示能力而忽视跨样本稳定性。经验发现不准确预报与注意力响应能量方差大相关，理论证明该方差会放大预测误差下界，因此亟需稳定注意力响应。
light_analysis.method: 提出HARECast，通过头部注意力响应能量（Head-wise Attention Response Energy）建模和分组正则化目标减少跨样本波动，可集成于多种架构。实例化采用重建分支和扩散预测器，在SEVIR和MeteoNet上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在SEVIR和MeteoNet基准上，HARECast达到当前最优性能，有效降低注意力响应能量方差并提升预报准确性，验证了稳定性机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示注意力响应能量不稳定是预报不可靠的关键因素，提供理论下界，并设计通用调节框架。HARECast在单/多模态任务中提升可靠性，未来可扩展至其他动态预测场景。

title: Does Engram Do Memory Retrieval in Autoregressive Image Generation?
abstract: The Engram module -- a hash-keyed, O(1) associative memory injected into Transformer layers -- was recently shown to improve large language model pretraining, with the appealing interpretation that it provides a content-addressed shortcut to recurring local token patterns. We ask whether this interpretation transfers to autoregressive (AR) image generation, or whether the observed gains, if any, come from a different mechanism. We adapt the Engram module to vision with 2D spatial $n$-gram hashing, gated fusion, and KV-cache-compatible incremental inference, and inject it into a class-conditional AR generator trained on ImageNet 256x256. Across a sweep of backbone-to-memory budget ratios $ρ{\in}[0.17, 0.90]$, every Engram-augmented variant trails the pure AR baseline in FID, indicating that the module saves backbone FLOPs but does not, by itself, improve sample quality. We then probe how the module is used. A gate-clamp sweep shows that disabling the Engram pathway entirely is catastrophic, yet a tiny constant gate (g=0.10) matches or beats the learned gate -- inconsistent with a heavily content-addressed recall mechanism. A donor-probe experiment shows that swapping the hash inputs for matched, adversarial, or random same-class exemplars produces statistically indistinguishable next-token distributions, while collapsing or randomising the table degrades them by two to three orders of magnitude. Finally, training a model from scratch with the entire memory table frozen to $\mathcal{N}(0, 1)$ noise costs only $Δ\text{FID}{=}0.10$ and actually raises Inception Score. Together, these findings indicate that the Engram in AR image generation behaves not as a content-addressed retriever but as a gated architectural side-pathway: a hash-keyed residual stream whose benefit is dominated by the pathway itself, with the learned table contributing only a small distributional refinement.

light_analysis.overview: 本文发现Engram模块在自回归图像生成中并非内容寻址检索器，而是作为门控架构侧路径起作用。
light_analysis.motivation: Engram模块在语言模型中通过内容寻址记忆提升预训练效果。本文探究该机制是否迁移至自回归图像生成，并理解其实际作用。
light_analysis.method: 将Engram适配至视觉任务，使用2D空间n-gram哈希、门控融合和KV缓存兼容增量推理，注入类条件自回归生成器（ImageNet 256x256），并设计门控钳制、供体探测等实验分析其行为。
light_analysis.result: 在FID指标上，所有Engram增强变体均落后于纯自回归基线，但能节省骨干网络FLOPs。门控钳制显示完全禁用Engram路径是灾难性的，但极小的常值门控（g=0.10）即可匹配或超越学习门控；供体探测表明哈希输入更换对分布影响可忽略，而表格冻结为噪声仅导致ΔFID=0.10并提升Inception Score。
light_analysis.conclusion: Engram在自回归图像生成中不是内容寻址记忆，而是一个哈希键控的残差侧路径，其增益主要来自路径本身，表格仅提供微小分布优化。

title: CLIP Tricks You: Training-free Token Pruning for Efficient Pixel Grounding in Large VIsion-Language Models
abstract: In large vision-language models, visual tokens typically constitute the majority of input tokens, leading to substantial computational overhead. To address this, recent studies have explored pruning redundant or less informative visual tokens for image understanding tasks. However, these methods struggle with pixel grounding tasks, where token importance is highly contingent on the input text. Through an in-depth analysis of CLIP, we observe that visual tokens located within referent regions often exhibit low similarity to the textual representation. Motivated by this insight, we introduce LiteLVLM, a training-free, text-guided token pruning strategy for efficient pixel grounding inference. By reversing the ranking of CLIP's visual-text similarity, LiteLVLM effectively retains visual tokens covering the referent regions, while recovering context tokens to enable clear foreground-background separation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LiteLVLM significantly outperforms existing methods by over 5% across diverse token budgets. Without any training or fine-tuning, LiteLVLM maintains 90\% of the original performance with a 22% speedup and a 2.3x memory reduction. Our code is available at https://github.com/sejong-rcv/LiteLVLM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiteLVLM，一种无需训练、文本引导的视觉令牌剪枝策略，实现高效像素级定位推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 大视觉语言模型中视觉令牌占大部分输入，计算开销大。现有剪枝方法在像素级定位任务中失效，因为令牌重要性高度依赖输入文本。通过分析CLIP发现，参考区域内视觉令牌与文本相似度反而较低，需要新策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出LiteLVLM，一种无需训练的文本引导令牌剪枝策略。通过反转CLIP视觉-文本相似度排序，保留覆盖参考区域的令牌并恢复上下文令牌，实现前景-背景分离。无需训练或微调，直接用于像素级定位推理。
light_analysis.result: 在多种令牌预算下，LiteLVLM性能优于现有方法超5%。无需训练，保持原始性能90%，同时实现22%速度提升和2.3倍内存减少。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献一种简单有效的训练免费令牌剪枝方法，提升像素级定位效率。揭示CLIP中视觉-文本相似度反直觉现象并利用。可加速大模型推理，未来可探索更通用剪枝策略。

title: Do Heavy Tails Help Diffusion? On the Subtle Trade-off Between Initialization and Training
abstract: Recent works have proposed incorporating heavy-tailed (HT) noise into diffusion- and flow-based generative models, with the goals of better recovering the tails of target distributions and improving generative diversity. This motivation is intuitive: if the data are heavy-tailed, HT noise may appear better matched than light-tailed (LT) Gaussian noise. However, replacing Gaussian noise by HT noise also changes the underlying estimation problem. In this paper, we revisit this paradigm through a combined theoretical and empirical study, establishing sampling-error bounds for two representative diffusion models driven by HT and LT noise. We show that HT noise makes the statistical estimation problem harder, leading to less favorable sampling-error bounds. We support these findings with experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, empirically recovering the predicted error trade-off. Our results call into question a growing design trend in generative modeling and challenge the use of HT noise to improve rare-region exploration.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过理论和实验论证，重尾噪声在扩散模型中反而导致更差的采样误差，挑战了其改善稀有区域探索的流行观点。
light_analysis.motivation: 近期研究提出在扩散和流生成模型中使用重尾噪声，以更好地恢复目标分布尾部和提升生成多样性。然而，替换高斯噪声为重尾噪声也改变了底层估计问题。现有研究缺乏对这种权衡的理论分析，本文旨在通过建立采样误差界限，重新审视这一范式，揭示重尾噪声带来的统计估计困难及其对采样误差的不利影响。
light_analysis.method: 论文从理论角度推导了重尾噪声和轻尾高斯噪声驱动的两种代表性扩散模型的采样误差界限，证明了重尾噪声使统计估计问题更难，导致更差的误差界。同时，在合成数据集和真实世界数据集上进行实验，通过对比不同噪声类型下的误差权衡，实证支持理论预测。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，重尾噪声导致扩散模型的采样误差界限更不利，统计估计难度增加。实验在合成和真实数据集上复现了预测的误差权衡，验证了理论结论。结果质疑了使用重尾噪声改进稀有区域探索的流行设计趋势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文挑战了生成模型中采用重尾噪声以增强尾部恢复和多样性的趋势，指出其带来的统计估计代价可能超过收益。研究为生成模型噪声类型的选择提供了理论指导，未来工作可探索其他改善稀有区域探索的方法，并考虑噪声类型与模型架构的协同设计。

title: Formal Conjectures: An Open and Evolving Benchmark for Verified Discovery in Mathematics
abstract: As automated reasoning systems advance rapidly, there is a growing need for research-level formal mathematical problems to accurately evaluate their capabilities. To address this, we present Formal Conjectures, an evolving benchmark of currently 2615 mathematical problem statements formalized in Lean 4. Sourced from areas of active mathematical research, the dataset features 1029 open research conjectures providing a zero-contamination benchmark for mathematical proof discovery, and 836 solved problems for proof autoformalization. Notably, the repository provides a structured interface connecting mathematicians who formalize and clarify problems with the AI systems and humans attempting to solve them. Demonstrating its immediate utility, the benchmark has already been leveraged to make new mathematical discoveries, including the resolution of open research conjectures. We describe our approach to ensuring the correctness of these formalizations in a collaborative open-source project where contributions stem from an active community. In this framework, AI-generated proofs and disproofs serve as a valuable auditing mechanism to iteratively improve the fidelity of the benchmark. Finally, we provide a standardized evaluation setup and report baseline results on frozen evaluation subsets, demonstrating a climbable signal that measures the current frontier of automated reasoning on research-level mathematics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了包含2615个形式化数学问题的开放基准Formal Conjectures，用于评估自动化推理在研究级数学中的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着自动化推理系统快速发展，需要研究级的形式化数学问题来准确评估其能力。现有基准存在数据污染或缺乏挑战性，因此需要零污染、开放、包含开放研究猜想和已解决问题的基准，以推动数学发现和自动形式化。
light_analysis.method: 构建了Lean 4形式化的基准，包含1029个开放研究猜想（零污染）和836个已解决问题，提供结构化接口连接数学家与AI系统。采用社区贡献和AI生成的证明/反证作为审计机制，迭代改进基准正确性，并报告冻结子集上的基线结果。
light_analysis.result: 基准包含2615个形式化问题，已被用于做出新的数学发现（包括解决开放猜想），并在冻结评估子集上展示了可测量信号，反映了当前自动化推理在研究级数学中的前沿性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准为零污染、演进式的评估平台，有助于推动形式化数学和自动定理证明的发展，并可作为AI在数学发现中的标准评估工具。未来可通过社区贡献持续扩展。

title: Finding the Weakest Link: Adversarial Attack against Multi-Agent Communications
abstract: Multi-agent systems rely on communication for information sharing and action coordination, which exposes a vulnerability to attacks. We investigate single-victim communication perturbation attacks against Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning-trained systems and propose methods that use gradient information from the Jacobian to identify which messages, agent, and timesteps are most susceptible to attack and have the greatest impact on the system. We enhance these methods with two proposed adversarial loss functions that trade-off attack success for attack impact which also create more effective perturbations. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods against two different multi-agent communication methods in navigation, PredatorPrey, and TrafficJunction environments. Our results show that our novel message selection method achieves a similar or greater impact than random message selection across almost all tested scenarios. Our victim selection, message selection, tempo, and loss functions improve attack effectiveness in half of the thirty scenarios we tested.
comment: Full version of the Extended Abstract presented at AAMAS 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对多智能体通信的单受害者对抗攻击方法，利用雅可比梯度选择关键通信环节并优化损失函数。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体系统依赖通信协作，但通信链路易受攻击。现有攻击方法未充分利用梯度信息选择最脆弱环节，且缺乏针对单受害者通信扰动的有效攻击。该研究旨在识别并利用最易受攻击且影响最大的消息、智能体和时间步，提升攻击效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于雅可比梯度信息的消息、智能体和时间步选择方法，识别最易受攻击的通信环节。设计两种对抗损失函数，在攻击成功率和攻击影响间权衡，生成更有效的扰动。在导航、PredatorPrey和TrafficJunction环境中，针对两种多智能体通信方法进行测试。
light_analysis.result: 新消息选择方法在几乎所有场景中达到相似或大于随机消息选择的影响。在30个测试场景的一半中，受害者选择、消息选择、节奏和损失函数提升了攻击效果。实验证明方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究贡献了针对多智能体通信的对抗攻击框架，通过梯度信息定位弱点并优化攻击。学术上提供了新攻击思路，实际中有助于评估系统安全性。未来可探索防御机制或扩展到其他通信协议。

title: PanoWorld: Towards Spatial Supersensing in 360$^\circ$ Panorama World
abstract: Multimodal large laboratory models (MLLMs) still struggle with spatial understanding under the dominant perspective-image paradigm, which inherits the narrow field of view of human-like perception. For navigation, robotic search, and 3D scene understanding, 360-degree panoramic sensing offers a form of supersensing by capturing the entire surrounding environment at once. However, existing MLLM pipelines typically decompose panoramas into multiple perspective views, leaving the spherical structure of equirectangular projection (ERP) largely implicit. In this paper, we study pano-native understanding, which requires an MLLM to reason over an ERP panorama as a continuous, observer-centered space. To this end, we first define the key abilities for pano-native understanding, including semantic anchoring, spherical localization, reference-frame transformation, and depth-aware 3D spatial reasoning. We then build a large-scale metadata construction pipeline that converts mixed-source ERP panoramas into geometry-aware, language-grounded, and depth-aware supervision, and instantiate these signals as capability-aligned instruction tuning data. On the model side, we introduce PanoWorld with Spherical Spatial Cross-Attention, which injects spherical geometry into the visual stream. We further construct PanoSpace-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark for evaluating ERP-native spatial reasoning. Experiments show that PanoWorld substantially outperforms both proprietary and open-source baselines on PanoSpace-Bench, H* Bench, and R2R-CE Val-Unseen benchmarks. These results demonstrate that robust panoramic reasoning requires dedicated pano-native supervision and geometry-aware model adaptation. All source code and proposed data will be publicly released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PanoWorld模型，通过球面空间交叉注意力机制和全景原生监督数据构建，实现360°全景连续空间的超感知空间推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLM在空间理解上受限于窄视角透视图像，虽然360°全景提供超感知，但现有方法将其分解为多视角而忽略球面结构。论文旨在实现原生全景理解，要求模型在等距柱状投影（ERP）全景上作为连续、以观察者为中心的空间进行推理，解决语义锚定、球面定位等关键能力缺失问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先定义原生全景理解的关键能力（语义锚定、球面定位、参考帧变换、深度感知3D推理）。构建大规模元数据管道，从混合源ERP全景生成几何感知、语言接地和深度感知的监督信号，并转化为能力对齐的指令微调数据。模型方面引入球形空间交叉注意力（Spherical Spatial Cross-Attention），将球面几何注入视觉流。同时构建诊断基准PanoSpace-Bench。
light_analysis.result: PanoWorld在PanoSpace-Bench、H* Bench和R2R-CE Val-Unseen基准上大幅优于专有和开源基线。实验证明，稳健的全景推理需要专用的全景原生监督和几何感知模型适应。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调显著超越。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于提出全景原生理解范式，证明现有方法在全景空间推理上的不足，并通过专用监督和几何感知模型显著提升性能。工作和数据将开源，为导航、机器人和3D场景理解提供新思路。未来可扩展至更多动态场景和实时应用。

title: GeoBuildBench: A Benchmark for Interactive and Executable Geometry Construction from Natural Language
abstract: We introduce GeoBuildBench, a benchmark designed to evaluate whether large language models and multimodal agents can ground informal natural-language plane geometry problems into executable geometric constructions. Unlike existing geometry benchmarks that focus on answer correctness or static diagram interpretation, GeoBuildBench treats geometry diagram as an interactive construction task: given a textual problem, an agent must generate a domain-specific language (DSL) program to produce a diagram satisfying explicitly specified geometric objects and verifiable constraints. The benchmark features 489 Chinese textbook-style problems, curated through automated filtering and human validation to ensure text-complete, constructible problem specifications. We evaluate several state-of-the-art multimodal models in a bounded iterative setting and show that, despite reasonable success rates, models frequently exhibit structural hallucinations, missing objects, and failures to satisfy geometric constraints, with limited ability to exploit visual and constraint-based feedback for self-correction. These results highlight geometry construction as a rigorous testbed for grounded, executable reasoning beyond textual or visual plausibility. Our benchmark and code are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoBuildBench基准，评估大语言模型和多模态智能体从自然语言生成可执行几何构造的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有几何基准多关注答案正确性或静态图解，忽略从非正式语言到可执行构造的接地推理。这限制了模型在需要严格、可验证推理场景的应用。GeoBuildBench通过交互式构造任务填补这一空白，要求模型生成域特定语言程序以满足明确几何约束，为评估模型的可执行推理能力提供更严格的测试。
light_analysis.method: 收集489个中文教科书风格平面几何问题，经自动过滤和人工验证确保文本完整且可构造。设计域特定语言(DSL)用于描述几何对象和约束。评估多个当前最优多模态模型，在有限迭代设置中允许模型使用视觉和约束反馈进行自我修正。关键创新在于将问题转化为可执行程序，而非直接输出答案。
light_analysis.result: 模型在构造任务上取得一定成功率，但频繁出现结构幻觉（如对象缺失）、无法满足几何约束，且自我修正能力有限。与基线相比，模型难以有效利用迭代反馈改进构造，表明几何构造是超越文本或视觉合理性的严格测试。具体量化结果如成功率等摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoBuildBench为评估模型的接地、可执行推理提供了新基准，揭示了当前模型在结构准确性和约束满足上的不足。该工作强调了从语言到可执行构造的挑战，有助于推动多模态智能体在数学推理和交互式图形生成领域的发展。未来可探索更有效的自修正策略或扩展至更复杂几何问题。

title: STOP: Structured On-Policy Pruning of Long-Form Reasoning in Low-Data Regimes
abstract: Long chain-of-thought (Long CoT) reasoning improves performance on multi-step problems, but it also induces overthinking: models often generate low-yield reasoning that increases inference cost and latency. This inefficiency is especially problematic in low-data fine-tuning regimes, where real applications adapt reasoning models with limited supervision and cannot rely on large-scale teacher distillation or heavy test-time control. To address this, we propose STOP (Structured On-policy Pruning), an on-policy algorithm for analyzing and pruning long-form reasoning traces. STOP constructs self-distilled traces from the model. Then it maps each trace into a structured reasoning interface through node segmentation, taxonomy annotation, and reasoning-tree construction. On top of this interface, we introduce ECN (Earliest Correct Node), which retains the shortest prefix ending at the earliest node that both functions as an answering conclusion and yields the correct final answer, removing redundant post-solution reasoning while preserving semantic continuity. Experiments on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-LLaMA-3-8B across GSM8K, Math 500, and AIME 2024 show that STOP reduces generated tokens by 19.4-42.4% while largely preserving accuracy in low-data fine-tuning. Beyond efficiency, our analyses show that STOP induces much smaller distributional shift than teacher-guided pruning, improves the structural efficiency of generated reasoning, and reallocates reasoning effort away from redundant verification and backtracking toward more productive exploration.
comment: 20 pages, 6 figures, 6 tables. Code available at: https://github.com/chenjux/ECN-STOP

light_analysis.overview: 提出STOP算法，一种在低数据微调场景下对长链推理进行结构化在线剪枝的方法，通过保留最早正确节点减少推理token而不显著损失准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 长链推理虽提升多步问题性能，但导致过度思考，产生大量低收益推理，增加推理成本和延迟。在低数据微调场景中，监督有限，无法依赖大规模教师蒸馏或测试时控制，现有方法不适用。因此需要一种在有限数据下可自动剪枝冗余推理的方法。
light_analysis.method: STOP算法首先从模型自身构建自蒸馏推理轨迹，通过节点分割、分类注释和推理树构建将其映射为结构化推理接口。在此基础上引入最早正确节点（ECN）概念，保留从起始到首个正确结论的最短前缀，移除后续冗余推理，同时保持语义连续性。该方法无需外部教师或大规模数据。
light_analysis.result: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-LLaMA-3-8B模型上，GSM8K、Math 500和AIME 2024数据集实验显示，STOP减少生成token 19.4-42.4%，准确率基本保持。与教师引导剪枝相比，分布偏移更小，推理结构效率提升，将计算从冗余验证和回溯重分配至更有益的探索。
light_analysis.conclusion: STOP有效降低了长链推理的推理成本且适用于低数据微调场景，具有学术和实用价值。学术上提出了结构化剪枝与ECN概念；实用上可提升推理效率。未来工作可探索跨领域适应和更自动化的树构建方法。

title: Continual Fine-Tuning of Large Language Models via Program Memory
abstract: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT), particularly Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), has become a standard approach for adapting Large Language Models (LLMs) under limited compute. However, in continual settings where models are updated sequentially with small datasets, conventional LoRA updates struggle to balance rapid adaptation and knowledge retention. Existing methods typically treat the low-rank space as a homogeneous update region, lacking mechanisms to regulate how short-term updates are consolidated over time. We propose a continual LoRA framework with \textbf{Pro}gram memory, inspired by \textbf{C}omplementary \textbf{L}earning Systems in neuroscience. Our approach, dubbed \textbf{ProCL}, organizes LoRA adapters into structured program memory slots that are dynamically retrieved through input-conditioned attention. This enables rapid and localized adaptation, encouraging similar inputs to reuse shared adapter regions while reserving unused capacity for future data. The slots are then combined with the underlying adapter, which maintains a distributed representation that gradually accumulates knowledge across tasks to balance plasticity and stability. Our method operates entirely within the LoRA parameterization and incurs no additional inference cost. Experiments on diverse benchmarks demonstrate improved retention and reduced catastrophic forgetting over other continual LoRA strategies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于程序记忆的持续LoRA框架ProCL，平衡大语言模型持续微调中的快速适应与知识保留。
light_analysis.motivation: 参数高效微调（PEFT）尤其是LoRA已成为大语言模型适配的标准方法，但在连续学习场景中，使用小数据集顺序更新模型时，传统的LoRA更新难以平衡快速适应与知识保留。现有方法通常将低秩空间视为同质更新区域，缺乏调节短期更新整合为长期知识的机制，导致灾难性遗忘问题。
light_analysis.method: 受神经科学中互补学习系统的启发，提出ProCL框架，将LoRA适配器组织为结构化的程序记忆槽，通过输入条件注意力动态检索。这实现了快速局部适应，鼓励相似输入复用共享适配器区域，同时保留未用容量给未来数据。槽与底层适配器结合，分布式表示逐步积累知识，平衡可塑性与稳定性。方法完全在LoRA参数化内操作，无额外推理成本。
light_analysis.result: 在多种基准测试上，ProCL相比其他持续LoRA策略，改善了知识保留并减少了灾难性遗忘。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明在持续微调场景下有效平衡了快速适应与长期记忆。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProCL通过引入程序记忆机制，为持续LoRA微调提供了一种有效平衡可塑性与稳定性的解决方案。完全兼容LoRA参数化且无额外推理成本，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的记忆组织方式或扩展到其他参数高效微调方法。

title: A$_3$B$_2$: Adaptive Asymmetric Adapter for Alleviating Branch Bias in Vision-Language Image Classification with Few-Shot Learning
abstract: Efficient transfer learning methods for large-scale vision-language models ($e.g.$, CLIP) enable strong few-shot transfer, yet existing adaptation methods follow a fixed fine-tuning paradigm that implicitly assumes a uniform importance of the image and text branches, which has not been systematically studied in image classification. Through extensive analysis, we reveal a Branch Bias issue in vision-language image classification: adapting the image encoder does not always improve performance under out-of-distribution settings. Motivated by this observation, we propose A$_3$B$_2$, an Adaptive Asymmetric Adapter that alleviates Branch Bias in few-shot learning. A$_3$B$_2$ introduces Uncertainty-Aware Adapter Dampening (UAAD), which automatically suppresses image-branch adaptation when prediction uncertainty is high, enabling soft and data-driven control without manual intervention. Architecturally, A$_3$B$_2$ adopts a lightweight asymmetric design inspired by mixture-of-experts with Load Balancing Regularization. Extensive experiments on three few-shot image classification tasks across 11 datasets demonstrate that A$_3$B$_2$ consistently outperforms 11 competitive prompt- and adapter-based baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出A$_3$B$_2$自适应非对称适配器，通过不确定性感知阻尼缓解视觉-语言少样本分类中的分支偏差问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言模型微调方法假设图像和文本分支重要性均匀，但研究发现存在分支偏差：在分布外场景下自适应图像编码器不一定提升性能。该问题在少样本图像分类中未被系统研究，且手动调整分支权重不可行。因此需要一种自适应、数据驱动的方法来动态控制分支贡献。
light_analysis.method: A$_3$B$_2$包含两个核心组件：不确定性感知适配器阻尼（UAAD），根据预测不确定性自动抑制图像分支适配，实现软控制；轻量级非对称架构，借鉴专家混合（Mixture-of-Experts）并加入负载平衡正则化，以平衡分支贡献。方法无需手动干预，完全由数据驱动。
light_analysis.result: 在三个少样本图像分类任务（11个数据集）上，A$_3$B$_2$一致优于11种基于提示或适配器的竞争基线。未提供具体数值，但摘要明确表明性能提升且具泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次揭示视觉-语言分类中的分支偏差问题，并提出A$_3$B$_2$自适应缓解方法。其创新在于不确定性驱动的自适应阻尼和非对称专家混合设计，为少样本迁移学习提供了新思路。未来可探索对更大规模模型和更多任务的适用性。

title: Unifying Physically-Informed Weather Priors in A Single Model for Image Restoration Across Multiple Adverse Weather Conditions
abstract: Image restoration under multiple adverse weather conditions aims to develop a single model to recover the underlying scene with high visibility. Weather-related artifacts vary with the particle's distance to the camera according to the established scene visibility analysis, where close and faraway regions are more affected by falling drops and fog effects, respectively. Existing methods fail to consider this weather-specific physical visual process; thus, the restoration performance is limited.
