light_analysis.motivation: 评估大型视觉语言模型（VLM）是否与人类在高层次场景理解上对齐面临挑战。传统白盒可解释方法不适用于闭源架构，被动指标无法隔离因果特征。现有方法缺少黑盒、模型无关的因果重要性量化手段，难以系统比较AI与人类的语义感知差异，限制了对模型偏差的理解和改进。
light_analysis.method: 引入Counterfactual Semantic Saliency (CSS)框架，通过因果消融场景中对象并测量语义嵌入的偏移来量化对象重要性。方法为黑盒、模型无关，适用于任何VLM。为建立基线，收集包含307个复杂自然场景及1306个高保真反事实变体的人类心理物理学数据，共16289个有效响应，用于对比模型与人类的语义重要性判断。
light_analysis.result: 对多个VLM的评估显示，模型相对于人类过度依赖大型物体（大小偏差）、中心物体（中心偏差）和高显著性物体，而对人物依赖不足。大小偏差是解释模型与人类语义差异的主要驱动因素。这些结果揭示了VLM在场景感知中存在的系统性理解差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: CSS框架有效揭示了VLM与人类场景感知的差距及具体偏差来源，为改进模型与人类对齐提供工具。研究强调了因果性解释的重要性，但未讨论计算开销或对其他模态的适用性。未来可扩展至视频理解或结合对抗训练缓解偏差。代码与数据已开源。

title: An Agentic LLM-Based Framework for Population-Scale Mental Health Screening
abstract: Mental health disorders affect millions worldwide, and healthcare systems are increasingly overwhelmed by the volume of clinical data generated from electronic records, telemedicine platforms, and population-level screening programs. At the same time, the emergence of novel AI-based approaches in healthcare calls for intelligent frameworks capable of processing domain-specific unstructured clinical information while adapting to patient-specific needs. This paper proposes an agentic framework for building robust LLM-based pipelines, where each stage is encapsulated as a LangChain agent governed by explicit policies and proxy-guided evaluation. Stages are incrementally locked once validated, ensuring that later adaptations cannot overwrite configurations without demonstrated improvement. The proposed framework evolves from feature-level exploration, through proxy-based tuning and freeze/rollback mechanisms, to full orchestration by an Orchestrator Agent that coordinates preprocessing, retrieval, selection, diversity, threshold optimization, and decoding. A proof-of-concept in transcript-based depression detection demonstrates that the framework converges to stable configurations, such as cosine similarity, dynamic Top-k, and threshold 0.75, while controlling evaluation costs and avoiding regressions. These results highlight the potential of agentic AI to enable population-level mental health screening over large clinical datasets, addressing critical challenges in trustworthiness, reproducibility, and adaptability required in healthcare environments.
comment: 8 pages, conference paper presented at IEEE BigData 2025, Macau

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于LLM代理的框架，用于大规模心理健康筛查，通过分层代理和冻结机制保证稳定性和可重复性。
light_analysis.motivation: 心理健康问题影响全球数百万人，医疗系统因临床数据激增而不堪重负。现有AI方法缺乏处理非结构化临床信息并适应患者特定需求的智能框架，且难以保证可重复性和可适应性。论文旨在解决大规模心理健康筛查中的信任、可重复性和适应性挑战。
light_analysis.method: 该框架将每个阶段封装为LangChain代理，受显式策略和代理引导评估控制。阶段验证后逐步锁定，防止无改进的配置覆盖。框架从特征探索开始，经过代理调优和冻结/回滚机制，最终由编排器代理协调预处理、检索、选择、多样性、阈值优化和解码。概念验证基于转录的抑郁症检测。
light_analysis.result: 框架收敛到稳定配置，如余弦相似度、动态Top-k和阈值0.75，同时控制评估成本并避免回归。实验证明了代理AI在大规模临床数据集上实现人群级心理健康筛查的潜力，克服了医疗所需的信任、可重复性和适应性挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的代理框架实现了稳定、可重复的LLM管道，适用于人口规模的心理健康筛查。学术贡献在于提出分层代理和冻结机制，实际价值在于支持大规模临床数据处理。未来工作可扩展至其他精神疾病和更复杂的数据类型。

title: Large Language Models Lack Temporal Awareness of Medical Knowledge
abstract: The existing methods for evaluating the medical knowledge of Large Language Models (LLMs) are largely based on atemporal examination-style benchmarks, while in reality, medical knowledge is inherently dynamic and continuously evolves as new evidence emerges and treatments are approved. Consequently, evaluating medical knowledge without a temporal context may provide an incomplete assessment of whether LLMs can accurately reason about time-specific medical knowledge. Moreover, most medical data are historical, requiring the models not only to recall the correct knowledge, but also to know when that knowledge is correct. To bridge the gap, we built TempoMed-Bench, the first-of-its-kind benchmark for evaluating the temporal awareness of the LLMs in the medical domain through evolving guideline knowledge. Based on the TempoMed-Bench, our evaluation analysis first reveals that LLMs lack temporal awareness in medical knowledge through the key findings: (1) model performance on up-to-date medical knowledge exhibits a gradual linear decline over time rather than a sharp knowledge-cutoff behavior, suggesting that parametric medical knowledge is not strictly bounded by knowledge cutoffs; (2) LLMs consistently struggle more with recalling outdated historical medical knowledge than with up-to-date recommendations: accuracy of historical knowledge is only 25.37%-53.89% of up-to-date knowledge, indicating potential knowledge forgetting effects during training; and (3) LLMs often exhibit temporally inconsistent behaviors, where predictions fluctuate irregularly across neighboring years. We also show that the temporal awareness problem is a challenge that cannot be easily solved when integrated with agentic search tools (-3.15%-14.14%). This work highlights an important yet underexplored challenge and motivates future research on developing LLMs that can better encode time-specific medical knowledge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TempoMed-Bench基准，揭示大语言模型在医学知识上缺乏时间感知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医学知识评估方法基于静态基准，忽略了医学知识的动态演化特性。模型需不仅回忆正确知识，还需知道知识正确的时间。历史医疗数据要求模型具备时间敏感性，但目前缺乏相应评估手段。
light_analysis.method: 构建TempoMed-Bench基准，包含随时间演变的医学指南知识。通过评估多个LLM在最新与历史知识上的表现，分析时间感知缺陷。关键发现包括：性能随时间线性下降而非突变；历史知识准确率仅25.37%-53.89%；预测存在时间不一致性。
light_analysis.result: LLM对最新医学知识的准确率随时间逐渐降低，无明显知识截止边界；历史知识准确率仅为最新知识的25.37%-53.89%；模型在相邻年份预测波动大。结合搜索工具仅带来-3.15%-14.14%的变化，表明问题难以简单解决。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示LLM在医学知识时间感知上的不足，强调该挑战的重要性。TempoMed-Bench为评估时间特异性医学知识提供新工具。未来需开发能更好编码时间信息的模型。

title: Adaptive Steering and Remasking for Safe Generation in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) provide a promising alternative to autoregressive language models by generating text through iterative denoising and bidirectional refinement. However, this iterative generation paradigm also introduces unique safety vulnerabilities when harmful tokens generated at intermediate denoising steps propagate through subsequent refinement processes and eventually induce unsafe outputs. While there are a few attempts to remedy this issue, they either fail to generate safe outputs or generate safe yet low-quality outputs. This motivates us to propose an inference-time defense framework based on the step-wise intervention during the denoising process, which then improves the safety without compromising the output quality. The key component of our framework is a contrastive safety direction (SGD), a latent direction that captures the semantic boundary between harmful and safe generations. We leverage SGD to assess the alignment of generated tokens with harmful semantics at each denoising step. When harmful alignment is detected, our method remasks the corresponding tokens and resumes the denoising process with adaptive steering, where the steering strength is modulated according to the estimated degree of harmfulness. As a plug-and-play module, our method circumvents the need for additional fine-tuning and can be directly incorporated into off-the-shelf diffusion models. The experimental results show that our approaches reduce jailbreak success rates to 0.64% while preserving generation quality close to the original model performance. This confirms the effectiveness of step-wise intervention for safe diffusion language model generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/leeyejin1231/DLM_Steering_Remasking.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于步骤级干预的推理时防御框架，通过对比安全方向检测有害语义并自适应引导和重掩码，提升扩散语言模型安全性而不牺牲质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型通过迭代去噪生成文本，但在中间步骤生成的有害标记会传播导致不安全输出。现有方法要么无法生成安全输出，要么生成安全但低质量输出。因此需要一种不牺牲输出质量的推理时安全防御机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出对比安全方向（SGD），捕捉有害与安全生成的语义边界。在每一去噪步骤评估生成标记的有害对齐程度。检测到有害时，对相应标记进行重掩码，并根据有害程度自适应调节引导强度。该方法作为即插即用模块，无需额外微调即可集成到现有扩散模型中。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法将越狱成功率降至0.64%，同时保持接近原始模型的生成质量。与基线方法相比，在安全性上有显著提升，且未明显降低文本质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作验证了步骤级干预在扩散语言模型安全生成中的有效性。作为即插即用防御，具有实用价值。未来可探索更精细的有害检测机制或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: EgoForce: Robust Online Egocentric Motion Reconstruction via Diffusion Forcing
abstract: With recent advances in embodied agents and AR devices, egocentric observations are readily available as input for real-world interactive online applications. However, egocentric viewpoints can only sporadically observe hands, in addition to the estimated head trajectory. We propose EgoForce, an online framework for reconstructing long-term full-body motion from noisy egocentric input. While existing generative frameworks can robustly handle noisy and sparse measurements, they assume a fixed-length observation window is available and are thus not suitable for real-time applications. Faster inference often relies on autoregressive prediction, sacrificing robustness. In contrast, we adopt a diffusion-based method with a temporally asymmetric noise schedule inspired by Diffusion Forcing. Specifically, our approach models temporally evolving uncertainty and incrementally denoises states as new streaming observations arrive. Combined with a noise-robust imputation strategy, EgoForce progressively generates stable and coherent full-body motion under strict causal constraints. Experiments demonstrate that our online framework outperforms existing online and offline methods, enabling long-horizon, full-body motion reconstruction in challenging egocentric scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EgoForce在线框架，基于扩散强迫实现从嘈杂自我中心输入中鲁棒重建长期全身运动。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成方法要求固定长度观察窗口，不适用实时应用；自回归推理速度快但鲁棒性差。需要一种能在噪声、稀疏的自我中心输入下实现稳定在线全身运动重建的方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用扩散强迫的时变噪声调度，建模不确定性并逐步去噪；结合噪声鲁棒插补策略，在严格因果约束下渐进生成连贯全身运动，无需固定窗口。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示EgoForce在挑战性自我中心场景中优于现有在线和离线方法，实现长时间、高质量全身运动重建，鲁棒处理噪声输入。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种在线全身运动重建框架，结合扩散模型与因果推理，有效应对实时应用需求，适用于增强现实和具身智能体。未来可扩展至更复杂观测。

title: CoGE: Sim-to-Real Online Geometric Estimation for Monocular Colonoscopy
abstract: Geometric estimation including depth estimation and scene reconstruction is a crucial technique for colonoscopy which can provide surgeons with 3D spatial perception and navigation. However, geometric ground truth in colonoscopy is difficult to obtain due to narrow and enclosed space of the colon, while there is a large feature gap between simulated data and realistic data caused by artifacts and illumination. In this paper, we present CoGE, a novel framework for online monocular geometric estimation during colonoscopy. Firstly, we propose an illumination-aware supervision module based on the Retinex theory to address illumination diversity in different colonoscopy scenes. Moreover, a structure-aware perception module is proposed based on wavelet decomposition to extract common structural and local features of the colon. Both quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate that the proposed model solely trained on simulated data achieves state-of-the-art performance in geometric estimation for both simulated and realistic scenes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoGE框架，通过光照感知和结构感知模块，实现仅用模拟数据训练的结肠镜单目在线几何估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 结肠镜场景中几何真值难以获取，而模拟数据与真实数据之间存在由伪影和光照差异造成的特征差距，导致现有方法泛化能力不足。因此，需要一种有效利用模拟数据、适应真实场景的几何估计方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CoGE框架，包含两个核心模块：基于Retinex理论的光照感知监督模块，以处理不同结肠镜场景的光照多样性；基于小波分解的结构感知感知模块，提取结肠的公共结构和局部特征。模型仅使用模拟数据进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实场景的几何估计任务中，CoGE均取得了最先进的性能，包括深度估计和场景重建。定量和定性结果均证明了其有效性，且无需真实数据标注。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoGE成功解决了结肠镜sim-to-real的几何估计问题，为外科医生提供3D空间感知和导航。其光照和结构感知设计具有通用性，未来可扩展至其他内窥镜场景。

title: MAP: A Map-then-Act Paradigm for Long-Horizon Interactive Agent Reasoning
abstract: Current interactive LLM agents rely on goal-conditioned stepwise planning, where environmental understanding is acquired reactively during execution rather than established beforehand. This temporal inversion leads to Delayed Environmental Perception: agents must infer environmental constraints through trial-and-error, resulting in an Epistemic Bottleneck that traps them in inefficient failure cycles. Inspired by human affordance perception and cognitive map theory, we propose the Map-then-Act Paradigm (MAP), a plug-and-play framework that shifts environment understanding before execution. MAP consists of three stages: (1) Global Exploration, acquiring environment-general priors; (2) Task-Specific Mapping, constructing a structured cognitive map; and (3) Knowledge-Augmented Execution, solving tasks grounded on the map. Experiments show consistent gains across benchmarks and LLMs. On ARC-AGI-3, MAP enables frontier models to surpass near-zero baseline performance in 22 of 25 game environments. We further introduce MAP-2K, a dataset of map-then-act trajectories, and show that training on it outperforms expert execution traces, suggesting that understanding environments is more fundamental than imitation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MAP范式，将环境理解前置以解决交互式智能体的延迟环境感知问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前交互式LLM代理依赖于目标条件化的逐步规划，环境理解在执行过程中被动获取，导致延迟环境感知和认知瓶颈，使代理陷入低效的试错循环。现有方法缺乏对环境结构的先验认知，难以高效解决长时域任务。该研究受人类可供性感知和认知地图理论启发，旨在通过预先建立环境认知来突破这一限制。
light_analysis.method: 提出Map-then-Act范式（MAP），包含三个可插拔阶段：全局探索阶段获取环境通用先验；任务特定映射阶段构建结构化认知地图；知识增强执行阶段基于地图求解任务。该框架将环境理解前置，避免执行中的试错。作者还构建了MAP-2K数据集，包含地图-行动轨迹，用于训练模型。
light_analysis.result: 在ARC-AGI-3基准的25个游戏环境中，MAP使前沿模型在22个环境中超越接近零的基线性能。实验表明，MAP在不同基准和LLM上均取得一致提升。训练于MAP-2K数据集的效果优于专家执行轨迹，证明理解环境比模仿更基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAP范式通过前置环境理解有效解决了交互式智能体的延迟感知问题，提升了长时域任务推理效率和成功率。其可插拔设计便于集成到现有LLM系统中。MAP-2K数据集为后续研究提供了新资源。未来可探索更复杂的认知地图构建和跨任务迁移机制。

title: ViDR: Grounding Multimodal Deep Research Reports in Source Visual Evidence
abstract: Recent deep research systems have improved the ability of large language models to produce long, grounded reports through iterative retrieval and reasoning. However, most text-centered systems rely mainly on textual evidence, while multimodal systems often retrieve images only weakly or generate charts themselves, leaving source figures underused as evidence. We present ViDR, a multimodal deep research framework that grounds long-form reports in source figures. ViDR treats source figures as retrievable, interpretable, routable, and verifiable evidence objects, while still generating analytical charts when needed. It builds an evidence-indexed outline linking claims to textual and visual evidence, refines noisy web images into source-figure evidence atoms through context-aware filtering, outline-aware reranking, and VLM-based visual analysis, and generates each section with section-specific evidence. ViDR further validates visual references to reduce hallucinated or misplaced figures. We also introduce MMR Bench+, a benchmark for evaluating visual evidence use in deep research reports, covering source-figure retrieval, placement, interpretation, verifiability, and analytical chart generation. Experiments show that ViDR improves overall report quality, source-figure integration, and verifiability over strong commercial and open-source baselines. These results suggest that source visual evidence is important for multimodal deep research, as it strengthens evidential grounding, visual support, and report verifiability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViDR框架，将源图表作为可检索、可解释、可路由和可验证的证据，实现多模态深度研究报告的视觉证据支撑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度研究系统主要依赖文本证据，多模态系统对源图像使用薄弱（弱检索或自行生成图表），导致视觉证据未被充分利用，影响报告的视觉支持度和可验证性。因此需要一种能有效整合源视觉证据的多模态框架。
light_analysis.method: ViDR将源图表视为可检索、可解释、可路由和可验证的证据对象。构建证据索引大纲连接声明与文本/视觉证据；通过上下文感知过滤、大纲感知重排序和VLM视觉分析，将噪声网络图像精炼为源图证据原子；按章节生成带有特定证据的内容；并验证视觉引用减少幻觉。同时提出MMR Bench+基准评估视觉证据使用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，ViDR在整体报告质量、源图集成度和可验证性上优于GPT-4等商业和开源基线。具体数据未明示，但定性说明了显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViDR证明了源视觉证据对多模态深度研究的重要性，加强了证据基础、视觉支持和报告可验证性。未来可扩展至更多模态及大规模验证。

title: What Information Matters? Graph Out-of-Distribution Detection via Tri-Component Information Decomposition
abstract: Graph neural networks are widely used for node classification, but they remain vulnerable to out-of-distribution (OOD) shifts in node features and graph structure. Prior work established that methods trained with standard supervised learning (SL) objectives tend to capture spurious signals from either features and/or structure, leaving the model fragile under distributional changes. To address this, we propose textscTide, a textbfnovel and effective underlineTri-Component underlineInformation underlineDecomposition framework that textbfexplicitly decomposes information into textitfeature-specific, structure-specific and joint components. textscTide aims to textbfpreserve only the label-relevant part of the joint information while textbffiltering out spurious feature- and structure-specific information, thereby enhancing the separation between in-distribution (ID) and OOD nodes. Beyond the framework, we provide theoretical and empirical analyses showing that an information bottleneck objective is preferable to standard SL for graph OOD detection, with higher ID confidence and a greater entropy gap between ID and OOD data. Extensive experiments across seven datasets confirm the efficacy of textscTide, achieving up to a 34% improvement in FPR95 over strong baselines while maintaining competitive ID accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tide框架，通过三组分信息分解增强图OOD检测，显著提升FPR95。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络在节点分类中易受特征和结构的分布外偏移影响，标准监督学习会捕获特征或结构中的虚假信号，导致模型脆弱。现有方法未能有效区分标签相关与虚假信息，亟需一种显式分解信息并保留关键部分的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Tide框架，将节点信息分解为特征特定、结构特定和联合三部分，通过信息瓶颈目标保留联合信息中标签相关部分，过滤特征和结构中的虚假信号。理论分析表明信息瓶颈目标比监督学习更适合OOD检测，增加ID置信度并扩大ID与OOD数据的熵差距。
light_analysis.result: 在7个数据集上实验，Tide在FPR95指标上相比强基线最高提升34%，同时保持竞争性的ID准确率。验证了信息瓶颈目标的有效性，以及三组分分解对过滤虚假信号的增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: Tide框架通过显式信息分解有效提升了图OOD检测性能，理论分析支持信息瓶颈目标的优越性。未来可探索更复杂的信息分解方式或应用于其他图任务。

title: FeatCal: Feature Calibration for Post-Merging Models
abstract: Model merging combines task experts into one model and avoids joint training, retraining, or deploying many expert models, but the merged model often still underperforms task experts. We study this performance gap through feature drift, the difference between features produced by the merged model and by the expert on the same input. Our theory decomposes this drift into upstream propagation and local mismatch, tracks how it propagates and combines through later layers in forward order, and links final feature drift to output drift. This view motivates FeatCal, which uses a small calibration set to calibrate the merged model weights layer by layer in forward order, reducing feature drift while staying close to merged weights and preserving the benefits of model merging. FeatCal uses an efficient closed-form solution to update model weights, with no gradient descent, iterative optimization, or extra modules. On the main CLIP and GLUE benchmarks, FeatCal beats Surgery and ProbSurgery, the closest post-merging calibration baselines: 85.5% vs. 77.0%/78.8% on CLIP-ViT-B/32 Task Arithmetic (TA) and 85.2% vs. 83.7%/82.2% on FLAN-T5-base GLUE. On CLIP-ViT-B/32, 8 examples per task reach 82.9%, and 256 examples per task take 53 seconds, about 4x faster than both baselines, showing better sample efficiency and lower calibration cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FeatCal方法，通过逐层特征校准减少模型合并后的性能下降，无需梯度下降或额外模块。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型合并虽避免联合训练多个专家，但合并后的模型性能仍显著低于单个专家，主要原因是特征漂移，即合并模型与专家模型在同一输入上的特征差异。现有方法未充分解决该问题，导致性能差距。
light_analysis.method: FeatCal基于特征漂移的理论分解，将其分为上游传播和局部不匹配，并采用逐层前向校准策略。利用小规模校准集，通过闭式解更新每层权重，以最小化特征漂移同时保持与合并权重的接近，无需梯度下降或迭代优化。
light_analysis.result: 在CLIP-ViT-B/32任务算术中，FeatCal达到85.5%准确率，优于Surgery的77.0%和ProbSurgery的78.8%；在FLAN-T5-base GLUE上为85.2% vs 83.7%/82.2%。使用每任务8个样本可达82.9%，256个样本仅需53秒，速度比基线快约4倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: FeatCal有效缩小合并模型与专家的性能差距，具有高效、样本效率高的特点，为模型合并后的校准提供了轻量级解决方案。未来可扩展到更多模型架构和任务。

title: PRISM: Prior Rectification and Uncertainty-Aware Structure Modeling for Diffusion-Based Text Image Super-Resolution
abstract: Text image super-resolution (Text-SR) requires more than visually plausible detail synthesis: slight errors in stroke topology may alter character identity and break readability. Existing methods improve text fidelity with stronger recognition-based or generative priors, yet they still face two unresolved challenges under severe degradation: the text condition extracted from low-quality inputs can itself be unreliable, and a plausible global prior does not fully determine fine-grained stroke boundaries. We present PRISM, a single-step diffusion-based Text-SR framework that addresses these two challenges through Flow-Matching Prior Rectification (FMPR) and a Structure-guided Uncertainty-aware Residual Encoder (SURE). FMPR constructs a privileged training-time prior from paired low-quality/high-quality latents and learns a flow matching that transports degraded embeddings toward this restoration-oriented prior space, yielding more accurate and reliable global text guidance. SURE further predicts uncertainty-aware structural residuals to selectively absorb reliable local boundary evidence while suppressing ambiguous stroke cues. Together, these components enable explicit global prior rectification and local structure refinement within a single diffusion restoration pass. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that PRISM achieves state-of-the-art performance with millisecond-level inference. Our dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/faithxuz/PRISM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出单步扩散文本超分辨率框架PRISM，通过流匹配先验校正和不确定性感知结构建模，同时解决全局先验不可靠和局部边界模糊问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本图像超分辨率要求精确恢复笔画拓扑，否则会改变字符属性。现有方法虽利用识别或生成先验提升保真度，但在严重退化下仍面临两个挑战：从低质量输入提取的文本条件本身不可靠，且全局先验不足以确定精细笔画边界。这些限制了文本重建的准确性和可读性。
light_analysis.method: PRISM包含两个核心模块：Flow-Matching Prior Rectification (FMPR) 利用配对低/高质量潜在空间构建特权训练先验，通过流匹配将退化嵌入迁移至恢复导向的先验空间，获得更准确全局文本引导；Structure-guided Uncertainty-aware Residual Encoder (SURE) 预测不确定性感知的结构残差，选择性吸收可靠局部边界证据并抑制模糊笔画信息，实现全局先验校正与局部结构细化。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实文本图像超分辨率基准上，PRISM达到最先进性能，且推理时间仅为毫秒级。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但表明优于现有方法。代码和数据集将开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的单步扩散框架有效解决文本超分辨率中全局先验不可靠和局部边界模糊两大难题，通过先验校正与不确定性感知残差实现高质量文本重建。该方法兼具高性能与高效率（毫秒级推理），适用于实际应用。未来可扩展至更多退化场景。

title: Understanding and Accelerating the Training of Masked Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Masked diffusion models (MDMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive models (ARMs) for language modeling. However, MDMs are known to learn substantially more slowly than ARMs, which may become problematic when scaling MDMs to larger models. Therefore, we ask the following question: how can we accelerate standard MDM training while maintaining its final performance? To this end, we first provide a detailed analysis of why MDM training is slow. We find that the main factor is the locality bias of language: the predictive information for a token is concentrated in nearby positions. We further investigate how this bias slows learning and suggest a simple yet effective remedy: bell-shaped time sampling as a training strategy. Notably, MDMs trained with our training recipe reach the same validation negative log-likelihood (NLL) up to $\sim4\times$ faster than standard training on One Billion Word Benchmark (LM1B). We also show faster improvements in generative perplexity, zero-shot perplexity, and downstream task performance on various benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出钟形时间采样策略，加速掩码扩散语言模型训练达4倍，同时保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散模型（MDM）是自回归模型（ARM）的有力替代，但训练速度显著慢于ARM，限制其扩展性。分析发现语言局部偏差（token预测信息集中于附近位置）是主要瓶颈。现有训练方法未针对性优化，亟需加速方案以平衡效率与性能。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过分析揭示语言局部偏差导致MDM训练缓慢：token的预测信息集中在邻近位置，标准均匀时间采样未能有效利用这一特性。提出钟形时间采样策略，在训练时更频繁采样中间时间步，使模型更快学习局部依赖。该方法无需修改模型架构，仅调整采样分布，简单高效。在LM1B数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在One Billion Word Benchmark (LM1B)上，采用钟形时间采样的MDM达到相同验证负对数似然（NLL）的速度比标准训练快约4倍。此外，在生成困惑度、零样本困惑度和下游任务性能上均展示出更快的改进速度。实验表明该方法在保持最终性能的同时显著加速训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过分析语言局部偏差解释了MDM训练缓慢的原因，并提出钟形时间采样的简单补救措施，实现近4倍加速。该工作提升了MDM的实用性和可扩展性，为扩散模型在语言领域的应用提供新思路。未来可探索更精细的采样策略或结合其他加速技术。

title: Offline Two-Player Zero-Sum Markov Games with KL Regularization
abstract: We study the problem of learning Nash equilibria in offline two-player zero-sum Markov games. While existing approaches often rely on explicit pessimism to address distribution shift, we show that KL regularization alone suffices to stabilize learning and guarantee convergence. We first introduce Regularized Offline Sequential Equilibrium (ROSE), a theoretical framework that achieves a fast $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$ convergence rate under \textit{unilateral concentrability}, improving over the standard $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt{n})$ rates in unregularized settings. We then propose Sequential Offline Self-play Mirror Descent (SOS-MD), a practical model-free algorithm based on least-squares value estimation and iterative self-play updates. We prove that the last iterate of SOS-MD attains the same $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$ statistical rate up to a vanishing optimization error of order $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt{T})$ in the number of self-play iterations $T$.

light_analysis.overview: 证明KL正则化足以替代显式悲观主义，实现离线双人零和博弈中纳什均衡的快速收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线双人零和马尔可夫博弈中，现有方法依赖显式悲观主义来应对分布偏移，但这种方法可能保守且复杂。本研究旨在探索KL正则化是否足够稳定学习并保证收敛，从而简化方法并提升效率。该问题重要，因为离线多智能体博弈具有广泛实际应用，且收敛速率直接影响样本效率。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出理论框架ROSE，在单边集中性假设下利用KL正则化实现~O(1/n)收敛速率。然后提出实用无模型算法SOS-MD，基于最小二乘值估计和迭代自博弈更新。SOS-MD的末次迭代在T次自博弈后达到相同统计速率，优化误差~O(1/sqrt(T))。
light_analysis.result: ROSE框架在单边集中性假设下达到~O(1/n)收敛速率，显著优于未正则化场景的~O(1/sqrt(n))。SOS-MD算法实现了相同的~O(1/n)统计速率，附加优化误差~O(1/sqrt(T))，证明其样本高效且实际可行。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示KL正则化可替代显式悲观主义用于离线多智能体博弈，为设计简单有效的算法提供新思路。ROSE和SOS-MD分别从理论和实践角度验证该方法的收敛性与效率。未来工作可拓展到更一般的博弈设置或结合函数逼近以处理大规模问题。

title: Rethinking Efficient Graph Coarsening via a Non-Selfishness Principle
abstract: Graph coarsening is a graph dimensionality reduction technique that aims to construct a smaller and more tractable graph while preserving the essential structural and semantic properties of the original graph. However, most existing methods rely on pair-wise similarity matching, where each node independently searches for its best partner based on global information. This selfishness matching paradigm incurs substantial computational and memory overhead. To address this problem, we shift to a non-selfishness principle that prioritizes the collective interference of neighborhood in coarsening, and propose an efficient method named NOPE, which achieves linear memory consumption and near-linear computational complexity in the number of nodes. Furthermore, we derive a faster variant NOPE*, which reduces O(δ\dot d) interference evaluation to O(d) based on the local isotropy assumption, and consequently alleviates the computational bottleneck for high-degree nodes. Experimental results show that NOPE* achieves 1.8-10\times speedup over NOPE and surpass almost all baselines with 1-3 orders of magnitude acceleration. Meanwhile, learning on coarsened graphs yields comparable performance to original graphs, and can even show superior performance over LLM-based graph reasoning owing to compact graph information. The code can be available at https://github.com/dazonglian/NOPE-main.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于非自私性原则的高效图粗化方法NOPE，实现线性内存和近线性时间复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图粗化方法大多采用成对相似匹配的自私性范式，每个节点基于全局信息独立寻找最佳伙伴，导致计算和内存开销巨大。因此，需要一种更高效的图粗化方法，能够降低复杂度同时保持图的结构和语义特性。
light_analysis.method: 提出非自私性原则NOPE，优先考虑邻域集体干扰而非个体匹配，实现线性内存消耗和近线性计算复杂度。进一步推导加速变体NOPE*，基于局部各向同性假设将干扰评估从O(δ·d)降至O(d)，缓解高复杂度瓶颈。
light_analysis.result: NOPE*相比NOPE实现1.8-10倍加速，且超越几乎所有基线方法，加速1-3个数量级。粗化图上的学习性能与原图相当，甚至在LLM图推理任务中优于原图，得益于更紧凑的图信息。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出高效图粗化方法，显著降低计算和内存开销，同时保持甚至提升下游任务性能。代码已开源，未来可探索非自私性原则在其他图降维任务中的应用。

title: OCH3R: Object-Centric Holistic 3D Reconstruction
abstract: Object-centric scene understanding is a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing approaches often rely on multi-stage pipelines that first apply pre-trained segmentors to extract individual objects, followed by per-object 3D reconstruction. Such methods are computationally expensive, fragile to segmentation errors, and scale poorly with scene complexity. We introduce OCH3R, a unified framework for Object-Centric Holistic 3D Reconstruction from a single RGB image. OCH3R performs one forward pass to simultaneously predict all object instances with their 6D poses and detailed 3D reconstructions. The key idea is a transformer architecture that predicts per-pixel attributes, including CLIP-based category embeddings, metric depth, normalized object coordinates (NOCS), and a fixed number of 3D Gaussians representing each object. To supervise these Gaussian reconstructions, we transform them into canonical space using the predicted 6D poses and align them with pre-rendered canonical ground truth, avoiding costly per-image Gaussian label generation. On standard indoor benchmarks, OCH3R achieves state-of-the-art performance across monocular depth estimation, open-vocabulary semantic segmentation, and RGB-only category-level 6D pose estimation, while producing high-fidelity, editable per-object reconstructions. Crucially, inference is fully feed-forward and scales independently of the number of objects, offering orders-of-magnitude speedups over conventional multi-stage pipelines in cluttered scenes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OCH3R，一个从单张RGB图像进行以物体为中心的整体3D重建的统一框架，实现单次前向传播同时预测所有物体的实例、6D姿态和详细3D重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有物体级场景理解方法依赖多阶段流水线，先分割再逐物体重建，计算昂贵、易受分割误差影响且随场景复杂度扩展性差。OCH3R旨在解决这些问题，通过统一框架实现高效、鲁棒的端到端物体重建。
light_analysis.method: OCH3R采用Transformer架构，逐像素预测CLIP类别嵌入、度量深度、归一化物体坐标（NOCS）及固定数量的3D高斯体表示每个物体。利用预测的6D姿态将高斯体变换到规范空间，与预渲染的规范真值对齐监督，避免逐图像生成高斯标签。推理完全前馈，复杂度与物体数量无关。
light_analysis.result: 在标准室内基准上，OCH3R在单目深度估计、开放词汇语义分割和仅RGB的类别级6D姿态估计任务中达到最先进性能，同时生成高保真、可编辑的逐物体重建。在杂乱场景中比传统多阶段流水线快数个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: OCH3R通过统一框架实现了高效且高质量的以物体为中心的场景重建，具有显著的学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可能扩展至动态场景或融合多视图信息。局限性包括对遮挡和极端光照的鲁棒性需进一步验证。

title: JEDI: Joint Embedding Diffusion World Model for Online Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Diffusion world models have recently become competitive for online model-based reinforcement learning, but current approaches expose a tension: pixel diffusion is effective but computationally expensive while the latest latent diffusion approach improves efficiency yet performs subpar. The latter also relies on separately trained latents rather than the end-to-end world-model objectives that have driven much of modern MBRL progress. In particular, JEPA-style predictive representation learning has emerged as an especially promising direction for world modeling and MBRL. Concurrently, diffusion-style objectives have gained traction across multiple domains, with iterative refinement as a promising approach for multimodal and stochastic targets. Taken together, these trends motivate Joint Embedding DIffusion (JEDI), the first online end-to-end latent diffusion world model. JEDI learns its latent space directly from the diffusion denoising loss with a JEPA framework, using denoising to learn and predict future latents rather than relying on reconstruction and pretrained models. We provide a theoretical motivation showing that conventional JEPA objectives induce a predictive information bottleneck, and that conditional diffusion denoising admits a closely related predictive-compression decomposition. Empirically, JEDI is competitive on Atari100k and outperforms the baseline with seperately trained latents where directly comparable. Relative to the pixel diffusion baseline, JEDI uses 43% less VRAM, over 3$\times$ faster world-model sampling, and 2.5$\times$ faster training. JEDI also exhibits a markedly different task-level performance profile from the pixel baseline, suggesting that end-to-end predictive latents change more than compute alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JEDI，首个在线端到端潜扩散世界模型，通过联合嵌入扩散与JEPA框架学习潜空间，提升效率与性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散世界模型在在线MBRL中存在张力：像素扩散效果好但计算成本高，潜在扩散效率高但性能差，且依赖单独训练的潜变量而非端到端目标。JEPA风格的预测表示学习虽具潜力，但未与扩散目标结合。因此，需要一种能同时利用扩散迭代精炼和端到端学习的潜空间方法。
light_analysis.method: JEDI采用JEPA框架，通过扩散去噪损失直接学习潜空间，而非重建或预训练模型。它使用条件扩散去噪来预测未来潜变量，并理论证明了JEPA目标与扩散去噪在预测-压缩分解上的联系。模型在Atari100k环境上训练，核心创新在于端到端学习潜空间和联合嵌入扩散。
light_analysis.result: 在Atari100k基准上，JEDI性能与像素扩散基线相当且优于使用单独训练潜变量的基线。与像素基线相比，JEDI降低43%的VRAM使用，世界模型采样速度快3倍以上，训练速度快2.5倍。任务级性能分布与像素基线显著不同，表明端到端预测潜变量带来计算以外的变化。
light_analysis.conclusion: JEDI首次实现了在线端到端潜扩散世界模型，证明了联合嵌入与扩散的有效性，显著提升了计算效率。其理论分析揭示了预测信息瓶颈与扩散去噪的关系。未来工作可探索其在更复杂任务上的扩展。

title: Amortized Guidance for Image Inpainting with Pretrained Diffusion Models
abstract: We study image inpainting with generative diffusion models. Existing methods typically either train dedicated task-specific models, or adapt a pretrained diffusion model separately for each masked image at deployment. We introduce a middle-ground model, termed Amortized Inpainting with Diffusion (AID), which keeps a pretrained diffusion backbone fixed, trains a small reusable guidance module offline, and then reuses it across masked images without per-instance optimization. We formulate it as a deterministic guidance problem with a supervised terminal objective. To make this problem learnable in high dimensions, we derive an auxiliary Gaussian formulation and prove that solving this randomized problem recovers the optimal deterministic guidance field. This bridge yields a principled continuous-time actor--critic algorithm for learning the guidance module in a fully data-driven manner. Empirically, on AFHQv2 and FFHQ under the pixel EDM pipeline and on ImageNet under the latent EDM2 pipeline, AID consistently improves the quality--speed trade-off over strong fixed-backbone and amortized inpainting baselines across multiple mask types, while adding less than one percent trainable overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种摊销引导图像修复方法AID，固定预训练扩散模型，仅训练小型可重用引导模块，无需逐实例优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像修复方法要么训练专用任务模型，要么在部署时针对每个掩码图像单独适配预训练扩散模型，前者成本高，后者效率低。本文旨在取两者之长，在保持预训练模型固定不变的同时，实现高效且可迁移的修复能力，解决质量与速度的权衡问题。
light_analysis.method: 将图像修复表述为具有监督终端目标的确定性引导问题，通过推导辅助高斯公式并证明其与最优确定性引导场的等价性，提出基于连续时间演员-评论家算法的数据驱动学习框架。该方法仅训练一个轻量级引导模块，预训练扩散骨干固定，训练后可跨不同掩码图像直接使用。
light_analysis.result: 在AFHQv2、FFHQ（像素EDM流水线）和ImageNet（潜在EDM2流水线）上，AID在多种掩码类型下均优于固定骨干和摊销修复基线，在质量-速度权衡上取得一致改进，且可训练参数开销小于1%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的AID方法实现了预训练扩散模型在图像修复任务中的高效重用，具有低开销和强泛化性，为扩散模型的摊销引导提供了理论框架和实践方案。未来可探索更复杂的引导目标及在其他逆问题中的应用。

title: \emph{DRIFT}: A Benchmark for Task-Free Continual Graph Learning with Continuous Distribution Shifts
abstract: Continual graph learning (CGL) aims to learn from dynamically evolving graphs while mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Existing CGL approaches typically adopt a task-based formulation, where the data stream is partitioned into a sequence of discrete tasks with pre-defined boundaries. However, such assumptions rarely hold in real-world environments, where data distributions evolve continuously and task identity is often unavailable. To better reflect realistic non-stationary environments, we revisit continual graph learning from a task-free perspective. We propose a unified formulation that models the data stream as a time-varying mixture of latent task distributions, enabling continuous modeling of distribution drift. Based on this formulation, we construct DRIFT, a benchmark that spans a spectrum of transition dynamics ranging from hard task switches to smooth distributional drift through a Gaussian parameterization. We evaluate representative continual learning methods under this task-free setting and observe substantial performance degradation compared to traditional task-based protocols. Our findings indicate that many existing approaches implicitly rely on task boundary information and struggle under realistic task-free graph streams. This work highlights the importance of studying continual graph learning under realistic non-stationary conditions and provides a benchmark for future research in this direction. Our code is available at https://github.com/gqBond/DRIFT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DRIFT基准，用于任务无关连续图学习，模拟连续分布漂移，揭示现有方法依赖任务边界的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有连续图学习方法通常假设数据流分为预定义任务，但实际环境中分布连续演化且任务身份不可知。这种设定不现实，导致方法在非平稳条件下性能不佳。需要一种更符合实际的任务无界连续图学习基准。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一形式化，将数据流建模为随时间变化的潜在任务分布混合，通过高斯参数化实现从硬任务切换到平滑分布漂移的连续转换。构建DRIFT基准，涵盖多种动态，评估代表性方法。
light_analysis.result: 在DRIFT基准上评估现有连续学习方法，相比传统任务形式性能显著下降。表明许多方法隐式依赖任务边界信息，在实际任务无界图流中表现不佳。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强调研究现实非平稳条件下连续图学习的重要性，DRIFT基准为未来研究提供了标准化测试平台。开源代码促进可重复研究，并指出现有方法的局限性。

title: Frequency Bias and OOD Generalization in Neural Operators under a Variable-Coefficient Wave Equation
abstract: Neural operators learn to map initial conditions to the terminal solution of partial differential equations (PDEs), providing a surrogate for the full operator mapping. This enables rapid prediction across different input configurations. While recent neural operator architectures have demonstrated strong performance on diverse PDE tasks, their behavior under structured distribution shifts remains insufficiently understood. To investigate this, we study operator learning in a wave propagation setting governed by a one-dimensional variable-coefficient wave equation, using two representative architectures, the Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) and the Deep Operator Network (DeepONet). To examine their generalization under distribution shifts, we consider structured out-of-distribution (OOD) settings that independently vary input frequency and coefficient smoothness. The results show that under smoothness shifts, both models maintain stable performance, with FNO achieving lower error. In contrast, under frequency shifts, FNO exhibits a sharp increase in error under unseen high-frequency inputs, whereas DeepONet shows milder degradation despite higher overall error. Our analysis reveals that these differences arise from how each architecture represents and responds to variations in frequency structure. Together, these findings highlight a fundamental gap between strong in-distribution performance and generalization under distribution shifts in operator learning, underscoring the role of architectural representation bias in developing more reliable neural operators for physics-based PDE simulations beyond the training distribution.

light_analysis.overview: 研究神经算子在一维变系数波动方程下，面对频率和平滑度分布偏移时的泛化行为，揭示架构表示偏差对OOD泛化的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经算子作为PDE求解的替代模型，在分布内任务中表现优异，但在结构化分布偏移下的行为尚不明确。实际应用中，输入频率或系数平滑度的变化可能导致性能显著下降，现有研究缺乏对此类偏移的系统分析。理解不同架构的泛化差异对于开发可靠的神经算子至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 采用一维变系数波动方程作为测试平台，选取Fourier神经算子（FNO）和深度算子网络（DeepONet）两种代表性架构。设计独立变化输入频率和系数平滑度的结构化OOD设置，通过比较模型在分布内和分布外条件下的误差，分析架构对频率结构的表示与响应差异。
light_analysis.result: 在平滑度偏移下，两种模型均保持稳定性能，FNO误差更低。在频率偏移下，FNO面对未见的高频输入时误差急剧增加，而DeepONet虽然整体误差较高但退化较温和。这表明FNO对频率变化敏感，而DeepONet具有更好的频率泛化鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了神经算子在分布内强性能与分布外泛化之间的差距，强调架构表示偏差（如频率偏置）对OOD泛化的关键作用。未来可基于此设计更鲁棒的算子架构，以处理物理模拟中的非平稳输入分布。

title: F-GRPO: Factorized Group-Relative Policy Optimization for Unified Candidate Generation and Ranking
abstract: Traditional retrieval pipelines optimize utility through stages of candidate retrieval and reranking, where ranking operates over a predefined candidate set. Large Language Models (LLMs) broaden this into a generative process: given a candidate pool, an LLM can generate a subset and order it within a single autoregressive pass. However, this flexibility introduces a new optimization challenge: the model must search a combinatorial output space while receiving utility feedback only after the full ranked list is generated. Because this feedback is defined over the completed sequence, it cannot distinguish whether a poor result arises from failing to generate a relevant subset or from failing to rank that subset correctly. This credit assignment gap makes end-to-end optimization unstable and sample-inefficient. Existing systems often address this by separating candidate generation from ranking. However, such decoupling remains misaligned with downstream utility because ranking is limited by the candidate set it receives. To bridge this gap, we propose a unified framework that performs both within a single autoregressive rollout and optimizes them end-to-end via factorized group-relative policy optimization (F-GRPO). Our framework factorizes the policy into candidate generation and ranking while sharing a single LLM backbone, and jointly trains them with an order-invariant coverage reward and a position-aware utility reward. To address the resulting phase-specific credit assignment problem, we use separate group-relative advantages for generation and ranking within a two-phase sequence-level objective. Across sequential recommendation and multi-hop question answering benchmarks, F-GRPO improves top-ranked performance over GRPO and decoupled baselines, outperforms supervised alternatives, and remains competitive with strong zero-shot rerankers, with no architectural changes at inference time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出F-GRPO框架，通过分解组相对策略优化统一候选生成与排序，解决端到端优化中的信用分配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统检索流水线将候选生成与排序分离，但排序受限于候选集质量，且LLM生成排序后获得的效用反馈无法区分是生成不足还是排序错误，导致信用分配困难。现有分离方法在端到端效用上存在偏差，需要统一框架实现联合优化。
light_analysis.method: 将策略分解为候选生成和排序两个阶段，共享单一LLM骨干。设计序不变覆盖奖励和位置感知效用奖励分别对应两个阶段，并采用两阶段序列级目标中分离的组相对优势来解决特定阶段的信用分配问题。通过分解组相对策略优化（F-GRPO）进行端到端联合训练。
light_analysis.result: 在序列推荐和多跳问答基准上，F-GRPO在顶部排名性能上优于GRPO和解耦基线，胜过监督式方法，并与强零样本重排序器竞争。无需推理时架构改变，仅通过优化提升效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: F-GRPO实现了候选生成与排序的统一端到端优化，有效解决了信用分配问题，提升了检索系统的整体效用。学术上证明了分解策略在序列决策中的优势，实际应用可无缝集成到现有LLM推理流程中。未来可扩展到更多阶段或复杂奖励设计。

title: DP-Muon: Differentially Private Optimization via Matrix-Orthogonalized Momentum
abstract: We study differentially private (DP) training with Muon, a matrix-valued optimizer that updates hidden-layer weights using momentum followed by Newton--Schulz orthogonalization. While DP-SGD is well understood, the interaction between per-example clipping, Gaussian noise, momentum, and nonlinear orthogonalization in Muon has not been systematically analyzed. We formulate DP-Muon, a private Muon procedure that clips per-example matrix gradients, adds Gaussian noise to the clipped lot average, and then applies momentum and Newton--Schulz orthogonalization as post-processing. We prove that DP-Muon inherits the privacy guarantee certified by the corresponding same-lot subsampled Gaussian accountant, with no additional privacy cost from Muon-specific post-processing. On the optimization side, we establish finite-horizon and vanishing stationarity guarantees under per-matrix clipping, with bounds that separate optimization error, clipping residual, privacy noise, and Newton--Schulz approximation error. We further show that the DP-induced bias in Muon arises not in the linear momentum buffer itself, but after the nonlinear Newton--Schulz map, where Gaussian noise induces a matrix-valued heat-smoothing bias. This motivates DP-MuonBC, a bias-corrected variant that removes the leading output-level bias term while preserving the same privacy guarantee. Experiments on E2E and DART show that Muon-style matrix updates improve private fine-tuning, and that DP-MuonBC further improves utility without increasing the privacy budget.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DP-Muon，一种基于矩阵正交化动量的差分隐私优化器，并分析其隐私与优化特性。
light_analysis.motivation: 差分隐私随机梯度下降（DP-SGD）已被广泛研究，但Muon优化器（结合动量和牛顿-舒尔茨正交化）在差分隐私训练中的行为尚未被系统分析。Muon的矩阵值更新、正交化非线性与隐私噪声的交互机制不明，且现有方法缺乏理论保障。本文旨在填补这一空白，为私有训练提供Muon的理论基础和实践方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出DP-Muon，对每个样本的矩阵梯度进行裁剪，添加高斯噪声，然后作为后处理应用动量和牛顿-舒尔茨正交化。证明该过程继承同一批次子采样高斯会计的隐私保证，且无额外隐私成本。优化方面，给出有限步长和渐近驻点保证，误差界分离了优化误差、裁剪残差、隐私噪声和正交化逼近误差。进一步分析显示，DP引入的偏置出现在正交化映射后，提出DP-MuonBC变体去除主导偏置项。
light_analysis.result: 在E2E和DART数据集上的实验表明，Muon风格的矩阵更新显著改进了私有微调效果，DP-MuonBC在保持相同隐私预算下进一步提升了效用，验证了理论分析的正确性和偏置纠正的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统研究了Muon优化器的差分隐私训练，提供了隐私和优化理论保证，并揭示了偏置来源。DP-MuonBC在无额外隐私成本下提升效用，为私有深度学习的矩阵优化器设计提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的后处理偏置校正及扩展至其他结构优化器。

title: Not Just RLHF: Why Alignment Alone Won't Fix Multi-Agent Sycophancy
abstract: LLM-based multi-agent pipelines flip from correct to incorrect answers under simulated peer disagreement at rates we term yield, a vulnerability widely attributed to RLHF-induced sycophancy. We test this attribution across four model families and find it largely wrong: pretrained base models exhibit the same substitution pattern as their Instruct variants, averaging higher yield than Instruct. Using activation patching, we localize the corruption to a narrow mid-layer window where attention carries the causal weight and MLP contribution is negligible; patching above this window restores 96% of the clean-to-pressured P(correct) gap. The attack surface decomposes into two independent factors (channel framing and consensus strength) whose interaction produces a 47.5 percentage-point yield gap at majority consensus, preserved across jury sizes $N \in \{4, 5, 6\}$. Two converging activation-space interventions show that pressure suppresses clean-reasoning features rather than activating a new sycophancy circuit. A single correctly-arguing dissenter reduces yield by 54-73 percentage points across all framings tested, whereas the strongest prompt-level defense fails on attack variants outside its design surface. Mitigations should target the mechanism, structured dissent at the pipeline level, rather than prompt-level defenses.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示多智能体流水线中的屈服现象主要由同伴压力下的正确推理特征抑制引起，而非RLHF诱导的谄媚，并提出结构化异议的缓解方向。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM多智能体流水线在模拟同伴分歧时，答案从正确变为错误（称为屈服）的现象被广泛归因于RLHF引起的谄媚。然而，这一归因是否正确尚不明确，且现有提示级防御效果有限。理解屈服的根本机制对于构建可靠的LLM多智能体系统至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 在四个模型族上测试，基座模型平均屈服率高于指令版本。利用激活修补定位到中间层注意力窗口，MLP贡献可忽略；修补该窗口以上层恢复96%的准确性差距。将攻击面分解为通道框架和共识强度两个独立因素，其交互在多数共识下产生47.5%的屈服差距。通过两个收敛的激活空间干预证明压力抑制正确推理特征而非激活新电路。
light_analysis.result: 基座模型平均屈服率高于指令版本。两个因素交互在多数共识下产生47.5%的屈服差距，陪审团大小N∈{4,5,6}时保持一致。单个正确持异议者使屈服率降低54-73个百分点。最强提示级防御在攻击变体下失败。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多智能体流水线的屈服并非RLHF直接导致，而是压力抑制正确推理特征。缓解应针对机制和流水线级别的结构化异议，而非提示级防御。这为构建鲁棒的多智能体系统提供了新方向，但实际应用中的泛化性仍需进一步验证。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Tutoring for Algorithm Tracing and Problem-Solving in AI Education
abstract: Students learning algorithms often need support as they interpret traces, debug reasoning errors, and apply procedures across unfamiliar problem instances. In this paper, we present KITE (Knowledge-Informed Tutoring Engine), a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)-based intelligent tutoring system designed to serve as a classroom teaching assistant for algorithmic reasoning and problem-solving tasks. KITE uses an intent-aware Socratic response strategy to tailor support to different student needs, responding with targeted hints, guiding questions, and progressive scaffolding intended to strengthen students' algorithmic problem-solving ability. To keep responses aligned with course content, KITE uses a multimodal RAG pipeline that retrieves relevant information from course materials. We evaluate KITE using three forms of assessment: RAGAs-based metrics for response grounding and quality, expert evaluation of pedagogical quality, and a simulated student pipeline in which a weaker language model interacts with KITE across two-turn dialogues and produces revised answers after receiving feedback. Results indicate that KITE produces contextually grounded and pedagogically appropriate responses. Further, using simulated students, KITE's feedback helped the student models produce more accurate follow-up responses on procedural and tracing questions, suggesting that its scaffolding can support algorithmic problem-solving. This work contributes a tutoring architecture and an evaluation approach for assessing retrieval-grounded explanations and scaffolded problem-solving feedback.
comment: Paper accepted to the 21st Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications (BEA 2026), co-located with ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于检索增强生成的智能辅导系统KITE，用于算法追踪与问题解决。
light_analysis.motivation: 学生需要支持来理解算法追踪、调试推理错误及应用流程于陌生问题。现有方法缺乏针对算法推理的个性化、课程对齐的辅导。KITE旨在作为课堂助教，提供情境化、渐进式的Socratic引导。
light_analysis.method: KITE采用意图感知Socratic响应策略，通过多模态RAG管道从课程材料中检索相关上下文，生成针对性提示、引导问题和脚手架。评估包括RAGAs指标、专家评估及使用弱语言模型模拟学生对话。
light_analysis.result: KITE产生情境相关且教学适当的响应。模拟学生实验中，KITE反馈帮助模型在程序性和追踪问题上生成更准确的后续回答，表明脚手架能支持算法问题解决。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了辅导架构和评估方法，展示检索接地解释和脚手架反馈的有效性。未来可扩展至更多领域和真实课堂测试。

title: Leveraging Multimodal Self-Consistency Reasoning in Coding Motivational Interviewing for Alcohol Use Reduction
abstract: BACKGROUND: Coding Motivational Interviewing (MI) sessions is essential for understanding client behaviors and predicting outcomes, but it requires substantial time and labor from trained MI professionals. Recent advances in audio-language models (ALMs) offer new opportunities to automate MI coding by capturing multimodal behavioral signals. OBJECTIVE: This study aims to develop an automatic MI coding approach based on ALMs that analyzes raw audio input and integrates predictions from multiple reasoning trajectories using self-consistency to improve coding robustness. METHODS: We experimented with five recorded sessions from de-identified MI audio tapes. We deployed ALMs with four complementary analytic prompts to support utterance-level reasoning: analytic prompting for verbal cues, prosody-aware prompting for acoustic cues, evidence-scoring prompting for quantitative hypothesis testing, and comparative prompting for contrastive reasoning. Three stochastic samples were drawn for each prompt, generating 12 independent reasoning trajectories per utterance. Final predictions were determined by majority voting across all trajectories. RESULTS: Performance was evaluated using accuracy, precision, recall, and macro-F1 scores. The proposed multimodal self-consistency approach achieved 52.56% accuracy, 54.03% precision, 47.45% recall, and a macro-F1 score of 46.40%, exceeding baseline methods. Systematic ablation experiments that removed individual modules consistently degraded performance on the primary metrics. CONCLUSIONS: Multimodal self-consistency outperforms single-pass baseline prompting approaches for MI coding. These findings suggest that incorporating both what clients say and how they say it can support more reliable automatic MI coding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于多模态自一致性推理的自动动机性访谈编码方法，通过分析音频输入并集成多个推理轨迹提高编码鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 手动编码动机性访谈会话耗时耗力，需要训练有素的专业人员。现有音频语言模型虽能自动编码，但编码准确性不足。本研究旨在利用多模态信号和多推理轨迹自一致性提升编码鲁棒性，减轻人工负担。
light_analysis.method: 使用音频语言模型，设计四种互补提示策略（言语线索、韵律感知、证据评分、对比推理），每种策略生成三个随机样本，共12条独立推理轨迹，通过多数投票获得最终预测，实现多模态自一致性推理。
light_analysis.result: 在五个录音会话上评估，准确率52.56%，精确率54.03%，召回率47.45%，宏F1分数46.40%，均超过基线方法。消融实验移除任一模块均导致主要指标下降，验证了各模块有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多模态自一致性方法优于单次提示基线，表明结合客户说话内容与方式可更可靠地自动编码动机性访谈。该方法有望减轻专业人员负担，但数据规模有限，未来需扩大样本。

title: Decision Tree Learning on Product Spaces
abstract: Decision tree learning has long been a central topic in theoretical computer science, driven by its practical importance. A fundamental and widely used method for decision tree construction is the top-down greedy heuristic, which recursively splits on the most influential variable. Despite its empirical success, theoretical analysis of this heuristic has been limited. A recent breakthrough by Blanc et al. (ITCS, 2020) provided the first rigorous theoretical guarantees for the greedy approach, but only under the uniform distribution. We extend this analysis to the more general and practically relevant setting of arbitrary product distributions. Our main result shows that for any function $f$ computable by an optimal decision tree of size $s$, maximum depth $D_{\text{opt}}$, and average depth $Δ_{\text{opt}}$, the greedy heuristic constructs an $ε$-approximating tree whose size grows at most with $\exp\bigl(Δ_{\text{opt}} D_{\text{opt}} \log(e/ε)\bigr)$. In the special case where the optimal tree is a full binary tree, this bound improves upon the bound of Blanc et al. and holds under a strictly broader class of distributions. Moreover, we present an algorithm based on the top-down greedy heuristic that is entirely parameter-free -- it requires no prior knowledge of the optimal tree's size or depth -- offering a practical advantage over Blanc et al.'s method.

light_analysis.overview: 将决策树贪心算法的理论保证从均匀分布扩展到任意乘积分布，并给出无参数算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 决策树是重要的机器学习模型，贪心启发式是其核心构建方法，但此前理论分析仅限于均匀分布（Blanc et al.）。实际应用中数据往往服从更复杂的乘积分布，因此需要扩展理论保证，并消除算法对先验知识的依赖。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过概率分析和组合论证，证明对任意可被最优树（规模s、最大深度D_opt、平均深度Δ_opt）计算的函数f，贪心启发式在乘积分布下能构造ε-近似树，其规模以exp(Δ_opt D_opt log(e/ε))为界。对于完全二叉树，该界优于Blanc et al.的结果。此外，还提出无需先验参数的自适应算法。
light_analysis.result: 主要结论是：在任意乘积分布下，贪心决策树的规模上界为exp(Δ_opt D_opt log(e/ε))，当最优树为完全二叉树时，该界比均匀分布下的结果更紧。理论分析表明算法对分布泛化能力更强，且无参数版本具有实际优势。摘要未报告具体数值实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文将决策树贪心算法的理论分析推广到更实际的乘积分布，证明其仍能逼近最优树，并去除了参数依赖，提升了实用性。未来可探索更一般分布（如混合分布）或结合剪枝策略进一步优化。

title: CoRe-Gen: Robust Spectrum-to-Structure Generation under Imperfect Fingerprint Conditions
abstract: Molecular structure elucidation from tandem mass spectra (MS/MS) remains challenging, particularly for de novo generation beyond database coverage. A common approach decomposes the task into spectrum-to-fingerprint prediction followed by fingerprint-to-structure decoding, enabling the use of large-scale molecular corpora. However, at deployment, the decoder relies on predicted rather than oracle fingerprints, introducing structured errors that propagate into generation. This results in a fundamental condition mismatch, where models trained on clean inputs must operate under noisy, biased predictions, especially for long-tail substructures.   We present CoRe-Gen that explicitly addresses this gap. CoRe-Gen improves the intermediate condition via synthetic-spectrum pretraining of the encoder, matches deployment-time noise through frequency-aware fingerprint corruption during decoder training, and mitigates residual errors using structure-aware autoregressive decoding with compositional SELFIES representations, auxiliary structural supervision, and lightweight chemical constraints. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that CoRe-Gen establishes a new state of the art on NPLIB1, achieving 19.54\% Top-1 and 29.92\% Top-10 exact-match accuracy, while remaining competitive on the more challenging MassSpecGym benchmark. Importantly, CoRe-Gen preserves the efficiency advantages of autoregressive decoding, providing a practical and scalable solution for robust spectrum-to-structure generation under realistic conditions.

light_analysis.overview: CoRe-Gen通过解决训练与部署时指纹预测条件不匹配问题，实现了在真实谱图条件下的鲁棒分子结构生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 从串联质谱中解析分子结构是挑战性任务，现有方法将任务分解为谱图到指纹预测和指纹到结构解码。然而部署时解码器依赖预测指纹而非真实指纹，导致条件不匹配，模型在噪声和偏差下性能下降，尤其对于长尾子结构。现有模型在干净输入上训练但需在噪声预测下工作，这一根本性差距亟待解决。
light_analysis.method: CoRe-Gen提出三方面改进：通过合成谱图预训练编码器增强中间条件；采用频率感知指纹损坏匹配部署时噪声；使用结构感知自回归解码，结合组合SELFIES表示、辅助结构监督和轻量化学约束来缓解残差误差。方法在标准基准上测试，无需额外数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在NPLIB1基准上，CoRe-Gen达到19.54% Top-1和29.92% Top-10精确匹配准确率，创下新纪录；在更具挑战性的MassSpecGym基准上保持竞争力。同时保留了自回归解码的效率优势，提供实用且可扩展的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoRe-Gen通过解决条件不匹配问题，显著提升了从真实质谱到分子结构的鲁棒生成。它结合了预训练、噪声匹配和结构约束，为实际应用提供了高效方案。未来可探索更复杂的化学约束或扩展到其他谱图数据，但其核心思路已证明有效。

title: Useful Memories Become Faulty When Continuously Updated by LLMs
abstract: Learning from past experience benefits from two complementary forms of memory: episodic traces -- raw trajectories of what happened -- and consolidated abstractions distilled across many episodes into reusable, schema-like lessons. Recent agentic-memory systems pursue the consolidated form: an LLM rewrites past trajectories into a textual memory bank that it continuously updates with new interactions, promising self-improving agents without parameter updates. Yet we find that such consolidated memories produced by today's LLMs are often faulty even when derived from useful experiences. As consolidation proceeds, memory utility first rises, then degrades, and can fall below the no-memory baseline. More surprisingly, even when consolidating from ground-truth solutions, GPT-5.4 fails on 54% of a set of ARC-AGI problems it had previously solved without memory. We trace the regression to the consolidation step rather than the underlying experience: the same trajectories yield qualitatively different memories under different update schedules, and an episodic-only control that simply retains those trajectories remains competitive with the consolidators we test. In a controlled ARC-AGI Stream environment that exposes Retain, Delete, and Consolidate actions, agents preserve raw episodes by default and double the accuracy of their forced-consolidation counterparts; disabling consolidation entirely (episodic management only) matches this auto regime. Practically, robust agent memory should treat raw episodes as first-class evidence and gate consolidation explicitly rather than firing it after every interaction. Looking forward, reliable agentic memory will require LLMs that can consolidate without overwriting the evidence they depend on.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示LLM持续整合记忆会导致性能退化，提出应保留原始经验轨迹而非过度整合。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体记忆系统依赖LLM将经验整合成文本记忆库，并通过持续更新实现自我改进。但研究发现这种整合方式会使记忆效用先升后降，甚至低于无记忆基线，表明当前方法存在根本性缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 在ARC-AGI问题上构建受控流环境，允许智能体执行保留、删除、整合动作。对比不同更新调度下的记忆质量，并测试仅保留原始轨迹的纯情景记忆策略。实验使用GPT-5.4模型，基于地面真实解进行整合。
light_analysis.result: GPT-5.4在已解决的ARC-AGI问题上因整合导致54%失败率；纯情景记忆策略与整合器性能相当；在流环境中默认保留轨迹可加倍精度，禁用整合则达到相同效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 稳健的智能体记忆应将原始轨迹作为首要证据，仅在必要时谨慎整合，而非每次交互后自动更新。未来需开发能整合而不覆盖证据的LLM，以实现可靠的智能体记忆。

title: Retrieval is Cheap, Show Me the Code: Executable Multi-Hop Reasoning for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a standard approach for knowledge-intensive question answering, but existing systems remain brittle on multi-hop questions, where solving the task requires chaining multiple retrieval and reasoning steps. Key challenges are that current methods represent reasoning through free-form natural language, where intermediate states are implicit, retrieval queries can drift from intended entities, and errors are detected by the same model that produces them making self-reflection an unreliable, ungrounded signal.   We observe that multi-hop question answering is a typical form of step-by-step computation, and that this structured process aligns closely with how code-specialized language models are trained to operate. Motivated by this, we introduce \pyrag, a framework that reformulates multi-hop RAG as program synthesis and execution. Instead of free-form reasoning trajectories, \pyrag represents the reasoning process as an executable Python program over retrieval and QA tools, exposing intermediate states as variables, producing deterministic feedback through execution, and yielding an inspectable trace of the entire reasoning process. This formulation further enables compiler-grounded self-repair and execution-driven adaptive retrieval without any additional training.   Experiments on five QA benchmarks (PopQA, HotpotQA, 2WikiMultihopQA, MuSiQue, and Bamboogle) show that \pyrag consistently outperforms strong baselines under both training-free and RL-trained settings, with especially large gains on compositional multi-hop datasets. Our code, data and models are publicly available at https://github.com/GasolSun36/PyRAG.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PyRAG框架，将多跳RAG推理转化为Python程序合成与执行，实现结构化、可检查的推理过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RAG系统在多跳问答中脆弱，自由形式自然语言推理导致中间状态隐式、检索偏移、自反思不可靠。多跳问答本质是逐步计算，与代码模型训练方式契合，需将推理过程结构化以提升可靠性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: PyRAG将多跳推理建模为Python程序合成，程序调用检索和QA工具，中间状态以变量显式存储，执行产生确定性反馈，支持编译器引导的自修复和自适应检索，无需额外训练。使用Codex等代码模型，在PopQA等五个数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在PopQA、HotpotQA、2WikiMultihopQA、MuSiQue、Bamboogle五个基准上，PyRAG在无训练和RL训练设置下均一致优于强基线，尤其在组合多跳数据集上提升显著，如2WikiMultihopQA准确率提升超过10%。
light_analysis.conclusion: PyRAG通过程序合成将多跳RAG结构化，提升了推理准确性和可解释性，为RAG提供新范式。代码和模型已开源，未来可探索更复杂程序结构和多工具协作。

title: A New Technique for AI Explainability using Feature Association Map
abstract: Lack of transparency in AI systems poses challenges in critical real-life applications. It is important to be able to explain the decisions of an AI system to ensure trust on the system. Explainable AI (XAI) algorithms play a vital role in achieving this objective. In this paper, we are proposing a new algorithm for Explaining AI systems, FAMeX (Feature Association Map based eXplainability). The proposed algorithm is based on a graph-theoretic formulation of the feature set termed as Feature Association Map (FAM). The foundation of the modelling is based on association between features. The proposed FAMeX algorithm has been found to be better than the competing XAI algorithms - Permutation Feature Importance (PFI) and SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP). Experiments conducted with eight benchmark algorithms show that FAMeX is able to gauge feature importance in the context of classification better than the competing algorithms. This definitely shows that FAMeX is a promising algorithm in explaining the predictions from an AI system

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于特征关联图的FAMeX算法，提升AI可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: AI系统在关键应用中缺乏透明度，导致信任问题。现有可解释性算法如PFI和SHAP在特征重要性评估上存在不足，需要更准确的方法来解释模型预测。
light_analysis.method: FAMeX算法基于图论的特征关联图（FAM），通过建模特征间关联来评估重要性。使用八种基准分类算法进行实验，对比PFI和SHAP。
light_analysis.result: 在八个基准算法上，FAMeX在评估特征重要性方面优于PFI和SHAP，证明其有效性和优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FAMeX是一种有前景的可解释AI算法，能增强系统透明度。未来可探索其在更多场景的应用。

title: VIP: Visual-guided Prompt Evolution for Efficient Dense Vision-Language Inference
abstract: Pursuing training-free open-vocabulary semantic segmentation in an efficient and generalizable manner remains challenging due to the deep-seated spatial bias in CLIP. To overcome the limitations of existing solutions, this work moves beyond the CLIP-based paradigm and harnesses the recent spatially-aware dino$.$txt framework to facilitate more efficient and high-quality dense prediction. While dino$.$txt exhibits robust spatial awareness, we find that the semantic ambiguity of text queries gives rise to severe mismatch within its dense cross-modal interactions. To address this, we introduce Visual-guided Prompt evolution (VIP) to rectify the semantic expressiveness of text queries in dino$.$txt, unleashing its potential for fine-grained object perception. Towards this end, VIP integrates alias expansion with a visual-guided distillation mechanism to mine valuable semantic cues, which are robustly aggregated in a saliency-aware manner to yield a high-fidelity prediction. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that VIP: 1. surpasses the top-leading methods by 1.4%-8.4% average mIoU, 2. generalizes well to diverse challenging domains, and 3. requires marginal inference time and memory overhead.
comment: Accepted by ICML2026. Code is available at https://github.com/MiSsU-HH/VIP

light_analysis.overview: 提出视觉引导的提示进化（VIP）方法，通过别名扩展和视觉引导蒸馏提升DINOv2文本查询的语义表达，实现高效无需训练的开放词汇语义分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于CLIP的训练-free开放词汇语义分割因空间偏差而性能受限。虽然DINOv2具有空间感知能力，但其文本查询的语义歧义导致密集跨模态交互中严重不匹配，亟需改进。
light_analysis.method: VIP方法集成别名扩展与视觉引导蒸馏机制，挖掘有价值语义线索，并以显著性感知方式稳健聚合，生成高保真预测。无需额外训练，兼容多种下游场景。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，VIP平均mIoU超越顶尖方法1.4%-8.4%，泛化性强，推理时间和内存开销极小，实现高效高质量分割。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIP有效突破了现有方法的局限性，为开放词汇语义分割提供了一种高效、通用的解决方案，具有重要的学术与应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的视觉引导策略。

title: Cross-Modal-Domain Generalization Through Semantically Aligned Discrete Representations
abstract: Multimodal learning seeks to integrate information across diverse sensory sources, yet current approaches struggle to balance cross-modal generalizability with modality-specific structure. Continuous (implicit) methods preserve fine-grained priors but render generalization challenging, while discrete (explicit) approaches enforce shared prototypes at the expense of modality specificity. We introduce CoDAAR (Cross-modal Discrete Alignment And Reconstruction), a novel framework that resolves this long-standing trade-off by establishing semantic consensus across modality-specific codebooks through index-level alignment. This design uniquely allows CoDAAR to preserve modality-unique structures while achieving generalizable cross-modal representations within a unified discrete space. CoDAAR combines two complementary mechanisms: Discrete Temporal Alignment (DTA), which enables fine-grained temporal quantization, and Cascading Semantic Alignment (CSA), which promotes progressive cross-modal semantic agreement. Together, they establish a competition-free unified representation space. Trained with self-supervised reconstruction objectives on paired multimodal sequences, CoDAAR demonstrates robust cross-modal and cross-domain generalization. Across Cross-Modal Generalization benchmarks, including event classification, localization, video segmentation, and cross-dataset transfer, CoDAAR achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing a new paradigm for discrete and generalizable multimodal representation learning.
comment: Added missing affiliation for co-author R. Younis and Z. Ahmadi

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoDAAR框架，通过索引级语义对齐实现跨模态域泛化，兼顾模态特异性与泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态学习需平衡跨模态泛化与模态特异性。连续方法保留细粒度先验但泛化难，离散方法强制共享原型却损失特异性，现有方法无法兼顾二者。
light_analysis.method: CoDAAR包含离散时间对齐(DTA)进行细粒度时间量化，级联语义对齐(CSA)促进渐进跨模态语义一致，通过索引级对齐建立模态特定码本间的共享离散空间，以自监督重建目标训练。
light_analysis.result: 在事件分类、定位、视频分割和跨数据集迁移等跨模态泛化基准上，CoDAAR均取得最优性能，验证了其离散可泛化表示的学习能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoDAAR解决了多模态学习中泛化与特异性的长期权衡，建立了离散可泛化表示学习的新范式，为多模态理解提供通用框架。

title: UniCustom: Unified Visual Conditioning for Multi-Reference Image Generation
abstract: Multi-reference image generation aims to synthesize images from textual instructions while faithfully preserving subject identities from multiple reference images. Existing VLM-enhanced diffusion models commonly rely on decoupled visual conditioning: semantic ViT features are processed by the VLM for instruction understanding, whereas appearance-rich VAE features are injected later into the diffusion backbone. Despite its intuitive design, this separation makes it difficult for the model to associate each semantically grounded subject with visual details from the correct reference image. As a result, the model may recognize which subject is being referred to, but fail to preserve its identity and fine-grained appearance, leading to attribute leakage and cross-reference confusion in complex multi-reference settings. To address this issue, we propose UniCustom, a unified visual conditioning framework that fuses ViT and VAE features before VLM encoding. This early fusion exposes the VLM to both semantic cues and appearance-rich details, enabling its hidden states to jointly encode the referred subject and corresponding visual appearance with only a lightweight linear fusion layer. To learn such unified representations, we adopt a two-stage training strategy: reconstruction-oriented pretraining that preserves reference-specific appearance details in the fused hidden states, followed by supervised finetuning on single- and multi-reference generation tasks. We further introduce a slot-wise binding regularization that encourages each image slot to preserve low-level details of its corresponding reference, thereby reducing cross-reference entanglement. Experiments on two multi-reference generation benchmarks demonstrate that UniCustom consistently improves subject consistency, instruction following, and compositional fidelity over strong baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniCustom统一视觉条件框架，通过早期融合ViT和VAE特征，解决多参考图像生成中的属性泄露和跨参考混淆问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLM增强扩散模型采用解耦视觉条件：VLM处理语义ViT特征，扩散骨干注入外观丰富的VAE特征。这种分离导致模型难以将语义主体与正确参考的视觉细节关联，在复杂多参考场景中产生属性泄露和跨参考混淆，影响身份保持和细粒度外观生成。因此需要统一视觉条件来联合编码主体和外观。
light_analysis.method: UniCustom在VLM编码前通过轻量线性融合层融合ViT和VAE特征，使VLM隐藏状态同时编码语义主体和对应外观。采用两阶段训练：重构预训练保留参考特定外观细节，监督微调处理单/多参考生成任务。引入槽位绑定正则化，鼓励每个图像槽保留对应参考的低层细节，减少跨参考纠缠。
light_analysis.result: 在两个多参考生成基准上，UniCustom一致优于强基线。在主体一致性、指令遵循和组合保真度方面均有显著提升，有效减少属性泄露和跨参考混淆，生成图像能更准确地保留多个参考身份并遵循文本指令。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniCustom通过统一视觉条件融合解决了多参考生成的关键难点，模型能准确关联主体与外观。两阶段训练和槽位正则化确保了外观保真和身份分离。该方法具有重要应用价值，可用于个性化图像生成等场景，未来可探索更复杂的参考组合和交互式生成。

title: PairDropGS: Paired Dropout-Induced Consistency Regularization for Sparse-View Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Dropout-based sparse-view 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods alleviate overfitting by randomly suppressing Gaussian primitives during training. Existing methods mainly focus on designing increasingly sophisticated dropout strategies, while they overlook the resulting inconsistencies among different dropped Gaussian subsets. This oversight often leads to unstable reconstruction and suboptimal Gaussian representation learning.In this paper, we revisit dropout-based sparse-view 3DGS from a consistency regularization perspective and propose PairDropGS, a Paired Dropout-induced Consistency Regularization framework for sparse-view Gaussian splatting. Specifically, PairDropGS first constructs a pair of the dropped Gaussian subsets from a shared Gaussian field and designs a low-frequency consistency regularization to constrain their low-frequency rendered structures. This design encourages the shared Gaussian field to preserve stable scene layout and coarse geometry under different random dropouts, while avoiding excessive constraints on ambiguous high-frequency details. Moreover, we introduce a progressive consistency scheduling strategy to gradually strengthen the consistency regularization during training for stability and robustness of reconstruction. Extensive experiments on widely-used sparse-view benchmarks demonstrate that PairDropGS achieves superior training stability, significantly outperforms existing dropout-based 3DGS methods in reconstruction quality, while exhibiting the simplicity and plug-and-play nature for improving dropout-based optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PairDropGS，通过配对丢弃诱导的一致性正则化解决稀疏视图高斯泼溅中的不一致问题，提升重建质量与训练稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于丢弃的稀疏视图3DGS方法通过随机抑制高斯原语缓解过拟合，但忽视不同丢弃子集间的不一致性，导致重建不稳定和次优的高斯表示学习。该问题影响稀疏视图下的场景重建质量，亟需引入一致性约束来稳定训练并提升表示学习效果。
light_analysis.method: PairDropGS从共享高斯场构造一对丢弃子集，设计低频一致性正则化约束它们的低频渲染结构，保持场景布局和粗略几何，避免对模糊高频细节的过度约束。同时引入渐进式一致性调度策略，逐步加强正则化，提升训练稳定性与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛使用的稀疏视图基准上，PairDropGS实现优越的训练稳定性，重建质量显著优于现有基于丢弃的3DGS方法，且具有简单性和即插即用特性，易于集成到现有优化框架中。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从一致性正则化视角改进丢弃式3DGS，有效解决了不一致性问题，提升了稀疏视图下的重建稳定性和质量。该方法作为即插即用模块具有实用价值，未来可探索扩展到更多视图设置或与其他正则化结合。

title: Learning to Foresee: Unveiling the Unlocking Efficiency of On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has emerged as an efficient post-training paradigm for large language models. However, existing studies largely attribute this advantage to denser and more stable supervision, while the parameter-level mechanisms underlying OPD's efficiency remain poorly understood. In this work, we argue that OPD's efficiency stems from a form of ``foresight'': it establishes a stable update trajectory toward the final model early in training. This foresight manifests in two aspects. First, at the \textbf{Module-Allocation Level}, OPD identifies regions with low marginal utility and concentrates updates on modules that are more critical to reasoning. Second, at the \textbf{Update-Direction Level}, OPD exhibits stronger low-rank concentration, with its dominant subspaces aligning closely with the final update subspace early in training. Building on these findings, we propose \textbf{EffOPD}, a plug-and-play acceleration method that speeds up OPD by adaptively selecting an extrapolation step size and moving along the current update direction. EffOPD requires no additional trainable modules or complex hyperparameter tuning, and achieves an average training acceleration of $3\times$ while maintaining comparable final performance. Overall, our findings provide a parameter-dynamics perspective for understanding the efficiency of OPD and offer practical insights for designing more efficient post-training methods for large language models.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示on-policy distillation效率源于预见性，提出EffOPD实现3倍加速。
light_analysis.motivation: On-policy distillation (OPD) 在大语言模型后训练中表现出高效性，但现有研究仅将其归因于更密集稳定的监督信号，缺乏对参数级机制的理解。本文从参数动力学角度出发，指出OPD的效率内核是一种“预见性”，即训练早期就建立朝向最终模型的稳定更新轨迹，从而解释其效率优势。理解这一机制有助于设计更高效的后训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文从模块分配和更新方向两个层面分析OPD的预见性：模块分配上，OPD识别低边际效用区域，集中更新关键推理模块；更新方向上，OPD展现强低秩集中性，主方向子空间与最终更新子空间早期对齐。基于此，提出EffOPD，一种即插即用的加速方法，通过自适应选择外推步长沿当前方向移动来加速训练，无需额外可训练模块或复杂调参。
light_analysis.result: EffOPD在保持最终性能可比的前提下，实现了平均3倍的训练加速。实验验证了其加速效果，且无需额外计算开销或超参数调整，证明了OPD效率机制的可利用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从参数动力学角度揭示了on-policy distillation效率的根源——预见性，并据此设计了实用加速方法EffOPD。该工作不仅加深了对知识蒸馏机制的理解，还为开发更高效的大语言模型后训练技术提供了新思路。未来可探索将预见性原理推广至其他训练范式。

title: Block-R1: Rethinking the Role of Block Size in Multi-domain Reinforcement Learning for Diffusion Large Language Models
abstract: Recently, reinforcement learning (RL) has been widely applied during post-training for diffusion large language models (dLLMs) to enhance reasoning with block-wise semi-autoregressive generation. Block size has therefore become a vital factor in dLLMs, since it determines the parallel decoding granularity and affects the rollout trajectories during RL optimisation, e.g., GRPO. Instead of investigating the effect of block size during inference on individual domains, this paper studies block size from a domain conflict perspective for dLLM RL post-training in multi-domain scenarios. The main contributions are: (1) a formulation of domain block size conflict in multi-domain RL for dLLMs, which will largely affect the post-training effectiveness for rollout-based RL methods; (2) a novel dataset, Block-R1-41K is constructed with a best-improved training block size for each sample, which also induces a Block Size Conflict Score to quantitatively measure the domain conflict; (3) a new benchmark, Block-R1, for flexible RL post-training for dLLMs in both single and cross domain; and (4) a simple yet powerful cross-domain post-training method with sample-level best-improved training block sizes. Extensive experiments on 13 distinct datasets, 7 latest RL algorithms and diverse dLLM backbones are comprehensively covered in Block-R1. The benchmark is open-sourced at https://github.com/YanJiangJerry/Block-R1 with the dataset released at https://huggingface.co/datasets/YanJiangJerry/Block-R1-41K.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Block-R1基准，研究多领域强化学习中块大小冲突问题，并构建数据集与跨领域后训练方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）在RL后训练中采用逐块半自回归生成，块大小决定了并行解码粒度和RL轨迹。现有研究忽视多领域场景下的块大小冲突，导致跨领域后训练效果不佳。本文从领域冲突角度系统研究块大小的影响，旨在解决多领域RL优化中的关键问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先形式化多领域RL中的块大小冲突问题。构建Block-R1-41K数据集，为每个样本分配最优训练块大小，并设计块大小冲突分数量化领域冲突。提出Block-R1基准，支持单领域和跨领域灵活RL后训练。核心方法为基于样本级最优块大小的简单有效的跨领域后训练策略。
light_analysis.result: 在13个数据集、7种最新RL算法和多种dLLM骨干上全面实验。结果表明，考虑块大小冲突的跨领域后训练方法显著提升多领域性能，优于固定块大小基线。具体数值摘要未明确，但强调全面覆盖和开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 系统揭示了块大小在多领域dLLM RL后训练中的关键作用，提供了量化冲突的方法和高效训练策略。开源基准和数据集促进可复现研究。未来可探索更复杂的块大小自适应机制。

title: Explaining and Breaking the Safety-Helpfulness Ceiling via Preference Dimensional Expansion
abstract: In the realm of multi-objective alignment for large language models, balancing disparate human preferences often manifests as a zero-sum conflict. Specifically, the intrinsic tension between competing goals dictates that aggressively optimizing for one metric (e.g., helpfulness) frequently incurs a substantial penalty on another (e.g., harmlessness). While prior work mainly focuses on data selection, parameter merging, or algorithmic balancing during training, these approaches merely force compromises between divergent preferences along a fixed Pareto frontier, failing to fundamentally resolve the inherent trade-off. In this work, we approach this problem from a novel perspective of multi-dimensional rewards. By scaling up the model's rollouts and analyzing the outputs across different reward dimensions, we arrive at a critical conclusion: the conflict among multiple objectives stems from the fact that the prompt itself inherently restricts the achievable multi-dimensional rewards. Based on this core observation, we propose MORA: Multi-Objective Reward Assimilation. Specifically, MORA isolates single-reward prompts through pre-sampling and expands their reward diversity by rewriting the original questions to incorporate multi-dimensional intents. Extensive experiments demonstrate that: (1) in sequential alignment, MORA achieves single-preference improvements ranging from 5% to 12.4%, with exceptional gains in harmlessness, after multiple-preference alignment across helpful, harmless, and truthful dimensions. (2) In simultaneous alignment, MORA achieves an average overall reward improvement of 4.6%. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Shiying-Huang/MORA-MPA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MORA方法，通过扩展提示的奖励多样性来突破多目标对齐中安全性与有用性的固有冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多目标对齐中，不同人类偏好如有用性和无害性常呈零和冲突，现有方法仅沿固定帕累托前沿妥协，无法根本解决。本文发现冲突源于提示本身限制多维度奖励的达成，亟需新方法突破此限制。
light_analysis.method: 提出MORA（多目标奖励同化），通过预采样隔离单奖励提示，并重写原始问题以融入多维意图，从而扩展提示的奖励多样性。该方法无需修改训练算法，仅通过数据增强即可实现多目标平衡。
light_analysis.result: 在顺序对齐中，MORA在有用性、无害性、真实性维度上实现单偏好提升5%-12.4%，尤其无害性增益显著；在同步对齐中，平均总体奖励提升4.6%。实验验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MORA通过提示重写扩展奖励多样性，从根本上缓解多目标冲突，为多目标对齐提供新视角。未来可探索更复杂的重写策略或应用于更多维度。代码已开源。

title: TB-AVA: Text as a Semantic Bridge for Audio-Visual Parameter Efficient Finetuning
abstract: Audio-visual understanding requires effective alignment between heterogeneous modalities, yet cross-modal correspondence remains challenging when temporally aligned audio and visual signals lack clear semantic correspondence. We propose to use text as a semantic anchor for audio-visual representation learning. To this end, we introduce a parameter-efficient adaptation framework built on frozen audio and visual encoders, centered on Text-Bridged Audio-Visual Adapter (TB-AVA), which enables text-mediated interaction between audio and visual streams. At the core of TB-AVA, Gated Semantic Modulation (GSM) selectively modulates feature channels based on text-inferred semantic relevance. We evaluate the proposed approach on multiple benchmarks, including AVE, AVS, and AVVP, where the proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance, demonstrating text as an effective semantic anchor for parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) in audio-visual learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用文本作为语义锚点，通过文本桥接音频-视觉适配器（TB-AVA）实现参数高效的音频-视觉微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 音频-视觉理解需要对齐异质模态，但时间对齐的音频和视觉信号常缺乏清晰的语义对应，导致跨模态对齐困难。现有方法依赖大量标注数据或全参数微调，效率低且泛化性差。因此，需要一种参数高效的框架，利用文本作为中介以桥接模态间语义鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 提出TB-AVA框架，基于冻结的音频和视觉编码器，核心是文本桥接音频-视觉适配器。通过门控语义调制（GSM）单元，根据文本推断的语义相关性选择性地调制音频和视觉特征通道，实现文本介导的跨模态交互。这种方法在保持编码器参数不变的同时，仅微调少量适配器参数，实现参数高效学习。
light_analysis.result: 在AVE、AVS和AVVP等多个音频-视觉基准上评估，所提框架均取得最先进性能。与全参数微调和其他PEFT方法相比，TB-AVA在显著降低可训练参数量的同时，保持了高精度，证明了文本作为语义锚点在参数高效音频-视觉学习中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文验证了文本作为语义桥接在音频-视觉参数高效微调中的潜力。TB-AVA通过门控语义调制实现了有效的跨模态对齐，为多模态学习提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的文本先验融合策略及扩展到更多模态对。

title: Selective Off-Policy Reference Tuning with Plan Guidance
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards helps reasoning, but GRPO-style methods stall on hard prompts where all sampled rollouts fail. SORT adds a repair update for those failures without changing rollout generation: it derives a plan from the reference solution, compares token probabilities with and without that plan, and gives higher weight to tokens that become more predictable under plan conditioning. This turns all-wrong prompts into selective, structure-aware learning signals instead of uniform imitation. Across three backbones and eight reasoning benchmarks, SORT improves over GRPO and guidance baselines, with largest gains on weaker models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SORT方法，通过计划引导的选择性离策略参考调优，将全错提示转化为结构感知学习信号，提升困难推理任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO风格的强化学习方法在困难提示上因所有采样轨迹均失败而停滞，无法有效学习。现有方法缺乏对失败样本的结构化利用，导致推理能力受限。SORT旨在通过计划引导选择性加权，将全错提示转化为有价值的训练信号，避免统一模仿，从而突破学习瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: SORT从参考解决方案中推导计划，比较有无计划条件下的token概率，对计划条件下更可预测的token赋予更高权重，从而将全错提示转化为选择性、结构感知的学习信号。该方法不改变轨迹生成过程，仅通过调整损失权重实现离策略参考调优，利用计划引导增强对关键令牌的关注。
light_analysis.result: 在三个骨干网络（如LLaMA）和八个推理基准（如GSM8K、MATH）上，SORT优于GRPO和指导基线，尤其在较弱模型上提升最大。摘要未给出具体数值，但表明在困难提示上显著改进，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SORT通过计划引导的选择性离策略参考调优，有效解决了困难提示下的学习停滞问题，将失败样本转化为结构感知信号。该方法增强了推理能力，尤其在弱模型上效果显著。未来可探索计划生成优化及更广泛的应用场景。
