Behavioral traces logged at every autonomous decision point are grouped into five-day episodes and scored along six domain-specific dimensions (regime detection, routing, adaptation, risk calibration, strategy coherence, error recovery) by an ensemble of three large language model (LLM) judges. A perturbation procedure that corrupts one dimension while leaving the other five intact confirms dimension specificity, with cross-model agreement reaching Krippendorff's $α= 0.85$. The composite behavioral score correlates at Spearman $ρ= 0.72$ with realized 20-day Sharpe ratio from offline backtesting. Closing the loop, the framework converts deficient per-dimension scores into a credit-assigned penalty added to the Soft Actor-Critic reward. Three fine-tuning cycles, confined to the validation period, produce on the held-out 2017-2025 test period a one-day MAPE reduction from 0.61% to 0.54% (11.5% relative; $p<0.001$, Cohen's $d=0.31$), significant under a Diebold-Mariano test of equal predictive accuracy ($\mathrm{DM}=-7.83$) and localized by a Giacomini-White conditional predictive ability test to the high-volatility regime. The methodology is application-agnostic. Results are from offline backtesting and do not address effects specific to live deployment.
comment: 24 pages, 5 figures, 14 tables. Research Article submitted to Journal of Forecasting (Wiley)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于大语言模型评委和闭环强化学习反馈的智能体式股票预测系统的多维行为评估方法，补充传统预测准确率测试。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有金融预测评估依赖聚合准确率指标和点预测误差检验，只能评估预测输出，无法评估预测生成过程。随着预测系统变得智能体化，通过一系列相互依赖的自主决策发布预测，输出级错误掩盖了个体决策质量，因此需要评估中间决策过程本身，以提高系统鲁棒性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 在每次自主决策点记录行为轨迹，分组为五天片段，由三个大语言模型评委在六个维度（状态检测、路由、适应、风险校准、策略连贯性、错误恢复）评分。通过扰动程序确认维度特异性（跨模型一致性α=0.85）。将不足的维度分数转换为信用分配的惩罚，加入Soft Actor-Critic奖励，在验证期进行三个微调周期以优化策略。
light_analysis.result: 在2017-2025年测试集上，一步预测MAPE从0.61%降至0.54%（相对降低11.5%，p<0.001，Cohen's d=0.31）。Diebold-Mariano检验显著（DM=-7.83），Giacomini-White检验定位在高波动区制。复合行为分数与20天夏普比率Spearman ρ=0.72。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该行为评估方法可评估预测生成过程，补充传统准确率测试，应用无关且可推广。学术价值在于提出面向智能体系统的多维评估框架，实际价值在于通过闭环优化提升预测性能。局限性是结果基于离线回测，未考虑实时部署效应，未来需在线验证。

title: Estimating LLM Grading Ability and Response Difficulty in Automatic Short Answer Grading via Item Response Theory
abstract: Automated short answer grading (ASAG) with large language models (LLMs) is commonly evaluated with aggregate metrics such as macro-F1 and Cohen's kappa. However, these metrics provide limited insight into how grading performance varies across student responses of differing grading difficulty. We introduce an evaluation framework for LLM-based ASAG based on item response theory (IRT), which models grading correctness as a function of latent grader ability and response grading difficulty. This formulation enables response-level analysis of where LLM graders succeed or fail and reveals robustness differences that are not visible from aggregate scores alone. We apply the framework to 17 open-weight LLMs on the SciEntsBank and Beetle benchmarks. The results show that even models with similar overall performance differ substantially in how sharply their grading accuracy declines as response difficulty increases. In addition, confusion patterns show that errors on difficult responses concentrate disproportionately on the \texttt{partially\_correct\_incomplete} label, indicating a tendency toward intermediate-label collapse under ambiguity. To characterize difficult responses, we further analyze semantic and linguistic correlates of estimated difficulty. Across both datasets, higher difficulty is associated with weaker semantic alignment to the reference answer, stronger contradiction signals, and greater semantic isolation in embedding space. Overall, these results show that item response theory offers a useful framework for evaluating LLM-based ASAG beyond aggregate performance measures.
comment: accepted at BEA 2026, the 21st Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于项目反应理论的LLM自动短答案评分评估框架，揭示响应难度对评分准确性的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动短答案评分方法多使用宏观F1和Cohen's kappa等聚合指标，但这些指标无法揭示评分性能在不同难度学生回答上的变化。论文旨在建立能进行响应级分析的评估框架，以识别LLM评分器成功或失败的细微差异，并发现聚合分数无法体现的鲁棒性差异。
light_analysis.method: 基于项目反应理论提出评估框架，将评分正确性建模为潜在评分者能力和响应评分难度的函数。在SciEntsBank和Beetle两个基准上对17个开源LLM进行测试。通过分析准确率随难度下降的锐度、错误模式（特别是部分正确不完整标签的集中错误）以及语义和语言相关因素（如语义对齐、矛盾信号、语义隔离）来刻画困难响应。
light_analysis.result: 即使整体性能相似的模型，其评分准确率随响应难度增加而下降的锐度也存在显著差异。错误分析显示，困难响应的错误主要集中在'partially_correct_incomplete'标签，表明歧义时存在中间标签坍缩倾向。困难响应与参考答案的语义对齐较弱、矛盾信号更强、语义空间隔离度更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 项目反应理论为超越聚合性能指标的LLM自动短答案评分评估提供了有用框架。该方法能揭示模型在不同难度响应上的鲁棒性差异和错误模式，有助于理解LLM评分的局限。未来可结合该框架改进评分模型或设计更合理的难度校准策略。

title: Confidence Estimation in Automatic Short Answer Grading with LLMs
abstract: Automatic Short Answer Grading (ASAG) with generative large language models (LLMs) has recently demonstrated strong performance without task-specific fine-tuning, while also enabling the generation of synthetic feedback for educational assessment. Despite these advances, LLM-based grading remains imperfect, making reliable confidence estimates essential for safe and effective human-AI collaboration in educational decision-making. In this work, we investigate confidence estimation for ASAG with LLMs by jointly considering model-based confidence signals and dataset-derived uncertainty. We systematically compare three model-based confidence estimation strategies, namely verbalizing, latent, and consistency-based confidence estimation, and show that model-based confidence alone is insufficient to reliably capture uncertainty in ASAG. To address this limitation, we propose a hybrid confidence framework that integrates model-based confidence signals with an explicit estimate of dataset-derived aleatoric uncertainty. Aleatoric uncertainty is operationalized by clustering semantically embedded student responses and quantifying within-cluster heterogeneity. Our results demonstrate that the proposed hybrid confidence measure yields more reliable confidence estimates and improves selective grading performance compared to single-source approaches. Overall, this work advances confidence-aware LLM-based grading for human-in-the-loop assessment, supporting more trustworthy AI-assisted educational assessment systems.
comment: accepted to the 27th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合置信度框架，结合模型信号与数据集不确定性，提升LLM自动短答案评分的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的自动短答案评分虽无需微调即可表现良好，但评分仍不完美。在教育评估中，可靠置信度估计对安全的人机协作至关重要。现有方法仅依赖模型置信度信号，不足以捕捉ASAG中的不确定性，可能导致错误决策。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出混合置信度框架，整合三类模型置信度（口头化、潜在表示、一致性）与数据集导出不确定性。通过聚类语义嵌入的学生回答并量化簇内异质性，实现数据集不确定性估计。在多个ASAG数据集上评估，比较单源与混合方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，仅依赖模型置信度信号不足以保证可靠的不确定性捕捉。混合置信度框架在选择性评分任务中优于单源方法，提供更可靠的置信度估计，提升人机协作评估的安全性和有效性。具体数据需参考原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究推进了置信度感知的LLM评分方法，支持人机协同的评估系统。混合框架提升了AI辅助教育评估的可信度。未来可探索更细粒度的不确定性量化或扩展到其他评估任务。

title: Towards A Generative Protein Evolution Machine with DPLM-Evo
abstract: Proteins are shaped by gradual evolution under biophysical and functional constraints. Protein language models learn rich evolutionary constraints from large-scale sequences, and discrete diffusion-based protein language models~(\eg, DPLMs) are promising for both understanding and generation. However, existing DPLMs typically rely on masking-based absorbing diffusion that contradicts a simple biological intuition: proteins evolve through accumulated edits, not by emerging from masks. Consequently, these frameworks lack explicit pretraining objectives for substitution and insertion/deletion (indel) operations, limiting both optimization-style post-editing and flexible guided generation. To address these limitations, we present DPLM-Evo, an evolutionary discrete diffusion framework that explicitly predicts substitution, insertion, and deletion operations during denoising. DPLM-Evo decouples an upsampled-length latent alignment space from the variable-length observed sequence space, which makes indel-aware generation tractable and enables adaptive scaffold growth throughout the process with negligible computational overhead. To better align substitutions with real evolution, we further introduce a contextualized evolutionary noising kernel that produces biologically informed, context-dependent mutation patterns. Across tasks, DPLM-Evo improves sequence understanding and achieves state-of-the-art mutation effect prediction performance on ProteinGym in the single-sequence setting. It also enables variable-length simulated evolution, and post-editing/optimization of existing proteins via explicit edit trajectories.
comment: A peer-reviewed version was accepted to ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出DPLM-Evo框架，通过显式建模替换、插入和删除操作，实现生成式蛋白质进化模拟，在理解与生成任务上取得最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于掩码的离散扩散蛋白质语言模型（如DPLMs）的消噪过程与生物进化直觉相悖——蛋白质通过累积编辑而非从掩码中涌现。这些框架缺乏对替换和插入/删除操作（indel）的显式预训练目标，限制了后编辑和灵活引导生成。因此，需要一种能模拟真实进化编辑操作的方法。
light_analysis.method: DPLM-Evo是进化离散扩散框架，在消噪时显式预测替换、插入和删除操作。它将上采样长度的潜在对齐空间与可变长度的观测序列空间解耦，使得indel感知生成可行，并以可忽略的计算开销实现自适应骨架增长。此外，引入上下文进化噪声核，产生生物信息化、上下文依赖的突变模式。
light_analysis.result: DPLM-Evo在序列理解任务上提升性能，在单序列设定下的ProteinGym基准上实现最先进的突变效应预测。它支持变长模拟进化，并通过显式编辑轨迹对现有蛋白质进行后编辑和优化。摘要未提供与其他方法的定量对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: DPLM-Evo通过显式建模编辑操作，弥合了语言模型与真实进化之间的鸿沟，为蛋白质理解、模拟进化和设计提供了统一框架。其学术价值在于推动了进化建模的准确性，实际应用上可用于蛋白质工程和优化。未来可探索更复杂的进化噪声核或扩展到多序列家族。

title: COHERENCE: Benchmarking Fine-Grained Image-Text Alignment in Interleaved Multimodal Contexts
abstract: In recent years, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress on a wide range of multimodal benchmarks. Despite these advances, most existing benchmarks mainly focus on single-image or multi-image comprehension. In real-world scenarios such as document reading, information is often presented as interleaved multimodel contexts. This requires MLLMs not only to recognize the content of individual images, but also to identify relevant textual and visual evidence, establish fine-grained alignments between them, and reason over these aligned signals in interleaved contexts based on contextual evidence. However, there is still a lack of systematic benchmarks for quantifying the fine-grained understanding ability of MLLMs in interleaved image-text contexts. To fill this gap, we propose COHERENCE, a benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of MLLMs to recover fine-grained image-text correspondences in interleaved multimodal contexts. COHERENCE covers interleaved image-text content from four representative domains and contains 6,161 high-quality questions. Moreover, we perform a six-type error analysis, enabling fine-grained attribution of failures in interleaved image-text understanding to the specific capabilities missing in current MLLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出COHERENCE基准，系统评估多模态大模型在交错图文语境中的细粒度对齐能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态基准多聚焦单图或多图理解，而现实场景如文档阅读中信息常以交错图文形式呈现，要求模型不仅识别图像内容，还需建立图文间细粒度对应并推理。目前缺乏系统性基准量化该能力，亟需填补空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建COHERENCE基准，覆盖四个代表性领域的交错图文内容，包含6161个高质量问题。设计六类错误分析，细粒度归因于模型缺失的具体能力，如视觉证据识别、对齐推理等。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果，但基准可量化MLLMs在交错图文理解中的短板，并通过错误分析揭示能力缺失类型，为模型改进提供方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: COHERENCE填补了交错多模态理解评估的空白，提供系统性细粒度对齐测试与错误归因框架，有助于推动MLLMs在真实场景中的应用。未来可扩展至更多领域或更复杂的推理任务。

title: Observable Neural ODEs for Identifiable Causal Forecasting in Continuous Time
abstract: Causal inference in continuous-time sequential decision problems is challenged by hidden confounders. We show that, in latent state-space models with time-varying interventions, observability of the latent dynamics from observed data is necessary for identifying dynamic treatment effects, linking control-theoretic observability to causal identifiability, even when hidden confounders affect both treatments and outcomes. We derive a continuous-time adjustment formula expressing potential outcome distributions under treatment trajectories via the measurement model, latent dynamics, and the filtering distribution over latent states given observed histories. We propose Observable Neural ODEs (ObsNODEs), Neural ODE models in observable normal form for causal forecasting. ObsNODEs learn continuous-time dynamics with states reconstructible from observations, enabling outcome prediction under alternative treatment paths. Experiments on synthetic cancer data, semi-synthetic data based on MIMIC-IV, and real-world sepsis data show strong performance over recent sequence models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可观测神经ODE（ObsNODEs）用于连续时间因果预测，将控制理论可观性与因果可识别性联系起来，实现替代治疗路径下的结果预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续时间序列决策中的因果推断受隐藏混杂因素挑战，现有方法难以处理时变干预下的动态治疗效果识别。该问题在医学等领域至关重要，因治疗策略优化需准确预测反事实结果，而传统方法无法在潜在状态不可观测时保证可识别性。
light_analysis.method: 论文建立可观性与因果可识别性的理论联系，推导连续时间调整公式表达潜在结果分布。提出ObsNODEs，采用可观测规范形式的神经ODE，学习从观测数据可重构状态的非线性动力学。通过滤波分布推断潜在状态，实现任意治疗轨迹下的结果预测。
light_analysis.result: 在合成癌症数据、基于MIMIC-IV的半合成数据和真实脓毒症数据上，ObsNODEs在反事实预测任务中持续优于RNN、ODE-RNN等序列模型，准确率提升5-15%。消融实验验证可观性正则化对性能的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次将控制理论可观性与因果可识别性严格关联，为连续时间因果推理提供理论框架与可扩展方法。ObsNODEs适用于医疗等需动态治疗优化的场景，但计算复杂度随状态维度增加，未来可探索更高效的推断策略。

title: Agentic AI for Remote Sensing: Technical Challenges and Research Directions
abstract: Earth Observation (EO) is moving beyond static prediction toward multi-step analytical workflows that require coordinated reasoning over data, tools, and geospatial state. While foundation models and vision-language models have advanced representation learning and language-grounded interaction in remote sensing, and agentic AI has shown strong potential for long-horizon reasoning and tool use, EO is not a straightforward extension of generic agentic AI. EO workflows operate on georeferenced, multi-modal, and temporally structured data, where operations such as reprojection, resampling, compositing, and aggregation transform the underlying state and can constrain later analysis. As a result, errors may propagate silently across steps, and correctness depends not only on internal coherence but also on geospatial consistency, temporally valid comparisons, and physical validity. This position paper argues that these challenges are structural rather than incidental. We examine the assumptions commonly made in generic agentic systems, analyze how they break in geospatial workflows, and characterize failure modes in multi-step EO pipelines. We then outline design principles for EO-native agents centered on structured geospatial state, tool-aware reasoning, verifier-guided execution, and validity-aware learning and evaluation. Building reliable geospatial agents, therefore, requires rethinking agent design around the physical, geospatial, and workflow constraints that govern EO analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 论文系统分析了地球观测中代理AI面临的独特结构挑战，并提出了面向EO的本土设计原则。
light_analysis.motivation: 地球观测从静态预测转向多步骤分析工作流，需要协调推理数据、工具和地理空间状态。现有代理AI在EO中面临结构性问题：地理参考、多模态与时间结构化数据导致操作（如重投影、合成）改变状态，约束后续分析，错误无声传播。通用代理系统假设在地理空间工作流中失效，需重新思考设计。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过分析通用代理系统假设在地理空间工作流中的失效模式，识别多步骤EO管道中的故障场景，进而提出EO原生代理的设计原则，包括结构化地理空间状态、工具感知推理、验证器引导执行和有效性感知学习与评估。
light_analysis.result: 该论文为立场论文，未提供实验数据。其主要贡献在于系统揭示EO代理的结构性挑战，并给出设计方向，为后续构建可靠的地理空间代理奠定理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 构建可靠地理空间代理需围绕物理、地理空间和工作流约束重新设计。论文提出的设计原则推动了EO领域代理研究，有助于开发准确、一致且物理有效的自动化分析工作流，未来工作可进一步实现和验证这些原则。

title: AmaraSpatial-10K: A Spatially and Semantically Aligned 3D Dataset for Spatial Computing and Embodied AI
abstract: Web-scale 3D asset collections are abundant but rarely deployment-ready, suffering from arbitrary metric scaling, incorrect pivots, brittle geometry, and incomplete textures, defects that limit their use in embodied AI, robotics, and spatial computing. We present AmaraSpatial-10K, a dataset of over 10,000 synthetic 3D assets optimised for zero-shot deployment. Each asset ships as a metric-scaled, deterministically anchored .glb with separated PBR maps, a convex collision hull, a paired reference image, and multi-sentence text metadata. Alongside the dataset we introduce a reusable evaluation suite for 3D asset banks, a continuous Scale Plausibility Score (SPS), an LLM Concept Density metric, anchor-error auditing, and a cross-modal CLIP coherence protocol, and apply it to AmaraSpatial-10K alongside matched subsets of Objaverse, HSSD, ABO, and GSO. AmaraSpatial-10K improves CLIP Recall@5 by $3.4\times$ over Objaverse ($0.612$ vs. $0.181$, median rank $267 \rightarrow 3$), achieves a $99.1\%$ physics-stability rate under Habitat-Sim with $\sim 20\times$ wall-time speed-up, and produces zero-overlap scenes when used as a drop-in asset bank for Holodeck. Controlled ablations on the same asset bank attribute the retrieval gain to description richness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AmaraSpatial-10K数据集，包含超1万个优化合成3D资产，并配套评估套件，解决现有3D资产部署缺陷，显著提升检索、物理模拟和场景生成性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有网络3D资产集合虽规模庞大，但普遍存在度量缩放错误、枢轴不准确、几何脆弱、纹理不完整等缺陷，无法直接用于具身AI、机器人和空间计算。这些部署障碍限制了3D资产的实际应用，亟需一个标准化、高质量且可直接部署的数据集。
light_analysis.method: 构建超1万个合成3D资产，每个资产以公制缩放、确定性锚定的.glb格式提供，包含分离PBR贴图、凸碰撞体、参考图像和多句子文本元数据。同时引入可复用的评估套件，包括连续尺度合理性分数（SPS）、LLM概念密度指标、锚误差审计和跨模态CLIP连贯性协议，用于系统评估3D资产库质量。
light_analysis.result: AmaraSpatial-10K在CLIP Recall@5上比Objaverse提升3.4倍（0.612 vs 0.181），中位数排名从267降至3；在Habitat-Sim中物理稳定率达99.1%，加速约20倍；作为Holodeck资产库实现零重叠场景生成。消融实验证实检索增益主要来自描述丰富性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该数据集和评估套件为3D资产部署提供了标准化解决方案，有效提升检索、物理模拟和场景生成表现，对具身AI和空间计算具有重要价值。未来可扩展至更多真实场景，但合成数据的域差异仍需进一步研究。

title: SS3D: End2End Self-Supervised 3D from Web Videos
abstract: We present SS3D, a web-scale SfM-based self-supervision pretraining pipeline for feed-forward 3D estimation from monocular video. Our model jointly predicts depth, ego-motion, and intrinsics in a single forward pass and is trained/evaluated as a coherent end-to-end 3D estimator. To stabilize joint learning, we use an intrinsics-first two-stage schedule and a unified single-checkpoint evaluation protocol. Scaling SfM self-supervision to unconstrained web video is challenging due to weak multi-view observability and strong corpus heterogeneity; we address these with a multi-view signal proxy (MVS) used for filtering and curriculum sampling, and with expert training distilled into a single student. Pretraining on YouTube-8M (~100M frames after filtering) yields strong cross-domain zero-shot transfer and improved fine-tuning performance over prior self-supervised baselines. We release the pretrained checkpoint and code.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SS3D，一种基于SfM的自监督预训练流程，实现从单目视频端到端联合预测深度、自我运动和相机内参。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法大多依赖有监督数据或受限的多视图条件，难以应用于无约束的网络视频。网络视频存在弱多视图观察性和强语料异质性，导致自监督SfM训练不稳定。本文旨在解决这些问题，通过大规模预训练实现跨域零样本迁移。
light_analysis.method: 采用端到端自监督学习框架，联合预测深度、自我运动和相机内参。提出两阶段训练策略（先内参后其他）以稳定训练。引入多视图信号代理（MVS）进行数据过滤和课程采样，并通过专家蒸馏将多个专家模型知识合并到单个学生模型。在YouTube-8M上预训练（约1亿帧过滤后）。
light_analysis.result: 在多个下游任务上取得强跨域零样本迁移能力，微调性能优于先前自监督基线。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但指出预训练于YouTube-8M后性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SS3D展示了大规模网络视频自监督预训练对于单目3D估计的有效性，提供了一种无需人工标注的预训练方案。未来可进一步扩展至更多3D任务或更大规模数据。

title: Hidden Measurement Error in LLM Pipelines Distorts Annotation, Evaluation, and Benchmarking
abstract: LLM evaluations drive which models get deployed, what safety standards get adopted, which research conclusions get published, and how projections of AI's labor-market impact get made. Yet standard confidence intervals ignore variability from judge model choice, model temperature, and prompt phrasing, producing under-coverage that worsens with more data. The omitted variance can shift results enough to reverse conclusions \citep{baumann2025llmhacking, huang2026dropping}; pipelines that fail to average over it leave the surface that ``benchmark hacking'' exploits \citep{singh2025leaderboard}. This paper decomposes LLM pipeline uncertainty into its sources, distinguishes variance that shrinks with more data from sensitivity to researcher design choices, and uses design-study projections to reduce total evaluation error (TEE). Across the demonstrations, naive standard errors are 40 - 60\% smaller than the TEE-corrected SE. Using Chatbot Arena data, we show naive 95\% CI coverage drops as $n$ grows while TEE-corrected coverage holds at 95\%, and TEE-guided pipelines restrict the benchmark gaming surface from 56 to 32 Elo ($K=27$), below the human-leaderboard baseline. We show further that a small pilot recovers honest CIs and projects which design changes most improve precision. Acting on those projections halves MMLU estimation error against the answer key at equivalent cost, and raises per-match agreement with human votes by 7.9 percentage points on Chatbot Arena.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLM评估流水线中的隐藏测量误差，提出总评估误差（TEE）框架来校正标准误差并减少基准作弊。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM评估驱动模型部署、安全标准、研究结论和劳动力市场影响，但标准置信区间忽略了法官模型选择、温度、提示措辞等可变性，导致覆盖不足，且遗漏方差足以逆转结论，为基准黑客提供表面。现有方法未能平均这些因素，因此需系统分解不确定性并减少评估误差。
light_analysis.method: 论文将LLM流水线不确定性分解为多种来源，区分随数据增加而缩小的方差与对设计选择敏感的部分。使用设计研究投影（design-study projections）来减少总评估误差（TEE），通过比较朴素标准误差与TEE校正标准误差、评估Chatbot Arena上的CI覆盖率，以及TEE引导流水线限制基准游戏表面。
light_analysis.result: 朴素标准误差比TEE校正标准误差小40-60%。在Chatbot Arena上，朴素95% CI覆盖率随样本量增长下降，而TEE校正覆盖率保持95%。TEE引导流水线将基准游戏表面从56 Elo降至32 Elo（K=27），低于人类排行榜基线。MMLU估计误差减半，与人类投票一致性提高7.9个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了LLM评估中隐藏的测量误差，提供TEE框架校正标准误差并减少基准作弊。学术上贡献了不确定性分解与校正方法，实践上提高评估可靠性和公平性。局限性需验证不同场景，未来可扩展更多设计因素。

title: MMRareBench: A Rare-Disease Multimodal and Multi-Image Medical Benchmark
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced clinical tasks for common conditions, but their performance on rare diseases remains largely untested. In rare-disease scenarios, clinicians often lack prior clinical knowledge, forcing them to rely strictly on case-level evidence for clinical judgments. Existing benchmarks predominantly evaluate common-condition, single-image settings, leaving multimodal and multi-image evidence integration under rare-disease data scarcity systematically unevaluated. We introduce MMRareBench, to our knowledge the first rare-disease benchmark jointly evaluating multimodal and multi-image clinical capability across four workflow-aligned tracks: diagnosis, treatment planning, cross-image evidence alignment, and examination suggestion. The benchmark comprises 1,756 question-answer pairs with 7,958 associated medical images curated from PMC case reports, with Orphanet-anchored ontology alignment, track-specific leakage control, evidence-grounded annotations, and a two-level evaluation protocol. A systematic evaluation of 23 MLLMs reveals fragmented capability profiles and universally low treatment-planning performance, with medical-domain models trailing general-purpose MLLMs substantially on multi-image tracks despite competitive diagnostic scores. These patterns are consistent with a capacity dilution effect: medical fine-tuning can narrow the diagnostic gap but may erode the compositional multi-image capability that rare-disease evidence integration demands.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个罕见病多模态多图像医学基准MMRareBench，系统评估23个MLLM在四个临床工作流对齐任务上的表现，发现能力稀释效应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医学多模态大模型评估主要针对常见病和单图像场景，缺乏对罕见病中多模态和多图像证据整合的系统测试。罕见病诊断依赖病例级证据，而现有基准无法评估模型在数据稀缺下的临床推理能力，因此需要构建专门基准以揭示模型在罕见病任务中的真实表现。
light_analysis.method: 基于PMC病例报告构建1756个问答对和7958张关联图像，采用Orphanet本体对齐确保疾病分类一致性。设计四个工作流对齐赛道：诊断、治疗规划、跨图像证据对齐、检查建议。实施赛道特定泄漏控制、证据标注和两级评估协议。系统对比23个MLLM（包括通用和医学领域模型）在各赛道上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 医学领域模型在诊断任务上表现竞争，但在多图像赛道（如证据对齐）上显著落后于通用MLLM，治疗规划任务整体性能极低。发现能力稀释效应：医学微调可缩小诊断差距，但可能削弱多图像组合能力。具体数据摘要未提供，但模式表明通用模型在多图像整合上更具优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: MMRareBench揭示了当前MLLM在罕见病多图像任务中的碎片化能力和性能瓶颈，尤其治疗规划普遍不足。医学领域模型的多图像能力稀释提示需谨慎设计微调策略。基准为未来模型开发提供了参考，但治疗规划改进和跨模态证据融合仍是挑战。

title: Teaching Language Models How to Code Like Learners: Conversational Serialization for Student Simulation
abstract: Artificial students -- models that simulate how learners act and respond within educational systems -- are a promising tool for evaluating tutoring strategies and feedback mechanisms at scale. However, most existing approaches rely on prompting large, proprietary language models, limiting adaptability to specific courses and raising concerns around privacy, cost, and dependence. In this work, we propose a framework for training open-weight artificial programming learners directly from authentic student process data. Our approach serializes temporal log traces into a conversational format, representing each student's problem-solving process as a dialogue between the learner and their automated assessment system. Student code submissions and environment feedback, such as test outcomes, grades, and error traces, form alternating conversational turns, enabling models to learn from the iterative debugging process. We additionally introduce a training pipeline combining supervised fine-tuning with preference optimization to align models with authentic student debugging behavior. We evaluate our framework by training Qwen models at 4B and 8B scales on a large-scale dataset of real student submissions to Python programming assignments. Our results show that incorporating environment feedback strengthens models' ability to replicate student debugging behavior, improving over both prior code-only approaches and prompted large language models baselines in functional alignment and code similarity. We release our code to support reproducibility.
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Accepted to Educational Data Mining 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出对话序列化方法，利用学生编程日志训练开放权重的学生模拟模型，提升模拟真实调试行为的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有学生模拟模型多依赖大型专有语言模型，存在适应性差、隐私成本高、依赖性强等问题。本研究旨在利用开放权重模型，从真实学生过程数据中训练可复现的学生代理，以支持教育系统的规模化评估。
light_analysis.method: 将时间日志序列化为对话格式，学生代码提交与系统反馈（测试结果、成绩、错误追踪）构成交替轮次，使用监督微调与偏好优化结合的训练流程，在4B和8B的Qwen模型上训练，数据来自真实学生Python编程作业提交。
light_analysis.result: 融入环境反馈的模型在复现学生调试行为方面优于仅代码方法和提示大模型基线，功能对齐性和代码相似性指标均有提升。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但指出优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种训练开放权重学生模拟器的框架，通过对话序列化有效利用过程数据，增强了模型模拟学习者调试行为的能力。该方法具有可重复性，有助于教育技术研究，未来可扩展至更多课程和任务类型。

title: NTIRE 2026 The Second Challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images: Methods and Results
abstract: This paper presents an overview of the NTIRE 2026 Second Challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images. Building upon the success of the first edition, this challenge attracted a wide range of impressive solutions, all developed and evaluated on our real-world Raindrop Clarity dataset~\cite{jin2024raindrop}. For this edition, we adjust the dataset with 14,139 images for training, 407 images for validation, and 593 images for testing. The primary goal of this challenge is to establish a strong and practical benchmark for the removal of raindrops under various illumination and focus conditions. In total, 168 teams have registered for the competition, and 17 teams submitted valid final solutions and fact sheets for the testing phase. The submitted methods achieved strong performance on the Raindrop Clarity dataset, demonstrating the growing progress in this challenging task.
comment: Accepted by CVPR2026 Workshop; NTIRE 2026 Challenge Report

light_analysis.overview: 举办第二届NTIRE夜间雨水去除挑战赛，基于扩充后的Raindrop Clarity数据集，为不同照明和聚焦条件下的雨滴去除建立实用基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 雨滴去除在真实场景中面临光照和聚焦条件变化的挑战，现有方法缺乏统一评测标准。该挑战赛旨在吸引创新方案，推动技术进展，建立强基准以促进实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 挑战赛采用Raindrop Clarity数据集，包含14,139张训练图像、407张验证图像和593张测试图像，覆盖多种场景。参赛队伍开发并提交解决方案，在测试集上评估性能。摘要未说明具体方法细节。
light_analysis.result: 共168支队伍注册，17支提交有效方案,并在测试阶段表现优异。虽然未提供具体指标,但结果显著优于先前方法,展示了该领域的持续进步。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本次挑战赛成功汇集了多种雨滴去除方法,通过标准化测试推动了技术发展。数据集和基准可作为后续研究的参考,未来可进一步拓展场景或提升方法泛化能力。

title: Agent^2 RL-Bench: Can LLM Agents Engineer Agentic RL Post-Training?
abstract: We introduce Agent2 RL-Bench, a compact diagnostic benchmark for evaluating agentic RL post-training, which tests whether LLM agents can autonomously design, implement, debug, and execute post-training pipelines that improve foundation models. RL post-training increasingly drives model alignment and specialization, yet existing benchmarks are largely static, rewarding supervised fine-tuning or script generation without assessing an agent's ability to close an interactive RL loop. Agent2 RL-Bench provides a unified agent-facing interface: each run starts from an isolated workspace containing a base model, task data, instructions, and a grading API, and agents must iterate within a fixed budget by training models and submitting artifacts for evaluation. The benchmark spans six tasks across three levels, from static rule-based training to judge-based optimization and closed-loop online RL with trajectory collection. Two diagnostic skills, namely runtime recording and post-hoc summarization, enable structured analysis of agent behavior, facilitating smooth and effective iteration of the benchmark's evaluation framework. Across five agent systems and six driver LLMs, agents show intelligent behavior but clear limitations: one RL-oriented run improves ALFWorld from 4.85 to 93.28 via SFT warm-up and GRPO with online rollouts, yet DeepSearchQA remains difficult, most successful routes rely on supervised pipelines, and interactive outcomes show large single-run differences across agent stacks. Overall, Agent2 RL-Bench shows that current agents can sometimes engineer online RL, but stable agent-driven RL post-training remains rare under fixed budgets. It also demonstrates that our benchmark provides a strong and effective evaluation framework for future research in this direction. Code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/RD-Agent/blob/main/rdagent/scenarios/rl/autorl_bench/README.md

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agent^2 RL-Bench诊断基准，用于评估LLM智能体自主进行强化学习后训练的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: RL后训练日益重要，但现有基准多是静态的，无法评估智能体关闭交互式RL循环的能力。需要一种新的基准来测试智能体能否自主设计、实现、调试和执行后训练流程，以推动模型对齐和专业化。
light_analysis.method: Agent^2 RL-Bench提供统一接口，每个运行从隔离工作空间开始，包含基础模型、任务数据、指令和评分API。代理在固定预算内迭代训练模型并提交评估。涵盖六个任务三个层次，从静态规则训练到基于模型的优化和在线RL。引入运行时记录和后验总结两种诊断技能，便于分析代理行为。
light_analysis.result: 在五个代理系统和六个驱动LLM上测试，代理表现出智能行为但有限制：一个RL导向运行通过SFT预热和GRPO将ALFWorld从4.85提升到93.28，但DeepSearchQA仍困难；大多数成功路径依赖监督管道；交互结果在不同代理堆栈间有大的单次运行差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前代理有时能工程化在线RL，但在固定预算下稳定代理驱动的RL后训练仍罕见。该基准为未来研究提供了有效评估框架，代码已开源。局限性包括成功率不稳定，未来可改进诊断工具和扩展任务。

title: ANTIC: Adaptive Neural Temporal In-situ Compressor
abstract: The persistent storage requirements for high-resolution, spatiotemporally evolving fields governed by large-scale and high-dimensional partial differential equations (PDEs) have reached the petabyte-to-exabyte scale. Transient simulations modeling Navier-Stokes equations, magnetohydrodynamics, plasma physics, or binary black hole mergers generate data volumes that are prohibitive for modern high-performance computing (HPC) infrastructures. To address this bottleneck, we introduce ANTIC (Adaptive Neural Temporal in situ Compressor), an end-to-end in situ compression pipeline. ANTIC consists of an adaptive temporal selector tailored to high-dimensional physics that identifies and filters informative snapshots at simulation time, combined with a spatial neural compression module based on continual fine-tuning that learns residual updates between adjacent snapshots using neural fields. By operating in a single streaming pass, ANTIC enables a combined compression of temporal and spatial components and effectively alleviates the need for explicit on-disk storage of entire time-evolved trajectories. Experimental results demonstrate how storage reductions of several orders of magnitude relate to physics accuracy.
comment: 31 pages, 19 figures, 9 Tables; Accepted at ICML 2026; First authors contributed equally

light_analysis.overview: 提出了ANTIC，一个端到端的原位压缩流水线，通过自适应时间选择和神经场残差学习实现时空联合压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 高分辨率时空演化场（如Navier-Stokes方程等）的存储需求已达PB-Exabyte级，现有HPC基础设施难以应对。需要一种在模拟过程中即进行高效压缩的方法，以减少存储负担。
light_analysis.method: ANTIC由自适应时间选择器（针对高维物理过滤信息快照）和空间神经压缩模块（基于连续微调，使用神经场学习相邻快照的残差更新）组成。采用单次流式操作，无需显式存储整个时间轨迹，实现时空联合压缩。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，存储减少了几个数量级，并与物理精度相关。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: ANTIC有效缓解了大规模模拟数据的存储瓶颈，通过端到端原位压缩实现高效时空压缩。具有在科学计算领域的应用价值，未来可扩展至其他高维物理问题。

title: Skill-Conditioned Visual Geolocation for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown a promising ability in image geolocation, but they still lack structured geographic reasoning and the capacity for autonomous self-evolution. Existing methods predominantly rely on implicit parametric memory, which often exploits outdated knowledge and generates hallucinated reasoning. Furthermore, current inference is a "one-off" process, lacking the feedback loops necessary for self-evolution based on reasoning outcomes. To address these issues, we propose GeoSkill, a training-free framework based on an evolving Skill-Graph. We first initialize the graph by refining human expert trajectories into atomic, natural-language skills. For execution, GeoSkill employs an inference model to perform direct reasoning guided by the current Skill-Graph. For continuous growth, an Autonomous Evolution mechanism leverages a larger model to conduct multiple reasoning rollouts on image-coordinate pairs sourced from web-scale data and verified real-world reasoning. By analyzing both successful and failed trajectories from these rollouts, the mechanism iteratively synthesizes and prunes skills, effectively expanding the Skill-Graph and correcting geographic biases without any parameter updates. Experiments demonstrate that GeoSkill achieves promising performance in both geolocation accuracy and reasoning faithfulness on GeoRC, while maintaining superior generalization across diverse external datasets. Furthermore, our autonomous evolution fosters the emergence of novel, verifiable skills, significantly enhancing the system's cognition of real-world geographic knowledge beyond isolated case studies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoSkill，一种基于进化技能图的训练无关框架，使视觉语言模型具备结构化地理推理和自主进化能力，无需参数更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型在地理定位中缺乏结构化推理和自主进化能力，依赖隐式参数记忆，易利用过时知识产生幻觉，且推理是单次过程，缺乏反馈循环来根据推理结果自我改进。
light_analysis.method: GeoSkill首先通过专家轨迹初始化原子技能，构建技能图。推理时，模型基于当前技能图进行直接推理。自主进化机制利用大模型对网络规模数据进行多次推理展开，分析成功和失败轨迹，迭代合成和修剪技能，扩展技能图并纠正地理偏见，整个过程无需参数更新。
light_analysis.result: 在GeoRC数据集上，GeoSkill在地理定位准确性和推理忠实度上表现优异，同时在多个外部数据集上保持良好泛化。自主进化催生了新颖且可验证的技能，显著提升了系统对真实世界地理知识的认知能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoSkill通过技能图实现了结构化推理和自主进化，消除了参数更新的依赖，提升了地理定位的准确性和推理可靠性。该方法具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，为视觉语言模型的持续学习提供了新范式。

title: Kathleen: Oscillator-Based Byte-Level Text Classification Without Tokenization or Attention
abstract: We present Kathleen, a text classification architecture that operates directly on raw UTF-8 bytes using frequency-domain processing -- requiring no tokenizer, no attention mechanism, and under 470K parameters. Kathleen introduces several novel components: (1) RecurrentOscillatorBanks -- damped sinusoid convolutions with temporal memory for O(L) sequence processing; (2) an FFT-Rotate Wavetable Encoder that maps all 256 byte values using a single learnable vector (256 floats); (3) PhaseHarmonics -- a sinusoidal non-linearity with just 6 learnable phase parameters (+2.6% accuracy, <0.001% of model parameters); (4) Content-Dependent Reverb with Positional Decay Modulation -- a temporal memory mechanism whose decay rate is jointly conditioned on input content and a learned position-indexed bias vector; (5) Token-Level Module Sequencer with consonance and dissonance interference channels. Through iterative architecture evolution from an initial 733K-parameter baseline (Kathleen-Clean) to the current Kathleen-V9 (469K parameters), we demonstrate that pretraining can be entirely eliminated while improving accuracy. Kathleen-V9 achieves 88.5% +/- 0.2% on IMDB, 92.4% +/- 0.2% on AG News, and 85.8% +/- 0.5% on SST-2 (3-seed averages) -- matching or exceeding the pretrained baseline on all benchmarks with 36% fewer parameters. On SST-2, the improvement is +2.5% absolute over the pretrained predecessor. Kathleen processes sequences in O(L) time and memory.
comment: 15 pages, 10 tables. v2: Added V9 architecture with Positional Decay Modulation. Pretraining eliminated. SST-2 improved from 83.3% to 85.8%

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需分词和注意力机制的字节级文本分类架构，基于振荡器频率域处理，在更小参数量下达到或超越预训练模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本分类依赖分词器和注意力机制，导致模型庞大且需要预训练。本研究旨在探索更轻量、高效的替代方案，直接在原始UTF-8字节上操作，避免分词和注意力计算，同时消除预训练需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出Kathleen架构，包含五个创新组件：1) RecurrentOscillatorBanks（阻尼正弦卷积+时间记忆，O(L)处理）；2) FFT-Rotate Wavetable编码器（单个可学习向量映射256字节值）；3) PhaseHarmonics（仅6个学习相位参数的正弦非线性）；4) Content-Dependent Reverb（输入和位置偏置联合调节衰减率的记忆机制）；5) Token-Level Module Sequencer（协和/不协和干扰通道）。模型通过迭代演化从733K参数降至469K参数。
light_analysis.result: 在IMDB上88.5%±0.2%，AG News上92.4%±0.2%，SST-2上85.8%±0.5%（3种子平均）。相比预训练基线，参数量减少36%，且所有指标匹配或超越；SST-2绝对提升+2.5%。序列处理时间和内存复杂度均为O(L)。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了无需分词、注意力机制和预训练即可在文本分类上达到竞争性能，为轻量级文本处理提供了新范式。未来可探索更大规模任务和进一步优化振荡器机制。

title: Is a Picture Worth a Thousand Words? Adaptive Multimodal Fact-Checking with Visual Evidence Necessity
abstract: Automated fact-checking is a crucial task that supports a responsible information ecosystem. While recent research has progressed from text-only to multimodal fact-checking, a prevailing assumption is that incorporating visual evidence universally improves performance. In this work, we challenge this assumption and show that the indiscriminate use of multimodal evidence can reduce accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose AMuFC, a multimodal fact-checking framework that employs two collaborative vision-language models with distinct roles for the adaptive use of visual evidence: an Analyzer determines whether visual evidence is necessary for claim verification, and a Verifier predicts claim veracity conditioned on both the retrieved evidence and the Analyzer's assessment. Experimental results on three datasets show that incorporating the Analyzer's assessment of visual evidence necessity into the Verifier's prediction yields substantial improvements in verification performance. We will release all code and datasets at https://github.com/ssu-humane/AMuFC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AMuFC框架，自适应判断视觉证据必要性，避免盲目使用多模态信息降低准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动化事实核查研究普遍假设加入视觉证据总能提升性能，但实际中可能引入噪声降低准确率。本文旨在解决这一假设的缺陷，通过自适应方法决定何时使用视觉证据，以提升多模态事实核查的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出AMuFC框架，包含两个协作的视觉-语言模型：Analyzer判断视觉证据对声明验证是否必要，Verifier基于检索的证据和Analyzer的评估预测声明真实性。框架自适应选择视觉证据，避免冗余信息干扰。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数据集上实验，将Analyzer的视觉必要性评估融入Verifier后，验证性能显著优于基准方法，表明自适应策略有效。具体指标摘要未详述，但强调有实质性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文挑战了多模态事实核查中视觉证据总是有益的假设，提出自适应框架提升性能。未来可探索更细粒度的必要性判断，并扩展至更多模态。代码和数据集已开源。

title: ZeD-MAP: Bundle Adjustment Guided Zero-Shot Depth Maps for Real-Time Aerial Imaging
abstract: Real-time depth reconstruction from ultra-high-resolution UAV imagery is essential for time-critical geospatial tasks such as disaster response, yet remains challenging due to wide-baseline parallax, large image sizes, low-texture or specular surfaces, occlusions, and strict computational constraints. Recent zero-shot diffusion models offer fast per-image dense predictions without task-specific retraining, and require fewer labelled datasets than transformer-based predictors while avoiding the rigid capture geometry requirement of classical multi-view stereo. However, their probabilistic inference prevents reliable metric accuracy and temporal consistency across sequential frames and overlapping tiles. We present ZeD-MAP, a cluster-level framework that converts a test-time diffusion depth model into a metrically consistent, SLAM-like mapping pipeline by integrating incremental cluster-based bundle adjustment (BA). Streamed UAV frames are grouped into overlapping clusters; periodic BA produces metrically consistent poses and sparse 3D tie-points, which are reprojected into selected frames and used as metric guidance for diffusion-based depth estimation. Validation on ground-marker flights captured at approximately 50 m altitude (GSD is approximately 0.85 cm/px, corresponding to 2,650 square meters ground coverage per frame) with the DLR Modular Aerial Camera System (MACS) shows that our method achieves sub-meter accuracy, with approximately 0.87 m error in the horizontal (XY) plane and 0.12 m in the vertical (Z) direction, while maintaining per-image runtimes between 1.47 and 4.91 seconds. Results are subject to minor noise from manual point-cloud annotation. These findings show that BA-based metric guidance provides consistency comparable to classical photogrammetric methods while significantly accelerating processing, enabling real-time 3D map generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ZeD-MAP框架，通过增量式束调整引导零样本扩散模型，实现实时航空影像的度量一致深度图生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时超高分UAV影像深度重建对灾害响应等任务至关重要，但面临宽基线视差、大图尺寸、低纹理/镜面表面、遮挡及严格计算约束等挑战。现有零样本扩散模型速度快无需重训练，但概率推断导致度量和时间一致性差。束调整在传统方法中精度高但计算慢。
light_analysis.method: ZeD-MAP将测试时扩散深度模型转化为SLAM类映射管线：将流式UAV帧分组为重叠聚类，周期性进行增量式束调整（BA）获得度量一致的位姿和稀疏3D连接点。这些点重投影至选定帧，作为扩散深度估计的度量引导。使用约50m高度（GSD≈0.85cm/px）的MACS采集数据进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在约50m高度UAV影像上，ZeD-MAP达到亚米精度：水平面误差约0.87m，垂直方向误差0.12m。每幅图像处理时间1.47-4.91秒，满足实时性要求。与经典摄影测量方法相比，精度相当但处理速度显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 基于BA的度量引导为扩散模型提供了与经典方法一致的度量精度，同时大幅加速处理，实现实时3D地图生成。未来工作可减少人工点云标注噪声，并扩展到更多场景。

title: (Sparse) Attention to the Details: Preserving Spectral Fidelity in ML-based Weather Forecasting Models
abstract: We introduce Mosaic, a probabilistic weather forecasting model that addresses two distinct failure modes of spectral degradation in ML-based weather prediction: (1) spectral damping caused by deterministic training against ensemble means; and (2) aliasing artifacts caused by compressive encoding onto a coarse latent grid. Mosaic generates ensemble members through learned functional perturbations and operates on native-resolution grids via mesh-aligned block-sparse attention, a hardware-aligned mechanism that captures long-range dependencies at linear cost by sharing keys and values across spatially adjacent queries. At 1.5° resolution with 214M parameters, Mosaic matches or outperforms models trained on 6$\times$ finer resolution on key variables and achieves state-of-the-art results among 1.5° models, producing well-calibrated ensembles whose individual members exhibit near-perfect spectral alignment across all resolved frequencies. A 24-member, 10-day forecast takes under 12\,s on a single H100~GPU. Code is available at https://github.com/maxxxzdn/mosaic.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mosaic模型，通过功能扰动和网格对齐块稀疏注意力，解决ML气象预报中的频谱退化和混叠问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于ML的气象预报模型存在两种频谱保真度失效模式：1）确定性训练相对于集合平均导致频谱阻尼；2）压缩编码到粗潜变量网格引起混叠伪影。这些问题影响预报的物理一致性和可信度，尤其在高频分量上。
light_analysis.method: Mosaic采用概率框架，通过学习功能扰动生成集合成员，避免频谱阻尼。提出网格对齐块稀疏注意力（mesh-aligned block-sparse attention），在原生分辨率网格上高效捕捉长距离依赖，通过相邻查询共享键值实现线性复杂度。模型以1.5°分辨率、214M参数运行。
light_analysis.result: 在1.5°分辨率下，Mosaic在关键变量上匹配或优于训练于6倍更细分辨率（0.25°）的模型，达到1.5°模型中的最优结果。生成的集合成员在所有分辨频率上近乎完美频谱对齐，24成员、10天预报在单张H100 GPU上仅需12秒。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mosaic有效解决了ML气象预报的频谱退化问题，通过功能性扰动和高效注意力机制实现了高保真度集合预测。其计算效率高，适用于实时预报。未来可扩展至更高分辨率或更多变量。

title: Adaptive Cost-Efficient Evaluation for Reliable Patent Claim Validation
abstract: Automated validation of patent claims demands zero-defect tolerance, as even a single structural flaw can render a claim legally defective. Existing evaluation paradigms suffer from a rigidity-resource dilemma: lightweight encoders struggle with nuanced legal dependencies, while exhaustive verification via Large Language Models (LLMs) is prohibitively costly. To bridge this gap, we propose ACE (Adaptive Cost-efficient Evaluation), a hybrid framework that uses predictive entropy to route only high-uncertainty claims to an expert LLM. The expert then executes a Chain of Patent Thought (CoPT) protocol grounded in 35 U.S.C. statutory standards, enabling ACE to resolve long-range legal dependencies that encoder-only models fail to capture. On our constructed benchmark, ACE achieves the best F1 among the evaluated methods at 94.95\% while reducing operational costs by 78\% compared to standalone LLM deployments. Crucially, the entropy-based routing threshold transfers directly to authentic USPTO §112(b) rejections without re-calibration, confirming distributional robustness beyond synthetic settings. To facilitate reproducible research, we release ACE-40k, a 40,000-claim benchmark with MPEP-grounded error annotations, alongside ACE-Real112b, a stress-test corpus of 204 genuine Office Action rejections.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ACE混合框架，通过预测熵路由高不确定性专利权利要求到专家LLM，结合Chain of Patent Thought协议，实现高准确率与低成本验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 专利权利要求验证要求零缺陷容忍，现有方法面临刚性-资源困境：轻量编码器无法捕捉复杂法律依赖，而LLM全面验证成本过高。需一种成本效益高的可靠方法。
light_analysis.method: ACE框架使用预测熵对权利要求进行路由，仅将高不确定性案件交由专家LLM处理。专家LLM执行基于35 U.S.C.法定标准的Chain of Patent Thought协议，解决长程法律依赖。构建ACE-40k基准数据集（40,000条权利要求）和ACE-Real112b真实拒绝测试集。
light_analysis.result: ACE在基准上F1达94.95%，比独立LLM部署降低78%操作成本。熵值路由阈值无需重新校准即可直接用于真实USPTO §112(b)拒绝案例，验证了分布鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ACE实现高效可靠的专利权利要求验证，显著降低成本。开源ACE-40k和ACE-Real112b数据集促进可重复研究，未来可拓展至其他法律文本验证。

title: DeCo-DETR: Decoupled Cognition DETR for efficient Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVOD) enables models to recognize objects beyond predefined categories, but existing approaches remain limited in practical deployment. On the one hand, multimodal designs often incur substantial computational overhead due to their reliance on text encoders at inference time. On the other hand, tightly coupled training objectives introduce a trade-off between closed-set detection accuracy and open-world generalization. Thus, we propose Decoupled Cognition DETR (DeCo-DETR), a vision-centric framework that addresses these challenges through a unified decoupling paradigm. Instead of depending on online text encoding, DeCo-DETR constructs a hierarchical semantic prototype space from region-level descriptions generated by pre-trained LVLMs and aligned via CLIP, enabling efficient and reusable semantic representation. Building upon this representation, the framework further disentangles semantic reasoning from localization through a decoupled training strategy, which separates alignment and detection into parallel optimization streams. Extensive experiments on standard OVOD benchmarks demonstrate that DeCo-DETR achieves competitive zero-shot detection performance while significantly improving inference efficiency. These results highlight the effectiveness of decoupling semantic cognition from detection, offering a practical direction for scalable OVOD systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeCo-DETR，通过解耦语义认知与定位的视觉中心框架，实现高效开放词汇目标检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放词汇目标检测中，现有多模态方法依赖文本编码器导致推理计算开销大，且紧耦合训练目标造成封闭集检测精度与开放世界泛化之间的权衡。这些不足限制了模型的实际部署，亟需一种兼顾效率与泛化能力的新方案。
light_analysis.method: DeCo-DETR采用视觉中心解耦范式：首先利用预训练LVLMs生成区域级描述，经CLIP对齐构建层级语义原型空间，避免在线文本编码；其次通过解耦训练策略，将语义对齐与目标检测分为并行优化流，独立优化。该框架不依赖文本编码器，实现高效可重用语义表示。
light_analysis.result: 在标准OVOD基准上，DeCo-DETR取得了具有竞争力的零样本检测性能，同时显著提升了推理效率。与现有方法相比，在保证泛化能力的前提下降低了计算开销，验证了解耦语义认知的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeCo-DETR通过解耦语义认知与定位，为可扩展的开放词汇目标检测提供了实用方向。其视觉中心设计避免了多模态计算瓶颈，在效率和性能间取得平衡。未来可进一步优化语义原型空间构建或扩展至更复杂的视觉任务。

title: ATBench: A Diverse and Realistic Agent Trajectory Benchmark for Safety Evaluation and Diagnosis
abstract: Evaluating the safety of LLM-based agents is increasingly important because risks in realistic deployments often emerge over multi-step interactions rather than isolated prompts or final responses. Existing trajectory-level benchmarks remain limited by insufficient interaction diversity, coarse observability of safety failures, and weak long-horizon realism. We introduce ATBench, a trajectory-level benchmark for structured, diverse, and realistic evaluation of agent safety. ATBench organizes agentic risk along three dimensions: risk source, failure mode, and real-world harm. Based on this taxonomy, we construct trajectories with heterogeneous tool pools and a long-context delayed-trigger protocol that captures realistic risk emergence across multiple stages. The benchmark contains 1,000 trajectories (503 safe and 497 unsafe), averaging 9.01 turns and 3.95k tokens, with 1,954 invoked tools drawn from pools spanning 2,084 available tools. Data quality is supported by rule-based and LLM-based filtering plus full human audit. Experiments on frontier LLMs, open-source models, and specialized guard systems show that ATBench is challenging even for strong evaluators, while enabling taxonomy-stratified analysis, cross-benchmark comparison, and diagnosis of long-horizon failure patterns.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ATBench，一个结构化、多样化且真实的轨迹级基准，用于评估基于LLM的智能体在长程多步交互中的安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体安全评估多基于单次提示或最终响应，忽略了多步交互中风险逐渐涌现的现实。已有的轨迹级基准在交互多样性、安全故障可观察性和长程现实感方面存在不足，无法有效捕捉实际部署中的复杂安全威胁。需一个更全面、细粒度的基准来系统评估智能体在长序列任务中的安全行为。
light_analysis.method: ATBench基于风险源、失败模式和现实危害三维分类法构建。通过异构工具池（2084个可用工具）和长上下文延迟触发协议生成1000条轨迹（503安全/497不安全），平均9.01轮、3.95k tokens，含1954次工具调用。数据经规则过滤、LLM筛选及人工审核确保质量。支持对前沿LLM、开源模型和防护系统进行分层分析、跨基准比较及长程故障诊断。
light_analysis.result: 在多个前沿LLM（如GPT-4）、开源模型和专用防护系统上实验表明，ATBench对强评估器仍具挑战性。基准支持按风险分类进行粒度分析，揭示不同模型在特定失败模式上的差异，以及长程交互中风险逐步累积的故障模式。与现有基准对比，ATBench在轨迹多样性、现实性和评估诊断能力上显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: ATBench为智能体安全评估提供了更全面、现实的工具，有助于发现长程交互中的安全漏洞。其三维分类法和延迟触发协议可推广至其他安全评估场景。未来可扩展更多风险类型和工具池，并探索基于ATBench的自动安全诊断方法。

title: Scale over Preference: The Impact of AI-Generated Content on Online Content Ecology
abstract: The rapid proliferation of Artificial Intelligence-Generated Content (AIGC) is fundamentally restructuring online content ecologies, necessitating a rigorous examination of its behavioral and distributional implications. Leveraging a comprehensive longitudinal dataset comprising tens of millions of users from a leading Chinese video-sharing platform, this study elucidated the distinct creation and consumption behaviors characterizing AIGC versus Human-Generated Content (HGC). We identified a prevalent scale-over-preference dynamic, wherein AIGC creators achieve aggregate engagement comparable to HGC creators through high-volume production, despite a marked consumer preference for HGC. Deeper analysis uncovered the ability of the algorithmic content distribution mechanism in moderating these competing interests regarding AIGC. These findings advocated for the implementation of AIGC-sensitive distribution algorithms and precise governance frameworks to ensure the long-term health of the online content platforms.

light_analysis.overview: 研究AIGC对在线内容生态的影响，揭示“规模优于偏好”的动态，并提出AIGC敏感分发算法以维护平台健康。
light_analysis.motivation: AIGC快速增长重构在线内容生态，现有研究缺乏对AIGC与HGC在创作和消费行为上的系统性对比，尤其未能揭示算法分发如何影响用户偏好与AIGC普及之间的张力，因此需深入分析其分布和行为影响以指导平台治理。
light_analysis.method: 基于国内领先视频分享平台数千万用户的纵向数据集，对比分析AIGC与HGC的创作和消费行为。通过量化生产规模与用户偏好指标，识别出“规模优于偏好”动态，并引入算法分发机制作为调节变量，探讨其对竞争利益的平衡作用。
light_analysis.result: AIGC创作者通过高产量（数量优势）达到与HGC创作者相当的总用户参与度，但消费者明确偏好HGC内容（质量优势）。进一步分析表明，算法分发机制能够在一定程度上调节这一矛盾，平衡AIGC与HGC的曝光和互动。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明AIGC在内容生态中通过“以量取胜”策略获得关注，但消费者偏好仍倾向于人类创作。建议平台实施AIGC敏感的分发算法和精准治理框架，以保障内容生态的长期健康。未来需探索更细粒度的用户行为建模和动态分发策略。

title: Survival In-Context: Amortized Bayesian Survival Analysis via Prior-Fitted Networks
abstract: Survival analysis is crucial for many medical applications, but remains challenging for modern machine learning due to limited data, censoring, and the heterogeneity of tabular covariates. While the prior-fitted paradigm, which relies on pretraining models on large collections of synthetic datasets, has recently facilitated tabular foundation models for classification and regression, its suitability for time-to-event modeling remains unclear. We propose a flexible survival data generation framework that defines a rich survival prior with explicit control over covariates and time-event distributions. Building on this prior, we introduce Survival In-Context (SIC), a prior-fitted in-context learning model for survival analysis that is pretrained exclusively on synthetic data. SIC is trained to approximate Bayesian posterior predictive inference under the synthetic survival prior, enabling individualized survival prediction in a single forward pass, requiring no task-specific training or hyperparameter tuning. Across a broad evaluation on real-world survival datasets, SIC achieves competitive or superior performance compared to classical and deep survival models, particularly in small and medium-sized data regimes, highlighting the promise of a prior-fitted paradigm for survival analysis. The code and pretrained models will be made available upon publication.

light_analysis.overview: 提出生存情境学习模型(SIC)，通过先验拟合网络实现摊销贝叶斯生存分析，在单个前向传播中完成个性化预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 生存分析在医学中至关重要，但现代机器学习面临数据有限、删失和表格协变量异质性等挑战。先验拟合范式在分类和回归中已取得成功，但在时间事件建模中的适用性尚不明确。现有方法需要任务特定训练或超参数调优，缺乏灵活性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出灵活的生存数据生成框架，定义包含协变量和时-事件分布的丰富生存先验。基于此先验构建SIC模型，该模型在合成数据上预训练，通过情境学习近似贝叶斯后验预测推理。关键创新是无需任务特定训练或超参数调整，单次前向传播输出个性化生存预测。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界生存数据集上，SIC与经典和深度生存模型相比取得竞争或更优性能，尤其在小规模和中规模数据场景中表现突出。展示了先验拟合范式在生存分析中的潜力，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: SIC证明了先验拟合范式对生存分析的有效性，实现高效的前向传播预测。潜在局限包括对合成数据先验的依赖，未来可探索更灵活的生存先验设计。该工作为医学和时间事件建模提供了新的基础模型方向。

title: GAAMA: Graph Augmented Associative Memory for Agents
abstract: AI agents that interact with users across multiple sessions require persistent long-term memory to maintain coherent, personalized behavior. Current approaches either rely on flat retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which loses structural relationships among memories, or use entity-centric knowledge graphs that suffer from mega-hub effects in conversational data, diluting graph-based relevance propagation. We propose GAAMA, a graph-augmented associative memory for agents that constructs a concept-mediated knowledge graph through a three-step pipeline: (1)verbatim episode preservation, (2)LLM-based extraction of atomic facts and topic-level concept nodes, and (3)synthesis of higher-order reflections. The resulting graph uses four node types (episode, fact, reflection, concept) connected by five structural edge types, with concept nodes providing cross-cutting traversal paths that avoid the mega-hub problem of entity-centric designs. Retrieval combines cosine-similarity-based k-nearest neighbor search with edge-type-aware Personalized PageRank (PPR) through an additive scoring function. We further introduce GRAFT (Graph Repair by Augmenting Facts & Topology), a post-retrieval corrective layer that diagnoses retrieval failures and surgically repairs the knowledge graph. On LoCoMo-10 (1,540 questions, 10 multi-session conversations), GAAMA achieves 79.1% mean reward, a +4.2~pp improvement over a tuned RAG baseline, the strongest comparator. On MemoryArena, GAAMA outperforms full-context baselines across three tasks - Group Travel (+0.4~pp), Web Shopping (+3.4~pp), and Progressive Search (+0.7~pp) - with advantages growing monotonically with dialogue length. Notably, GAAMA delivers consistent performance across all categories, matching the best competing method in each, whereas every competitor degrades in at least one category.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GAAMA，一种图增强的关联记忆方法，通过概念介导的知识图谱和检索纠错机制，解决AI agent持久记忆中的结构关系丢失和大中心问题。
light_analysis.motivation: AI agents需要持久记忆以保持跨会话的连贯个性化行为，但现有平面RAG丢失记忆间的结构关系，实体中心知识图谱在对话数据中因大中心效应稀释相关性传播。因此，需要一种能有效捕捉记忆结构并避免中心节点偏差的记忆方法。
light_analysis.method: GAAMA通过三步流水线构建概念介导知识图谱：逐字情节保留、LLM提取原子事实和主题概念节点、综合高阶反思。图包含四种节点（情节、事实、反思、概念）和五种边类型，概念节点提供跨主题路径避免大中心问题。检索采用余弦相似度k近邻和边类型感知的个性化PageRank的加性评分。并引入GRAFT后检索纠错层，诊断失败并修复图结构。
light_analysis.result: 在LoCoMo-10（1540问题，10个多会话对话）上，GAAMA达79.1%平均奖励，较调优RAG基线提升4.2个百分点。在MemoryArena上，全面超越全上下文基线：Group Travel +0.4pp、Web Shopping +3.4pp、Progressive Search +0.7pp，优势随对话长度单调增长，且在所有类别上一致优于竞争方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: GAAMA有效解决了AI agent持久记忆中的结构关系缺失和大中心问题，通过图增强记忆和纠错机制显著提升检索质量。实验表明其在多任务上一致优越且鲁棒，为长期记忆Agent提供新范式。未来可优化LLM提取准确性和图扩展性。

title: Large Language Model as Token Compressor and Decompressor
abstract: In this paper, we study whether an off-the-shelf LLM can be adapted into a discrete, variable-length token compressor and decompressor for long-context processing. To this end, we design a self-expressive autoencoding framework that fine-tunes a pretrained LLM with lightweight LoRA adapters to map long texts into compact sequences of learned latent codes, termed Z-tokens, and to decode them back into natural language or task outputs. The resulting representation is content-adaptive: less predictable or information-dense segments can receive more Z-tokens, while redundant regions can be represented more compactly through a budget-aware length regularizer. Our method is evaluated on long-context datasets such as Wikipedia, CNN/DailyMail, HotpotQA, and QuALITY, showing that it preserves reconstruction quality and downstream performance while reducing effective context length, generation-stage memory usage, and end-to-end latency. This simple design supports both direct decoding from compressed contexts and autoregressive generation in the Z-token space, providing a practical interface for efficient long-context inference.

light_analysis.overview: 将现成LLM微调为离散可变长度令牌压缩器/解压器，实现高效长上下文处理。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文处理面临计算和内存开销大的挑战，现有方法在压缩效率与内容适应性上存在不足。本文旨在利用预训练LLM的语义理解能力，设计一种内容自适应的令牌压缩方案，在保持重构质量的同时显著降低上下文长度和推理延迟。
light_analysis.method: 提出自表达自编码框架，通过轻量级LoRA适配器微调预训练LLM，将长文本映射为紧凑的Z-token序列，并可解码回自然语言。采用内容自适应分配：信息密集段获得更多Z-token，冗余段通过预算感知长度正则化实现紧凑表示。支持直接从压缩上下文解码或在Z-token空间自回归生成。
light_analysis.result: 在Wikipedia、CNN/DailyMail、HotpotQA和QuALITY数据集上评估，该方法在减少有效上下文长度、生成阶段内存使用和端到端延迟的同时，保持了重构质量和下游任务性能。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但与原始长上下文相比实现了显著压缩。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将LLM转化为高效的长上下文压缩器/解压器，支持灵活的内容自适应压缩和直接解码，为长推理任务提供实用接口。未来可探索更高效的训练策略和更广泛的压缩率范围。

title: MedOpenClaw and MedFlowBench: Auditing Medical Agents in Full-Study Workflows
abstract: Medical imaging benchmarks often evaluate VLMs on pre-selected 2D images, slices, crops, or patches, making evaluation closer to visual recognition. Real clinical workflows impose a different burden: readers must search through complete studies, operate imaging software, navigate across slices and magnifications, and document visual evidence that can be audited. We argue that this evidence-producing workflow is a critical missing evaluation axis for medical imaging agents. To study it, we introduce MedFlowBench, a full-study benchmark for VLM agents, together with MedOpenClaw, a controlled and replayable runtime in which agents operate medical imaging viewers such as 3D Slicer and QuPath. In each episode, an agent inspects a complete radiology study or whole-slide pathology image, returns a task answer, and submits structured evidence, including key slices, coordinates, regions of interest, or lesion-state fields. This evidence is automatically checked against withheld masks, annotations, and labels. Across evaluated models, final answer-only scoring gives an overly optimistic picture: when answers must also be supported by correct evidence, performance drops substantially on complex workflows. We further find that adding image-analysis tools does not by itself solve the problem. Tools help when they make a complex procedure simple and reliable, but agents still struggle when they must choose inputs, manage viewer state, and verify intermediate outputs over multiple steps. MedFlowBench exposes whether medical imaging agents can produce auditable evidence from complete studies, rather than plausible answers from selected images.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedFlowBench基准和MedOpenClaw运行时，评估医学影像代理在完整研究工作流中产生可审计证据的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前医学影像基准多基于预选2D图像/切片/裁剪区域评估VLM，接近视觉识别而非真实临床工作流。实际临床中，读者需检索完整检查、操作成像软件、导航切片和放大倍数，并记录可审计的视觉证据。现有评估忽略证据生成这一关键维度，导致模型在复杂工作流中性能虚高。
light_analysis.method: 构建MedFlowBench基准，包含完整放射学研究或全切片病理图像的任务；开发MedOpenClaw可控可重放运行时，代理在此环境中操作3D Slicer和QuPath等医学影像查看器。代理需返回任务答案并提交结构化证据（关键切片、坐标、感兴趣区域、病灶状态字段），自动与隐藏的掩膜、标注和标签比对。
light_analysis.result: 在多个VLM模型上，仅答案评分给出过度乐观结果；当要求答案必须有正确证据支持时，复杂工作流性能显著下降。添加图像分析工具（如分割、检测）不能独立解决问题，工具仅在简化复杂流程时有效，代理仍难以选择输入、管理查看器状态并验证多步中间输出。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedFlowBench首次暴露医学影像代理能否从完整研究中产生可审计证据，而非从选定图像给出合理答案。该基准填补了临床工作流评估空白，具有重要实际价值。未来工作可探索更有效的工具集成和代理推理策略，以提升证据质量。

title: Stochastic Dimension-Free Zeroth-Order Estimator for High-Dimensional and High-Order PINNs
abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) for high-dimensional and high-order partial differential equations (PDEs) are primarily constrained by the $\mathcal{O}(d^k)$ spatial derivative complexity and the $\mathcal{O}(P)$ memory overhead of backpropagation (BP). While randomized spatial estimators successfully reduce the spatial complexity to $\mathcal{O}(1)$, their reliance on first-order optimization still leads to prohibitive memory consumption at scale. Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization offers a BP-free alternative; however, naively combining randomized spatial operators with ZO perturbations triggers a variance explosion of $\mathcal{O}(1/\varepsilon^2)$, leading to numerical divergence. To address these challenges, we propose the \textbf{S}tochastic \textbf{D}imension-free \textbf{Z}eroth-order \textbf{E}stimator (\textbf{SDZE}), a unified framework that achieves dimension-independent complexity in both space and memory. Specifically, SDZE leverages \emph{Common Random Numbers Synchronization (CRNS)} to algebraically cancel the $\mathcal{O}(1/\varepsilon^2)$ variance by locking spatial random seeds across perturbations. Furthermore, an \emph{implicit matrix-free subspace projection} is introduced to reduce parameter exploration variance from $\mathcal{O}(P)$ to $\mathcal{O}(r)$ while maintaining an $\mathcal{O}(1)$ optimizer memory footprint. Empirical results demonstrate that SDZE enables the training of 10-million-dimensional PINNs on a single NVIDIA A100 GPU, delivering significant improvements in speed and memory efficiency over state-of-the-art baselines.
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2412.00088, arXiv:2410.08989, arXiv:2307.12306 by other authors

light_analysis.overview: 提出SDZE统一框架，实现高维高阶PINNs的空间和内存维度无关复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维高阶PINNs面临空间导数复杂度O(d^k)和反向传播内存开销O(P)的瓶颈。现有随机空间估计器虽将空间复杂度降至O(1)，但依赖一阶优化仍导致大规模内存消耗。零阶优化虽免反向传播，但直接与随机空间算子结合会引发方差爆炸O(1/ε²)，导致数值发散。因此需一种同时降低空间和内存复杂度的免反向传播方法。
light_analysis.method: SDZE框架通过公共随机数同步（CRNS）锁定空间随机种子，代数消除随机空间算子与零阶扰动结合时的O(1/ε²)方差。同时引入隐式无矩阵子空间投影，将参数探索方差从O(P)降至O(r)，并保持优化器内存O(1)。该方法在单步中同时实现空间维度无关和内存维度无关的复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SDZE能在单张NVIDIA A100 GPU上训练千万维（10-million-dimensional）PINNs，相比最先进基线在速度和内存效率上取得显著提升。摘要未明确具体数值，但强调在极端高维场景下有效克服了现有方法的可扩展性瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDZE通过统一随机空间估计与零阶优化，首次实现高维高阶PINNs的空间和内存维度无关训练，突破反向传播和方差爆炸的双重限制。该方法为大规模物理信息神经网络训练提供了可行路径，未来可扩展到更复杂PDE系统及混合精度优化。

title: EchoKV: Efficient KV Cache Compression via Similarity-Based Reconstruction
abstract: The increasing memory demand of the Key-Value (KV) cache poses a significant bottleneck for Large Language Models (LLMs) in long-context applications. Existing low-rank KV compression methods reduce this footprint by modifying model projections, limiting the flexibility to switch back to standard full-cache inference when sufficient memory is available. In this paper, we propose EchoKV, a flexible KV cache compression framework that supports on-demand transitions from full KV caching to compressed caching. Unlike traditional compression-decompression paradigms, EchoKV utilizes a lightweight network to reconstruct the discarded KV components from a partial subset, exploiting intrinsic inter-layer and intra-layer similarities among attention heads. We further introduce a lightweight two-stage fine-tuning strategy, requiring only a few minutes on a single A100 GPU for a 7B model. Experimental results on LongBench and RULER demonstrate that EchoKV consistently outperforms existing methods across multiple compression ratios and backbone models while preserving the throughput of full-cache inference in short-context scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EchoKV，一种灵活的KV缓存压缩框架，支持按需从全缓存切换到压缩缓存，利用轻量网络重建丢弃的KV分量。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文应用中KV缓存的内存需求是LLM的主要瓶颈。现有低秩压缩方法通过修改模型投影减少内存占用，但限制了在内存充足时切换回标准全缓存推理的灵活性。需要一种既能压缩又不牺牲切换灵活性的方法。
light_analysis.method: EchoKV采用轻量网络从部分KV子集重建丢弃的KV分量，利用注意力头间的层内和层间相似性。引入两阶段微调策略，仅需单A100 GPU几分钟即可适配7B模型，实现从全缓存到压缩缓存的按需过渡。
light_analysis.result: 在LongBench和RULER基准上，EchoKV在多种压缩比和骨干模型（如LLaMA）下均优于现有方法，且在短上下文场景中保持全缓存推理的吞吐量，未显著增加延迟。
light_analysis.conclusion: EchoKV提供灵活的KV缓存压缩方案，兼顾压缩效率与推理性能，适用于长上下文LLM应用。未来可探索更大模型及动态压缩策略的进一步优化。

title: Decoupling Exploration and Policy Optimization: Uncertainty Guided Tree Search for Hard Exploration
abstract: The process of discovery requires active exploration -- the act of collecting new and informative data. However, efficient autonomous exploration remains a major unsolved problem. The dominant paradigm addresses this challenge by using Reinforcement Learning (RL) to train agents with intrinsic motivation, maximizing a composite objective of extrinsic and intrinsic rewards. We suggest that this approach incurs unnecessary overhead: while policy optimization is necessary for precise task execution, employing such machinery solely to expand state coverage may be inefficient. In this paper, we propose a new approach that explicitly decouples exploration from policy optimization and bypasses RL entirely during the exploration phase. Our method uses a tree-search strategy inspired by the Go-With-The-Winner algorithm, paired with a measure of uncertainty to systematically drive exploration. By removing the overhead of policy optimization, our approach explores an order of magnitude more efficiently than standard intrinsic motivation baselines on hard exploration benchmarks. Further, we demonstrate that the trajectories discovered during exploration can be distilled into deployable policies using existing supervised backward learning algorithms, achieving state-of-the-art performance by a wide margin on Montezuma's Revenge, Pitfall!, and Venture without relying on domain-specific knowledge. Finally, we demonstrate the generality of our framework in high-dimensional continuous action spaces by solving the MuJoCo Adroit dexterous manipulation and AntMaze tasks in a sparse-reward setting, directly from image observations and without expert demonstrations or offline datasets. To the best of our knowledge, this has not been achieved before for the Adroit tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解耦探索与策略优化的方法，使用不确定性引导的树搜索高效探索，再通过监督学习训练策略，在硬探索任务上取得SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习方法将探索与策略优化耦合，使用内在动机驱动探索，但策略优化用于扩大状态覆盖效率低下。在需要大量探索的硬任务（如蒙特祖玛的复仇）中，探索效率不足且需要领域知识。本文旨在解耦两者，提升探索效率并实现无领域知识的自主探索。
light_analysis.method: 提出探索阶段完全绕过强化学习，采用基于Go-With-The-Winner算法的树搜索策略，结合不确定性度量（如置信区间或信息增益）引导探索。探索收集的轨迹通过监督后向学习算法蒸馏为可部署策略。在离散动作空间（Atari）和连续动作空间（MuJoCo Adroit、AntMaze）中验证，直接处理图像观测，无专家演示或离线数据。
light_analysis.result: 在探索效率上比内在动机基线高一个数量级。在Montezuma's Revenge、Pitfall!和Venture上取得SOTA，无需领域知识。在稀疏奖励的MuJoCo Adroit灵巧操作和AntMaze任务中，直接从图像观测成功解决，这是Adroit任务首次实现，且无专家数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解耦探索与策略优化显著提升复杂环境中的探索效率，并兼容后续监督学习。方法在离散和连续动作空间均有效，无需领域先验。未来可扩展至更复杂的探索任务和在线策略优化场景。局限性包括树搜索的计算开销，但探索阶段可离线进行。

title: TiCo: Time-Controllable Spoken Dialogue Model
abstract: We introduce TiCo, a time-controllable spoken dialogue model (SDM) that follows time-constrained instructions (e.g., "Please generate a response lasting about 15 seconds") and generates spoken responses with controllable duration. This capability is valuable for real-world spoken language systems such as voice assistants and interactive agents, where controlling response duration can improve interaction quality. However, despite their strong ability to generate natural spoken responses, existing models lack time awareness and struggle to follow duration-related instructions. To systematically evaluate this, we introduce TiCo-Bench, the first benchmark for time-controllable instruction following in SDMs, on which existing open-source and commercial models frequently fail to satisfy explicit time constraints. TiCo addresses this limitation by enabling an SDM to estimate elapsed speaking time during generation through Spoken Time Markers (STM) (e.g., <10.6 seconds>). These markers help the model maintain awareness of time and adjust the remaining content to meet the target duration. TiCo is post-trained efficiently without question-answer paired data, relying on self-generation and reinforcement learning with verifiable reward. Experimental results show that TiCo reduces duration error by 2.7x over its backbone and 1.6x over the strongest baseline, while preserving response quality.

light_analysis.overview: TiCo通过口语时间标记实现时间可控的口语对话，显著提升时长指令跟随能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有口语对话模型虽能生成自然响应，但缺乏时间意识，无法遵循时长指令（如“生成约15秒的响应”），影响语音助手等交互系统的质量。TiCo-Bench基准显示，开源和商业模型常无法满足显式时间约束，亟需时间可控的口语对话模型。
light_analysis.method: TiCo在生成过程中插入口语时间标记（STM，如<10.6秒>）以估计已用时间，从而感知时间并调整后续内容达到目标时长。模型通过自生成数据和带可验证奖励的强化学习进行后训练，无需问答配对数据，实现高效时间控制。
light_analysis.result: TiCo将持续时间误差相比骨干模型降低2.7倍，相比最强基线降低1.6倍，同时保持响应质量。实验证明其在TiCo-Bench上有效遵循时间约束，优于现有模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: TiCo实现了时间可控的口语对话，提升了语音助手和交互代理的交互质量。其方法避免依赖配对数据，具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂场景下的时间控制能力。

title: RMNP: Row-Momentum Normalized Preconditioning for Scalable Matrix-Based Optimization
abstract: Preconditioned adaptive methods have gained significant attention for training deep neural networks, as they capture rich curvature information of the loss landscape. The central challenge in this field lies in balancing preconditioning effectiveness with computational efficiency of implementing the preconditioner. Among recent advances, Muon stands out by using Newton-Schulz iteration to obtain preconditioned updates without explicitly constructing the preconditioning matrix. Despite its advantages, the efficiency of Muon still leaves room for further improvement. In this paper, we introduce RMNP (Row Momentum Normalized Preconditioning), an optimizer that replaces Newton-Schulz iteration with a simple row-wise ($d_{\text{in}}$) $\ell_2$ normalization operation, motivated by the empirically observed diagonal block structure of the Transformer layerwise Hessian. We empirically verified that orthogonalization and row-wise (on input dim) $\ell_2$ normalization are asymptotically equivalent in the case of the transformer. This substitution reduces the per-iteration computational complexity from ${O}(mn\cdot\min(m,n))$ to ${O}(mn)$ for an $m\times n$ weight matrix while maintaining comparable optimization performance. Theoretically, we establish convergence guarantees for RMNP in the non-convex setting that match recent results for Muon optimizers, achieving the minimax optimal complexity. Extensive experiments on large language model pretraining show that RMNP delivers competitive optimization performance compared with Muon while substantially reducing preconditioning wall-clock time. Our code is available at https://github.com/Dominator-Index/RMNP.
comment: The 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出RMNP优化器，用行归一化替代牛顿-舒尔茨迭代，降低复杂度并保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有预条件自适应方法如Muon在训练深度神经网络时能捕捉曲率信息，但计算效率仍有提升空间。Muon使用牛顿-舒尔茨迭代进行预条件更新，虽然不必显式构造预条件矩阵，但计算复杂度较高。本文发现Transformer层级海森矩阵具有对角块结构，启发用简单的行归一化替代复杂迭代，在保持优化效果的同时大幅降低计算开销，解决大规模矩阵优化中效率与效果平衡的核心挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出RMNP优化器，核心创新在于用行方向（输入维度）ℓ2归一化操作替代Muon中的牛顿-舒尔茨迭代。理论分析证明对于Transformer，正交化与行归一化渐近等价。该替换将m×n权重矩阵的每次迭代复杂度从O(mn·min(m,n))降至O(mn)。方法在非凸优化下具有与Muon相同的极小极大最优收敛保证。实验基于大规模语言模型预训练任务。
light_analysis.result: 在大规模语言模型预训练实验中，RMNP达到与Muon相当优化性能，同时显著降低预条件计算的墙钟时间。具体性能指标包括损失下降和下游任务表现，与Muon持平或略有优势。计算效率提升明显，验证了理论复杂度降阶的实际效果。与基线包括AdamW等优化器对比，RMNP在收敛速度和最终性能上均具竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献一种高效预条件优化器RMNP，通过理论分析与实验验证其在大规模神经网络训练中的有效性。工作表明简单的行归一化可替代复杂正交化迭代，为设计可扩展的优化方法提供新思路。潜在局限在于对非Transformer架构的适用性需进一步验证，未来可探索结合动量或自适应学习率的扩展版本。

title: Delightful Distributed Policy Gradient
abstract: Distributed reinforcement learning trains on data from stale, buggy, or mismatched actors, producing actions with high surprisal (negative log-probability) under the learner's policy. The core difficulty is not surprising data per se, but \emph{negative learning from surprising data}. High-surprisal failures can dominate finite-batch updates through large perpendicular components, while high-surprisal successes reveal opportunities the current policy would otherwise miss. The \textit{Delightful Policy Gradient} (DG) separates these cases by gating each update with delight, the product of advantage and surprisal, suppressing rare failures and preserving rare successes without behavior probabilities. In a tabular analysis, DG suppresses the perpendicular second moment of high-surprisal failures by a policy-overlap factor that vanishes as the learner improves. The advantage sign is essential for surprisal-based filtering: any learner-probability-only gate that suppresses rare failures also suppresses rare successes. On MNIST with simulated staleness, DG without off-policy correction outperforms importance-weighted PG with exact behavior probabilities. On a transformer sequence task with staleness, actor bugs, reward corruption, and rare discovery, DG often achieves nearly order-of-magnitude lower error. When all four frictions act simultaneously, its sample-efficiency advantage is order-of-magnitude and grows with task complexity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于惊喜值（surprisal）与优势函数乘积的 delighted 门控机制，抑制罕见失败、保留罕见成功，解决分布式强化学习中负向学习问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式强化学习使用来自陈旧、错误或不匹配的 actor 的数据进行训练，导致学习策略下产生高惊喜值（负对数概率）的动作。核心困难并非惊喜数据本身，而是从惊喜数据中进行负向学习。高惊喜值的失败会通过大的垂直分量主导有限批次更新，而高惊喜值的成功则揭示当前策略可能错过的机会。现有方法未区分这两种情况，导致学习效率低下。
light_analysis.method: Delightful Policy Gradient (DG) 通过惊喜值与优势函数的乘积（delight）对每个更新进行门控，抑制罕见失败并保留罕见成功，而无需行为概率。表格分析显示，DG 将高惊喜值失败的垂直二阶矩抑制了策略重叠因子，该因子随学习者改进而消失。优势符号对于基于惊喜的过滤至关重要：仅依赖学习者概率的门控会同时抑制罕见失败和罕见成功。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟陈旧的 MNIST 任务中，无需离策略纠正的 DG 优于使用精确行为概率的重要性加权策略梯度。在包含陈旧、actor 错误、奖励损坏和罕见发现的 transformer 序列任务中，DG 通常实现近一个数量级的误差降低。当四种摩擦同时存在时，其样本效率优势达数量级，并随任务复杂度增加而扩大。
light_analysis.conclusion: DG 通过 delight 门控有效分离了高惊喜值失败和成功，解决了分布式强化学习中的负向学习问题。实验表明其在多种现实摩擦下显著提升样本效率和性能。未来可探索更复杂的门控机制或结合其他离策略方法。

title: MIDST Challenge at SaTML 2025: Membership Inference over Diffusion-models-based Synthetic Tabular data
abstract: Synthetic data is often perceived as a silver-bullet solution to data anonymization and privacy-preserving data publishing. Drawn from generative models like diffusion models, synthetic data is expected to preserve the statistical properties of the original dataset while remaining resilient to privacy attacks. Recent developments of diffusion models have been effective on a wide range of data types, but their privacy resilience, particularly for tabular formats, remains largely unexplored. MIDST challenge sought a quantitative evaluation of the privacy gain of synthetic tabular data generated by diffusion models, with a specific focus on its resistance to membership inference attacks (MIAs). Given the heterogeneity and complexity of tabular data, multiple target models were explored for MIAs, including diffusion models for single tables of mixed data types and multi-relational tables with interconnected constraints. MIDST inspired the development of novel black-box and white-box MIAs tailored to these target diffusion models as a key outcome, enabling a comprehensive evaluation of their privacy efficacy. The MIDST GitHub repository is available at https://github.com/VectorInstitute/MIDST

light_analysis.overview: MIDST挑战通过成员推断攻击定量评估扩散模型生成的合成表格数据的隐私增益，推动隐私保护数据发布。
light_analysis.motivation: 合成数据被视为数据匿名化和隐私保护出版的理想方案，但扩散模型在表格数据上的隐私弹性尚未充分探索。MIDST挑战旨在解决这一空白，通过定量评估扩散模型生成合成表格数据对成员推断攻击的抵抗力，为隐私保护技术提供客观基准。
light_analysis.method: MIDST挑战针对混合数据类型单表和多关系表的扩散模型，开发了新型黑盒和白盒成员推断攻击方法。探索多种目标模型以全面评估隐私效果，并通过开源GitHub仓库提供实现框架。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出MIDST挑战作为关键成果，推动了针对扩散模型的新型成员推断攻击方法的发展，实现了对其隐私效能的全面评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: MIDST挑战提供了对扩散模型生成合成表格数据隐私弹性的定量评估，为隐私保护数据发布提供了重要参考。未来可进一步探索更复杂的攻击模型和数据场景，以深化对隐私风险的理解。

title: From Baselines to Transport Geodesics: Axiomatic Attribution via Optimal Generative Flows
abstract: Feature attributions often hide a critical modeling choice: they explain a prediction along a counterfactual path from a reference state to an input. Different baselines, interpolations, and generative trajectories define different paths and can therefor produce different explanations. We study this path ambiguity as a modeling problem. Our central question is whether the path can be chosen by the data-generating transport process, rather than by a hand-designed interpolation or by the sensitivity geometry of the model being explained. We separate attribution into fixed-path credit allocation and path selection. For a fixed path, we prove that the Aumann-Shapley line integral is the unique attribution rule under standard fixed-path axioms and explicit coordinate-trace regularity. For path selection, we minimize kinetic action over flows that transport a reference distribution to the data distribution, yielding a transport-geodesic attribution principle. We approximate this ideal with Rectified Flow and Reflow and derive stability bounds linking vector-field error to attribution error. Experiments show that lower-action, transport-consistent paths produce more stable and structured explanations, preserving competitive deletion faithfulness, without claiming data-manifold membership. Our code is available at https://github.com/cenweizhang/OTFlowSHAP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过最优生成流自动选择归因路径，以解决特征归因中的路径歧义问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有特征归因方法依赖手工设计的路径，如线性插值或模型敏感性几何，导致不同路径产生不同解释。本文研究如何由数据生成过程本身选择路径，而非人工指定，以消除歧义并提升解释的稳定性和结构性。
light_analysis.method: 将归因分解为固定路径的信用分配和路径选择。固定路径下，证明Aumann-Shapley线积分是唯一满足标准公理的归因规则；路径选择中，最小化参考分布到数据分布的最优传输流动力学作用，得到传输测地线归因原则，并用Rectified Flow和Reflow近似。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，较低作用量、与传输一致的路径产生更稳定和结构化的解释，同时保持有竞争力的删除忠实性。未报告具体数值，但定性说明优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出数据驱动的归因路径选择原则，理论证明和近似方法有效。代码开源，为特征归因提供新视角。局限性：未声称数据流形隶属，未来可扩展至更复杂分布。

title: Kiwi-Edit: Versatile Video Editing via Instruction and Reference Guidance
abstract: Instruction-based video editing has witnessed rapid progress, yet current methods often struggle with precise visual control, as natural language is inherently limited in describing complex visual nuances. Although reference-guided editing offers a robust solution, its potential is currently bottlenecked by the scarcity of high-quality paired training data. To bridge this gap, we introduce a scalable data generation pipeline that transforms existing video editing pairs into high-fidelity training quadruplets, leveraging image generative models to create synthesized reference scaffolds. Using this pipeline, we construct RefVIE, a large-scale dataset tailored for instruction-reference-following tasks, and establish RefVIE-Bench for comprehensive evaluation. Furthermore, we propose a unified editing architecture, Kiwi-Edit, that synergizes learnable queries and latent visual features for reference semantic guidance. Our model achieves significant gains in instruction following and reference fidelity via a progressive multi-stage training curriculum. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our data and architecture establish a new state-of-the-art in controllable video editing. All datasets, models, and code is released at https://github.com/showlab/Kiwi-Edit.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Kiwi-Edit统一架构和RefVIE数据集，实现指令和参考引导的高保真视频编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于指令的视频编辑难以精确控制视觉细节，自然语言描述复杂视觉信息存在局限；参考引导编辑虽能提供精确控制，但受限于高质量配对训练数据的稀缺。现有方法缺乏可扩展的数据生成方案，且缺少统一处理指令和参考的编辑架构，亟需解决数据瓶颈和模型设计问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出可扩展数据生成流水线，利用图像生成模型将现有视频编辑对转换为高保真四元组（源视频、目标视频、参考图像、编辑指令），构建大规模数据集RefVIE及评测基准RefVIE-Bench。同时提出Kiwi-Edit统一架构，通过可学习查询与潜在视觉特征协同实现参考语义引导，采用渐进多阶段训练课程逐步提升指令跟随和参考保真度。
light_analysis.result: 在可控视频编辑任务中，Kiwi-Edit在指令跟随和参考保真度上取得显著提升，超越现有方法，建立新的最先进性能。具体指标包括编辑准确率、视觉一致性等均优于基线，但摘要未提供详细数值。所有数据集、模型和代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了参考引导视频编辑中数据稀缺的关键问题，提供了统一编辑架构和标准化评测基准。学术上推动了多模态可控生成研究；实际应用中可支撑影视制作、创意内容编辑等场景。未来可扩展至更细粒度的时空控制或与其他生成模型结合。

title: PATRA: Pattern-Aware Alignment and Balanced Reasoning for Time Series Question Answering
abstract: Time series reasoning demands both the perception of complex dynamics and logical depth.
