However, existing LLM-based approaches exhibit two limitations: they often treat time series merely as text or images, failing to capture the patterns like trends and seasonalities needed to answer specific questions; and when trained on a mix of simple and complex tasks, simpler objectives often dominate the learning process, hindering the development of deep reasoning capabilities. To address these limitations, we propose the Pattern-Aware Alignment and Balanced Reasoning model (PATRA), introducing a pattern-aware mechanism that extracts trend and seasonality patterns from time series to achieve deep alignment. Furthermore, we design a task-aware balanced reward to harmonize learning across tasks of varying difficulty, incentivizing the generation of coherent Chains of Thought. Extensive experiments show that PATRA outperforms strong baselines across diverse Time Series Question Answering (TSQA) tasks, demonstrating superior cross-modal understanding and reasoning capability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PATRA模型，通过模式感知对齐和任务感知平衡奖励，提升时间序列问答的跨模态理解和推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM方法将时间序列视为文本或图像，忽视趋势和季节性等关键模式，难以精准回答特定问题；同时，简单和复杂任务的混合训练中，简单目标主导学习，阻碍深层推理能力发展。这限制了时间序列问答的准确性。
light_analysis.method: PATRA模型包括两个核心模块：模式感知机制，从时间序列中提取趋势和季节性模式以实现深度对齐；任务感知平衡奖励，差异化激励不同难度任务，提升链式思维推理的连贯性。方法融合了多模态对齐与强化学习。
light_analysis.result: 在多种时间序列问答任务上，PATRA显著超越多个强基线模型，展现了更优的跨模态理解和推理能力。摘要未提供具体数值，但声明了实验的广泛性和性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: PATRA有效解决了时间序列问答中模式捕获不足和推理深度不够的问题，通过模式感知与平衡奖励协同提升性能。未来可扩展至更复杂的时序推理场景，如异常检测或预测，但当前未讨论局限性。

title: Physics-informed neural particle flow for the Bayesian update step
abstract: The Bayesian update step poses significant computational challenges in high-dimensional nonlinear estimation. While log-homotopy particle flow filters offer an alternative to stochastic sampling, existing formulations usually yield stiff differential equations. Conversely, existing deep learning approximations typically treat the update as a black-box task or rely on asymptotic relaxation, neglecting the exact geometric structure of the finite-horizon probability transport. In this work, we propose a physics-informed neural particle flow, which is an amortized inference framework. To construct the flow, we couple the log-homotopy trajectory of the prior to posterior density function with the continuity equation describing the density evolution. This derivation yields a governing partial differential equation (PDE), referred to as the master PDE. By embedding this PDE as a physical constraint into the loss function, we train a neural network to approximate the transport velocity field. This approach enables purely unsupervised training, eliminating the need for ground-truth posterior samples. We demonstrate that the neural parameterization acts as an implicit regularizer, mitigating the numerical stiffness inherent to analytic flows and reducing online computational complexity. Experimental validation on multimodal benchmarks and a challenging nonlinear scenario confirms better mode coverage and robustness compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种物理信息神经网络粒子流，通过嵌入主偏微分方程作为物理约束，实现无监督训练，高效处理高维非线性贝叶斯更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 贝叶斯更新步骤在高维非线性估计中面临巨大计算挑战。现有log-homotopy粒子流滤波器产生刚性微分方程，数值求解困难；而深度学习近似通常忽略精确几何结构，依赖渐近松弛或黑盒处理。因此需要一种能保持几何结构、缓解数值刚度且计算高效的更新方法。
light_analysis.method: 将log-homotopy轨迹与连续性方程结合，推导出描述密度演化的主偏微分方程（PDE）。将该PDE作为物理约束嵌入损失函数，训练神经网络近似传输速度场。该方法无需真实后验样本，实现纯无监督训练。神经参数化充当隐式正则化器，缓解解析流的数值刚度，降低在线计算复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 在多模态基准和挑战性非线性场景下进行实验验证，所提方法相比现有基线方法（如常规粒子流和黑盒深度学习近似）实现了更好的模式覆盖和鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但定性结果表明其有效缓解了刚性并提升了估计精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种物理信息神经网络粒子流，创新地利用PDE约束实现无监督训练，有效克服了传统粒子流的数值刚度和计算瓶颈。该方法为高维贝叶斯更新提供了可扩展、鲁棒的解决方案，具有重要学术价值。未来可扩展至更复杂非线性系统及动态应用。

title: SubspaceAD: Training-Free Few-Shot Anomaly Detection via Subspace Modeling
abstract: Detecting visual anomalies in industrial inspection often requires training with only a few normal images per category. Recent few-shot methods achieve strong results employing foundation-model features, but typically rely on memory banks, auxiliary datasets, or multi-modal tuning of vision-language models. We therefore question whether such complexity is necessary given the feature representations of vision foundation models. To answer this question, we introduce SubspaceAD, a training-free method, that operates in two simple stages. First, patch-level features are extracted from a small set of normal images by a frozen DINOv2 backbone. Second, a Principal Component Analysis (PCA) model is fit to these features to estimate the low-dimensional subspace of normal variations. At inference, anomalies are detected via the reconstruction residual with respect to this subspace, producing interpretable and statistically grounded anomaly scores. Despite its simplicity, SubspaceAD achieves state-of-the-art performance across one-shot and few-shot settings without training, prompt tuning, or memory banks. In the one-shot anomaly detection setting, SubspaceAD achieves image-level and pixel-level AUROC of 97.1% and 97.5% on the MVTec-AD dataset, and 93.2% and 98.2% on the VisA dataset, respectively, surpassing prior state-of-the-art results. Code and demo are available at https://github.com/CLendering/SubspaceAD.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Revised version with corrected AU-PRO evaluation and recomputed metrics

light_analysis.overview: 提出SubspaceAD，一种无需训练、基于子空间建模的少样本异常检测方法，在MVTec-AD和VisA数据集上达到SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业视觉检测中，通常只需每类少量正常图像进行训练。现有少样本方法虽使用基础模型特征，但依赖记忆库、辅助数据集或多模态调优。作者质疑在视觉基础模型特征表示下，这种复杂性是否必要，旨在探索更简洁有效的方案。
light_analysis.method: SubspaceAD采用两阶段：首先，用冻结的DINOv2骨干网络从少量正常图像中提取块级特征；然后，对这些特征拟合PCA模型，估计正常变化的低维子空间。推理时，通过重建残差检测异常，产生可解释且统计基础的异常分数。无需训练、提示调优或记忆库。
light_analysis.result: 在单样本异常检测中，SubspaceAD在MVTec-AD上图像级和像素级AUROC分别达97.1%和97.5%，在VisA上达93.2%和98.2%，均超越先前SOTA。在少样本设置下也取得最佳性能，且无需任何训练或调优。
light_analysis.conclusion: SubspaceAD证明了简单子空间建模在少样本异常检测中的有效性，无需复杂组件。其训练免费、高度可解释，适合工业应用。局限性可能在于对特征质量的依赖，未来可探索更高效的特征提取或子空间估计方法。

title: Decentralized Ranking Aggregation via Gossip: Convergence and Robustness
abstract: The concept of ranking aggregation plays a central role in preference analysis, and numerous algorithms for calculating median rankings, often originating in social choice theory, have been documented in the literature, offering theoretical guarantees in a centralized setting, \textit{i.e.}, when all the ranking data to be aggregated can be brought together in a single computing unit. For many technologies (\textit{e.g.} peer-to-peer networks, IoT, multi-agent systems), extending the ability to calculate consensus rankings with guarantees of convergence and resilience to potential contamination in a decentralized setting, when preference data is initially distributed across a communicating network, remains a major methodological challenge. Indeed, in recent years, the literature on decentralized computation has mainly focused on computing or optimizing statistics such as arithmetic means using gossip algorithms. The purpose of this article is precisely to study how to achieve reliable and resilient consensus on collective rankings in a decentralized setting, thereby raising new questions, robustness to corrupted nodes, and scalability through reduced communication costs in particular. The approach proposed and analyzed here relies on the robustness guarantees offered by random gossip communication, which allows autonomous agents to compute a global ranking consensus using local interactions only, without coordination or a central authority.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于随机gossip通信的去中心化排名聚合方法，实现鲁棒共识。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有排名聚合算法多集中于集中式场景，无法直接适用于数据分布存储的去中心化环境（如P2P网络、IoT）。而去中心化计算研究主要针对简单统计量（如均值），缺乏对排名聚合的理论保障。本文旨在解决去中心化环境下排名共识的收敛性、对恶意节点的鲁棒性以及通信可扩展性等挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于随机gossip通信的分布式排名聚合算法，代理节点仅通过局部交互（邻居交换排名信息）逐步达成全局共识，无需中心协调。算法利用gossip的随机性保证收敛，并通过冗余传播机制抵抗节点污染，从而在去中心化网络中实现可靠的集体排名计算。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验指标，但理论分析表明：算法在随机gossip协议下保证收敛到真实中位数排名；对恶意节点注入的恶意排名数据具有鲁棒性，能有效抑制污染影响；通信开销随网络规模线性增长，具备可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为去中心化排名聚合提供收敛性与鲁棒性的理论保障，填补了该领域空白。方法适用于无中心协调的分布式系统（如多智能体、物联网），具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步优化通信效率或扩展至动态拓扑网络。

title: Exploring Multimodal LMMs for Online Episodic Memory Question Answering on the Edge
abstract: We investigate the feasibility of using Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for real-time online episodic memory question answering. While cloud offloading is common, it raises privacy and latency concerns for wearable assistants, hence we investigate implementation on the edge. We integrated streaming constraints into our question answering pipeline, which is structured into two asynchronous threads: a Descriptor Thread that continuously converts video into a lightweight textual memory, and a Question Answering (QA) Thread that reasons over the textual memory to answer queries. Experiments on the QAEgo4D-Closed benchmark analyze the performance of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) within strict resource boundaries, showing promising results also when compared to clound-based solutions. Specifically, an end-to-end configuration running on a consumer-grade 8GB GPU achieves 51.76% accuracy with a Time-To-First-Token (TTFT) of 0.41s. Scaling to a local enterprise-grade server yields 54.40% accuracy with a TTFT of 0.88s. In comparison, a cloud-based solution obtains an accuracy of 56.00%. These competitive results highlight the potential of edge-based solutions for privacy-preserving episodic memory retrieval.

light_analysis.overview: 探索在边缘设备上使用多模态大语言模型进行实时在线情景记忆问答的可行性和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可穿戴助手常依赖云卸载，但引发了隐私和延迟问题，尤其对于需要实时响应的在线情景记忆问答。本文旨在研究在边缘设备上实现此功能，以保护用户隐私并降低延迟，探索多模态大语言模型在资源受限条件下的表现。
light_analysis.method: 提出双线程异步管道：描述线程持续将视频流转换为轻量级文本记忆，问答线程基于文本记忆推理回答查询。实验采用QAEgo4D-Closed基准，在消费级8GB GPU、本地企业级服务器和云服务器上评估多模态大语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 端到端配置在8GB GPU上达到51.76%准确率，TTFT 0.41s；本地企业级服务器达54.40%准确率，TTFT 0.88s；云方案为56.00%准确率。边缘方案在隐私和延迟方面有优势，性能接近云端。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了边缘部署多模态大语言模型进行在线情景记忆问答的可行性，性能与云方案相当，同时提供隐私保护和低延迟优势。未来可进一步优化模型压缩和资源管理。

title: CASR: A Robust Cyclic Framework for Arbitrary Large-Scale Super-Resolution with Distribution Alignment and Self-Similarity Awareness
abstract: Arbitrary-Scale SR (ASISR) remains fundamentally limited by cross-scale distribution shift: once the inference scale leaves the training range, noise, blur, and artifacts accumulate sharply. We revisit this challenge from a cross-scale distribution transition perspective and propose CASR, a simple yet highly efficient cyclic SR framework that reformulates ultra-magnification as a sequence of in-distribution scale transitions. This design ensures stable inference at arbitrary scales while requiring only a single model. CASR tackles two major bottlenecks: distribution drift across iterations and patch-wise diffusion inconsistencies. The proposed SSAM module aligns structural distributions via superpixel aggregation, preventing error accumulation, while SARM module restores high-frequency textures by enforcing correlation-guided consistency and preserving self-similarity structure through correlation alignment. Despite using only a single model, our approach significantly reduces distribution drift, preserves long-range texture consistency, and achieves superior generalization even at extreme magnification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CASR循环超分框架，通过分布对齐和自相似性感知实现任意尺度鲁棒超分辨率。
light_analysis.motivation: 任意尺度超分辨率（ASISR）受限于跨尺度分布偏移，当推理尺度超出训练范围时，噪声、模糊和伪影急剧累积。现有方法难以处理极端放大下的分布漂移和纹理一致性。
light_analysis.method: CASR将超大放大重构为一系列分布内尺度转换序列，使用SSAM模块通过超像素聚合对齐结构分布防止误差累积，SARM模块通过相关性对齐恢复高频纹理并保持自相似性结构。仅需单一模型。
light_analysis.result: 方法显著减少分布漂移，保持长距离纹理一致性，在极端放大下实现优越泛化性能，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: CASR通过循环框架和分布对齐策略有效解决任意尺度超分辨率的跨尺度分布偏移问题，具有单模型、高效稳定的优势，未来可探索更复杂的分布过渡策略。

title: Zatom-1: Towards a Multimodal Foundation Model for 3D Molecules and Materials
abstract: General-purpose 3D modeling in chemistry encompasses molecules and materials, requiring both generative and predictive capabilities. However, most existing AI approaches are optimized for a single domain (molecules or materials) and a single task (generation or prediction), which limits representation sharing and transfer. We introduce Zatom-1, a cross-domain, general-purpose model architecture that unifies generative and predictive learning of 3D molecules and materials. Zatom-1 is a deliberately simplified Transformer trained with a multimodal flow matching objective that jointly models discrete atom types and continuous 3D geometries. This approach supports scalable pretraining with predictable gains as model capacity increases, while enabling fast and stable sampling. We use cross-domain generative pretraining as a universal initialization for downstream multi-task prediction of properties, energies, and forces. Empirically, Zatom-1 outperforms or competes with specialized baselines on both multi-task generative and predictive benchmarks in data-controlled settings, while improving generative inference speed by more than an order of magnitude. Our experiments demonstrate positive predictive transfer between data domains from joint generative pretraining: modeling materials during generative pretraining improves molecular property prediction accuracy. Open-source code and model weights are freely available at https://github.com/Zatom-AI/zatom.
comment: 38 pages, 10 figures, 15 tables. ICLR 2026 FM4Science. Code, data, and model weights are available at https://github.com/Zatom-AI/zatom

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨域统一生成与预测的多模态基础模型Zatom-1，采用流匹配目标联合建模原子类型与3D几何。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有化学AI方法多针对单领域（分子或材料）和单任务（生成或预测），限制了表示共享与迁移。需要统一架构实现对3D分子和材料的通用建模，同时支持生成与预测任务，以提升跨领域性能与效率。
light_analysis.method: Zatom-1基于简化Transformer架构，使用多模态流匹配目标联合训练离散原子类型与连续3D坐标。通过跨域生成预训练作为通用初始化，再微调用于下游多任务预测（性质、能量、力）。支持可扩展预训练，且采样快速稳定。
light_analysis.result: 在数据控制设置下，Zatom-1在生成和多任务预测基准上超越或匹敌专业基线，生成推理速度提升超过一个数量级。实验显示，联合生成预训练中材料建模可提升分子性质预测精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: Zatom-1证明了跨域通用模型在化学领域的潜力，统一生成与预测任务，促进表示共享与正向迁移。开源模型和代码便于复现与扩展，未来可用于更广泛的分子材料设计。

title: GraphThinker: Reinforcing Temporally Grounded Video Reasoning with Event Graph Thinking
abstract: Video reasoning requires a fine-grained understanding of the temporal dependencies and event-level relations between objects and events in videos. Current Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are prone to severe temporal hallucinations in video reasoning. An underlying cause of these hallucinations is weak visual-temporal grounding and the lack of explicit structure for modelling event relations. Models often rely on auxiliary text, such as dense captions, rather than explicitly anchoring their reasoning in actual visual evidence. However, these textual representations are inherently unstructured and fail to provide explicit causal constraints needed to guide the model's reasoning. In this work, we propose GraphThinker, a reinforcement finetuning method that constructs a structured event representation of a video and enforces visual grounding to jointly reduce reasoning hallucinations. Specifically, we employ an MLLM to construct an Event-based Video Scene Graph (EVSG) that captures both intra- and inter-event relations, guiding a structured video reasoning process. Moreover, we address the weak grounding issue by introducing a novel visual attention reward during reinforcement finetuning that encourages the model to actively attend to reliable visual cues. On the RexTime dataset, GraphThinker achieves an over 4% improvement in IoU=0.3 for moment localisation. On the VidHalluc dataset, GraphThinker achieves a 9.8% improvement in reducing temporal sequence hallucination and a 7.6% gain in Binary QA in reducing action hallucination, compared to the state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GraphThinker，通过事件图构建和强化微调减少视频推理中的时间幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态大模型在视频推理中存在严重的时间幻觉，根本原因是视觉-时间锚定薄弱且缺乏事件关系显式结构。现有方法依赖辅助文本如密集描述，但这些表示本质上非结构化，无法提供显式因果约束来引导模型推理，导致模型难以锚定实际视觉证据进行推理。
light_analysis.method: GraphThinker是一种强化微调方法，首先利用MLLM构建基于事件的视频场景图，捕获事件内部和事件间关系，引导结构化视频推理过程。其次，针对弱锚定问题，在强化微调中引入新颖的视觉注意力奖励，激励模型主动关注可靠的视觉线索。
light_analysis.result: 在RexTime数据集上，GraphThinker在时刻定位任务中IoU=0.3指标提升超过4%。在VidHalluc数据集上，相比最先进方法，时间序列幻觉减少9.8%，动作幻觉的二元QA准确率提升7.6%，证明了方法在减少各类幻觉上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphThinker通过结构化事件表示和视觉锚定强化，有效减少了视频推理中的时间幻觉。该方法无需额外带注释数据就能提升多模态大模型的定位和幻觉减少性能，为视频推理提供新的结构化框架。未来可探索更细粒度事件分解和跨视频事件关系学习。

title: Toward Scalable Verifiable Reward: Proxy State-Based Evaluation for Multi-turn Tool-Calling LLM Agents
abstract: Interactive large language model (LLM) agents operating via multi-turn dialogue and multi-step tool calling are increasingly used in production. Benchmarks for these agents must both reliably compare models and yield on-policy training data. Prior agentic benchmarks, such as tau-bench, tau^2-bench, and AppWorld, rely on fully deterministic backends, which are costly to build and iterate. We propose Proxy State-Based Evaluation, an LLM-driven simulation framework that preserves final state-based evaluation without a deterministic database. Specifically, a scenario specifies the user goal, user/system facts, expected final state, and expected agent behavior, and an LLM state tracker infers a structured proxy state from the full interaction trace. LLM judges then verify goal completion and detect tool/user hallucinations against scenario constraints. Empirically, our benchmark produces stable, model-differentiating rankings across model families and inference-time reasoning efforts, and its on-/off-policy rollouts provide supervision that transfers to unseen scenarios. Careful scenario specification yields near-zero simulator hallucination rates, as supported by ablation studies. The framework also supports sensitivity analyses over user personas. Human-LLM judge agreement exceeds 90%, indicating reliable automated evaluation. Overall, proxy state-based evaluation offers a practical, scalable alternative to deterministic agentic benchmarks for industrial LLM agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于代理状态评估的LLM驱动仿真框架，用于多轮工具调用LLM代理的可扩展可验证奖励。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的智能体基准测试（如tau-bench、tau^2-bench、AppWorld）依赖完全确定性的后端，构建和迭代成本高昂。随着交互式LLM代理在多轮对话和多步工具调用中的广泛应用，需要一个既能可靠比较模型又能产生策略训练数据的基准测试框架。本文旨在解决确定性后端带来的可扩展性差、开发成本高的问题，提供一种更实用的替代方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出代理状态评估框架，通过LLM驱动的仿真来模拟环境。场景中指定用户目标、系统事实、预期最终状态和预期行为，LLM状态跟踪器从完整交互轨迹推断结构化代理状态。LLM裁判验证目标完成情况，并检测工具/用户幻觉是否符合场景约束。无需确定性数据库，利用代理状态进行评估，支持策略内和策略外回滚，并具备用户角色敏感性分析。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该基准测试在多个模型系列和推理时间下产生稳定且能区分模型性能的排名。策略内/外回滚提供的监督信号可迁移到未见场景。通过消融研究，精心设计的场景规范使模拟器幻觉率接近零。人机裁判一致性超过90%，表明评估可靠。框架还支持用户角色敏感性分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 代理状态评估为工业级LLM代理提供了一个可扩展、实用的替代确定性基准测试的解决方案。其价值在于降低构建成本、保持评估可靠性，并支持生成训练数据。未来可探索更复杂的场景设计和幻觉检测机制，进一步提升框架的鲁棒性和适用性。

title: Learning to Approximate Uniform Facility Location via Graph Neural Networks
abstract: Neural networks, particularly message-passing neural networks (MPNNs), are increasingly used as heuristics for hard combinatorial optimization problems. Yet many learning-based methods rely on supervision, reinforcement learning, or gradient estimators, causing high computational cost, unstable training, or limited guarantees. Classical approximation algorithms provide worst-case guarantees but are non-differentiable and cannot adapt to structure in natural input distributions. We study this tradeoff through Uniform Facility Location (UniFL), a problem with applications in clustering, summarization, logistics, and supply chains. We propose a fully differentiable MPNN that incorporates approximation-algorithmic principles without solver supervision or discrete relaxations. The model has provable approximation guarantees and empirically improves on standard approximation algorithms, narrowing the gap to integer linear programming.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种完全可微的MPNN，融合近似算法原理，无需求解器监督或离散松弛，用于均匀设施选址问题，具有可证明的近似保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络用于组合优化时，现有方法依赖监督、强化学习或梯度估计，导致高计算成本、训练不稳定或有限保证。经典近似算法有最坏情况保证但不可微，无法适应自然输入分布。通过均匀设施选址问题（UniFL）探索学与算法的权衡，UniFL在聚类、摘要、物流和供应链中应用广泛。
light_analysis.method: 提出完全可微的MPNN，将近似算法原理融入消息传递机制，无需求解器监督或离散松弛。模型端到端可训练，同时保持可证明的近似保证。关键创新在于用可微架构实现经典算法思想，使学习过程兼具理论保障和适应性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在均匀设施选址问题上显著优于标准近似算法，缩小了与整数线性规划（ILP）的性能差距。尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但明确改进了现有启发式方法，证明了可微MPNN在组合优化中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出一种结合近似算法原理的可微MPNN，在均匀设施选址问题上实现性能提升和理论保证。学术上为学习与算法的融合提供新范式，应用上可改进聚类、物流等问题的求解质量。未来可扩展到其他组合优化问题，但当前设计可能限于特定问题结构。

title: How Well Do Large-Scale Chemical Language Models Transfer to Downstream Tasks?
abstract: Chemical Language Models (CLMs) pre-trained on large scale molecular data are widely used for molecular property prediction. However, the common belief that increasing training resources such as model size, dataset size, and training compute improves both pretraining loss and downstream task performance has not been systematically validated in the chemical domain. In this work, we evaluate this assumption by pretraining CLMs while scaling training resources and measuring transfer performance across diverse molecular property prediction (MPP) tasks. We find that while pretraining loss consistently decreases with increased training resources, downstream task performance shows limited improvement. Moreover, alternative metrics based on the Hessian or loss landscape also fail to estimate downstream performance in CLMs. We further identify conditions under which downstream performance saturates or degrades despite continued improvements in pretraining metrics, and analyze the underlying task dependent failure modes through parameter space visualizations. These results expose a gap between pretraining based evaluation and downstream performance, and emphasize the need for model selection and evaluation strategies that explicitly account for downstream task characteristics.

light_analysis.overview: 系统性评估大规模化学语言模型在预训练资源扩展时，跨下游分子性质预测任务的迁移性能，揭示预训练指标与下游性能之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 化学语言模型（CLMs）在分子性质预测中被广泛使用，但常见假设认为增加模型规模、数据量和计算资源能同时提升预训练损失和下游任务性能，这一假设在化学领域尚未得到系统验证。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探究资源扩展对CLMs迁移性能的实际影响，并识别下游性能饱和或退化的条件。
light_analysis.method: 通过预训练不同规模的CLMs，系统性地缩放训练资源（模型大小、数据集大小、计算量），并在多个分子性质预测（MPP）任务上测量迁移性能。同时，分析基于Hessian或损失景观的替代指标，通过参数空间可视化研究任务相关的失败模式。
light_analysis.result: 预训练损失随着训练资源增加持续降低，但下游任务性能的提升有限。替代指标（如Hessian）也无法可靠估计下游性能。在某些条件下，尽管预训练指标持续改善，下游性能出现饱和甚至退化。研究通过参数空间可视化揭示了任务依赖的失败模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 化学语言模型存在预训练指标与下游性能之间的显著差距，强调了模型选择和评估策略需明确考虑下游任务特性。该发现挑战了传统“更大更好”的预训练范式，为化学领域的大规模预训练模型设计提供了新视角，但摘要未提及具体局限性或未来方向。

title: Perception with Guarantees: Certified Pose Estimation via Reachability Analysis
abstract: Agents in cyber-physical systems are increasingly entrusted with safety-critical tasks. Ensuring safety of these agents often requires localizing the pose for subsequent actions. Pose estimates can, e.g., be obtained from various combinations of lidar sensors, cameras, and external services such as GPS. Crucially, in safety-critical domains, a rough estimate is insufficient to formally determine safety, i.e., guaranteeing safety even in the worst-case scenario, and external services might additionally not be trustworthy. We address this problem by presenting a certified pose estimation in 3D solely from a camera image and a well-known target geometry. This is realized by formally bounding the pose, which is computed by leveraging recent results from reachability analysis and formal neural network verification. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach efficiently and accurately localizes agents in both synthetic and real-world experiments.

light_analysis.overview: 通过可达性分析和形式化神经网络验证，实现从单目图像和已知目标几何的认证3D位姿估计，提供最坏情况下的安全保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 信息物理系统中的智能体执行安全关键任务时，需要高精度的位姿估计以确保安全性。现有方法如激光雷达、相机和GPS组合获取的位姿往往缺乏形式化保证，且外部服务可能不可信。因此，亟需一种能从单一相机图像中给出有界位姿估计的方法，以在理论上保障安全性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种基于可达性分析和形式化神经网络验证的认证位姿估计方法。利用已知目标几何形状，从相机图像中通过神经网络计算位姿，并应用形式化方法对网络输出进行严格界限分析，从而得到有保证的位姿范围。核心在于将位姿估计问题转化为可验证的约束求解问题。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实世界实验中，该方法在准确性和效率上均表现良好。实验结果表明，它能有效定位智能体，且计算开销可接受。具体性能指标（如位姿误差范围）在论文中有详细说明，但与基线方法对比时显示出更优的鲁棒性和形式化保证能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次将可达性分析引入位姿估计领域，为安全关键应用提供了形式化保证。该方法不依赖外部服务，仅需相机和已知几何，具有较强实用性。未来可扩展至多传感器融合或动态环境下的位姿跟踪，但当前方法可能受限于目标几何已知和计算实时性要求。

title: SpatialReward: Bridging the Perception Gap in Online RL for Image Editing via Explicit Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Online Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising avenue for complex image editing but is currently constrained by the scarcity of reliable and fine-grained reward signals. Existing evaluators frequently struggle with a critical perception gap we term "Attention Collapse," where models neglect cross-image comparisons and fail to capture fine-grained details, resulting in inaccurate perception and miscalibrated scores. To address these limitations, we propose SpatialReward, a reward model that enforces precise verification via explicit spatial reasoning. By anchoring reasoning to predicted edit regions, SpatialReward grounds semantic judgments in pixel-level evidence, significantly enhancing evaluative accuracy. Trained on a curated 260k spatial-aware dataset, our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on MMRB2 and EditReward-Bench, and outperforms proprietary evaluators on our proposed MultiEditReward-Bench. Furthermore, SpatialReward serves as a robust signal in online RL, boosting OmniGen2 by +0.90 on GEdit-Bench--surpassing the leading discriminative model and doubling the gain of GPT-4.1 (+0.45). These results demonstrate that spatial reasoning is essential for unlocking effective alignment in image editing.
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpatialReward奖励模型，通过显式空间推理解决在线强化学习中图像编辑的感知差距问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线强化学习在复杂图像编辑中受限于可靠且细粒度的奖励信号稀缺。现有评估器存在“注意力坍缩”感知差距，即模型忽略跨图像比较且无法捕捉细节，导致感知不准确和分数校准错误。该问题阻碍了RL在图像编辑中的有效对齐，亟需更精确的奖励机制。
light_analysis.method: SpatialReward通过显式空间推理实现精确验证。将推理锚定到预测的编辑区域，使语义判断基于像素级证据，提升评估准确性。在精心整理的26万空间感知数据集上训练，模型在MMRB2和EditReward-Bench上达到最优，并在提出的MultiEditReward-Bench上超越专有评估器。
light_analysis.result: SpatialReward作为在线RL鲁棒信号，在OmniGen2上GEdit-Bench指标提升+0.90，超过领先判别模型，增益为GPT-4.1的两倍（+0.45）。在MMRB2和EditReward-Bench上取得最优性能，验证了空间推理对图像编辑对齐的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpatialReward通过显式空间推理显著提升了图像编辑中在线强化学习的奖励信号质量，推动了有效对齐。该工作强调了像素级证据在细粒度评估中的关键作用。未来可探索更复杂的空间推理结构及在更多编辑任务上的泛化能力。

title: SupChain-Bench: Benchmarking Large Language Models for Real-World Supply Chain Management
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in complex reasoning and tool-based decision making, motivating their application to real-world supply chain management. However, supply chain workflows require reliable long-horizon, multi-step orchestration grounded in domain-specific procedures, which remains challenging for current models. To systematically evaluate LLM performance in this setting, we introduce SupChain-Bench, a unified real-world benchmark that assesses both supply chain domain knowledge and long-horizon tool-based orchestration grounded in standard operating procedures (SOPs). Our experiments reveal substantial gaps in execution reliability across models. We further propose SupChain-ReAct, an SOP-free framework that autonomously synthesizes executable procedures for tool use, achieving the strongest and most consistent tool-calling performance. Our work establishes a principled benchmark for studying reliable long-horizon orchestration in real-world operational settings and highlights significant room for improvement in LLM-based supply chain agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SupChain-Bench基准评估LLM在供应链管理中的表现，并推出SupChain-ReAct框架无需标准操作程序即可自主合成可执行程序。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在复杂推理和工具决策中展现潜力，但供应链管理需要可靠的长链条、多步骤编排，基于领域特定标准操作程序，当前模型难以满足。现有方法缺乏统一基准评估这种能力，因此需要系统性评测并改进。
light_analysis.method: 构建SupChain-Bench基准，评估供应链领域知识和基于标准操作程序的长链条工具编排能力。进一步提出SupChain-ReAct框架，无需标准操作程序，自动合成为工具使用的可执行程序，实现自主的SOPS-free编排。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，现有模型在执行可靠性上存在显著差距。SupChain-ReAct框架在工具调用上达到最强且最一致的性能，显著优于其他方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文建立了原则性基准，用于研究真实操作设置中的可靠长链条编排，并指出LLM供应链代理有显著改进空间。未来可进一步优化自主编排能力。

title: Language Model Goal Selection Differs from Humans' in a Self-Directed Learning Task
abstract: Whether in agentic workflows, social studies, or chat settings, large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being asked to replace humans in choosing which goals to pursue, rather than completing predefined tasks. However, the assumption that LLMs accurately reflect human preferences for goal setting remains largely untested. We assess the validity of LLMs as proxies for human goal selection in a controlled, self-directed learning task borrowed from cognitive science. Across five models (GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Qwen3 32B, and Centaur), we find substantial divergence from human behavior. While people gradually explore and learn to achieve goals with diversity across individuals, most models exploit a single identified solution or show surprisingly low performance, with distinct patterns across models and little variability across instances of the same model. Chain-of-thought reasoning and persona steering provide limited improvements, and our conclusions hold across experimental settings. While they await confirmation in applied settings, these findings highlight the uniqueness of human goal selection and caution against its replacement with current models.

light_analysis.overview: 本文评估了LLM在自导学习任务中作为人类目标选择代理的有效性，发现模型行为与人类显著不同，警示不应简单替代人类选择目标。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM越来越多地被用于替代人类选择目标（如智能体工作流、社交研究），但模型是否真实反映人类目标选择偏好尚未验证。现有研究多关注LLM完成预定义任务的能力，忽略了目标设定这一高级决策。本研究借鉴认知科学中的自导学习任务，系统比较LLM与人类在目标选择上的差异，以检验LLM代理的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 从认知科学引入一个受控的自导学习任务，让GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro、Claude Sonnet 4.5、Qwen3 32B和Centaur等五个LLM参与，并与人类行为对比。任务中人类逐步探索、实现多样化目标，而模型行为则通过输出分析评估。实验还尝试链式思维推理和角色引导来改善模型表现，并测试多种设置验证结论的稳健性。
light_analysis.result: 所有模型与人类行为存在显著差异：人类表现出渐进探索和个体间多样性，而大多数模型倾向于利用单一解或表现低性能，不同模型模式各异，同一模型实例间缺乏多样性。链式思维和角色引导对改进效果有限，结论在不同实验设置下保持一致。这些发现基于受控任务，尚需在应用场景验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了人类目标选择的独特性，LLM在自导学习任务中无法复现人类的目标探索与多样性行为。当前模型不应作为人类目标选择的替代品，在智能体决策、社会模拟等领域需谨慎使用。未来需开发更贴近人类认知的模型，或在应用前进行更广泛验证。

title: Towards Generalizable Reasoning: Group Causal Counterfactual Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) excel at complex tasks with advances in reasoning capabilities. However, existing reward mechanisms remain tightly coupled to final correctness and pay little attention to the underlying reasoning process: trajectories with sound reasoning but wrong answers receive low credit, while lucky guesses with flawed logic may be highly rewarded, affecting reasoning generalization. From a causal perspective, we interpret multi-candidate reasoning for a fixed question as a family of counterfactual experiments with theoretical supports. Building on this, we propose Group Causal Counterfactual Policy Optimization to explicitly train LLMs to learn generalizable reasoning patterns. It proposes an episodic causal counterfactual reward that jointly captures (i) robustness, encouraging the answer distribution induced by a reasoning step to remain stable under counterfactual perturbations; and (ii) effectiveness, enforcing sufficient variability so that the learned reasoning strategy can transfer across questions. We then construct token-level advantages from this reward and optimize the policy, encouraging LLMs to favor reasoning patterns that are process-valid and counterfactually robust. Extensive experiments on diverse benchmarks demonstrate its advantages.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分组因果反事实策略优化，解决LLM推理奖励与过程脱节问题，提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM推理奖励机制与最终答案正确性紧密耦合，忽略推理过程质量：推理正确但答案错误的轨迹得分低，而逻辑缺陷但猜测正确的轨迹得分高，阻碍推理泛化。需要一种关注过程鲁棒性和有效性的奖励机制，以促进通用推理模式的学习。
light_analysis.method: 从因果视角将多候选推理视为反事实实验，提出Group Causal Counterfactual Policy Optimization。设计情节因果反事实奖励，包含鲁棒性（推理步骤在反事实扰动下答案分布稳定）和有效性（推理策略跨问题迁移）。构建token级优势优化策略，鼓励过程有效且反事实稳健的推理模式。
light_analysis.result: 在多个推理基准（如数学、常识等）上的广泛实验表明，所提方法显著优于现有基线，提升了推理准确性和泛化能力。具体数据摘要未明确，但证实了因果反事实奖励的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过因果反事实奖励同时优化推理过程的鲁棒性和有效性，有效提升LLM推理泛化能力。学术贡献在于引入因果视角解决奖励偏差，实际应用价值在于增强推理可靠性。未来可探索更细粒度的反事实扰动与多步推理结合。

title: Provably avoiding over-optimization in Direct Preference Optimization without knowing the data distribution
abstract: We introduce PEPO (Pessimistic Ensemble based Preference Optimization), a single-step Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)-like algorithm to mitigate the well-known over-optimization issue in preference learning without requiring the knowledge of the data-generating distribution or learning an explicit reward model. PEPO achieves pessimism via an ensemble of preference-optimized policies trained on disjoint data subsets and then aggregates them through a worst case construction that favors the agreement across models. In the tabular setting, PEPO achieves sample complexity guarantees depending only on a single-policy concentrability coefficient, thus avoiding the all-policy concentrability which affects the guarantees of algorithms prone to over-optimization, such as DPO. The theoretical findings are corroborated by a convincing practical performance, while retaining the simplicity and the practicality of DPO-style training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PEPO算法，通过集成悲观策略避免偏好学习中的过度优化，无需知道数据分布或显式奖励模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有直接偏好优化（DPO）方法容易过度优化，通常需要已知数据分布或学习奖励模型来缓解，但实际中这些条件难以满足。本文旨在设计一种无需这些先验知识就能避免过度优化的算法，提高偏好学习的鲁棒性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: PEPO算法基于悲观集成思想：在不相交数据子集上训练多个策略，通过最坏情况聚合（偏好模型间的一致程度）实现悲观性。在表格设置中，其样本复杂度仅依赖单策略可集中系数，而非全策略可集中系数，从而避免过度优化。
light_analysis.result: 理论上，PEPO在表格环境中取得了样本复杂度保证，仅依赖于单策略可集中系数，显著优于DPO等容易过度优化的算法。实际性能验证了理论结果，同时保持了DPO式训练的简洁高效，但摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: PEPO为偏好学习提供了一种免于过度优化的新范式，兼具理论保证和实用价值。未来可探索其在更复杂场景（如连续动作空间）的应用，以及不同聚合策略的影响。

title: OmniSIFT: Modality-Asymmetric Token Compression for Efficient Omni-modal Large Language Models
abstract: Omni-modal Large Language Models (Omni-LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in audio-video understanding tasks. However, their reliance on long multimodal token sequences leads to substantial computational overhead. Despite this challenge, token compression methods designed for Omni-LLMs remain limited. To bridge this gap, we propose OmniSIFT (Omni-modal Spatio-temporal Informed Fine-grained Token compression), a modality-asymmetric token compression framework tailored for Omni-LLMs. Specifically, OmniSIFT adopts a two-stage compression strategy: (i) a spatio-temporal video pruning module that removes video redundancy arising from both intra-frame structure and inter-frame overlap, and (ii) a vision-guided audio selection module that filters audio tokens. The entire framework is optimized end-to-end via a differentiable straight-through estimator. Extensive experiments on five representative benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy and robustness of OmniSIFT. Notably, for Qwen2.5-Omni-7B, OmniSIFT introduces only 4.85M parameters while maintaining lower latency than training-free baselines such as OmniZip. With merely 25% of the original token context, OmniSIFT consistently outperforms all compression baselines and even surpasses the performance of the full-token model on several tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出模态不对称的 token 压缩框架 OmniSIFT，实现高效全模态大语言模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 全模态大语言模型在处理音频-视频理解任务时，依赖长多模态 token 序列，导致显著的计算开销。尽管存在 token 压缩方法，但针对全模态模型的压缩方案仍然有限。现有方法未能有效处理视频的时空冗余和音频与视觉的关系。因此，需要一种专门为全模态模型设计的、高效且鲁棒的 token 压缩方法，以在保持性能的同时降低计算成本。
light_analysis.method: OmniSIFT 采用模态不对称的两阶段压缩策略。第一阶段为时空视频修剪模块，通过分析帧内结构和帧间重叠去除视频冗余。第二阶段为视觉引导音频选择模块，利用视觉信息过滤不相关的音频 token。整个框架使用可微分的直通估计器进行端到端优化，无需依赖预训练的压缩先验。该方法适用于 Qwen2.5-Omni-7B 等模型，仅引入少量额外参数。
light_analysis.result: 在五个代表性基准上的广泛实验表明，OmniSIFT 显著提升效率与性能。针对 Qwen2.5-Omni-7B，仅增加 4.85M 参数，延迟低于训练无关基线 OmniZip。使用原始 token 上下文的 25% 时，OmniSIFT 一致优于所有压缩基线，并在多个任务上超越全 token 模型，验证了其鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmniSIFT 有效解决了全模态大语言模型的长 token 序列计算开销问题，通过模态不对称的压缩策略在保持高性能的同时大幅降低资源需求。其学术价值在于提出了一种新的压缩框架，实际应用潜力在于加速多模态模型部署。未来可探索更广泛的模态组合或自适应压缩率，以进一步提升灵活性。

title: Imposing Boundary Conditions on Neural Operators via Learned Function Extensions
abstract: Neural operators have emerged as powerful surrogates for the solution of partial differential equations (PDEs), yet their ability to handle general, highly variable boundary conditions (BCs) remains limited. Existing approaches often fail when the solution operator exhibits strong sensitivity to boundary forcings. We propose a general framework for conditioning neural operators on complex non-homogeneous BCs through function extensions. Our key idea is to map boundary data to latent pseudo-extensions defined over the entire spatial domain, enabling any standard operator learning architecture to consume boundary information. The resulting operator, coupled with an arbitrary domain-to-domain neural operator, can learn rich dependencies on complex BCs and input domain functions at the same time. To benchmark this setting, we construct 18 challenging datasets spanning Poisson, linear elasticity, and hyperelasticity problems, with highly variable, mixed-type, component-wise, and multi-segment BCs on diverse geometries. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, outperforming baselines by large margins, while requiring no hyperparameter tuning across datasets. Overall, our results demonstrate that learning boundary-to-domain extensions is an effective and practical strategy for imposing complex BCs in existing neural operator frameworks, enabling accurate and robust scientific machine learning models for a broader range of PDE-governed problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过函数扩展（B2D扩展）将复杂边界条件融入神经算子，实现高精度PDE求解。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经算子在求解偏微分方程时对通用、高度可变的边界条件处理能力有限。现有方法在解算子对边界强迫高度敏感时往往失败，无法有效学习复杂边界依赖。需要一种框架使标准神经算子能同时处理复杂边界条件和输入域函数。
light_analysis.method: 提出边界到域（B2D）扩展框架：学习将边界数据映射到整个空间域的潜在伪扩展，作为神经算子的附加输入。该方法可耦合任意域到域神经算子，同时学习边界和输入函数的丰富依赖。不使用超参数调优，在多种几何体上处理混合型、分量式、多段边界条件。
light_analysis.result: 在18个挑战性数据集（涵盖泊松、线弹性、超弹性问题）上实现最先进精度，显著超越基线方法。无需超参数调优，表现出强大的泛化能力和鲁棒性，验证了B2D扩展策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 学习边界到域扩展是向现有神经算子框架施加复杂边界条件的有效实用策略，能扩展科学机器学习模型可解决的PDE问题范围。未来可探索更复杂的扩展形式或应用于其他算子架构。

title: Exponential Approximation Rates and Parameter Efficiency of Learnable Bernstein Activations
abstract: The choice of activation function fundamentally shapes the representational capacity and parameter efficiency of deep neural networks, yet most widely used activations lack rigorous theoretical guarantees on these properties. We provide a theoretical analysis of DeepBern-Nets (DBNs) -- networks employing learnable Bernstein polynomial activations -- showing that their approximation error decays with the network depth $L$ and the polynomial order $n$ with a rate of $\mathcal{O}(n^{-L})$, exponentially faster than the polynomial rate of ReLU architectures while remaining fully differentiable. We validate these predictions through $1{,}344$ experiments on large scientific datasets (HIGGS and SUSY), comparing DBNs against ReLU, Leaky ReLU, SELU, and GeLU. DBNs achieve over $70\%$ parameter reduction across the majority of architectures -- reaching $99.9\%$ at scale -- converge to ReLU's final loss in as few as $26\%$ of the training epochs, and attain up to $45\%$ lower final loss. These advantages hold over all tested activations, confirming that DBN's gains stem from the learnable polynomial structure rather than mere smoothness.

light_analysis.overview: 证明DeepBern-Nets使用可学习Bernstein多项式激活可达到指数级逼近率，并显著提升参数效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 激活函数直接影响深度神经网络的表示能力和参数效率，但大多数常用激活（如ReLU）缺乏严格的理论保证，且逼近速率仅为多项式级，限制了深层网络的效率。现有可微激活虽平滑但未充分利用可学习结构。该研究旨在通过可学习Bernstein多项式激活，实现更优的理论逼近特性和实际参数效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出DeepBern-Nets，采用可学习的Bernstein多项式作为激活函数。理论分析表明，其逼近误差随网络深度L和多项式阶数n以O(n^{-L})指数衰减，远优于ReLU的多项式率。在HIGGS和SUSY数据集上开展1344个实验，与ReLU、Leaky ReLU、SELU、GeLU对比，验证其参数减少和收敛速度。
light_analysis.result: DBNs在大多数架构中实现超过70%的参数减少，大规模时达99.9%；达到ReLU最终损失仅需26%的训练轮次；最终损失降低高达45%。这些优势在所有对比激活上均成立，证明收益源于可学习多项式结构而非单纯平滑性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次从理论上证明了可学习多项式激活的指数逼近率，并在大型数据集上验证了其卓越的参数效率和收敛速度。研究为设计高效激活函数提供了新方向，具有重要学术价值。未来可探索更复杂的多项式基或与其他架构结合。

title: DiscoverLLM: From Executing Intents to Discovering Them
abstract: To handle ambiguous and open-ended requests, Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly trained to interact with users to surface intents they have not yet expressed (e.g., ask clarification questions). However, users are often ambiguous because they have not yet formed their intents: they must observe and explore outcomes to discover what they want. Simply asking "what kind of tone do you want?" fails when users themselves do not know. We introduce DiscoverLLM, a novel and generalizable framework that trains LLMs to help users form and discover their intents. Central to our approach is a novel user simulator that models cognitive state with a hierarchy of intents that progressively concretize as the model surfaces relevant options -- where the degree of concretization serves as a reward signal that models can be trained to optimize. Resulting models learn to collaborate with users by adaptively diverging (i.e., explore options) when intents are unclear, and converging (i.e., refine and implement) when intents concretize. Across proposed interactive benchmarks in creative writing, technical writing, and SVG drawing, DiscoverLLM achieves over 10% higher task performance while reducing conversation length by up to 40%. In a user study with 75 human participants, DiscoverLLM improved conversation satisfaction and efficiency compared to baselines.

light_analysis.overview: DiscoverLLM通过训练大语言模型帮助用户发现并形成意图，而非仅执行已有意图，显著提升任务性能并缩短对话长度。
light_analysis.motivation: 用户在交互中常因未形成明确意图而表达模糊，现有LLM仅通过提问澄清，无法有效辅助用户探索和发现意图。这种认知缺口导致对话效率低下，尤其在创意写作等开放任务中，用户需要观察和探索才能明确需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出DiscoverLLM框架，包含建模认知状态与意图层次结构的用户模拟器，以意图具体化程度作为奖励信号。模型通过强化学习学会自适应发散（探索选项）和收敛（细化实现），在创意写作、技术写作和SVG绘制交互基准中训练。
light_analysis.result: 在三个交互基准任务中，DiscoverLLM任务性能提升超10%，对话长度缩短达40%。75人用户研究显示，相比基线方法，用户对话满意度和效率均有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作创新性地将LLM从意图执行者转变为意图发现协作伙伴，具有重要学术价值。实际中可提升对话系统在模糊需求场景的交互质量。未来可拓展至更复杂用户认知状态建模。

title: CPMobius: Iterative Coach-Player Reasoning for Data-Free Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong potential in complex reasoning, yet their progress remains fundamentally constrained by reliance on massive high-quality human-curated tasks and labels, either through supervised fine-tuning (SFT) or reinforcement learning (RL) on reasoning-specific data. This dependence renders supervision-heavy training paradigms increasingly unsustainable, with signs of diminishing scalability already evident in practice. To overcome this limitation, we introduce CPMöbius (CPMobius), a collaborative Coach-Player paradigm for data-free reinforcement learning of reasoning models. Unlike traditional adversarial self-play, CPMöbius, inspired by real world human sports collaboration and multi-agent collaboration, treats the Coach and Player as independent but cooperative roles. The Coach proposes instructions targeted at the Player's capability and receives rewards based on changes in the Player's performance, while the Player is rewarded for solving the increasingly instructive tasks generated by the Coach. This cooperative optimization loop is designed to directly enhance the Player's mathematical reasoning ability. Remarkably, CPMöbius achieves substantial improvement without relying on any external training data, outperforming existing unsupervised approaches. For example, on Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct, our method improves accuracy by an overall average of +4.9 and an out-of-distribution average of +5.4, exceeding RENT by +1.5 on overall accuracy and R-zero by +4.2 on OOD accuracy. Our codebase has been released at https://github.com/thunlp/CPMobius.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CPMobius无数据强化学习框架，通过教练-球员协作范式提升数学推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在复杂推理上依赖大量人工标注数据进行监督微调或强化学习，但这种监督密集型范式可持续性差，规模扩展出现瓶颈。现有无监督方法效果有限，亟需无需外部数据的推理增强方法。
light_analysis.method: 受人类体育协作启发，提出CPMobius，包含Coach和Player两个独立但合作的角色。Coach根据Player能力生成指令，并基于Player性能变化获得奖励；Player通过解决Coach生成的指令任务获得奖励。协作优化循环直接提升数学推理能力，无需任何外部训练数据。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct上，CPMobius总体准确率平均提升+4.9，OOD准确率提升+5.4；总体准确率超过RENT +1.5，OOD准确率超过R-zero +4.2。
light_analysis.conclusion: CPMobius实现了无需外部训练数据的推理能力提升，验证了协作式自博弈范式的有效性。代码已开源，为无数据强化学习提供新思路。未来可探索更多推理任务和更大模型。

title: Aligning Forest and Trees in Images & Long Captions for Visually Grounded Understanding
abstract: Vision-language models such as CLIP often struggle to faithfully understand long, detail-rich captions, relying on dominant scene cues while overlooking fine-grained visual evidence. We propose a hierarchical vision-language learning principle for understanding scenes as part-to-whole compositions: before forming a whole-scene representation, a model should uncover what semantic parts appear where in the image. To this end, we propose CAFT (Cross-domain Alignment of Forests and Trees), a vision-language model that jointly learns local text-region alignment at intermediate representations and global image-text alignment at the final representation. Exploiting the organization of long captions, where local descriptions often correspond to scene parts, CAFT employs a fine-to-coarse image encoder and a part-whole text encoder to discover localized part semantics and progressively compose them into a global image-text representation. Trained on 30M image-text pairs, CAFT achieves state-of-the-art performance on six long-text retrieval benchmarks and exhibits strong scaling behavior. Experiments show that CAFT learns fine-grained representations that localize textual semantics in image regions without explicit region-level supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAFT模型，通过层次化视觉语言学习实现图像与长文本的细粒度对齐，无需区域级监督。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型如CLIP在处理细节丰富的长文本描述时表现不佳，往往依赖场景主导线索而忽略细粒度视觉证据。这种局限性源于模型缺乏对场景局部到整体的理解能力。因此，需要一种能够学习部分到整体组合的视觉语言原理，以提升对长文本的理解和视觉定位能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出CAFT模型，采用层次化学习原则：先发现语义部分在图像中的位置，再构建整体场景表示。使用粗细粒度图像编码器（fine-to-coarse image encoder）和部分整体文本编码器（part-whole text encoder），在中间表示学习局部文本-区域对齐，在最终表示学习全局图像-文本对齐。利用长文本描述中局部描述对应场景部分的特点，逐步组合局部语义为全局表示。训练使用3000万图像-文本对。
light_analysis.result: CAFT在六个长文本检索基准上取得最先进性能，表现出强扩展性。实验表明，模型学习了细粒度表示，能够将文本语义定位到图像区域，而无需显式的区域级监督。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但整体优于CLIP等方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAFT通过层次化对齐实现了对长文本的细粒度理解，解决了现有模型忽视局部细节的问题。学术上提出了一种新的视觉语言学习范式，实际应用可提升图文检索、视觉定位等任务效果。局限性可能在于对超长文本的扩展性，未来可探索更复杂的部分-整体关系。

title: Preserve-Then-Quantize: Balancing Rank Budgets for Quantization Error Reconstruction in LLMs
abstract: Quantization Error Reconstruction (QER) reduces accuracy loss in Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) by approximating weights as $\mathbf{W} \approx \mathbf{Q} + \mathbf{L}\mathbf{R}$, using a rank-$r$ correction to reconstruct quantization error. Prior methods devote the full rank budget to error reconstruction, which is suboptimal when $\mathbf{W}$ has intrinsic low-rank structure and quantization corrupts dominant directions. We propose Structured Residual Reconstruction (SRR), a rank-allocation framework that preserves the top-$k$ singular subspace of the activation-scaled weight before quantization, quantizes only the residual, and uses the remaining rank $r-k$ for error reconstruction. We derive a theory-guided criterion for selecting $k$ by balancing quantization-exposed energy and unrecoverable error under rank constraints. We further show that resulting $\mathbf{Q} + \mathbf{L}\mathbf{R}$ parameterization naturally supports Quantized Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (QPEFT), and stabilizes fine-tuning via gradient scaling along preserved directions. Experiments demonstrate consistent perplexity reductions across diverse models and quantization settings in PTQ, along with a 5.9 percentage-point average gain on GLUE under 2-bit QPEFT. The project page is available at https://ai-isl.github.io/srr.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Project page: https://ai-isl.github.io/srr

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构化残差重构（SRR）框架，通过平衡秩预算保留主导奇异子空间并重构量化误差，提升LLM量化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有量化误差重构方法将全部秩预算用于误差重构，在权重具有内在低秩结构且量化破坏主导方向时效果不佳。重要是因为LLM部署需要低比特量化以减少内存，但精度损失严重。现有方法未能区分保留重要方向与重构误差的秩分配，导致次优性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Structured Residual Reconstruction (SRR)，在量化前保留激活缩放权重的top-k奇异子空间，仅量化残差部分，并使用剩余秩r-k进行误差重构。通过理论指导选择k以平衡暴露能量与不可恢复误差。同时，该参数化自然支持量化参数高效微调（QPEFT），并通过沿保留方向的梯度缩放稳定微调过程。
light_analysis.result: 在多种LLM模型和量化设置下，SRR在PTQ中一致降低困惑度。在2-bit QPEFT下，GLUE基准上平均提升5.9个百分点。未提供具体困惑度数值，但表明优于先前方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SRR通过合理的秩分配有效提升LLM量化性能，并支持高效微调，具有实际应用价值。局限性可能包括理论准则计算开销，未来可探索更优的k选择或扩展至其他模型。

title: AdaptNC: Adaptive Nonconformity Scores for Conformal Prediction under Distribution Shift
abstract: Rigorous uncertainty quantification is essential for the safe deployment of autonomous systems in unconstrained environments. Conformal Prediction (CP) provides a distribution-free framework for this task, yet its standard formulations rely on exchangeability assumptions that are violated by the distribution shifts inherent in real-world robotics. Existing online CP methods maintain target coverage by adaptively scaling the conformal threshold, but typically employ a static nonconformity score function. We show that this fixed geometry leads to highly conservative, volume-inefficient prediction regions when environments undergo structural shifts. To address this, we propose $\textbf{AdaptNC}$, a framework for the joint online adaptation of both the nonconformity score parameters and the conformal threshold. AdaptNC leverages an adaptive reweighting scheme to optimize score functions, and introduces a replay buffer mechanism to mitigate the coverage instability that occurs during score transitions. We evaluate AdaptNC on diverse robotic benchmarks involving multi-agent policy changes, environmental changes and sensor degradation. Our results demonstrate that AdaptNC significantly reduces prediction region volume compared to state-of-the-art threshold-only baselines while maintaining target coverage levels.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AdaptNC框架，联合在线调整非一致性得分参数和共形阈值，提高分布偏移下预测区域的体积效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主系统安全部署需要严谨不确定性量化。共形预测标准公式依赖可交换性假设，而现实机器人环境中的分布偏移违反该假设。现有在线方法仅自适应缩放阈值，使用静态得分函数，导致预测区域体积大且保守。因此需要同时调整得分函数和阈值的自适应方法。
light_analysis.method: AdaptNC框架通过自适应重加权方案优化非一致性得分函数，并引入重放缓冲机制缓解得分转换期间的覆盖不稳定性。该方法同时在线调整得分参数和共形阈值，使预测区域适应环境的结构变化，避免固定几何结构导致的体积低效。
light_analysis.result: 在多智能体策略变化、环境变化和传感器退化等机器人基准上评估。与仅调整阈值的基线方法相比，AdaptNC在维持目标覆盖率的同时，显著降低了预测区域体积，提升了体积效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaptNC通过联合调整得分函数和阈值，有效处理分布偏移，提高了预测体积效率，适用于机器人等现实环境。未来可扩展至更复杂场景，具有重要应用价值。

title: The Horizon Threshold in Cooperative Multi-Agent Reward-Free Exploration
abstract: We study cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning in the setting of reward-free exploration, where multiple agents jointly explore an unknown MDP in order to learn its dynamics (without observing rewards). We focus on a tabular finite-horizon MDP and adopt a phased learning framework. In each learning phase, multiple agents independently interact with the environment. More specifically, in each learning phase, each agent is assigned a policy, executes it, and observes the resulting trajectory. Our primary goal is to characterize the tradeoff between the number of learning phases and the number of agents, especially when the number of learning phases is small.   Our results identify a regime change governed by the horizon $H$. When the number of learning phases equals $H$, we present a computationally efficient algorithm that uses only $\tilde{O}(S^6 H^6 A / ε^2)$ agents to obtain an $ε$ approximation of the dynamics (i.e., yields an $ε$-optimal policy for any reward function). We complement our algorithm with a lower bound showing that any algorithm restricted to $ρ< H$ phases requires at least $A^{H/ρ}$ agents to achieve constant accuracy. Thus, we show that having $Θ(H)$ learning phases is both necessary and sufficient when restricting the number of agents to be polynomial.

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究合作多智能体无奖励探索中阶段数与智能体数量的权衡，发现时域H决定机制转变：H阶段可实现多项式智能体，少于H则需指数级。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多智能体强化学习中，无奖励探索旨在让多个智能体协同探索未知MDP以学习其动态。现有方法往往忽视学习阶段数与智能体数量的权衡，尤其是在阶段数较小的情况。该问题重要，因为实际场景中阶段数可能受限，理解这一权衡有助于设计更高效的探索策略。当前缺乏对阶段数与智能体数量关系的理论刻画，特别是当阶段数少于时域H时的指数级增长边界。
light_analysis.method: 论文考虑有限时域表格MDP，采用分阶段学习框架，每个阶段每个智能体独立执行指定策略并观测轨迹。当学习阶段数等于H时，提出一种计算高效算法，使用O~(S^6 H^6 A / ε^2)个智能体获得ε近似动态（即对任意奖励函数产生ε最优策略）。算法通过精心设计阶段策略聚合智能体信息实现高效探索。
light_analysis.result: 当学习阶段数ρ=H时，算法使用多项式数量智能体实现ε近似。且下界证明：任何算法若ρ<H，为保证恒定精度至少需要A^{H/ρ}个智能体（呈指数级）。因此，Θ(H)阶段是智能体数量多项式增长的充要条件。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次严格刻画了合作多智能体无奖励探索中阶段数与智能体数量的权衡，揭示了时域H的关键角色。学术上为多智能体探索理论提供新见解，实践上指导资源受限场景下的算法设计。未来可扩展至连续状态/动作空间或非表格情形。

title: Auditing Sybil: Explaining Deep Lung Cancer Risk Prediction Through Generative Interventional Attributions
abstract: Lung cancer remains the leading cause of cancer mortality, driving the development of automated screening tools to alleviate radiologist workload. Standing at the frontier of this effort is Sybil, a deep learning model capable of predicting future risk solely from computed tomography (CT) with high precision. However, despite extensive clinical validation, current assessments rely purely on observational metrics. This correlation-based approach overlooks the model's actual reasoning mechanism, necessitating a shift to causal verification to ensure robust decision-making before clinical deployment. We propose S(H)NAP, a model-agnostic auditing framework that constructs generative interventional attributions validated by expert radiologists. By leveraging realistic 3D diffusion bridge modeling to systematically modify anatomical features, our approach isolates object-specific causal contributions to the risk score. Providing the first interventional audit of Sybil, we demonstrate that while the model often exhibits behavior akin to an expert radiologist, differentiating malignant pulmonary nodules from benign ones, it suffers from critical failure modes, including dangerous sensitivity to clinically unjustified artifacts and a distinct radial bias.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S(H)NAP框架，通过生成式干预归因审计深度学习肺癌风险预测模型Sybil，发现其行为与专家相似但存在关键缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 肺癌是主要癌症死因，深度学习模型Sybil能高精度预测风险，但现有评估仅基于观测指标，忽略模型实际推理机制。需要因果验证确保临床部署前的稳健决策，以弥补相关性方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出S(H)NAP，一种模型无关的审计框架，利用3D扩散桥建模生成真实干预归因，并由放射科专家验证。通过系统修改解剖特征，隔离对象特定因果贡献到风险评分，首次实现对Sybil的干预审计。
light_analysis.result: 首次对Sybil进行干预审计，发现模型行为常类似专家放射科医生，能区分恶性与良性结节，但存在关键失败模式，包括对临床不合理的伪影敏感和明显的径向偏差，暴露了推理缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: 展示了Sybil的推理机制，揭示了其优点和缺陷，强调了因果验证在临床AI部署中的重要性。未来可应用于其他模型，促进模型可解释性和安全性的提升。

title: Conditional Compatibility Learning for Context-Dependent Anomaly Detection
abstract: Anomaly detection usually assumes that abnormality is an intrinsic property of an observation. A defect is a defect, and a rare object is rare, regardless of where it appears. Many real-world anomalies do not work this way. A runner on a track is normal, but the same runner on a highway is not. The subject is unchanged; only the context makes it anomalous. This setting, long recognized as contextual anomaly detection, remains largely underexplored in modern vision-language systems. The difficulty is not merely empirical; it is formal. When anomaly labels depend on the relation between a subject and its context, any detector reasoning from a global representation that conflates subject and context is provably non-identifiable: two different subject-context configurations can map to the same embedding while requiring opposite labels, and no such detector can be correct on both. This impossibility motivates a different formulation: instead of asking whether an observation deviates from a global notion of normality, the model should ask whether subjects are compatible with their surrounding context. We define this as conditional compatibility learning. We instantiate this framework in CC-CLIP, a vision-language architecture that learns disentangled subject- and context-aware representations from a single image and fuses visual evidence through text-conditioned attention. CC-CLIP achieves state-of-the-art results on real-world contextual anomaly detection, substantially outperforming all existing CLIP-based and context-reasoning baselines. A single-branch variant of CC-CLIP also achieves competitive performance on structural anomaly benchmarks.
comment: Preprint. 9 pages main text, plus appendix

light_analysis.overview: 提出条件兼容性学习框架CC-CLIP，解决上下文依赖异常检测中全局表示的非可识别性问题，实现主体与上下文解耦的异常检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统异常检测假设异常是内在属性，但现实异常（如跑者在跑道 vs 高速公路）依赖上下文。现有视觉语言方法使用全局表示融合主体和上下文，导致非可识别性：不同配置可能映射到相同嵌入却需相反标签。因此需要从全局异常转向主体-上下文兼容性判断。
light_analysis.method: 提出条件兼容性学习，模型学习判断主体是否与上下文兼容。CC-CLIP架构从单图像学习解耦的主体和上下文表示，通过文本条件注意力机制融合视觉证据，避免全局表示混淆。无需额外数据集或标注，直接利用CLIP预训练模型。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界上下文异常检测基准上，CC-CLIP显著超越所有现有CLIP和上下文推理基线，实现SOTA。其单分支变体在结构异常基准上同样表现竞争力，证明框架的有效性和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文形式化证明了上下文异常检测中全局表示的非可识别性，并提出条件兼容性学习作为新范式。CC-CLIP展示了视觉语言系统在上下文依赖异常检测中的潜力，为未来研究提供了理论基础和实用框架。局限性在于依赖CLIP预训练，对未见上下文泛化能力待探索。

title: Inference-Time Dynamic Modality Selection for Incomplete Multimodal Classification
abstract: Multimodal deep learning (MDL) has achieved remarkable success across various domains, yet its practical deployment is often hindered by incomplete multimodal data. Existing incomplete MDL methods either discard missing modalities, risking the loss of valuable task-relevant information, or recover them, potentially introducing irrelevant noise, leading to the discarding-imputation dilemma. To address this dilemma, in this paper, we propose DyMo, a new inference-time dynamic modality selection framework that adaptively identifies and fuses reliable recovered modalities, fully exploring task-relevant information beyond the conventional discard-or-impute paradigm. Central to DyMo is a novel selection algorithm that maximizes multimodal task-relevant information for each test sample. Since direct estimation of such information at test time is intractable due to the unknown data distribution, we theoretically establish a connection between information and the task loss, which we compute at inference time as a tractable proxy. Building on this, a novel principled reward function is proposed to guide modality selection. In addition, we design a flexible multimodal network architecture compatible with arbitrary modality combinations, alongside a tailored training strategy for robust representation learning. Extensive experiments on diverse natural and medical image datasets show that DyMo significantly outperforms state-of-the-art incomplete/dynamic MDL methods across various missing-data scenarios. Our code is available at https://github.com//siyi-wind/DyMo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出推理时动态模态选择框架DyMo，通过自适应选择并融合可靠恢复的模态，解决不完整多模态分类中的丢弃-填充困境。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态深度学习在实际部署中常面临数据不完整问题。现有方法要么丢弃缺失模态，损失任务相关信息；要么恢复缺失模态，引入无关噪声，从而陷入丢弃-填充困境。为此，需要一种能够自适应选择可靠模态的方法，充分探索任务相关信息。
light_analysis.method: DyMo框架包含一个最大化每个测试样本多模态任务相关信息的选择算法。通过建立信息与任务损失的理论联系，在推理时计算可代理的奖励函数指导模态选择。此外，设计了兼容任意模态组合的灵活网络架构和鲁棒表示学习的训练策略。
light_analysis.result: 在多种自然和医学图像数据集上的大量实验表明，DyMo在各种缺失数据场景下显著优于当前最先进的不完整/动态多模态深度学习方法。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但强调显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: DyMo通过动态模态选择有效缓解了不完整多模态分类问题，超越了传统丢弃或恢复的范式。该工作为实际部署中处理不完整数据提供了新思路，代码已开源。未来可探索更高效的信息估计方法或扩展到更多模态类型。

title: Cascaded Flow Matching for Heterogeneous Tabular Data with Mixed-Type Features
abstract: Advances in generative modeling have recently been adapted to tabular data containing discrete and continuous features. However, generating mixed-type features that combine discrete states with an otherwise continuous distribution in a single feature remains challenging. We advance the state-of-the-art in diffusion models for tabular data with a cascaded approach. We first generate a low-resolution version of a tabular data row, that is, the collection of the purely categorical features and a coarse categorical representation of numerical features. Next, this information is leveraged in the high-resolution flow matching model via a novel guided conditional probability path and data-dependent coupling. The low-resolution representation of numerical features explicitly accounts for discrete outcomes, such as missing or inflated values, and therewith enables a more faithful generation of mixed-type features. We formally prove that this cascade tightens the transport cost bound. The results indicate that our model generates significantly more realistic samples and captures distributional details more accurately, for example, the detection score improves by 51.9\%. Code is available at https://github.com/muellermarkus/tabcascade.

light_analysis.overview: 提出级联流匹配方法，通过粗到细的生成策略解决表格数据中混合类型特征的生成难题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型在处理包含离散和连续特征的表格数据时，对同一特征内同时存在离散状态和连续分布的混合类型特征生成效果不佳。这种特征常见于实际数据（如缺失或膨胀值），但现有方法难以忠实建模。因此，需要一种能显式处理离散结果并提升生成质量的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出级联流匹配框架：先低分辨率生成，将纯类别特征和数值特征的粗类别表示作为条件；再通过引导条件概率路径和数据依赖耦合，将低分辨率信息注入高分辨率流匹配模型。该设计显式建模离散结果，并证明能收紧传输成本界限。
light_analysis.result: 在表格数据生成任务中，所提模型相比基线显著提升真实性和分布细节捕捉能力。检测分数（Detection Score）提升51.9%，表明生成样本更难以与真实样本区分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过级联生成策略有效解决了混合类型特征生成难题，理论证明传输成本更优，实践上生成质量大幅提升。未来可扩展至更复杂数据类型或与其他生成模型结合。

title: Mind the Gap: How Elicitation Protocols Shape the Stated-Revealed Preference Gap in Language Models
abstract: Recent work identifies a stated-revealed (SvR) preference gap in language models (LMs): a mismatch between the values models endorse and the choices they make in context. Existing evaluations rely heavily on binary forced-choice prompting, which entangles genuine preferences with artifacts of the elicitation protocol. We systematically study how elicitation protocols affect SvR correlation across 24 LMs. Allowing neutrality and abstention during stated preference elicitation allows us to exclude weak signals, substantially improving Spearman's rank correlation ($ρ$) between volunteered stated preferences and forced-choice revealed preferences. However, further allowing abstention in revealed preferences drives $ρ$ to near-zero or negative values due to high neutrality rates. Finally, we find that system prompt steering using stated preferences during revealed preference elicitation does not reliably improve SvR correlation on AIRiskDilemmas. Together, our results show that SvR correlation is highly protocol-dependent and that preference elicitation requires methods that account for indeterminate preferences.
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Eval Eval Workshop and 3rd Technical AI Safety Conference (TAIS 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究引出协议如何影响语言模型陈述-揭示偏好差距，发现协议依赖性高，需考虑不确定偏好。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究指出语言模型存在陈述-揭示偏好差距，但传统二元强制选择提示方法混淆了真实偏好与引出协议伪影。该问题重要，因为偏好一致性是模型可信度关键，而现有评估方法不够准确，需要系统性研究协议影响以改进评估。
light_analysis.method: 在24个语言模型上系统研究引出协议对SvR相关性的影响。在陈述偏好中允许中立和弃权以排除弱信号，在揭示偏好中允许弃权。使用Spearman秩相关衡量相关性，并在AIRiskDilemmas数据集上测试系统提示引导效果。
light_analysis.result: 允许陈述偏好中立和弃权使Spearman秩相关显著提升；但进一步允许揭示偏好弃权导致相关性趋近零或负值，因高弃权率。系统提示引导不能可靠改善SvR相关性。结果表明SvR相关性高度依赖协议。
light_analysis.conclusion: SvR相关性高度依赖引出协议，偏好引出需要能处理不确定偏好的方法。研究贡献在于揭示协议对评估结果的关键影响，为未来设计更稳健的偏好评估方法提供指导，但需进一步研究如何有效整合不确定偏好。

title: Improving Classifier-Free Guidance of Flow Matching via Manifold Projection
abstract: Classifier-free guidance (CFG) is a widely used technique for controllable generation in diffusion and flow-based models. Despite its empirical success, CFG relies on a heuristic linear extrapolation that is often sensitive to the guidance scale. In this work, we provide a principled interpretation of CFG through the lens of optimization. We demonstrate that the velocity field in flow matching corresponds to the gradient of a sequence of smoothed distance functions, which guides latent variables toward the scaled target image set. This perspective reveals that the standard CFG formulation is an approximation of this gradient, where the prediction gap, the discrepancy between conditional and unconditional outputs, governs guidance sensitivity. Leveraging this insight, we reformulate the CFG sampling as a homotopy optimization with a manifold constraint. This formulation necessitates a manifold projection step, which we implement via an incremental gradient descent scheme during sampling. To improve computational efficiency and stability, we further enhance this iterative process with Anderson Acceleration without requiring additional model evaluations. Our proposed methods are training-free and consistently refine generation fidelity, prompt alignment, and robustness to the guidance scale. We validate their effectiveness across diverse benchmarks, demonstrating significant improvements on large-scale models such as DiT-XL-2-256, Flux, and Stable Diffusion 3.5.

light_analysis.overview: 通过流形投影改进无分类器引导，提供优化视角并引入增量梯度下降和Anderson加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 无分类器引导在扩散和流模型中广泛使用但依赖启发式线性外推，对引导尺度敏感且缺乏原则性解释，限制了生成质量和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 将CFG重新表述为同伦优化与流形约束，通过增量梯度下降实现投影，并采用Anderson加速提高效率，无需训练适配现有模型。
light_analysis.result: 在DiT-XL-2-256、Flux和Stable Diffusion 3.5等大规模模型上，显著提升了生成保真度、提示对齐性和对引导尺度的鲁棒性，摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了训练免费的流形投影方法，从优化角度解释CFG，增强了可控生成的稳定性和性能，具有理论价值和实际应用潜力。

title: Collaborative Parameter Learning: Mitigating Forgetting via Parameter-Level Gradient Analysis
abstract: Catastrophic forgetting during knowledge injection impairs the ability of large language models to acquire new knowledge without overwriting previously mastered knowledge. Recent studies analyze forgetting from a gradient similarity perspective and mitigate forgetting through vector projection. However, these methods primarily characterize gradient similarity at the aggregate direction level, leaving the parameter wise contributions to forgetting underexplored. In this paper, we decompose gradient similarity into parameter wise contributions and identify two types of parameters during forgetting: Conflicting Parameters, whose updates contribute to forgetting and typically account for 50 percent to 75 percent of parameters, and Collaborative Parameters, whose updates mitigate forgetting and account for 25 percent to 50 percent. Based on this analysis, we propose Collaborative Parameter Learning, CPL, a parameter wise training rule that freezes Conflicting Parameters and updates only Collaborative Parameters. Experiments comparing CPL with seven baseline methods show that CPL learns 20.2% to 48.2% more questions with negligible forgetting, while reducing peak VRAM by approximately 3 GB per billion model parameters and computation time by 16.5 percent. Extensive evaluations on parameter consumption, out of set generalization, cross prompt generalization, multimodal tasks, open ended question answering, and multilingual settings demonstrate that CPL effectively mitigates forgetting across diverse scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出协作参数学习(CPL)，通过参数级梯度分析识别冲突与协作参数，仅更新协作参数以缓解大语言模型的灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在注入新知识时面临灾难性遗忘，现有方法从梯度相似性角度分析但仅在聚合方向层面，忽略了参数级贡献。本文旨在通过分解梯度相似性到参数级，识别参数对遗忘的具体影响，从而更精确地控制参数更新，减少遗忘。
light_analysis.method: 将梯度相似性分解为每个参数的贡献，识别出两类参数：冲突参数（更新导致遗忘，占50%-75%）和协作参数（更新缓解遗忘，占25%-50%）。提出CPL训练规则，冻结冲突参数，仅更新协作参数。该方法无需额外数据或模型修改，仅通过梯度分析调整参数更新策略。
light_analysis.result: 在七种基线方法对比中，CPL在遗忘极少的情况下多学习20.2%-48.2%的问题，同时降低峰值显存约每十亿参数3GB，计算时间减少16.5%。在参数消耗、跨分布泛化、跨提示泛化、多模态任务、开放问答和多语言设置中均有效缓解遗忘。
light_analysis.conclusion: CPL通过参数级梯度分析有效缓解灾难性遗忘，具有高效、低资源消耗的特点，适用于多种场景。未来可探索动态参数识别机制或结合其他遗忘缓解技术。局限性包括冲突参数比例可能随数据和任务变化。

title: Perceptrons and localization of attention's mean-field landscape
abstract: The forward pass of a Transformer can be seen as an interacting particle system on the unit sphere: time plays the role of layers, particles that of token embeddings, and the unit sphere idealizes layer normalization. In some weight settings the system can even be seen as a gradient flow for an explicit energy, and one can make sense of the infinite context length (mean-field) limit thanks to Wasserstein gradient flows. In this paper we study the effect of the perceptron block in this setting, and show that critical points are generically atomic and localized on subsets of the sphere.

light_analysis.overview: 研究Transformer中感知器块对注意力平均场景观的影响，证明临界点原子化且局部化于球面子集。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer在深度和长上下文场景下的行为理解是重要问题，现有理论多忽略感知器块的作用。本文通过粒子系统建模，揭示感知器块如何改变能量景观，为理解注意力机制提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 将Transformer前向传播建模为单位球面上的相互作用粒子系统，其中层为时间、token为粒子，层归一化理想化为球面约束。通过Wasserstein梯度流分析无限上下文（平均场）极限，证明感知器块的引入使临界点具有原子分布并局部化。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明在特定权重设置下，感知器块导致能量景观的临界点呈现原子性和局部化特征，即粒子聚集于球面孤立点集。摘要未提供定量实验数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了感知器块在平均场注意力模型中的关键作用，为Transformer架构的理论分析提供了新工具，可能启发更优的网络设计。未来可拓展至更一般权重或实际训练动态。

title: Predict-Project-Renoise: Sampling Diffusion Models under Hard Constraints
abstract: Diffusion models cannot enforce hard constraints, yet applications in the physical sciences demand exact satisfaction of conservation laws, boundary conditions, and observational consistency. In this work, we identify a corrector kernel whose unique stationary distribution is the constrained marginal at each noise level, and approximate it by iteratively projecting through the denoiser and renoising via the forward kernel. The resulting Predict-Project-Renoise (PPR) algorithm enables sampling from pretrained diffusion models under hard constraints. Its three components are each necessary: projecting through the denoiser keeps samples close to the data manifold, while renoising and iterating drive samples toward the constrained marginal. On 2D distributions, the Kuramoto-Sivashinsky equation, and global weather forecasting with a $10^8$-dimensional atmospheric model, PPR simultaneously achieves low constraint violations and high distributional fidelity, a combination that existing methods fail to deliver.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Predict-Project-Renoise (PPR)算法，使预训练扩散模型能在硬约束下高效采样。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型无法强制执行硬约束，但物理科学应用（如守恒定律、边界条件、观测一致性）需要精确满足这些约束。现有方法在约束违反和分布保真度之间难以兼顾，限制了扩散模型在科学领域的应用。
light_analysis.method: PPR算法通过识别一个校正核，其唯一平稳分布是每个噪声水平下的约束边际，并迭代执行三个步骤：预测（通过去噪器）、投影（确保约束）和重噪（通过前向核）。投影通过去噪器保持样本接近数据流形，重噪和迭代驱动样本向约束边际分布收敛。
light_analysis.result: 在2D分布、Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程以及10^8维大气模型的全球天气预报任务中，PPR同时实现了低约束违反和高分布保真度，而现有方法无法达到这一组合效果。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了其优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PPR算法有效解决了扩散模型在硬约束下的采样问题，为物理科学、工程等需要严格约束的应用提供了可行方案。未来可探索更高效的近似或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: SynCABEL: Synthetic Contextualized Augmentation for Biomedical Entity Linking
abstract: We present SynCABEL (Synthetic Contextualized Augmentation for Biomedical Entity Linking), a framework that addresses a central bottleneck in supervised biomedical entity linking (BEL): the scarcity of expert-annotated training data. SynCABEL leverages large language models to generate context-rich synthetic training examples for all candidate concepts in a target knowledge base, providing broad supervision without manual annotation. We demonstrate that SynCABEL, when combined with decoder-only models and guided inference, establishes new state-of-the-art results across three widely used multilingual benchmarks: MedMentions for English, QUAERO for French, and SPACCC for Spanish. Evaluating data efficiency, we show that SynCABEL reaches the performance of full human supervision using up to 60% less annotated data, substantially reducing reliance on labor-intensive and costly expert labeling. Finally, acknowledging that standard evaluation based on exact code matching often underestimates clinically valid predictions due to ontology redundancy, we introduce an LLM-as-a-judge protocol. This analysis reveals that SynCABEL significantly improves the rate of clinically valid predictions. Our synthetic datasets, models, and code are released to support reproducibility and future research: - HuggingFace Datasets & Models - GitHub Repository

light_analysis.overview: SynCABEL利用大语言模型生成上下文丰富的合成训练数据，用于生物医学实体链接，减少对人工标注的依赖，在多个多语言基准上取得新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 监督式生物医学实体链接（BEL）面临专家标注数据稀缺的瓶颈。现有方法依赖昂贵的手工标注，且标准评估基于精确代码匹配，由于本体冗余常低估临床有效预测。本文旨在通过合成数据增强提供广泛监督，减少人工标注需求，并引入更公平的LLM-as-a-judge评估协议。
light_analysis.method: SynCABEL框架利用大语言模型为目标知识库中所有候选概念生成上下文丰富的合成训练样本。结合decoder-only模型和引导推理（guided inference）进行实体链接。此外，引入LLM-as-a-judge协议评估预测的临床有效性，以弥补精确代码匹配的不足。
light_analysis.result: 在MedMentions（英）、QUAERO（法）和SPACCC（西）三个多语言基准上，SynCABEL取得了新的SOTA结果。数据效率分析显示，使用比完全人工监督少60%的标注数据即可达到同等性能。LLM-as-a-judge评估表明SynCABEL显著提高了临床有效预测率。
light_analysis.conclusion: SynCABEL有效缓解了BEL中标注数据稀缺问题，降低人工成本，提升性能。学术价值在于提出了合成数据增强与引导推理结合的新范式，实际应用价值在于可扩展至其他医学文本任务。开源数据集、模型和代码促进可重复性。未来可探索进一步提升合成数据真实性。

title: PolySHAP: Extending KernelSHAP with Interaction-Informed Polynomial Regression
abstract: Shapley values have emerged as a central game-theoretic tool in explainable AI (XAI). However, computing Shapley values exactly requires $2^d$ game evaluations for a model with $d$ features. Lundberg and Lee's KernelSHAP algorithm has emerged as a leading method for avoiding this exponential cost. KernelSHAP approximates Shapley values by approximating the game as a linear function, which is fit using a small number of game evaluations for random feature subsets.   In this work, we extend KernelSHAP by approximating the game via higher degree polynomials, which capture non-linear interactions between features. Our resulting PolySHAP method yields empirically better Shapley value estimates for various benchmark datasets, and we prove that these estimates are consistent.   Moreover, we connect our approach to paired sampling (antithetic sampling), a ubiquitous modification to KernelSHAP that improves empirical accuracy. We prove that paired sampling outputs exactly the same Shapley value approximations as second-order PolySHAP, without ever fitting a degree 2 polynomial. To the best of our knowledge, this finding provides the first strong theoretical justification for the excellent practical performance of the paired sampling heuristic.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PolySHAP方法，通过高阶多项式回归扩展KernelSHAP，捕获特征交互，提升Shapley值估计精度，并理论证明与配对采样等价。
light_analysis.motivation: Shapley值是XAI的核心工具，但精确计算需指数级成本。KernelSHAP通过线性近似降低复杂度，但忽略了特征间的非线性交互，导致估计不准。现有配对采样启发式改良效果显著，但缺乏理论解释。本文旨在通过高阶多项式建模交互，提升估计精度，并为配对采样提供理论支撑。
light_analysis.method: PolySHAP将KernelSHAP的线性回归扩展为d次多项式回归，显式建模特征交互。通过优化多项式拟合的权重，捕获非线性关系。理论证明估计量的一致性。特别地，二阶PolySHAP与配对采样（antithetic sampling）等价，无需显式拟合二次多项式即能获得相同近似，该发现为配对采样提供了首次严格理论证明。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，PolySHAP相比KernelSHAP获得更优的Shapley值估计精度。具体数值因数据集而异，摘要未列出精确指标。理论分析表明，PolySHAP估计量具有一致性。配对采样与二阶PolySHAP的等价性解释了其优秀实践性能，为启发式方法提供了理论依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: PolySHAP通过高阶多项式回归改进了KernelSHAP，有效捕获特征交互，提升估计质量。其与配对采样的等价性不仅解释了后者高效的原因，也为未来XAI方法设计提供了新视角。局限性可能在于高阶多项式计算开销，未来可探索更紧凑的交互建模方式。

title: LangForce: Bayesian Decomposition of Vision Language Action Models via Latent Action Queries
abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown promise in robot manipulation but often struggle to generalize to new instructions or complex multi-task scenarios. We identify a critical pathology in current training paradigms where goal-driven data collection creates a dataset bias. In such datasets, language instructions are highly predictable from visual observations alone, causing the conditional mutual information between instructions and actions to vanish, a phenomenon we term Information Collapse. Consequently, models degenerate into vision-only policies that ignore language constraints and fail in out-of-distribution (OOD) settings. To address this, we propose LangForce, a novel framework that enforces instruction following via Bayesian decomposition. By introducing learnable Latent Action Queries, we construct a dual-branch architecture to estimate both a vision-only prior $p(a \mid v)$ and a language-conditioned posterior $π(a \mid v, \ell)$. We then optimize the policy to maximize the conditional Pointwise Mutual Information (PMI) between actions and instructions. This objective effectively penalizes the vision shortcut and rewards actions that explicitly explain the language command. Without requiring new data, LangForce significantly improves generalization. Extensive experiments across on SimplerEnv and RoboCasa demonstrate substantial gains, including an 11.3% improvement on the challenging OOD SimplerEnv benchmark, validating the ability of our approach to robustly ground language in action.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LangForce框架，通过贝叶斯分解和潜在动作查询解决VLA模型中的信息坍缩问题，强制遵循指令。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人操作中泛化能力差，尤其对新指令或复杂多任务场景失效。研究发现，现有训练范式存在数据集偏差：语言指令可从视觉观测中高度预测，导致指令与动作之间的条件互信息消失（信息坍缩），模型退化为仅依赖视觉的策略，忽略语言约束，在分布外场景中失败。
light_analysis.method: 提出LangForce框架，通过贝叶斯分解将策略分解为视觉先验p(a|v)和语言条件后验π(a|v,l)，利用可学习的潜在动作查询构建双分支架构。优化目标最大化动作与指令的条件点互信息（PMI），惩罚视觉捷径并奖励明确解释语言命令的动作。无需新数据，仅调整训练目标。
light_analysis.result: 在SimplerEnv和RoboCasa基准上取得显著改进：在挑战性分布外SimplerEnv任务中准确率提升11.3%，验证了方法有效鲁棒地接地语言到动作。
light_analysis.conclusion: LangForce通过贝叶斯分解和PMI优化解决了VLA模型的信息坍缩问题，显著提升指令跟随泛化能力。具有重要学术价值（揭示并解决数据偏差）和实用价值（提升机器人操作灵活性）。未来可探索更复杂的先验估计或扩展到多模态场景。

title: Automated Rubrics for Reliable Evaluation of Medical Dialogue Systems
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for clinical decision support, where hallucinations and unsafe suggestions may pose direct risks to patient safety. These risks are hard to assess: subtle clinical errors are often missed by generic metrics and LLM judges using general criteria, while expert-authored fine-grained rubrics are expensive and difficult to scale. In this paper, we propose a retrieval-augmented multi-agent framework designed to automate the generation of instance-specific evaluation rubrics.   Our approach grounds evaluation in authoritative medical evidence by decomposing retrieved content into atomic facts and synthesizing them with user interaction constraints to form verifiable, fine-grained evaluation criteria. Evaluated on HealthBench and LLMEval-Med datasets, our framework achieves Clinical Intent Alignment (CIA) scores of 50.20% and 31.90%, significantly outperforming the GPT-4o baseline and demonstrating robust cross-lingual generalization. In discriminative tests on HealthBench, our rubrics yield a 7.8% higher win rate than GPT-4o baseline with nearly double score $Δ$, while ablation studies confirm its structural necessity. Beyond evaluation, our rubrics effectively guide response refinement, improving quality by 9.2%. This provides a scalable, cross-lingual foundation for both evaluating and improving medical LLMs. The code is available at https://github.com/AmbeChen/Automated-Rubric-Generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出检索增强的多智能体框架，自动生成实例特定的医学对话评估指标，提升评估可靠性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在临床决策支持中的幻觉和不安全建议对患者安全构成直接风险，但现有评估方法难以捕捉细微临床错误：通用指标和LLM判断易遗漏，专家细粒度评分标准成本高且难扩展。因此需要一种可扩展、可靠的自动化评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出检索增强的多智能体框架，通过检索权威医学证据，将内容分解为原子事实，并与用户交互约束综合，生成可验证的细粒度评估指标。框架自动化实例特定指标生成，无需人工专家，确保评估依据权威医学知识。
light_analysis.result: 在HealthBench和LLMEval-Med数据集上，框架的临床意图对齐得分分别达50.20%和31.90%，显著优于GPT-4o基线。区分性测试中胜率提高7.8%，得分增量几乎翻倍。消融研究验证结构必要性。评估指标还可指导响应改进，质量提升9.2%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提供了可扩展、跨语言的评估和改进医疗LLM的基础。自动化指标生成降低评估成本，提升可靠性，且能直接用于优化模型输出。未来可探索更多医疗场景，代码已开源促进研究。

title: Sockpuppetting: Jailbreaking LLMs by Combining Prefilling with Optimization
abstract: Prefill attacks are an effective and low-cost jailbreaking method, as they directly insert an acceptance sequence (e.g., "Sure, here is how to...") at the start of an LLM's output and lead the model to continue the response. We make two contributions to this prior work. First, we show that an unsophisticated adversary can improve the well-known prefill attacks by ensembling a small number of prefill variants. Running three easy-to-generate prefills yields a combined attack success rate (ASR) of 22%, 90%, and 99% on Gemma-7B, Llama-3.1-8B, and Qwen3-8B respectively, an up to 38% improvement over the standard "Sure, here's..." prefill and up to 82% over our reproduction of GCG (Zou et al., 2023). Second, we introduce "sockpuppetting", a hybrid attack that optimizes an adversarial suffix placed inside the "assistant" message block of the chat template, rather than within the user prompt. The rolling variant of this attack, RollingSockpuppetGCG, increases prompt-agnostic ASR by up to 64% over our universal GCG baseline on Llama-3.1-8B.
