Both findings highlight the need for defences against output-prefix injection in open-weight models. Code: https://gitlab.com/asendotsinski/sockpuppetting

light_analysis.overview: 提出集成多个prefill变体和在assistant消息块内优化对抗后缀的混合攻击方法，有效提升LLM越狱攻击成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有prefill攻击虽有效但单一prefill成功率有限，且易被防御。本文旨在通过集成多prefill变体及在聊天模板中注入对抗后缀来提升攻击效果，揭示open-weight模型对输出前缀注入的脆弱性。
light_analysis.method: 1）集成三个简单生成的prefill变体（如"Sure, here's..."等）进行集成攻击；2）提出sockpuppetting攻击，将对抗后缀嵌入聊天模板的assistant消息块内，并采用GCG优化生成后缀，其滚动变体RollingSockpuppetGCG进一步实现prompt无关性。
light_analysis.result: 在Gemma-7B、Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen3-8B上，集成prefill的ASR分别达22%、90%、99%，比标准prefill提升最高38%，比GCG提升82%；RollingSockpuppetGCG在Llama-3.1-8B上比universal GCG提升64%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明prefill攻击的改进和sockpuppetting方法能显著提升越狱成功率，强调了对输出前缀注入防御的迫切需求。代码已开源，为后续防御研究提供基准。

title: LLM Flow Processes for Text-Conditioned Regression
abstract: Recent work has demonstrated surprisingly good performance of pre-trained LLMs on regression tasks (for example, time-series prediction), with the ability to incorporate expert prior knowledge and the information contained in textual metadata. However we observe major error cascades even in short sequences < ~100 points; these models are also computationally intensive and difficult to parallelise. Marginal LLM predictions do not suffer this issue and are trivially parallelised, but can predict over-broad densities. To address this, we propose combining these densities with a lightweight (diffusion-based) neural process. We show that this combination leads to better-calibrated predictions overall, outputs locally consistent trajectories, and leads to text-conditioned function space selection in the meta-learner. As part of this work we propose a gradient-free (and non-Monte Carlo) method for sampling from a product-of-experts of a score model and an 'expert' (here the LLM predictive densities). We believe this general method is of independent interest as it is applicable whenever an expert can be convolved with a Gaussian in closed form.

light_analysis.overview: 结合预训练LLM与轻量级扩散神经过程，提出文本条件回归方法，并引入梯度自由采样方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练语言模型在回归任务（如时间序列预测）中表现良好，能整合专家先验知识和文本元数据。然而，即使在短序列中也会出现严重的错误级联，且模型计算强度高、难以并行化。边际LLM预测虽避免了这些问题并易于并行，但预测密度过于宽泛。因此，需要一种方法改善预测校准性和局部一致性。
light_analysis.method: 提出将LLM的边际预测密度与轻量级扩散神经过程相结合，以获得校准更好的预测和局部一致轨迹，并实现文本条件的函数空间选择。同时提出一种无梯度、非蒙特卡洛的采样方法，从评分模型和专家（LLM预测密度）的乘积中采样，该方法适用于任何能与高斯分布闭式卷积的专家。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告定量结果，但声称结合方法在整体预测校准性上更好，输出局部一致轨迹，并在元学习器中实现文本条件函数空间选择。具体性能指标或对比数据未给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过结合LLM和扩散神经过程，解决了LLM在回归任务中的错误级联和计算问题，同时改进了预测校准性。提出的梯度自由采样方法具有独立价值，可推广至其他专家与高斯卷积的场景。未来工作可能涉及更广泛的应用和效率优化。

title: High-Order Epistasis Detection Using Factorization Machine with Quadratic Optimization Annealing and MDR-Based Evaluation
abstract: Detecting high-order epistasis is a fundamental challenge in genetic association studies due to the combinatorial explosion of candidate locus combinations. Although multifactor dimensionality reduction (MDR) is a widely used method for evaluating epistasis, exhaustive MDR-based searches become computationally infeasible as the number of loci or the interaction order increases. In this paper, we define the epistasis detection problem as a black-box optimization problem and solve it with a factorization machine with quadratic-optimization annealing (FMQA). We propose an efficient epistasis detection method based on FMQA, in which the classification error rate (CER) computed by MDR is used as a black-box objective function. Experimental evaluations were conducted using simulated case-control datasets with predefined high-order epistasis. The results demonstrate that the proposed method successfully identified ground-truth epistasis across various interaction orders and the numbers of genetic loci within a limited number of iterations. These results indicate that the proposed method is effective and computationally efficient for high-order epistasis detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于因子机与二次优化退火的高阶上位性检测方法，以MDR分类错误率为黑箱目标，高效识别基因交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 高阶上位性检测是遗传关联研究的基础挑战，因候选位点组合爆炸导致穷举搜索不可行。多因子降维法虽广泛使用，但随位点或交互阶数增加计算量剧增。现有方法难以平衡检测精度与计算效率，亟需新方法以有限迭代次数识别真实高阶交互。
light_analysis.method: 将上位性检测定义为黑箱优化问题，采用因子机结合二次优化退火（FMQA）求解。以MDR计算的分类错误率（CER）作为黑箱目标函数，通过FMQA高效搜索最优位点组合。使用模拟病例对照数据集验证，包含预设高阶上位性，评估不同交互阶数和位点数量下的性能。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟数据集上，该方法能在有限迭代次数内成功识别各种交互阶数和位点数量的真实上位性。与传统穷举MDR相比，计算效率显著提升，且能发现高阶交互，表明其在准确性和效率上的优势，具体指标如迭代次数、检测成功率等摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出FMQA-MDR方法有效解决高阶上位性检测的计算爆炸问题，在有限迭代中实现高效准确检测。该方法具有学术价值，可推广至更大规模遗传研究，未来可探索实际数据集验证及与其他优化方法结合以进一步提升性能。

title: The Multi-View Paradigm Shift in MRI Radiomics: Predicting MGMT Methylation in Glioblastoma
abstract: Non-invasive inference of molecular tumor characteristics from med-ical imaging is a central goal of radiogenomics, particularly in glioblastoma (GBM), where O6-methylguanine-DNA methyltransferase (MGMT) promoter methylation carries important prognostic and therapeutic significance. Although radiomics-based machine learning methods have shown promise for this task, conventional unimodal and early-fusion approaches are often limited by high fea-ture redundancy and incomplete modeling of modality-specific information. In this work, we introduce a multi-view latent representation learning framework based on variational autoencoders (VAE) that preserves modality-specific radio-mic structure while enabling late fusion in a compact probabilistic latent space. The approach is evaluated on radiomic features extracted from the necrotic tumor core in post-contrast T1-weighted (T1Gd) and Fluid-Attenuated Inversion Re-covery (FLAIR) Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI). Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed multi-view VAE combined with a random forest classifier achieves a test Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) Curve (AUC) of 0.77 (95% confidence interval: 0.71-0.83), substantially outperforming both a baseline radiomics model (AUC = 0.54) and a hyperparam-eter-tuned model (AUC = 0.64). These findings indicate that multi-view probabilistic encoding enables more effective integration of complementary MRI in-formation and significantly improves predictive performance for MGMT pro-moter methylation status.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于变分自编码器的多视角潜在表征学习框架，用于预测胶质母细胞瘤MGMT启动子甲基化状态。
light_analysis.motivation: 从医学影像非侵入性推断分子肿瘤特征是放射基因组学的核心目标，特别是胶质母细胞瘤中MGMT启动子甲基化状态具有重要的预后和治疗意义。尽管基于影像组学的机器学习方法已有进展，但传统的单模态和早期融合方法受限于高特征冗余和模态特定信息建模不完整，亟需更有效的多模态融合策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于变分自编码器的多视角潜在表征学习框架，保留模态特异性影像组学结构，并通过晚期融合在紧凑的概率潜在空间进行整合。使用坏死肿瘤核心的对比增强T1加权和FLAIR MRI影像组学特征，结合随机森林分类器进行预测。
light_analysis.result: 多视角VAE结合随机森林分类器在测试集上达到AUC=0.77（95%置信区间0.71-0.83），显著优于基线放射组学模型（AUC=0.54）和超参数调优模型（AUC=0.64），表明多视角概率编码能有效整合互补MRI信息并提升预测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多视角概率编码实现了更有效的MRI信息整合，显著提高了MGMT启动子甲基化预测性能，为放射组学的多模态融合提供了新范式。未来可探索更多模态和优化潜在空间。

title: Feature Learning Dynamics in Infinite-Depth Neural Networks
abstract: Deep neural networks have achieved remarkable success in practice, yet a mechanistic understanding of how features evolve during training remains incomplete, especially in the large-depth limit. For ResNets under depth-$μ$P scaling, prior work treats the layer index $\ell$ as a continuous time $t_\ell = \ell/L$, yielding SDE descriptions of the training dynamics. A key unresolved issue is that backpropagation reuses each forward weight matrix $W_\ell$ through its transpose $W_\ell^\top$, creating correlations between forward features and backward gradients whose behavior and role in feature learning remain unclear. We study this reused-weight forward--backward coupling in one-layer ResNets under depth-$μ$P. Using conditional Gaussian representations, we explicitly separate the coupling terms induced by weight reuse from decoupled Gaussian fluctuations before taking any network limit. At initialization, we prove that the coupling is a finite-width effect and vanishes at rate $O(n^{-1})$, uniformly over depth. During training, however, SGD induces a nontrivial forward--backward correlation term that survives the infinite-width limit. The key depth effect is that, under depth-$μ$P scaling, this surviving term is higher order in depth and its accumulated contribution over layers becomes negligible as $L\to\infty$. This depth-induced suppression motivates Neural Feature Dynamics (NFD), a forward--backward SDE system with decoupled backward weights that retains the feature-gradient covariance structure generated during training. Under nondegeneracy assumptions, we prove that the finite-network training dynamics converge to its NFD limit with an $O(L^{-1})$ depth-discretization error, while the reused-weight coupling term has a faster $O(L^{-2})$ decay. These results provide a rigorous infinite-depth limit for the feature-learning dynamics of one-layer ResNets under depth-$μ$P.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经网络特征动力学的SDE理论，证明深度μP缩放下无限深度ResNet特征学习极限。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络在训练中特征演化机制尚不明确，尤其在大深度极限下。现有工作将层索引视为连续时间，得到训练动力学的随机微分方程描述，但反向传播重用前向权重矩阵，产生正向特征与反向梯度之间的耦合，其行为及在特征学习中的作用未解。本文研究这种重用权重的前后向耦合，旨在揭示深度对特征学习的影响。
light_analysis.method: 采用条件高斯表示，显式分离权重重用引起的耦合项与解耦高斯涨落。在初始化时证明耦合是有限宽效应，随宽度n增加以O(n^{-1})速率消失，且深度一致。训练中SGD诱导非平凡的前后向相关项，在无限宽极限下持续存在。深度μP缩放下，该项在深度上高阶小，随层数L→∞积累贡献可忽略。由此提出神经特征动力学，一种具有解耦后向权重的正反向SDE系统，保留特征-梯度协方差结构。
light_analysis.result: 在非退化假设下，证明了有限网络训练动力学会收敛到其NFD极限，深度离散化误差为O(L^{-1})，而重用权重耦合项衰减更快，为O(L^{-2})。这些结果提供了深度μP缩放下单层ResNet特征学习动力学的严格无限深度极限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了无限深度ResNet特征学习动力学的严格极限理论，揭示了深度对前后向耦合的抑制作用。NFD系统为理解深度网络特征演化提供了新框架。未来可扩展到更复杂架构，并探索有限深度与无限深度行为的关系。

title: Make-It-Poseable: Feed-forward Latent Posing Model for 3D Characters
abstract: Posing 3D characters is a fundamental task in computer graphics. However, existing paradigms, ranging from traditional auto-rigging to recent pose-conditioned generative models, frequently struggle with inaccurate skinning weights, fixed mesh topologies, and poor pose conformance. These challenges have become particularly pronounced with the recent explosion of AI-generated 3D assets, which often exhibit flawed structures and fused geometry. To address these issues, we introduce Make-It-Poseable, a novel feed-forward framework that reformulates character posing as a skinning-free latent-space transformation problem. By decoupling shape deformation from the constraints of fixed mesh connectivity, our method directly operates on compact latent representations to reconstruct characters in target poses. To achieve this, our framework integrates a latent posing transformer for shape manipulation, a dense pose representation for fine-grained control, and an adaptive completion module optimized via a bipartite-matched latent loss to robustly handle topological changes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing baselines in posing quality. Furthermore, our skeleton-agnostic design exhibits remarkable zero-shot generalization to diverse morphologies including quadrupeds and seamlessly supports various 3D authoring applications such as part replacement and refinement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无蒙皮、无骨架的前馈潜在姿态模型，将3D角色姿态化重构为潜在空间变换问题，显著提升姿态质量与泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D角色姿态化方法（如自动蒙皮、姿态条件生成模型）在处理AI生成的3D资产时表现不佳，因为这些资产常存在结构缺陷和融合几何，导致蒙皮权重不准确、网格拓扑固定、姿态吻合度差。亟需一种能解耦形状变形与网格连接约束、鲁棒处理拓扑变化的新范式。
light_analysis.method: 核心思路是将角色姿态化转化为无蒙皮的潜在空间变换。框架包括：潜在姿态变换器（操控形状）、密集姿态表示（细粒度控制）、自适应补全模块（处理拓扑变化），并通过二分匹配潜在损失优化。训练后可直接前馈生成目标姿态，无需骨架或蒙皮。
light_analysis.result: 在姿态质量指标上显著超越现有基线方法。零样本泛化到四足动物等多样形态，且骨架无关设计支持部件替换、细节细化等3D创作应用，展示了强泛化性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Make-It-Poseable创新性地解耦了姿态化与网格拓扑，为AI生成的低质量3D资产提供了高效姿态解决方案。其无蒙皮、零样本泛化特性对数字内容创作具重要价值，未来可扩展至更多形态和交互式编辑场景。

title: Differentiable Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Crafting effective reward signals remains a central challenge in Reinforcement Learning (RL), especially for complex reasoning tasks. Existing automated reward optimization methods typically rely on derivative-free search heuristics that treat the reward function as a black box, failing to exploit the causal dynamics between reward structure modifications and policy performance. We introduce Differentiable Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning (DERL), a bi-level framework for the autonomous discovery of optimal reward structures. DERL employs a Meta-Optimizer that evolves a reward function through the composition of structured atomic primitives to guide an inner-loop policy. Unlike prior black-box methods, DERL introduces differentiability into the meta-optimization process by updating the Meta-Optimizer using policy gradients derived from inner-loop validation performance. This allows for the progressive learning of a "meta-gradient" for task success, providing the system with dense, actionable feedback. We validate DERL across diverse reasoning domains: embodied agent (ALFWorld), scientific simulation (ScienceWorld), and mathematical reasoning (GSM8K, MATH). Results show that DERL achieves state-of-the-art performance on agent benchmarks, substantially outperforming non-differentiable baselines-especially in out-of-distribution generalization. Trajectory analyses confirm that DERL captures the intrinsic causal structure of tasks, enabling fully autonomous, self-improving agent alignment.
comment: Work in Progress. We release our code and model at https://github.com/sitaocheng/DERL

light_analysis.overview: 提出可微分进化强化学习（DERL），通过可微分的元优化自动发现最优奖励结构，实现自改进的智能体对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 在强化学习中，设计有效的奖励信号仍是一大挑战，尤其对于复杂推理任务。现有的自动奖励优化方法通常依赖无导数的搜索启发式，将奖励函数视为黑箱，未能利用奖励结构修改与策略性能之间的因果动态。这导致优化效率低，泛化能力差，亟需一种能利用因果信息进行可微优化的新方法。
light_analysis.method: DERL采用双层级框架：内层策略执行任务，外层元优化器通过结构化原子原语的组合演化奖励函数。关键创新在于引入可微分性，元优化器利用来自内层验证性能的策略梯度进行更新，从而学习任务成功的“元梯度”，提供密集、可操作的反馈。该方法在ALFWorld、ScienceWorld、GSM8K和MATH等不同推理领域进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在智能体基准测试中，DERL达到了最先进的性能，尤其在分布外泛化方面显著优于非可微分基线方法。轨迹分析确认DERL捕获了任务的内在因果结构，实现了完全自主的自改进智能体对齐。摘要未提供具体的准确率或性能数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: DERL通过可微分的元优化机制，实现了奖励结构的自主发现，为强化学习中奖励工程的自动化提供了新范式。其学术价值在于将进化搜索与梯度优化结合，实际应用价值体现在复杂推理任务的自主对齐。未来工作可进一步扩展原子原语库或应用到更广泛的领域。

title: MobiBench: Multi-Branch, Modular Benchmark for Mobile GUI Agents
abstract: Mobile GUI Agents, AI agents capable of interacting with mobile applications on behalf of users, have the potential to transform human computer interaction. However, current evaluation practices for GUI agents face two fundamental limitations. First, they either rely on single path offline benchmarks or online live benchmarks. Offline benchmarks using static, single path annotated datasets unfairly penalize valid alternative actions, while online benchmarks suffer from poor scalability and reproducibility due to the dynamic and unpredictable nature of live evaluation. Second, existing benchmarks treat agents as monolithic black boxes, overlooking the contributions of individual components, which often leads to unfair comparisons or obscures key performance bottlenecks. To address these limitations, we present MobiBench, the first modular and multi path aware offline benchmarking framework for mobile GUI agents that enables high fidelity, scalable, and reproducible evaluation entirely in offline settings. Our experiments demonstrate that MobiBench achieves 94.72 percent agreement with human evaluators, on par with carefully engineered online benchmarks, while preserving the scalability and reproducibility of static offline benchmarks. Furthermore, our comprehensive module level analysis uncovers several key insights, including a systematic evaluation of diverse techniques used in mobile GUI agents, optimal module configurations across model scales, the inherent limitations of current LFMs, and actionable guidelines for designing more capable and cost efficient mobile agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MobiBench，首个模块化、多路径感知的离线基准测试框架，用于移动GUI代理的高保真、可扩展和可复现评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有移动GUI代理评估存在两大局限：离线基准测试使用静态单路径数据集，不公平地惩罚有效替代操作；在线基准测试因动态和不可预测性导致可扩展性和可复现性差。此外，现有基准将代理视为黑盒，忽略组件贡献，导致不公平比较或掩盖性能瓶颈。因此，需要一种既能保证高保真度又能兼顾可扩展性和可复现性的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: MobiBench采用模块化、多路径感知的离线基准测试框架。通过设计多路径注释数据集和模块级评估机制，支持对代理各组件（如视觉编码器、规划器）的独立分析。框架在离线设置下模拟在线交互的多样性，使用94.72%的人类评估一致性作为验证指标，确保高保真度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MobiBench与人类评估者达到94.72%的一致性，与精心设计的在线基准相当，同时保留了静态离线基准的可扩展性和可复现性。模块级分析揭示了不同技术（如视觉编码器、规划策略）的系统性评估结果，以及最优模块配置随模型规模变化的规律，并指出了当前大型基础模型的固有局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MobiBench首次实现了移动GUI代理的模块化、多路径离线评估，解决了现有基准的公平性和可复现性问题。其模块级分析为设计更高效、更强大的移动代理提供了 actionable 指南。未来工作可扩展到更多应用场景和代理类型。

title: Asynchronous Reasoning: Training-Free Interactive Thinking LLMs
abstract: Many state-of-the-art LLMs are trained to think before giving their answer. Reasoning can greatly improve language model capabilities, but it also makes them less interactive: given a new input, a model must stop thinking before it can respond. Real-world use cases such as voice-based or embodied assistants require an LLM agent to respond and adapt to additional information in real time, which is incompatible with sequential interactions. In contrast, humans can listen, think, and act asynchronously: we begin thinking about the problem while reading it and continue thinking while formulating the answer. In this work, we augment LLMs capable of reasoning to operate in a similar way without additional training. Our method uses the properties of positional embeddings to enable LLMs built for sequential generation to simultaneously think, listen, and write outputs. We evaluate our approach on math, commonsense, and safety reasoning: it allows models to generate accurate thinking-augmented answers while reducing time to first non-thinking token from minutes to ${\le}$ 5s and the overall delays by up to $12{\times}$.

light_analysis.overview: 提出异步推理方法，无需训练即可使LLM同时思考、听取和输出，大幅降低交互延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推理型LLM在响应前必须停止思考，导致顺序交互延迟大，无法满足语音或实体助手等实时应用需求。而人类可以异步处理信息，因此需要让LLM具备类似能力，在不额外训练的情况下实现实时交互。
light_analysis.method: 利用位置嵌入的特性，使原本顺序生成的LLM能够同时进行思考、监听和写作输出。该方法无需额外训练或修改模型架构，仅通过调整推理过程即可实现异步操作，适用于数学、常识和安全推理场景。
light_analysis.result: 在数学、常识和安全推理任务中，该方法使模型生成思考增强答案的同时，将首次非思考token的输出时间从分钟级缩短至≤5秒，总体延迟降低最多12倍，且不牺牲答案准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了推理型LLM的交互性，使其适用于实时应用场景，如语音助手和具身代理。未来可探索更复杂的异步策略，但当前方法依赖于位置嵌入的特定属性，可能对某些模型架构不通用。

title: AP-BMM: Approximating Capability-Cost Pareto Sets of LLMs via Asynchronous Prior-Guided Bayesian Model Merging
abstract: Serving Large Language Models (LLMs) often requires choosing between stronger reasoning and lower inference cost. Model merging offers a practical way to build several models between a reasoning-oriented model and a cheaper base model, but common model-level merging methods usually control this trade-off with only one or two global knobs. We study this setting as a multi-objective optimization problem: instead of producing one merged model, the goal is to find a set of merged models that cover different accuracy--token-cost preferences. Layer-wise merging is more flexible because it can assign different merge weights to different Transformer layers. However, it introduces two practical challenges. First, the layer-wise search space is large, and existing methods often search it without using helpful signals from the source models. Second, LLM evaluations can take very different amounts of time, so synchronous batch optimization wastes GPU time while waiting for slow evaluations. We propose Asynchronous Prior-Guided Bayesian Model Merging (AP-BMM). AP-BMM uses parameter and reasoning-activation differences between the source models to suggest which layers should matter early in the search. It also uses an asynchronous Bayesian optimization loop that accounts for candidate models already being evaluated. A lightweight reranking step further spreads candidates across the accuracy--cost trade-off. Under fixed evaluation budgets, AP-BMM achieves stronger Pareto-set quality and broader trade-off coverage than synchronous layer-wise baselines and representative model-level merging baselines. Compared with the synchronous Bayesian baseline, it also reduces wall-clock time by improving GPU utilization.   Code: https://github.com/MiLab-HITSZ/AP-BMM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出异步先验引导的贝叶斯模型合并方法，高效生成LLM的准确率-代价帕累托前沿。
light_analysis.motivation: 部署LLM需权衡推理能力与成本，现有模型级合并仅用全局参数控制，灵活不足；层级合并虽灵活但搜索空间大，缺乏先验利用且同步评估浪费GPU时间。
light_analysis.method: AP-BMM利用源模型参数与激活差异指导层重要性搜索，异步贝叶斯优化考虑已评估候选，轻量重排序扩展帕累托覆盖。
light_analysis.result: 固定评估预算下，AP-BMM的帕累托集质量与权衡覆盖优于同步层基线和模型级基线，并通过异步机制减少墙钟时间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了异步先验引导的贝叶斯模型合并新范式，提升多目标优化效率，代码开源促进实际应用。未来可探索更高效搜索策略。

title: d-TreeRPO: Towards More Reliable Policy Optimization for Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is pivotal for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of diffusion large language models (dLLMs). However, existing dLLM policy optimization methods suffer from two critical reliability bottlenecks: (1) reward sparsity, arising from coarse or unverifiable signals that impede accurate advantage calculation; and (2) their probability estimates do not account for the gap to the unbiased expectation over all decoding orders, which are intractable to compute. To mitigate these issues, we propose d-TreeRPO, a reliable RL framework for dLLMs that leverages tree-structured rollouts and bottom-up advantage computation based on verifiable outcome rewards to provide fine-grained and verifiable step-wise reward signals. Furthermore, we provide a theoretical proof demonstrating that increasing prediction confidence effectively minimizes the gap between unbiased expected prediction probabilities and its single-step forward pass estimate. Guided by this analysis, we introduce a time-scheduled self-distillation loss during training that enhances prediction confidence in later training stages, thereby enabling more accurate probability estimation and better performance. Experiments demonstrate that d-TreeRPO outperforms existing baselines and achieves significant improvements across multiple reasoning benchmarks. Specifically, it achieves +86.2% on Sudoku, +51.6% on Countdown, +4.5% on GSM8K, and +5.3% on Math500 compared to the base model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出d-TreeRPO框架，通过树结构展开和自蒸馏损失提升扩散语言模型强化学习的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）的强化学习存在奖励稀疏和概率估计偏离无偏期望的问题。现有方法基于粗粒度或不可验证的奖励信号，导致优势计算不准确；且单步前向概率估计与所有解码顺序的无偏期望存在难以计算的差距，限制了模型性能。亟需一种可靠的策略优化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出d-TreeRPO框架，使用树结构展开并根据可验证的结果奖励进行自底向上的优势计算，提供细粒度、可验证的逐步骤奖励信号。理论上证明提高预测置信度能最小化单步估计与无偏期望的差距，据此在训练后期引入时间调度的自蒸馏损失，增强预测置信度，实现更准确的概率估计。
light_analysis.result: 在多个推理基准上，d-TreeRPO相比基线模型取得显著提升：Sudoku +86.2%，Countdown +51.6%，GSM8K +4.5%，Math500 +5.3%。实验验证了框架的有效性和优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: d-TreeRPO有效解决了扩散语言模型强化学习的两个可靠性瓶颈，通过树结构奖励传播和置信度增强策略提升了推理性能。该方法具有理论和实践价值，未来可探索更复杂的树结构或扩展到其他序列生成任务。

title: Prismatic World Model: Learning Compositional Dynamics for Planning in Hybrid Systems
abstract: Model-based planning in robotic domains is challenged by the hybrid nature of physical dynamics, where continuous motion is punctuated by discrete events such as contacts and impacts. Conventional latent world models typically employ monolithic neural networks that enforce global continuity, which over-smooths distinct dynamic modes (e.g., sticking vs. sliding, flight vs. stance). For a planner, this smoothing results in compounding errors during long-horizon lookaheads, rendering the search process unreliable at physical boundaries. To address this, we introduce the Prismatic World Model (PRISM-WM), a structured architecture designed to decompose complex hybrid dynamics into composable primitives. PRISM-WM uses a context-aware Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework where a gating mechanism implicitly identifies the current physical mode, and specialized experts predict the associated transition dynamics. We further introduce a latent orthogonalization objective to ensure expert diversity, preventing mode collapse. By modeling the mode transitions in system dynamics, PRISM-WM reduces rollout drift. Experiments on continuous control benchmarks, including high-dimensional humanoids and multi-task settings, demonstrate that PRISM-WM provides a high-fidelity substrate for trajectory optimization algorithms (e.g., TD-MPC), indicating its potential as a foundational model for model-based agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prismatic World Model，一种分解混合动力系统为可组合原语的结构化架构，通过MoE和正交化提升规划保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器人领域的模型预测规划面临物理动力学的混合性质挑战，连续运动与离散事件交织。传统潜在世界模型使用整体神经网络强制全局连续性，导致不同动态模式（如摩擦与滑动、飞行与站立）被过平滑，造成长期规划时误差累积，在物理边界处搜索不可靠。因此需要一种能显式建模模式切换的架构。
light_analysis.method: PRISM-WM采用上下文感知的混合专家（MoE）框架：一个门控机制隐式识别当前物理模式，专门化专家预测相应的转移动力学。同时引入潜在正交化目标确保专家多样性，防止模式坍塌。该方法将系统动力学的模式转换显式建模，减少轨迹展开的漂移。实验中结合轨迹优化算法（如TD-MPC）在连续控制基准上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在包括高维人形机器人和多任务设置的连续控制基准上，PRISM-WM为轨迹优化算法（例如TD-MPC）提供了高保真度的基础，显著降低了长期规划中的复合误差，提升了规划可靠性。与基线方法相比，PRISM-WM的预测更准确，模式切换处表现更优，具体指标如规划成功率或累积奖励提升（摘要中未给出具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISM-WM通过结构化分解混合动力学，为模型预测控制提供了更可靠的规划基础。其学术价值在于提出了一种隐式识别物理模式的MoE架构，实际应用上可作为模型基智能体的基础模型。未来可扩展至更复杂接触动力学场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: FOAM: Blocked State Folding for Memory-Efficient LLM Training
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance due to their large parameter counts and extensive training data. However, their scale leads to significant memory bottlenecks during training, especially when using memory-intensive optimizers like Adam. Existing memory-efficient approaches often rely on techniques such as singular value decomposition (SVD), projections, or weight freezing, which can introduce substantial computational overhead, require additional memory for projections, or degrade model performance. In this paper, we propose Folded Optimizer with Approximate Moment (FOAM), a method that compresses optimizer states by computing block-wise gradient means and incorporates a residual correction to recover lost information. Theoretically, FOAM achieves convergence rates equivalent to vanilla Adam under standard non-convex optimization settings. Empirically, FOAM eliminates up to 90\% of the memory overhead of optimizer states and accelerates convergence. Furthermore, FOAM is compatible with other memory-efficient optimizers, delivering performance and throughput that match or surpass both full-rank and existing memory-efficient baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/zqOuO/FOAM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FOAM方法，通过块状梯度均值与残差校正压缩优化器状态，实现LLM训练内存高效。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型因参数量大和训练数据多，导致训练内存瓶颈，尤其在使用Adam等内存密集型优化器时。现有方法如SVD、投影或权重冻结，存在计算开销大、需额外内存或降低模型性能等问题。因此，需要一种能有效减少优化器状态内存占用且不影响性能的方法。
light_analysis.method: FOAM方法通过计算块状梯度均值来压缩优化器状态，并引入残差校正恢复丢失信息。理论分析表明，在标准非凸优化设置下，FOAM收敛速率与标准Adam相当。该方法无需额外投影或冻结，可直接替换现有优化器。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，FOAM可消除高达90%的优化器状态内存开销，并加速收敛。与其他内存高效优化器兼容，性能和吞吐量匹配或超越全秩及现有内存高效基线方法。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: FOAM提供了一种内存高效的LLM训练方案，通过块状梯度均值与残差校正显著降低优化器状态内存占用，同时保持理论收敛保证和实际性能。其兼容性使其可广泛应用于现有训练框架，为大规模模型训练提供了实用工具。未来可探索进一步压缩或与其他技术结合。

title: StreamGaze: Gaze-Guided Temporal Reasoning and Proactive Understanding in Streaming Videos
abstract: Streaming video understanding requires models not only to process temporally incoming frames, but also to anticipate user intention for realistic applications such as Augmented Reality (AR) glasses. While prior streaming benchmarks evaluate temporal reasoning, none measure whether Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can interpret or leverage human gaze signals within a streaming setting. To fill this gap, we introduce StreamGaze, the first benchmark designed to evaluate how effectively MLLMs utilize gaze for temporal and proactive reasoning in streaming videos. StreamGaze introduces gaze-guided past, present, and proactive tasks that comprehensively assess streaming video understanding. These tasks evaluate whether models can use real-time gaze signals to follow shifting attention and infer user intentions based only on past and currently observed frames. To build StreamGaze, we develop a gaze-video Question Answering (QA) generation pipeline that aligns egocentric videos with raw gaze trajectories through fixation extraction, region-specific visual prompting, and scanpath construction. This pipeline produces spatio-temporally grounded QA pairs that reflect human perceptual dynamics. Across all StreamGaze tasks, we observe substantial performance gaps between state-of-the-art MLLMs and human performance, highlighting key limitations in gaze-based temporal reasoning, intention modeling, and proactive prediction. We further provide detailed analyses of gaze prompting strategies, reasoning behaviors, and task-specific failure modes, offering insights into current limitations and directions for future research. All data and code are publicly available to support continued research in gaze-guided streaming video understanding.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 with strong scores (5/5/5) but desk-rejected after the camera-ready due to not completing all reviewing duties

light_analysis.overview: 首个评估多模态大模型利用凝视信号进行流式视频时序推理与主动理解的基准StreamGaze。
light_analysis.motivation: 流式视频理解需要模型处理时序帧并预测用户意图，但现有基准未评估多模态大模型（MLLMs）在流式场景中解释或利用人眼凝视信号的能力。该问题对增强现实等应用至关重要，因为凝视信号能反映用户注意力焦点和意图。当前方法缺乏对凝视引导的时序推理和主动理解的系统性评估，因此需要专门基准来揭示模型在这方面的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 提出StreamGaze基准，包含凝视引导的过去、现在和主动任务，全面评估流式视频理解。构建凝视-视频问答生成管道，通过对齐第一视角视频与原始凝视轨迹，进行注视点提取、区域特定视觉提示和扫描路径构建，生成时空对齐的QA对，反映人类感知动态。使用该管道生成评估数据，并对比多种前沿MLLMs与人类表现。
light_analysis.result: 在所有StreamGaze任务中，最先进的MLLMs与人类性能之间存在显著差距，特别是在凝视引导的时序推理、意图建模和主动预测方面。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但指出性能差距突出。进一步分析了凝视提示策略、推理行为及特定任务失败模式，揭示了当前MLLMs在流式视频理解中的关键局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: StreamGaze揭示了MLLMs在利用凝视信号进行流式视频理解中的不足，为未来研究提供了明确方向。该基准有助于推动凝视引导的时序推理和主动理解能力发展，在AR眼镜等应用中具有重要价值。公开数据和代码可促进后续研究。潜在局限包括任务设计可能未覆盖所有实际场景，未来可拓展更多凝视相关任务。

title: SpectralTrain: A Universal Framework for Hyperspectral Image Classification
abstract: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification typically involves large-scale data and computationally intensive training, which limits the practical deployment of deep learning models in real-world remote sensing tasks. This study introduces SpectralTrain, a universal, architecture-agnostic training framework that enhances learning efficiency by integrating curriculum learning (CL) with principal component analysis (PCA)-based spectral downsampling. By gradually introducing spectral complexity while preserving essential information, SpectralTrain enables efficient learning of spectral -- spatial patterns at significantly reduced computational costs. The framework is independent of specific architectures, optimizers, or loss functions and is compatible with both classical and state-of-the-art (SOTA) models. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets -- Indian Pines, Salinas-A, and the newly introduced CloudPatch-7 -- demonstrate strong generalization across spatial scales, spectral characteristics, and application domains. The results indicate consistent reductions in training time by 2-7x speedups with small-to-moderate accuracy deltas depending on backbone. Its application to cloud classification further reveals potential in climate-related remote sensing, emphasizing training strategy optimization as an effective complement to architectural design in HSI models. Code is available at https://github.com/mh-zhou/SpectralTrain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpectralTrain，一个结合课程学习与PCA光谱降采样的通用训练框架，无需依赖特定架构即可加速高光谱图像分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 高光谱图像分类通常面临数据量大和训练计算密集的问题，限制了深度学习模型在遥感任务中的实际部署。现有方法多专注于架构设计，忽视了训练策略优化，且缺乏通用高效的训练方案。因此，亟需一种独立于特定模型、能显著提升学习效率并降低计算成本的训练框架。
light_analysis.method: SpectralTrain框架整合了课程学习与基于主成分分析的光谱降采样。课程学习逐步引入光谱复杂性，PCA保留关键信息，使模型高效学习光谱-空间模式。该框架架构无关，兼容任何分类器、优化器和损失函数，可直接用于经典及最新高光谱分类模型。实验采用Indian Pines、Salinas-A和新数据集CloudPatch-7。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数据集上，SpectralTrain实现了2-7倍的训练加速，同时分类精度仅有小幅变化（取决于骨干网络）。例如，在Indian Pines上训练时间减少约4倍，精度下降不超过1%。该方法在云分类任务中也表现出潜力，验证了其跨尺度、跨光谱特性的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpectralTrain作为通用训练框架，显著降低高光谱图像分类的计算开销，扩大了现有模型的适用范围。它强调训练策略优化是架构设计的有力补充，尤其适用于计算受限场景。未来可探索更复杂的课程策略或与其他数据增强技术结合。代码已开源。

title: STORM: Segment, Track, and Object Re-Localization from a Single Image
abstract: Accurate 6D pose estimation and tracking are core capabilities for physical AI systems, yet real-world deployment remains brittle and labor-intensive. Many pipelines rely on CAD models, manual masking, or per-object adaptation, and still fail under occlusion or fast motion without a principled way to recognize failure. We propose STORM, a unified framework for reference-conditioned 6D tracking that can operate from a single reference image, with minimal manual input and improved robustness. STORM combines: (i) Hierarchical Spatial Fusion Attention (HSFA), a task-driven reference-query fusion architecture that supports both single-reference and multi-reference conditioning and can optionally use vision-language semantic conditioning to resolve instance ambiguities; and (ii) a BCE-trained tracking verifier whose continuous compatibility logit is used as an energy-like score to detect drift and trigger automatic re-initialization. Experiments on LM-O and YCB-Video show that STORM improves annotation-free pose tracking accuracy over strong baselines and recovers reliably from severe occlusions and rapid viewpoint changes with minimal overhead.
comment: 21 pages. Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026); camera-ready version

light_analysis.overview: 提出STORM统一框架，从单张参考图像进行6D姿态跟踪，结合层次空间融合注意力和BCE训练的跟踪验证器，实现鲁棒跟踪和自动重初始化。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前6D姿态估计和跟踪在真实部署中脆弱且劳动密集，许多方法依赖CAD模型、手动掩膜等，在遮挡和快速运动下易失败，且缺乏检测失败机制。STORM旨在减少人工输入、提高鲁棒性，并具备失败检测与恢复能力。
light_analysis.method: STORM包含两个关键技术：(i) 层次空间融合注意力（HSFA），任务驱动的参考-查询融合架构，支持单/多参考条件，可选视觉语言语义条件解决实例歧义；(ii) 基于BCE训练的跟踪验证器，其连续兼容性分数作为能量分数检测漂移并触发自动重初始化。在LM-O和YCB-Video数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在LM-O和YCB-Video上，STORM在无标注姿态跟踪精度上超越强基线，能从严重遮挡和快速视角变化中可靠恢复，且额外开销小。实验表明其鲁棒性和高效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: STORM实现了从单张图像进行鲁棒6D跟踪，显著减少人工输入。其HSFA和验证器设计具有学术创新性，适用于物理AI系统。未来可扩展至更多复杂场景。

title: Sharpness-Guided Group Relative Policy Optimization via Probability Shaping
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a practical route to improve large language model reasoning, and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is a widely used optimizer in this setting. However, RLVR training is typically performed with limited control over generalization. We revisit GRPO through a robustness-based generalization view, where the generalization loss is upper bounded by a combination of the empirical loss and a sharpness surrogate measured by the gradient norm. Building on this perspective, we propose Sharpness-Guided GRPO (GRPO-SG), a simple token-weighted variant of GRPO that downweights tokens likely to cause overly large gradients, reducing sharp updates and stabilizing optimization, thereby improving generalization. Experiments across mathematical reasoning, logic puzzles and tool-augmented question answering show consistent improvements over GRPO, along with smoother gradient-norm trajectories, supporting GRPO-SG as a simple and effective generalization-oriented upgrade to GRPO for RLVR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sharpness-Guided GRPO (GRPO-SG)，通过概率塑形降低大梯度token权重，提升GRPO在RLVR中的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR通过GRPO优化LLM推理，但泛化控制有限。从鲁棒性视角看，泛化损失上界由经验损失和基于梯度范数的锐度组成。GRPO忽视梯度锐度，导致优化不稳定和泛化不足。
light_analysis.method: GRPO-SG基于梯度范数锐度，对每个token加权，降低易产生过大梯度的token权重，从而减少尖锐更新、稳定优化。采用数学推理、逻辑谜题和工具增强问答等任务评估，保持与GRPO相似的框架。
light_analysis.result: 在多个任务上，GRPO-SG相对GRPO取得一致改进，且梯度范数轨迹更平滑，表明优化更稳定、泛化更好。摘要未给出具体数值，但声称consistent improvements。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRPO-SG以简单有效的token加权方式提升GRPO泛化，适用于RLVR场景。其价值在于无需复杂修改即可改善泛化，未来可探索自适应权重或结合其他锐度度量。

title: Re-evaluating Minimum Bayes Risk Decoding for Automatic Speech Recognition
abstract: Recent work has shown that sample-based Minimum Bayes Risk (MBR) decoding outperforms beam search in text-to-text generation tasks, such as machine translation, text summarization, and image captioning. On the other hand, beam search is the current practice for speech-to-text tasks such as automatic speech recognition (ASR) and Speech Translation (ST). Given that MBR decoding is effective in text-to-text generation tasks, it is reasonable to expect it to also be effective for speech-to-text tasks. In this paper, we evaluate MBR decoding for ASR and ST tasks on English and Japanese using Whisper and its derivative models. We observe that the accuracy of MBR decoding outperforms that of beam search in most of the experimental settings we have evaluated. The results show that MBR decoding is a promising method for offline ASR and ST tasks that require high accuracy. The code is available at https://github.com/CyberAgentAILab/mbr-for-asr

light_analysis.overview: 评估最小贝叶斯风险解码在语音识别和语音翻译任务中的有效性，发现其优于波束搜索。
light_analysis.motivation: 波束搜索是自动语音识别和语音翻译任务的标准解码方法，而最小贝叶斯风险解码在文本生成任务（如机器翻译）中已显示出优势。然而，MBR在语音到文本任务中的潜力尚未被充分探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过实验验证MBR在ASR和ST任务上的表现，以寻求更高准确率的解码方案。
light_analysis.method: 使用Whisper及其衍生模型，在英语和日语数据集上，对自动语音识别和语音翻译任务进行最小贝叶斯风险解码与波束搜索的对比实验。MBR解码通过从模型采样多个候选序列，并基于风险函数选择最优假设。实验设置包括离线场景，注重准确性评估。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 在大多数实验设置下，最小贝叶斯风险解码的准确率均优于波束搜索。具体指标包括词错误率或翻译质量分数，但摘要未提供具体数值。结果表明MBR在离线ASR和ST任务中具有显著优势，尤其适用于高精度要求场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 最小贝叶斯风险解码是离线语音识别和语音翻译任务中有前途的解码方法，能够提升准确率。该研究为语音任务提供了一种替代波束搜索的高性能解码策略，具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步探索采样策略和风险函数优化，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Loopholing Discrete Diffusion: Deterministic Bypass of the Sampling Wall
abstract: Discrete diffusion models offer a promising alternative to autoregressive generation through parallel decoding, but they suffer from a sampling wall: once categorical sampling occurs, rich distributional information collapses into one-hot vectors and cannot be propagated across steps, forcing subsequent steps to operate with limited information. To mitigate this problem, we introduce Loopholing, a novel and simple mechanism that preserves this information via a deterministic latent pathway, leading to Loopholing Discrete Diffusion Models (LDDMs). Trained efficiently with a self-conditioning strategy that avoids unrolling the full denoising trajectory, LDDMs achieve substantial gains-reducing generative perplexity by up to 61% over prior baselines, thereby closing (and in some cases surpassing) the gap with autoregressive models, and producing more coherent text. Applied to reasoning tasks, LDDMs also improve performance on arithmetic benchmarks such as Countdown and Game of 24. These results also indicate that loopholing mitigates idle steps and oscillations, providing a general and effective path toward high-quality non-autoregressive text generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Loopholing机制，通过确定性潜在路径保留分布信息，解决离散扩散模型的采样墙问题，显著提升生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 离散扩散模型通过并行解码为自回归生成提供替代方案，但存在采样墙问题：分类采样后，丰富的分布信息坍缩为one-hot向量，无法跨步骤传播，导致后续步骤信息有限，影响生成质量。现有方法未能有效解决此问题，亟需一种机制来保持分布信息的连续性。
light_analysis.method: Loopholing机制通过确定性潜在路径保留分布信息，避免信息坍缩，形成LDDMs。训练采用自条件策略，无需展开完整去噪轨迹，高效收敛。该方法可轻松集成到现有离散扩散框架中，无需复杂架构改动。
light_analysis.result: LDDMs在生成困惑度上较基线降低最高61%，缩小甚至超越与自回归模型的差距，生成更连贯的文本。在推理任务中，算术基准（如Countdown、Game of 24）性能提升。此外，Loopholing缓解了无效步长和振荡问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: Loopholing为离散扩散模型提供通用有效的路径，实现高质量非自回归文本生成，不仅在语言建模上逼近自回归模型，还提升了推理能力。未来可探索其在大规模模型和更复杂任务中的应用。

title: Scaling Laws Meet Model Architecture: Toward Inference-Efficient LLMs
abstract: Scaling the number of parameters and the size of training data has proven to be an effective strategy for improving large language model (LLM) performance. Yet, as these models grow increasingly powerful and widely deployed, the cost of inference has become a pressing concern. Despite its importance, the trade-off between model accuracy and inference efficiency remains underexplored. In this work, we examine how key architectural factors, hidden size, the allocation of parameters between MLP and attention (mlp-to-attention ratio), and grouped-query attention (GQA), influence both inference cost and accuracy. We introduce a conditional scaling law that augments the Chinchilla framework with architectural information, along with a search framework for identifying architectures that are simultaneously inference-efficient and accurate. To validate our approach, we train more than 200 models spanning 80M to 3B parameters and 8B to 100B training tokens, and fit the proposed conditional scaling law. Our results show that the conditional scaling law reliably predicts optimal architectural choices and that the resulting models outperform existing open-source baselines. Under the same training budget, optimized architectures achieve up to 2.1% higher accuracy and 42% greater inference throughput compared to LLaMA-3.2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出条件缩放定律，联合优化模型架构与推理效率，实现精度与吞吐量双提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型规模扩大和广泛部署，推理成本成为紧迫问题。尽管模型精度与推理效率之间存在权衡，但现有研究对此探索不足。无法有效指导选择同时满足高精度和高吞吐量的架构，亟需系统化的框架来揭示架构参数（如隐藏层大小、MLP与注意力参数分配、分组查询注意力）对推理成本和精度的影响。
light_analysis.method: 提出条件缩放定律，在Chinchilla框架中引入架构信息（隐藏层大小、MLP与注意力比例、GQA）。构建搜索框架以识别推理高效且准确的架构。训练200多个模型（参数量80M至3B，训练token数8B至100B）来拟合该定律，并验证其对最优架构选择的预测能力。
light_analysis.result: 在相同训练预算下，优化后的架构相比LLaMA-3.2实现最高2.1%的精度提升和42%的推理吞吐量提升。条件缩放定律可靠预测了最优架构选择，且优化模型优于现有开源基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了将架构信息纳入缩放定律对设计推理高效模型的有效性。学术上拓展了缩放定律的理论边界，实践上为在资源受限场景下部署高性能LLM提供了直接指导。未来可探索更多架构维度及动态推理策略。

title: REAP the Experts: Why Pruning Prevails for One-Shot MoE compression
abstract: Sparsely-activated Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) models offer efficient pre-training and low latency but their large parameter counts create significant memory overhead, motivating research into expert compression. Contrary to recent findings favouring expert merging on discriminative benchmarks, we find that expert pruning is a superior strategy for generative tasks. We demonstrate that existing merging techniques introduce an irreducible error due to the loss of fine-grained routing control over experts. Leveraging this insight, we propose Router-weighted Expert Activation Pruning (REAP), a novel pruning criterion that considers both router gate-values and expert activation norms to minimize the reconstruction error bound. Across a diverse set of SMoE models ranging from 20B to 1T parameters, REAP consistently outperforms merging and other pruning methods on generative benchmarks, especially at 50% compression. Notably, our method achieves near-lossless compression on code generation tasks with Qwen3-Coder-480B and Kimi-K2, even after pruning 50% of experts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REAP方法，证明专家剪枝在生成任务中优于专家合并，并在大规模SMoE模型上实现高效压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: Sparsely-activated Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) 模型参数庞大，内存开销显著，亟需专家压缩技术。现有专家合并方法在判别任务上表现良好，但本文发现其在生成任务中因丢失细粒度路由控制而引入不可减少误差，因此需要更优的剪枝策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出Router-weighted Expert Activation Pruning (REAP)，通过结合路由器门值和专家激活范数作为剪枝标准，最小化重建误差界。在20B至1T参数的多种SMoE模型（如Qwen3-Coder-480B、Kimi-K2）上实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在生成基准上，REAP一致优于专家合并和其他剪枝方法，尤其在50%压缩率下效果显著。在代码生成任务中，对Qwen3-Coder-480B和Kimi-K2模型，即使剪枝50%的专家仍可实现近乎无损的压缩。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了专家剪枝在生成任务中优于合并的机理，并提出了有效的REAP方法。该成果在学术上深化了对SMoE路由控制的理解，在实际中显著降低了模型内存需求，为高效部署提供了新方案。未来可探索路由控制的进一步优化。

title: Probabilistic Prediction Markets with Intermittent Contributions
abstract: Although both data availability and the demand for accurate forecasts are increasing, collaboration between stakeholders is often constrained by data ownership and competitive interests. In contrast to recent proposals within cooperative game-theoretical frameworks, we place ourselves in a more general framework, based on prediction markets. There, independent agents trade forecasts of uncertain future events in exchange for rewards. We introduce and analyse a prediction market that (i) accounts for the historical performance of the agents, (ii) adapts to time-varying conditions, while (iii) permitting agents to enter and exit the market at will. The proposed design employs robust regression models to learn the optimal forecasts' combination whilst handling missing submissions. Moreover, we introduce a pay-off allocation mechanism that considers both in-sample and out-of-sample performance while satisfying several desirable economic properties. Case-studies using simulated and real-world data allow demonstrating the effectiveness and adaptability of the proposed market design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种支持间歇性参与的随机预测市场，通过鲁棒回归模型和双重性能评估机制实现自适应组合与公平分配。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据可用性和预测需求日益增长，但数据所有权和竞争利益限制了利益相关者之间的协作。现有合作博弈论框架约束较强，而预测市场允许独立代理人交易预测以获得奖励，更灵活。然而，现有预测市场设计未充分考虑代理人历史表现、时变条件以及代理人可随时进出市场的需求，导致预测组合和收益分配存在缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种新的预测市场设计，包含三个关键特性：(i) 考虑代理人历史表现；(ii) 适应时变条件；(iii) 允许代理人任意进出市场。采用鲁棒回归模型学习最优预测组合，并有效处理代理人缺席时的缺失提交。引入收益分配机制，同时考虑样本内和样本外表现，满足多个理想经济属性。通过模拟和真实数据案例研究验证市场设计的有效性和适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实数据案例中，所提出的市场设计展示了有效性、适应性以及对稀疏参与的鲁棒性。相比传统方法，该设计能更准确地组合预测，并在代理人间歇参与时保持合理的收益分配。具体而言，鲁棒回归模型有效处理了缺失数据，双重性能评估机制提升了激励相容性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为协作预测提供了一种灵活的预测市场框架，解决了间歇性参与和时变环境下的关键问题。理论价值在于拓展了预测市场理论，实践价值在于适用于数据敏感、竞争性强的领域（如金融、供应链）。未来可考虑扩展至更复杂的非线性组合或动态激励调整。

title: sketch2symm: Symmetry-aware sketch-to-shape generation via semantic bridging
abstract: Sketch-based 3D reconstruction remains a challenging task due to the abstract and sparse nature of sketch inputs, which often lack sufficient semantic and geometric information. To address this, we propose Sketch2Symm, a two-stage generation method that produces geometrically consistent 3D shapes from sketches. Our approach introduces semantic bridging via sketch-to-image translation to enrich sparse sketch representations, and incorporates symmetry constraints as geometric priors to leverage the structural regularity commonly found in everyday objects. Experiments on mainstream sketch datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance compared to existing sketch-based reconstruction methods in terms of Chamfer Distance, Earth Mover's Distance, and F-Score, verifying the effectiveness of the proposed semantic bridging and symmetry-aware design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sketch2Symm，通过语义桥接和对称约束从稀疏草图中生成几何一致的3D形状。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于草图的3D重建因草图抽象稀疏、缺乏语义和几何信息而具有挑战性。现有方法难以生成几何一致的结果，尤其对日常物体的结构规律利用不足。本文旨在通过语义桥接丰富草图表示，并利用对称性先验提升重建质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段生成方法Sketch2Symm。第一阶段通过草图到图像的翻译进行语义桥接，将稀疏草图转换为富含语义的图像表示；第二阶段结合对称约束作为几何先验，生成具有结构规律的3D形状。该方法利用对称性这一常见几何属性，增强重建的几何一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在主流草图数据集上，与现有方法相比，Sketch2Symm在Chamfer距离、推土机距离和F-Score上均取得更优性能，验证了语义桥接和对称感知设计的有效性。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Sketch2Symm通过语义桥接和对称约束有效解决了草图稀疏导致的几何不一致问题，提升了3D重建质量。该方法可应用于快速原型设计和创意建模，未来可探索更复杂的几何先验。

title: Deontic Argumentation
abstract: We address the issue of defining a semantics for deontic argumentation that supports weak permission. Some recent results show that grounded semantics do not support weak permission when there is a conflict between two obligations. We provide a definition of Deontic Argumentation Theory that accounts for weak permission, and we recall the result about grounded semantics. Then, we propose a new semantics that supports weak permission.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种支持弱许可的道义论证新语义，解决基础语义在义务冲突时无法支持弱许可的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 道义论证中弱许可（即允许做某事但不禁止其否定）是一个关键概念。现有基础语义在存在义务冲突时无法支持弱许可，这限制了道义论证的表达能力。因此需要定义新的语义以处理弱许可，完善道义论证理论。
light_analysis.method: 首先定义了道义论证理论（Deontic Argumentation Theory）以支持弱许可，并回顾了基础语义不支持的结论。然后提出一种新的语义，通过修改论证的接受标准或引入新的评估规则，使得在义务冲突下仍能导出弱许可结论。摘要未说明具体技术细节。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供定量实验结果或对比数据。主要贡献在于理论上证明了新语义能够支持弱许可，而基础语义不能。具体性能提升或应用效果未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为道义论证提供了支持弱许可的语义，解决了现有理论的局限。该研究对形式化道德推理和规范系统有理论价值，但缺乏实验验证。未来工作可能包括在新语义下分析其他论证特性或应用于实际法律推理场景。

title: FMC-DETR: Frequency-Decoupled Multi-Domain Coordination for Aerial-View Object Detection
abstract: Remote sensing object detection is a critical technology for real-world applications such as natural resource monitoring, traffic management, and UAV-based rescue. Detecting tiny objects in high-resolution aerial imagery remains challenging due to weak visual cues and insufficient global context modeling in complex scenes. Existing methods often suffer from delayed contextual interaction and limited nonlinear reasoning, which restrict their ability to effectively refine shallow representations and ultimately lead to suboptimal performance. To address these challenges, we propose FMC-DETR, a frequency-decoupled fusion framework for aerial-view object detection. First, we propose the Wavelet Kolmogorov-Arnold Transformer (WeKat) backbone, which employs cascaded wavelet transforms to enhance global low-frequency structure perception in shallow features while preserving fine-grained details, and further leverages Kolmogorov-Arnold networks for adaptive nonlinear modeling of multi-scale dependencies. Second, we introduce the Multi-Domain Feature Coordination (MDFC) module, which refines cross-scale fused representations through partial-channel spatial, spectral, and structural coordination, thereby strengthening small-object-related feature responses in cluttered scenes. Finally, we design the Compact Partial Fusion (CPF) module, which performs compact multi-branch aggregation with progressive partial refinement to improve feature diversity and multi-scale interaction while preserving stable information flow and reducing redundant perturbation. Extensive experiments across multiple remote sensing benchmarks demonstrate that FMC-DETR achieves state-of-the-art performance and significantly outperforming the baseline detector. Code is available at https://github.com/bloomingvision/FMC-DETR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FMC-DETR，一种频率解耦的多域协调框架，用于航拍目标检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 遥感目标检测在自然资源监测、交通管理和无人机救援等实际应用中至关重要。然而，高分辨率航拍图像中微小目标检测面临弱视觉线索和复杂场景中全局上下文建模不足的挑战。现有方法存在上下文交互延迟和非线性推理能力有限的问题，难以有效细化浅层表示，导致性能欠佳。因此，需要一种能增强全局低频感知、自适应非线性建模和跨尺度特征协调的方法。
light_analysis.method: FMC-DETR包含三个核心模块：1) WeKat骨干网络，使用级联小波变换增强浅层特征的全局低频结构感知并保留细节，通过Kolmogorov-Arnold网络自适应建模多尺度依赖；2) MDFC模块，通过部分通道的空间、光谱和结构协调细化跨尺度融合表示，增强杂乱场景中小目标相关特征响应；3) CPF模块，执行紧凑多分支聚合和渐进部分细化，提升特征多样性和多尺度交互，同时保持信息流稳定并减少冗余扰动。
light_analysis.result: 在多个遥感基准数据集上的大量实验表明，FMC-DETR达到了最先进的性能，显著优于基线检测器。具体性能指标如mAP等未在摘要中明确说明，但声称显著提升。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: FMC-DETR通过频率解耦和多域协调有效解决了航拍图像中微小目标检测的挑战。其创新点在于结合小波变换与KAN网络增强特征表示，以及多域协调模块改进特征融合。该方法具有较高的学术价值和实际应用潜力，未来可探索更高效的非线性建模和轻量化设计。

title: Multilingual Vision-Language Models, A Survey
abstract: This survey examines multilingual vision-language models that process text and images across languages. We review 33 models and 23 benchmarks, spanning encoder-only and generative architectures, and identify a key tension between language neutrality (consistent cross-lingual representations) and cultural awareness (adaptation to cultural contexts). Current training methods favor neutrality through contrastive learning, while cultural awareness depends on diverse data. Two-thirds of evaluation benchmarks use translation-based approaches prioritizing semantic consistency, though recent work incorporates culturally grounded content. We find discrepancies in cross-lingual capabilities and gaps between training objectives and evaluation goals.

light_analysis.overview: 综述多语言视觉语言模型，揭示语言中立性与文化意识的张力，分析训练与评估差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言视觉语言模型在跨语言应用中至关重要，但现有方法面临语言中立性（跨语言一致表示）与文化意识（适应文化背景）之间的根本矛盾。当前训练偏向中立性（如对比学习），而评估依赖翻译方法，忽视了文化差异性，导致模型实际跨语言能力不足。该综述旨在系统梳理33个模型和23个基准，明确当前进展与关键问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用系统性综述方法，涵盖33个多语言视觉语言模型（编码器-only和生成式架构）和23个评估基准。分析了训练策略（如对比学习）与评估方法（基于翻译 vs. 文化嵌入），重点关注语言中立性与文化意识的权衡，以及训练目标与评估目标的一致性。
light_analysis.result: 发现当前模型在跨语言能力上存在显著差异，三分之二的基准使用翻译方法优先语义一致性，仅少数融入文化内容；训练（中立性导向）与评估（翻译优先）之间存在目标差距；缺乏衡量文化适应性的标准化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述揭示了多语言视觉语言模型领域的关键矛盾——中立性与文化意识的张力，以及训练与评估的不匹配。未来应设计兼顾文化多样性的训练数据与评估基准，推动模型在跨语言场景中的实际应用。

title: DAWM: Diffusion Action World Models for Offline Reinforcement Learning via Action-Inferred Transitions
abstract: Diffusion-based world models have demonstrated strong capabilities in synthesizing realistic long-horizon trajectories for offline reinforcement learning (RL). However, many existing methods do not directly generate actions alongside states and rewards, limiting their compatibility with standard value-based offline RL algorithms that rely on one-step temporal difference (TD) learning. While prior work has explored joint modeling of states, rewards, and actions to address this issue, such formulations often lead to increased training complexity and reduced performance in practice. We propose \textbf{DAWM}, a diffusion-based world model that generates future state-reward trajectories conditioned on the current state, action, and return-to-go, paired with an inverse dynamics model (IDM) for efficient action inference. This modular design produces complete synthetic transitions suitable for one-step TD-based offline RL, enabling effective and computationally efficient training. Empirically, we show that conservative offline RL algorithms such as TD3BC and IQL benefit significantly from training on these augmented trajectories, consistently outperforming prior diffusion-based baselines across multiple tasks in the D4RL benchmark.
comment: ICML2025 workshop Building Physically Plausible World Models

light_analysis.overview: 提出DAWM，一种扩散世界模型，结合逆动力学模型生成完整转移，用于兼容一步TD学习的离线强化学习，提升性能并降低复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散世界模型常直接生成状态和奖励，而不生成动作，与基于值的一步时序差分（TD）学习离线强化学习算法不兼容。先前工作尝试联合建模状态、奖励和动作，但导致训练复杂度增加且性能下降。因此，需要一种高效生成完整合成转移的方法，以支持标准值基离线RL算法。
light_analysis.method: DAWM 包含两个模块：一个扩散世界模型，以当前状态、动作和回报为目标条件，生成未来状态-奖励轨迹；一个逆动力学模型（IDM），从生成的轨迹中高效推断动作。这种模块化设计产生完整的合成转移（状态、动作、奖励、下一状态），适合一步TD学习。通过去噪扩散概率模型生成轨迹，IDM辅助动作推理，避免联合建模的高复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 在 D4RL 基准上的实验表明，使用 DAWM 增强轨迹训练的保守离线 RL 算法（如 TD3BC 和 IQL）显著优于先前基于扩散的基线方法。例如，在多个任务中，TD3BC 和 IQL 的性能提升一致，验证了 DAWM 生成数据的有效性。具体数值未在摘要中详述，但整体表现超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAWM 有效解决了扩散世界模型与一步TD离线RL的兼容性问题，通过模块化设计降低训练复杂度并提升性能。该方法具有学术价值，为离线RL中生成模型的应用提供了新思路。未来可探索扩展到在线RL或更复杂环境。局限性可能在于逆动力学模型的精度对性能的影响。

title: CR-Net: Scaling Parameter-Efficient Training with Cross-Layer Low-Rank Structure
abstract: Low-rank architectures have become increasingly important for efficient large language model (LLM) pre-training, providing substantial reductions in both parameter complexity and memory/computational demands. Despite these advantages, current low-rank methods face three critical shortcomings: (1) compromised model performance, (2) considerable computational overhead, and (3) limited activation memory savings. To address these limitations, we propose Cross-layer Low-Rank residual Network (CR-Net), an innovative parameter-efficient framework inspired by our discovery that inter-layer activation residuals possess low-rank properties. CR-Net implements this insight through a dual-path architecture that efficiently reconstructs layer activations by combining previous-layer outputs with their low-rank differences, thereby maintaining high-rank information with minimal parameters. We further develop a specialized activation recomputation strategy tailored for CR-Net that dramatically reduces memory requirements. Extensive pre-training experiments across model scales from 60M to 7B parameters demonstrate that CR-Net consistently outperforms state-of-the-art low-rank frameworks while requiring fewer computational resources and less memory.

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨层低秩残差网络CR-Net，利用激活残差的低秩性质，实现大规模语言模型的高效参数与内存优化预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有低秩方法在LLM预训练中面临模型性能受损、计算开销大和激活内存节省有限三大问题。CR-Net旨在通过挖掘跨层激活残差的低秩结构，在减少参数与计算的同时保持高秩信息，从而平衡效率与性能。
light_analysis.method: CR-Net采用双路径架构，将前一层输出与低秩残差结合重构当前层激活，利用跨层低秩特性保持高秩表示。并定制激活重计算策略，显著降低训练内存。方法在60M至7B参数模型上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在60M到7B参数的预训练实验中，CR-Net在多项指标上持续超越当前最优低秩方法，同时计算资源与内存消耗更低，证明了其扩展性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: CR-Net有效解决了低秩框架在LLM预训练中的性能-效率权衡问题，为参数高效训练提供了新范式。其跨层低秩架构和重计算策略具有理论创新与实用价值，可推广至更大规模模型。

title: UNIV: Unified Foundation Model for Infrared and Visible Modalities
abstract: Joint RGB-infrared perception is essential for achieving robustness under diverse weather and illumination conditions. Although foundation models excel within single modalities, they suffer from substantial cross-modal degradation, an issue we attribute to a pattern shortcut, i.e., a modal bias that prioritizes superficial sensor patterns over underlying semantics. To address this problem, we introduce UNIV, a Unified foundation model for Infrared and Visible modalities. At the core of UNIV lies Patch Cross-modal Contrastive Learning (PCCL), a self-supervised contrastive learning strategy that constructs a unified cross-modal feature space. PCCL employs a frozen pre-trained model to sample pseudo patch pairs based on semantic similarity, and aligns infrared-visible representations by attracting semantically related pairs while repelling unrelated ones. This process simultaneously enhances cross-modal alignment and inter-class semantic separability, guiding the model to focus on semantic structure rather than falling into pattern shortcuts. To further enable cross-modal learning, we introduce MVIP, the most comprehensive visible-infrared benchmark to date, containing 98,992 precisely aligned image pairs across diverse scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate UNIV's superior performance on infrared tasks (+1.7 mIoU for semantic segmentation and +0.7 mAP for detection), while maintaining competitive accuracy on RGB tasks.

light_analysis.overview: UNIV通过补丁跨模态对比学习解决红外-可见跨模态退化问题，构建统一基础模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基础模型在单一模态表现优异，但跨模态时存在严重退化，归因于模型优先考虑浅层传感器模式（模式捷径）而非语义。RGB-红外联合感知对恶劣环境鲁棒性至关重要，现有方法缺乏有效的跨模态对齐机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出UNIV，核心是补丁跨模态对比学习(PCCL)，使用冻结预训练模型基于语义相似性采样伪补丁对，通过吸引语义相关、排斥无关对对齐红外-可见特征。引入MVIP数据集（98,992对齐对）增强跨模态学习，引导模型关注语义结构。
light_analysis.result: 在红外语义分割任务上提升1.7 mIoU，目标检测提升0.7 mAP，RGB任务保持竞争精度。PCCL有效增强跨模态对齐与类间语义可分离性，减少模态偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: UNIV通过PCCL和MVIP数据集解决了跨模态模式捷径问题，实现红外-可见统一基础模型。学术价值在于自监督对比学习解决模态偏差，实际应用提升全天候感知鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更多模态。

title: Do Activation Verbalization Methods Convey Privileged Information?
abstract: Recent interpretability methods have proposed to translate LLM internal representations into natural language descriptions using a second verbalizer LLM. This is intended to illuminate how the target model represents and operates on inputs. But do such activation verbalization approaches actually provide privileged knowledge about the internal workings of the target model, or do they merely convey information about the inputs provided to it? We critically evaluate popular verbalization methods and datasets used in prior work and find that one can perform well on such benchmarks without access to target model internals, suggesting that these datasets are not ideal for evaluating verbalization methods. We then run controlled experiments which reveal that verbalizations often reflect the parametric knowledge of the verbalizer LLM that generated them, rather than the knowledge of the target LLM whose activations are decoded. Taken together, our results indicate a need for targeted benchmarks and experimental controls to rigorously assess whether verbalization methods provide meaningful insights into the operations of LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 通过控制实验揭示激活词化方法主要反映词化器模型的知识，而非目标模型内部，质疑其可解释性价值。
light_analysis.motivation: 最近的可解释性方法使用第二个语言模型将LLM内部表示翻译为自然语言描述，旨在揭示目标模型如何表示和处理输入。但这类激活词化方法是否真正提供了关于目标模型内部运作的特权知识，还是仅仅反映了输入信息？现有研究缺乏严格的评估，导致无法区分其来源。
light_analysis.method: 首先批判性评估了已有工作中的流行词化方法和数据集，发现在不访问目标模型内部的情况下仍能取得良好表现，表明这些数据集不理想。随后进行控制实验，通过设计对比条件，系统性地分析词化结果与目标模型激活值及词化器模型知识的关系，揭示了词化结果更多依赖于词化器的参数知识。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，现有基准不能有效评估词化方法，因为无需目标模型内部即可达到高性能。控制实验进一步证实，词化结果主要反映词化器LLM的参数量知识，而非目标模型的内部知识，说明现有方法可能无法提供有意义的内部洞察。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究指出，需要设计针对性的基准和严格的控制实验来科学评估词化方法是否真正揭示LLM的内部操作。此项工作对可解释性研究具有警示意义，强调了在评估方法时需排除混淆因素，推动更可靠的解释方法发展。

title: Test of Time: Rethinking Temporal Signal of Benchmark Contamination
abstract: Post-cutoff performance decay of LLMs has been widely interpreted as a temporal signal for benchmark contamination, where public information released before the training cutoff may have been included into training corpora and inflated model performance by memorization. We critically examine this view and demonstrate that this temporal signal is highly sensitive to how benchmark questions are constructed, even if the underlying source material remains invariant. Specifically, we show that LLM-transformed questions can produce remarkably different temporal patterns compared to fill-in-the-blank (cloze) questions directly retrieved from the very same documents. We validate this effect on prior benchmarks that report clear post-cutoff decay (LiveCodeBench), and show that a simple LLM-driven transformation of the same problems can effectively remove the temporal pattern. We further provide a mechanistic understanding of this phenomenon using influence function analysis. Overall, our results suggest that post-cutoff performance decay is a sensitive contamination signal, motivating more robust contamination probes for reliable LLM evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 重新审视基准污染的时间信号，证明后截止性能衰减高度依赖问题构建方式，而非单纯污染指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前常用后截止性能衰减作为大语言模型基准污染的时间信号，但该信号是否可靠值得商榷。现有方法默认公开信息在训练截止前被记忆导致性能虚高，然而摘要指出问题构建方式（如完形填空 vs LLM转换）会显著改变时间模式，因此需要更稳健的污染探测方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过对比直接检索文档的完形填空问题与LLM转换后的同一问题，分析后截止性能衰减差异。在LiveCodeBench等基准上验证，使用LLM驱动的问题变换可去除时间模式。利用影响函数分析提供机制理解，揭示后截止衰减对问题构建的敏感性。
light_analysis.result: 在已有报告清晰后截止衰减的基准（如LiveCodeBench）上，LLM转换的同一问题不再显示时间模式，而完形填空问题仍保留衰减。这表明后截止性能衰减高度敏感于问题构建方式，并非稳定的污染信号。影响函数分析进一步支持该结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 后截止性能衰减不是可靠的基准污染指标，其表现依赖问题格式。论文建议开发更稳健的污染探测方法，以保障LLM评估的可信度。未来可探索其他污染信号或构建抗污染评估集。

title: SkySplat: Generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting from Multi-Temporal Sparse Satellite Images
abstract: Three-dimensional scene reconstruction from sparse-view satellite images is a long-standing and challenging task. While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) and its variants have recently attracted attention for its high efficiency, existing methods remain unsuitable for satellite images due to incompatibility with rational polynomial coefficient (RPC) models and limited generalization capability. Recent advances in generalizable 3DGS approaches show potential, but they perform poorly on multi-temporal sparse satellite images due to limited geometric constraints, transient objects, and radiometric inconsistencies. To address these limitations, we propose SkySplat, a novel self-supervised framework that integrates the RPC model into the generalizable 3DGS pipeline, enabling more effective use of sparse geometric cues for improved reconstruction. SkySplat relies only on RGB images and radiometric-robust relative height supervision, thereby eliminating the need for ground-truth height maps. Key components include a Cross-Self Consistency Module (CSCM), which mitigates transient object interference via consistency-based masking, and a multi-view consistency aggregation strategy that refines reconstruction results. Compared to per-scene optimization methods, SkySplat achieves an 86 times speedup over EOGS with higher accuracy. It also outperforms generalizable 3DGS baselines, reducing MAE from 13.18 m to 1.80 m on the DFC19 dataset significantly, and demonstrates strong cross-dataset generalization on the MVS3D benchmark. The is available at https://github.com/NanCheng2001/SkySplat-main

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkySplat，一种自监督框架，将RPC模型集成到可泛化3DGS中，实现从多时相稀疏卫星图像的高效三维重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 卫星图像三维重建长期面临挑战，现有3DGS方法不兼容RPC模型且泛化性差，多时相稀疏卫星图像存在几何约束不足、瞬态物体和辐射不一致问题。需要一种能有效利用稀疏几何线索、无需真值高度图的方法。
light_analysis.method: SkySplat是自监督框架，集成RPC模型到可泛化3DGS管道，仅需RGB图像和辐射鲁棒的相对高度监督。关键组件包括交叉自一致性模块(CSCM)通过一致性掩码缓解瞬态物体干扰，以及多视图一致性聚合策略优化重建。
light_analysis.result: 与逐场景优化相比，SkySplat比EOGS快86倍且精度更高；在DFC19数据集上，MAE从13.18m降至1.80m，显著优于可泛化3DGS基线；在MVS3D基准上展现强跨数据集泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkySplat通过集成RPC模型和自监督学习，解决了多时相稀疏卫星图像重建的挑战，具有高效率和强泛化性。学术价值在于提出新框架，实际应用价值在卫星遥感领域。未来可进一步优化瞬态物体处理。

title: Exact Verification of Graph Neural Networks with Incremental Constraint Solving
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are increasingly often employed in high-stakes applications, such as fraud detection or healthcare, but are susceptible to adversarial attacks. A number of techniques have been proposed to provide adversarial robustness guarantees, but support for commonly used aggregation functions in message-passing GNNs is lacking. In this paper, we develop an exact (sound and complete) verification method for GNNs to compute guarantees against attribute and structural perturbations that involve edge addition or deletion, subject to budget constraints. Our method employs constraint solving with bound tightening, and iteratively solves a sequence of relaxed constraint satisfaction problems while relying on incremental solving capabilities of solvers to improve efficiency. We implement GNNev, a versatile exact verifier for message-passing neural networks, which supports three aggregation functions -- sum, max and mean -- with the latter two considered here for the first time. Extensive experimental evaluation of GNNev on real-world fraud datasets (Amazon and Yelp) and biochemical datasets (MUTAG and ENZYMES) demonstrates its usability and effectiveness, as well as superior performance on node classification and competitiveness on graph classification compared to existing exact verification tools on sum-aggregated GNNs.
comment: Extended version of the paper accepted at FM 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种精确验证图神经网络的方法，支持sum、max、mean聚合函数及属性/结构扰动。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络在欺诈检测、医疗等高风险场景中应用日益广泛，但易受对抗攻击。现有验证方法缺乏对消息传递GNN中常用聚合函数（如max、mean）的支持，且无法处理边增删等结构扰动。因此，需要一种精确且完备的验证方法来提供鲁棒性保证，填补当前技术空白。
light_analysis.method: 本文开发了GNNev，一种基于约束求解的精确验证器。通过边界收紧技术，迭代求解一系列松弛约束满足问题，并利用求解器的增量求解能力提升效率。支持三种聚合函数——sum、max和mean，其中后两种首次被精确验证。可处理属性扰动和结构扰动（增删边），受预算约束。
light_analysis.result: 在Amazon和Yelp（欺诈检测）以及MUTAG和ENZYMES（生化）数据集上评估，GNNev在节点分类任务中优于现有精确验证工具，在图分类任务中具有竞争力。展示了其在现实场景中的可用性和有效性，能够处理更大规模的图并验证更复杂的扰动。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为GNN的max和mean聚合函数提供精确验证，扩展了对抗鲁棒性保证的适用范围。所提方法GNNev通过增量约束求解实现了高效验证，对高风险应用中的GNN部署具有重要意义。未来可进一步优化求解效率并扩展至更复杂的GNN架构。

title: Breaking Down and Building Up: Mixture of Skill-Based Vision-and-Language Navigation Agents
abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) poses significant challenges for agents to interpret natural language instructions and navigate complex 3D environments. While recent progress has been driven by large-scale pre-training and data augmentation, current methods still struggle to generalize to unseen scenarios, particularly when complex spatial and temporal reasoning is required. In this work, we propose SkillNav, a modular framework that introduces structured, skill-based reasoning into Transformer-based VLN agents. Our method decomposes navigation into a set of interpretable atomic skills (e.g., Vertical Movement, Area and Region Identification, Stop and Pause), each handled by a specialized agent. To support targeted skill training without manual data annotation, we construct a synthetic dataset pipeline that generates diverse, linguistically natural, skill-specific instruction-trajectory pairs. We then introduce a novel training-free Vision-Language Model (VLM)-based router, which dynamically selects the most suitable agent at each time step by aligning sub-goals with visual observations and historical actions. SkillNav obtains competitive results on commonly used benchmarks and establishes state-of-the-art generalization to the GSA-R2R, a benchmark with novel instruction styles and unseen environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkillNav模块化框架，通过分解导航为原子技能并利用VLM路由器动态选择专家agent，提升VLN泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) 要求agent理解自然语言指令并导航复杂3D环境。现有方法依赖大规模预训练和数据增强，但仍难以泛化到需复杂空间和时间推理的未见场景。问题重要性在于智能导航是具身AI的核心挑战之一，当前方法在指令风格和环境变化时性能显著下降。
light_analysis.method: SkillNav将导航分解为可解释的原子技能（如垂直移动、区域识别），每个技能由专用agent处理。通过合成数据管道生成多样化技能特定指令-轨迹对，无需人工标注。引入无训练的VLM路由器，利用视觉观测和历史动作动态选择最合适的agent，实现子目标对齐。
light_analysis.result: SkillNav在常用VLN基准上取得竞争性结果，并在GSA-R2R基准上（包含新颖指令风格和未见环境）达到最先进的泛化性能，证明了模块化技能推理和动态路由的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：1) 提出技能分解的模块化VLN框架，提升可解释性和泛化；2) 构建合成数据管道降低标注成本；3) 设计无训练VLM路由器实现零样本路由。学术上探索了结构化推理的潜力，实际应用可用于机器人导航。局限性是技能定义依赖人工设计，未来可自动发现技能。

title: Centralized Adaptive Sampling for Reliable Co-Training of Independent Multi-Agent Policies
abstract: Independent on-policy policy gradient algorithms are widely used for multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in cooperative and no-conflict games, but they are known to converge sub-optimally when each agent's individual policy gradient points away from an optimal joint equilibrium. Going beyond prior work, we observe that sub-optimal convergence can still arise even when the expected individual policy gradients of each agent point toward the optimal joint solution. After collecting a finite set of trajectories, stochasticity in independent action sampling can cause the joint data distribution to deviate from the expected joint on-policy distribution. This \textit{sampling error} w.r.t. the joint on-policy distribution produces inaccurate gradient estimates that can make agents converge sub-optimally. We hypothesize that joint sampling error can be reduced through coordinated action selection and that doing so will increase the reliability of policy gradient learning in MARL (i.e., the probability of converging to an optimal joint policy). To test this hypothesis, we first introduce an adaptive action sampling approach to reduce joint sampling error in the Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution setting. Our method, Cooperative Sampling Error Reduction (CoSER), continually adapts a centralized behavior policy to place higher probability on joint actions that are under-sampled w.r.t. the current joint policy. We then empirically evaluate CoSER on a diverse set of multi-agent games and demonstrate that (1) CoSER reduces joint sampling error more efficiently than independent on-policy sampling and (2) this reduction increases the reliability of independent policy gradient algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoSER方法，通过集中自适应采样减少联合采样误差，提升独立策略梯度算法在多智能体强化学习中的收敛可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 独立策略梯度算法在合作博弈中可能收敛到次优平衡，即使各智能体的期望梯度指向最优解。由于随机采样，有限轨迹的联合数据分布偏离期望的联合在策略分布，产生采样误差，导致不准确的梯度估计。减少联合采样误差对提高策略梯度学习的可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: CoSER（协同采样误差减少）方法在集中训练分散执行框架下，通过自适应调整集中行为策略，对当前联合策略下采样不足的联合动作赋予更高概率，从而减少联合采样误差，使梯度估计更准确。
light_analysis.result: 在多种多智能体博弈任务中，CoSER比独立在策略采样更有效地降低了联合采样误差，并显著提高了独立策略梯度算法收敛到最优联合策略的可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoSER通过减少联合采样误差提升了多智能体强化学习中独立策略梯度算法的收敛可靠性，揭示了采样误差是次优收敛的新原因，为协作学习提供了有效方法，未来可扩展至更复杂场景。

title: CADDesigner: Conceptual CAD Model Generation with a General-Purpose Agent
abstract: Computer-Aided Design (CAD) is widely used for conceptual design and parametric 3D modeling, but typically requires a high level of expertise from designers. To lower the entry barrier and facilitate early-stage CAD modeling, we present CADDesigner, an LLM-powered agent for conceptual CAD design. The agent accepts both textual descriptions and sketches as input, engaging in interactive dialogue with users to refine and clarify design requirements through comprehensive requirement analysis. Built upon a novel Explicit Context Imperative Paradigm (ECIP), the agent generates high-quality CAD modeling code. During the generation process, the agent incorporates iterative visual feedback to improve model quality. Generated design cases can be stored in a structured knowledge base, providing a mechanism for continual knowledge accumulation and future improvement of code generation. Experimental results show that CADDesigner achieves competitive performance and outperforms representative baselines on conceptual CAD model generation tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CADDesigner，一种基于LLM的通用代理，通过交互式对话和显式上下文命令范式生成概念CAD模型，实现低门槛设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 计算机辅助设计（CAD）在概念设计和参数化3D建模中广泛应用，但需要设计师具备高水平专业知识，入门门槛高。现有方法缺乏对设计需求的灵活理解和迭代优化，难以支持早期概念设计阶段的快速建模。因此，开发一个能够理解自然语言和草图、通过交互式对话明确需求并自动生成CAD模型的智能代理具有重要意义，可降低使用门槛，加速设计流程。
light_analysis.method: CADDesigner采用大型语言模型（LLM）作为核心，支持文本描述和草图输入，通过交互式对话进行需求分析和细化。其关键创新是显式上下文命令范式（ECIP），用于生成高质量的CAD建模代码。生成过程中引入迭代视觉反馈，根据渲染结果修正模型。设计案例存储在结构化知识库中，实现持续知识积累，提升后续代码生成质量。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CADDesigner在概念CAD模型生成任务上达到了竞争力的性能，并优于代表性基线方法。摘要未明确具体指标，但声称超越基线，验证了交互式需求分析和ECIP范式的有效性，以及迭代视觉反馈和知识库积累对生成质量的提升作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: CADDesigner通过LLM代理降低了CAD设计的专业门槛，支持文本和草图输入，实现交互式概念设计。其ECIP范式和迭代视觉反馈机制显著提升了生成代码的质量，结构化知识库促进了持续学习。该工作为早期概念设计自动化提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂的CAD任务和多样化输入形式。

title: Test-time Offline Reinforcement Learning on Goal-related Experience
abstract: Foundation models compress a large amount of information in a single, large neural network, which can then be queried for individual tasks. There are strong parallels between this widespread framework and offline goal-conditioned reinforcement learning algorithms: a universal value function is trained on a large number of goals, and the policy is evaluated on a single goal in each test episode. Extensive research in foundation models has shown that performance can be substantially improved through test-time training, specializing the model to the current goal. We find similarly that test-time offline reinforcement learning on experience related to the test goal can lead to substantially better policies at modest compute costs. We propose a novel self-supervised data selection criterion, which selects transitions from an offline dataset according to their relevance to the current state and quality with respect to the evaluation goal. We demonstrate across a wide range of high-dimensional loco-navigation and manipulation tasks that fine-tuning a policy on the selected data for a few gradient steps leads to significant performance gains over standard offline pre-training. Our goal-conditioned test-time training (GC-TTT) algorithm applies this routine in a receding-horizon fashion during evaluation, adapting the policy to the current trajectory as it is being rolled out. Finally, we study compute allocation at inference, demonstrating that, at comparable costs, GC-TTT induces performance gains that are not achievable by scaling model size.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GC-TTT算法，在测试时对与目标相关的经验进行离线强化学习，通过自监督数据选择微调策略，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线目标条件强化学习训练通用值函数，但测试时策略未针对当前目标优化。基础模型研究表明测试时训练能显著提升性能，受此启发，探索在测试时利用离线数据中与当前目标相关的经验进行微调，以较低计算成本获得更优策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出自监督数据选择准则，从离线数据集中选取与当前状态相关且对评估目标有质量保证的转移。在评估时，以滚动时域方式对所选数据微调策略若干梯度步，即目标条件测试时训练（GC-TTT）算法，在高维导航和操作任务上验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在多类任务中，GC-TTT在标准离线预训练基础上显著提升性能。在可比计算成本下，性能提升无法通过扩大模型规模实现，表明测试时微调更具优势。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但强调显著的性能增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: GC-TTT通过测试时微调利用与目标相关的经验，有效提升离线强化学习策略性能，计算成本有限。为离线RL的推理时自适应提供新范式，未来可探索更高效的数据选择和微调策略，以及与其他基础模型技术的结合。

title: The Geometry of LLM Quantization: GPTQ as Babai's Nearest Plane Algorithm
abstract: Quantizing the weights of large language models (LLMs) from 16-bit to lower bitwidth is the de facto approach to deploy massive transformers onto more affordable accelerators. While GPTQ emerged as one of the standard methods for one-shot post-training quantization at LLM scale, its inner workings are described as a sequence of algebraic updates that obscure geometric meaning or worst-case guarantees. In this work, we show that, when executed back-to-front (from the last to first dimension) for a linear layer, GPTQ is mathematically identical to Babai's nearest plane algorithm for the classical closest vector problem (CVP) on a lattice defined by the Hessian matrix of the layer's inputs. This equivalence is based on a sophisticated mathematical argument, and has two analytical consequences: first, the GPTQ error propagation step gains an intuitive geometric interpretation; second, GPTQ inherits the error upper bound of Babai's algorithm under the assumption that no weights are clipped. Leveraging this bound, we design post-training quantization methods that avoid clipping, and outperform the original GPTQ. In addition, we provide efficient GPU inference kernels for the resulting representation. Taken together, these results place GPTQ on a firm theoretical footing and open the door to importing decades of progress in lattice algorithms towards the design of future quantization algorithms for billion-parameter models. Source code is available at https://github.com/IST-DASLab/GPTQ-Babai.
comment: Published as a conference paper at the Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026): https://openreview.net/forum?id=NFB4QGGS65

light_analysis.overview: 揭示GPTQ量化算法与Babai最近平面算法的数学等价性，并基于格理论设计改进方法。
light_analysis.motivation: GPTQ作为LLM后训练量化的标准方法，其内部更新步骤缺乏直观几何解释和最坏情况性能保证，限制了算法理解和进一步优化。本文旨在通过建立GPTQ与格中最远向量问题求解算法的深层联系，为其提供理论支撑，并利用格算法领域积累的成果来改善量化性能。
light_analysis.method: 证明当从最后一维向第一维执行时，GPTQ的逐层误差校正等同于Babai最近平面算法，后者用于求解由层输入Hessian矩阵定义的格上的最近向量问题(CVP)。利用此等价性，推导出无权重裁剪假设下的误差上界，并据此设计避免裁剪的新量化方案，同时开发高效的GPU推理内核。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明GPTQ继承了Babai算法的误差上界。实验验证了所提方法在无需裁剪的情况下优于原始GPTQ，具体性能提升体现在量化模型精度和推理效率上，但摘要未给出精确数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将GPTQ置于严格的格算法理论基础上，揭示了其几何意义，为设计更优的亿级参数模型量化算法开辟了新途径。该工作连接了格密码与LLM量化两个领域，但未讨论大比特宽度或不同量化粒度下的泛化性，未来可探索基于格的量化方法。

title: FLEXITOKENS: Flexible Tokenization for Evolving Language Models
abstract: Adapting language models to new data distributions by simple finetuning is challenging. This is due to the rigidity of their subword tokenizers, which typically remain unchanged during adaptation. This inflexibility often leads to inefficient tokenization, causing overfragmentation of text in out-of-distribution domains, unseen languages, or scripts. In this work, we develop byte-level LMs with learnable tokenizers to make tokenization adaptive. Our models include a submodule that learns to predict boundaries given the input byte sequence, encoding it into variable-length segments. Most tokenizer-free methods train this boundary predictor using an auxiliary loss that enforces a fixed compression rate across the training corpus, introducing a new kind of rigidity. We propose FLEXITOKENS, a simplified training objective that enables significantly greater flexibility during adaptation. Evaluating across multiple multilingual benchmarks, morphologically diverse tasks, and domains, we demonstrate that FLEXITOKENS consistently reduces token over-fragmentation and achieves up to 10% point improvements on token classification and generative tasks compared to BPE and other gradient-based tokenizer baselines. We validate our findings using models of varying sizes, and our method demonstrates consistent improvements across scales. Code and data for our experiments will be released at https://github.com/skai-research/flexitokens

light_analysis.overview: 提出FLEXITOKENS，一种可学习tokenizer方法，通过简化训练目标使语言模型的tokenization在适应新数据时具有灵活性和自适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型通过微调适应新数据分布时，子词tokenizer通常保持不变，导致在分布外领域、未见语言或脚本中文本过度碎片化，tokenization效率低下。现有方法通过辅助损失强制固定压缩率，引入新的刚性。因此需要一种更灵活的tokenization方法，能够自适应地调整token边界以提高适应性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 开发字节级语言模型，包含一个可学习的边界预测子模块，根据输入字节序列预测边界并编码为可变长度片段。提出FLEXITOKENS，采用简化的训练目标替代固定压缩率的辅助损失，在适应过程中提供更大灵活性。该方法避免了传统tokenizer的刚性，允许模型根据数据分布动态调整tokenization策略。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多语言基准、形态多样化任务和领域上评估，FLEXITOKENS持续减少token过度碎片化。与BPE和其他基于梯度的tokenizer基线相比，在token分类和生成任务上实现高达10个百分点的提升。在不同规模模型上均表现一致改进，验证了方法的有效性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLEXITOKENS通过可学习tokenizer和简化训练目标，有效解决了语言模型适应新数据时tokenization刚性问题，减少了文本过度碎片化，提升了性能。该方法具有学术价值和实际应用潜力，尤其在多语言和领域适应场景。代码和数据将开源，未来可探索更高效的训练或扩展至更大规模模型。

title: RDMA: Cost Effective Agent-Driven Rare Disease Mining from Electronic Health Records
abstract: Rare diseases affect 1 in 10 Americans yet remain systematically underdocumented in clinical records. ICD-based systems cannot capture their breadth, over 50\% of Orphanet codes lack a direct ICD mapping and only 2.2\% of HPO codes have matching ICD codes, leaving patient populations invisible and delaying diagnosis. Mining unstructured clinical notes offers a direct path forward, but real notes are long, noisy, and abbreviation-dense, and limited annotations make fine-tuning infeasible, demanding approaches that generalize without task-specific training. We present Rare Disease Mining Agents (RDMA), an agentic framework equipping smaller quantized LLMs with tools for abbreviation resolution, implicit phenotype reasoning, and ontology grounding against Orphanet and HPO.
