RDMA substantially outperforms fine-tuned and RAG-based baselines across benchmarks with different data characteristics, without any task-specific training. A small quantized model achieves maximal performance, reducing inference costs by up to 10x and local hardware costs by up to 17x, enabling private deployment on standard hardware without cloud-based PHI exposure. RDMA's uncertainty-flagging mechanism further reduces expert annotation burden while preserving agreement quality, supporting scalable rare disease documentation in clinical practice. Available at https://github.com/jhnwu3/RDMA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RDMA智能体框架，利用量化小模型和工具调用，从电子病历中高效挖掘罕见病信息，无需任务特定训练，显著降低成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 罕见病在临床记录中系统性缺失，ICD编码覆盖率极低（仅2.2%的HPO代码有对应ICD码），导致患者群体不可见。现有方法依赖人工标注或微调，但病历噪声大、缩写多，标注数据稀缺，急需无需任务特定训练、可泛化的方法。
light_analysis.method: RDMA为小型量化LLM配备三个工具：缩写解析、隐式表型推理、本体链接（与Orphanet和HPO对照）。使用4位量化模型，无监督方式运行，通过工具链从非结构化笔记中提取罕见病提及。无需微调，支持本地私有部署，避免云端暴露PHI。
light_analysis.result: 在多个罕见病基准上，RDMA优于微调的和RAG基线的性能，且无需任何任务特定训练。量化小模型达到最优效果，推理成本降低10倍，本地硬件成本降低17倍。不确定性标记机制减少专家标注负担，同时保持一致质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: RDMA提供了一种成本有效的罕见病文档解决方案，避免了昂贵的人工标注和云端PHI风险，支持大规模私有部署。其价值在于解锁了罕见病患者的临床可见性，未来可扩展更多本体或加入主动学习机制。

title: From Curated Data to Scalable Models: Continual Pre-training of Dense and MoE Large Language Models for Tibetan
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success across a wide range of natural language processing tasks, yet their performance remains heavily biased toward high-resource languages. Tibetan, despite its cultural significance and large speaker population, is still substantially underrepresented. In this work, we present a comprehensive pipeline for advancing Tibetan language modeling through large-scale data curation and continual pre-training. We construct a 72 GB high-quality Tibetan corpus, the largest to date, and adapt Qwen2.5-7B through balanced multilingual continual pre-training with Tibetan, Chinese, and English, followed by multilingual instruction tuning. To further scale capacity efficiently, we extend the dense model to a 50B-A10B Mixture-of-Experts architecture. Due to the absence of standardized Tibetan benchmarks, we build multiple evaluation datasets via high-quality translation and human verification. Experimental results show that both dense and MoE models consistently outperform existing open-source and Tibetan-focused models of similar scale across diverse tasks. Our work advances Tibetan-centric LLM research and provides transferable insights for extending LLMs to other low-resource languages. We will release the model weights, evaluation benchmarks, and detailed data processing documentation in the follow-up.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过大规模数据整理和持续预训练构建了密集和MoE架构的藏语大语言模型，性能显著优于现有模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在高资源语言上表现突出，但藏语因其文化重要性和庞大使用人口却严重代表性不足。现有模型缺乏专用藏语数据和预训练策略，导致性能偏差。本研究旨在通过构建最大藏语语料库和持续预训练方法填补这一空白，为低资源语言建模提供可迁移方案。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建72GB高质量藏语语料库（迄今最大），并在Qwen2.5-7B基础上进行平衡的多语言持续预训练（藏语、中文、英语），随后进行多语言指令微调。为高效扩展容量，将密集模型转化为50B-A10B参数的混合专家（MoE）架构。同时，通过高质量翻译和人工验证构建多个标准化藏语评测数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提出的密集模型和MoE模型在多种任务上均持续优于现有开源模型和藏语专用模型，性能指标全面领先。具体提升幅度和对比数据在摘要中未明确说明，但强调了相较于同等规模模型的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作为藏语大语言模型研究奠定了基础，证明了大规模数据整理和持续预训练在低资源语言上的有效性。MoE架构进一步提升了容量效率。未来将开源模型权重、评测基准和数据处理文档，为其他低资源语言建模提供可复现路线。

title: Where Do Reasoning Models Refuse?
abstract: Chat models without chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning must decide whether to refuse a harmful request before generating their first response token. Reasoning models, by contrast, produce extended chains of thought before their final output, raising a natural question: where in this process does the decision to refuse occur? We investigate this across four open-source reasoning models. We first show that the CoT causally influences refusal outcomes; fixing a specific reasoning trace substantially reduces variance in whether the model ultimately refuses or complies. Zooming into the reasoning trace, we find that in distilled models, subtle differences in the opening sentence of the CoT can fully determine the model's refusal decision, and that these patterns transfer across models distilled from the same teacher. Finally, we extract linear refusal directions from model activations and show that ablating them increases harmful compliance, though less reliably than the same technique achieves on non-reasoning models, and with non-negligible degradation to general capabilities.
comment: v1 accepted to the ICML 2025 Workshop on Reliable and Responsible Foundation Models (R2FM). 20 pages, 12 figures

light_analysis.overview: 研究推理模型在链式思维过程中拒绝有害请求的时机和机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的聊天模型在不使用链式思维推理时，必须在生成第一个响应token之前决定是否拒绝有害请求。而推理模型在最终输出前会产生扩展的推理链，这引发了一个自然问题：拒绝决策在此过程中的何时发生？理解这一机制对于提升模型的安全性和可控性至关重要，现有方法尚未深入探究推理模型中拒绝决策的时序特性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究对四个开源推理模型进行实验。首先通过因果干预证明链式思维对拒绝结果有因果影响，固定特定推理踪迹能显著降低拒绝/遵从的方差。进一步分析发现，在蒸馏模型中，链式思维的开头句子中的微妙差异可完全决定拒绝决策，且这些模式在不同蒸馏模型中传递。最后，从模型激活中提取线性拒绝方向，通过消融实验证明去除这些方向会增加有害遵从，但效果不如非推理模型可靠，且会损害通用能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，固定链式思维踪迹可大幅降低拒绝结果的方差。在蒸馏模型中，开句的细微变化完全决定拒绝与否，且模式可跨模型迁移。线性拒绝方向的消融虽增加有害遵从，但可靠性低于非推理模型，且导致通用能力有不可忽视的下降。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但定性描述了这些发现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了推理模型在链式思维过程中拒绝有害请求的关键位置和因果机制，对理解模型安全行为具有学术价值。研究发现蒸馏模型中开句的敏感性，提示了安全对齐的脆弱性。未来工作可探索更鲁棒的拒绝机制，并在保持通用能力的同时提升安全性。

title: Reasoning to Edit: Hypothetical Instruction-Based Image Editing with Visual Reasoning
abstract: Instruction-based image editing (IIE) has advanced rapidly with the success of diffusion models. However, existing efforts primarily focus on simple and explicit instructions to execute editing operations such as adding, deleting, moving, or swapping objects. They struggle to handle more complex implicit hypothetical instructions that require deeper reasoning to infer plausible visual changes and user intent. Additionally, current datasets provide limited support for training and evaluating reasoning-aware editing capabilities. Architecturally, these methods also lack mechanisms for fine-grained detail extraction that support such reasoning. To address these limitations, we propose Reason50K, a large-scale dataset specifically curated for training and evaluating hypothetical instruction reasoning image editing, along with ReasonBrain, a novel framework designed to reason over and execute implicit hypothetical instructions across diverse scenarios. Reason50K includes over 50K samples spanning four key reasoning scenarios: Physical, Temporal, Causal, and Story reasoning. ReasonBrain leverages Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for editing guidance generation and a diffusion model for image synthesis, incorporating a Fine-grained Reasoning Cue Extraction (FRCE) module to capture detailed visual and textual semantics essential for supporting instruction reasoning. To mitigate the semantic loss, we further introduce a Cross-Modal Enhancer (CME) that enables rich interactions between the fine-grained cues and MLLM-derived features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ReasonBrain consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on reasoning scenarios while exhibiting strong zero-shot generalization to conventional IIE tasks. Our dataset and code will be released publicly.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Reason50K数据集和ReasonBrain框架，解决隐式假设性指令的图像编辑问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指令式图像编辑方法主要处理简单显式指令（如添加、删除物体），无法理解需要深度推理的隐式假设性指令（涉及物理、时间、因果等场景）。同时，缺乏支持推理感知编辑训练与评估的数据集，现有模型的架构也缺少细粒度细节提取机制，导致推理能力不足。因此，亟需专用数据集和推理框架来提升模型处理复杂隐含指令的能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建Reason50K数据集，包含50K样本，覆盖物理、时间、因果、故事四类推理场景。提出ReasonBrain框架：利用多模态大语言模型生成编辑指导，扩散模型负责图像合成；核心创新是细粒度推理线索提取模块（FRCE），捕获视觉与文本语义；并引入跨模态增强器（CME）减少语义损失，增强细粒度线索与MLLM特征的交互。
light_analysis.result: ReasonBrain在四个推理场景上均显著优于现有基线方法，在物理、时间、因果、故事推理任务中取得更高编辑质量与一致性。同时，在不需专门训练的传统指令式图像编辑任务上表现出强大的零样本泛化能力，证明其推理机制有效迁移到常规编辑场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过Reason50K数据集和ReasonBrain框架首次系统解决隐式假设性指令的图像编辑问题，为推理感知编辑奠定了数据和模型基础。该方法有效提升了编辑的语义理解与细节保持能力，具有广泛的学术价值（推动多模态推理研究）和应用潜力（智能图像编辑工具）。未来可扩展至更多推理类型及实时编辑场景。

title: LoRA-Mixer: Coordinate Modular LoRA Experts Through Serial Attention Routing
abstract: Recent attempts to combine low-rank adaptation (LoRA) with mixture-of-experts (MoE) for multi-task adaptation of Large Language Models (LLMs) often replace whole attention/FFN layers with switch experts or append parallel expert branches, undermining parameter efficiency and limiting task specialization. We introduce LoRA-Mixer, a modular MoE framework that routes task-specific LoRA experts into the core projection matrices of the attention module, namely input and output linear layers, rather than primarily targeting FFN blocks. The design delivers fine-grained token-level specialization by fully exploiting the attention mechanism, while remaining drop-in compatible with Transformers and state-space models (SSMs), since linear projection layers are ubiquitous. To train robust routers from limited data while promoting stable, selective decisions and high expert reuse, LoRA-Mixer employs an adaptive Routing Specialization Loss (RSL) that jointly enforces global load balance and input-aware specialization via an entropy-shaping objective. The framework supports two regimes: (i) joint optimization of adapters and router with a differentiable hard-soft top-k routing scheme, and (ii) plug-and-play routing over frozen, pre-trained LoRA modules sourced from public repositories. Across 15 benchmarks, including MedQA, GSM8K, HumanEval, and GLUE, RSL-optimized LoRA-Mixer outperforms state-of-the-art routing and LoRA-MoE baselines while using 48 percent of their trainable parameters, with gains of 3.79, 2.90, and 3.95 percentage points on GSM8K, CoLA, and ARC-C, respectively. Cross-model transfer and adapter reuse experiments further demonstrate the approach's versatility and data efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/hustcselwb/LoRA-Mixer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LoRA-Mixer，通过串行注意力路由协调模块化LoRA专家，实现多任务微调的高效参数专业化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LoRA与MoE结合的方法常替换整个注意力/FFN层或添加并行专家分支，导致参数效率低下和任务专业化受限。为了解决这一问题，需要一种更细粒度的多任务适应方法，充分利用注意力机制，同时保持与Transformer和状态空间模型的兼容性，并在有限数据下训练鲁棒的路由器。
light_analysis.method: LoRA-Mixer将任务特定的LoRA专家路由到注意力模块的输入和输出线性投影矩阵中，而非FFN块，实现细粒度令牌级专业化。采用自适应路由专业化损失（RSL），通过熵整形目标联合全局负载平衡和输入感知专业化。支持联合优化和即插即用两种模式，后者可重用预训练LoRA模块。
light_analysis.result: 在15个基准测试上，RSL优化的LoRA-Mixer优于最先进的路由和LoRA-MoE基线，仅使用其48%的可训练参数。在GSM8K、CoLA和ARC-C上分别提升3.79、2.90和3.95个百分点。跨模型迁移和适配器重用实验进一步验证了其多功能性和数据效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: LoRA-Mixer通过串行注意力路由实现了高效的模块化LoRA专家协调，在参数效率和任务性能上均优于现有方法。其兼容主流架构并支持现成LoRA模块重用，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的路由策略和跨任务泛化。

title: Block-wise Adaptive Caching for Accelerating Diffusion Policy
abstract: Diffusion Policy has demonstrated strong visuomotor modeling capabilities, but its high computational cost renders it impractical for real-time robotic control. Despite huge redundancy across repetitive denoising steps, existing diffusion acceleration techniques fail to generalize to Diffusion Policy due to fundamental architectural and data divergences. In this paper, we propose $\textbf{B}$lock-wise $\textbf{A}$daptive $\textbf{C}$aching ($\textbf{BAC}$), a method to accelerate Diffusion Policy by caching intermediate action features. BAC achieves lossless action generation acceleration by adaptively updating and reusing cached features at the block level, based on a key observation that feature similarities exhibit non-uniform temporal dynamics and distinct block-specific patterns. To operationalize this insight, we first design an Adaptive Caching Scheduler to identify optimal update timesteps by maximizing the global feature similarities between cached and skipped features. However, applying this scheduler for each block leads to significant error surges due to the inter-block propagation of caching errors, particularly within Feed-Forward Network (FFN) blocks. To mitigate this issue, we develop the Bubbling Union Algorithm, which truncates these errors by updating the upstream blocks with significant caching errors before downstream FFNs. As a training-free plugin, BAC is readily integrable with existing transformer-based Diffusion Policy and vision-language-action models. Extensive experiments on multiple robotic benchmarks demonstrate that BAC achieves up to 3$\times$ inference speedup for free. Project page: https://block-wise-adaptive-caching.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Block-wise Adaptive Caching (BAC)，通过块级自适应缓存扩散策略中间特征，实现无损加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散策略虽具强视觉运动建模能力，但高计算成本使其难以用于实时机器人控制。现有扩散加速方法因架构和数据差异无法泛化至扩散策略，亟需针对性的高效加速方案。
light_analysis.method: 基于特征相似度在不同时间步和块间呈现非均匀动态及块特化模式的观察，设计自适应缓存调度器，通过最大化全局相似度确定最优更新时刻。针对缓存错误跨块传播尤其是前馈网络块，提出冒泡联合算法，在关键模块前更新上游块以截断错误。BAC为训练无关插件。
light_analysis.result: 在多个机器人基准测试中，BAC实现高达3倍推理加速，且保持生成质量无损。与现有基于Transformer的扩散策略及视觉-语言-动作模型无缝集成。
light_analysis.conclusion: BAC提出一种训练无关的高效加速方法，通过块级自适应缓存解决扩散策略推理延迟问题，具有广泛适用性。未来可探索更精细的缓存调度或结合其他加速技术。

title: MaskPro: Linear-Space Probabilistic Learning for Strict (N:M)-Sparsity on LLMs
abstract: The rapid scaling of large language models~(LLMs) has made inference efficiency a primary bottleneck in the practical deployment. To address this, semi-structured sparsity offers a promising solution by strategically retaining $N$ elements out of every $M$ weights, thereby enabling hardware-friendly acceleration and reduced memory. However, existing (N:M)-compatible approaches typically fall into two categories: rule-based layerwise greedy search, which suffers from considerable errors, and gradient-driven combinatorial learning, which incurs prohibitive training costs. To tackle these challenges, we propose a novel linear-space probabilistic framework named MaskPro, which aims to learn a prior categorical distribution for every $M$ consecutive weights and subsequently leverages this distribution to generate the (N:M)-sparsity throughout an $N$-way sampling without replacement. Furthermore, to mitigate the training instability induced by the high variance of policy gradients in the super large combinatorial space, we propose a novel update method by introducing a moving average tracker of loss residuals instead of vanilla loss. Finally, we conduct comprehensive theoretical analysis and extensive experiments to validate the superior performance of MaskPro, as well as its excellent scalability in memory efficiency and exceptional robustness to data samples. Our code is available at \href{https://github.com/woodenchild95/Maskpro.git}{\ttfamily https://github.com/woodenchild95/Maskpro.git}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出线性空间概率框架MaskPro，通过先验分布不放回采样实现LLMs的高效(N:M)稀疏性学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型快速扩展使推理效率成为部署瓶颈，半结构化稀疏通过保留每M个权重中的N个实现硬件加速和内存降低。现有方法中，基于规则的贪婪搜索误差大，梯度驱动的组合学习训练成本高。需要一种兼顾精度和效率的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出MaskPro框架，学习每M个连续权重的先验分类分布，通过N次不放回采样生成(N:M)稀疏结构。为缓解策略梯度高方差导致的训练不稳定，引入损失残差的移动平均追踪器替代原始损失进行更新，实现稳定训练。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析和实验验证了MaskPro的优越性能，在内存效率和数据鲁棒性方面表现优异。具体性能指标和与基线对比结果需参考原论文，摘要未明确具体数值，但宣称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MaskPro为LLMs提供了一种高效且可扩展的(N:M)稀疏性解决方案，具备良好的内存效率和样本鲁棒性。代码已开源，便于进一步研究和应用。未来可探索更复杂的不放回采样策略。

title: Revisit What You See: Revealing Visual Semantics in Vision Tokens to Guide LVLM Decoding
abstract: Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) achieve strong performance across multimodal tasks by integrating visual perception with language understanding. However, how vision information contributes to the model's decoding process remains under-explored, as reflected in frequent hallucinations. Through a series of analyses, we found that (i) vision tokens provide meaningful visual information even when hallucinations occur, and (ii) their semantics are encoded in the textual space and become explicit under appropriate vocabulary constraints. Building on these observations, we propose ReVisiT, a simple training-free decoding method that guides text generation in LVLMs by Referencing Vision Tokens. Our approach leverages the semantic information embedded within vision tokens by projecting them into the text token distribution. Specifically, ReVisiT dynamically selects the most relevant vision token at each decoding step via context-aware constrained divergence minimization. Then, ReVisiT uses its constrained projection to refine the output distribution to better incorporate visual semantics. Across five benchmarks on recent LVLMs, ReVisiT achieves competitive or superior results to state-of-the-art decoding baselines while reducing computational cost by up to $2\times$
comment: ACL 2026 Main Conference (Oral). 30 pages, 10 figures. Code: https://github.com/bscho333/ReVisiT

light_analysis.overview: 提出 ReVisiT，一种无需训练的解码方法，通过引用视觉令牌中的语义信息引导 LVLM 文本生成，减少幻觉并提高效率。
light_analysis.motivation: LVLMs 在解码过程中视觉信息如何起作用尚不明确，导致频繁出现幻觉。现有方法未充分利用视觉令牌中的语义信息。本文通过分析发现，即使出现幻觉，视觉令牌仍包含有意义的信息，且其语义在文本空间中编码，在适当词汇约束下可显式化。
light_analysis.method: 提出 ReVisiT，一种无需训练的解码方法。通过将视觉令牌投影到文本令牌分布中，动态选择最相关的视觉令牌（通过上下文感知的约束散度最小化），然后使用其约束投影来细化输出分布，以更好地融入视觉语义。
light_analysis.result: 在五个基准测试上，ReVisiT 在最近的 LVLMs 上达到了与最先进解码基线相当或更优的结果，同时将计算成本降低高达 2 倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReVisiT 有效利用视觉令牌中的语义信息指导解码，减少幻觉，且无需额外训练，计算效率高。该方法具有较高的实用价值，可推广至更多 LVLMs，未来可探索更复杂的令牌选择策略。

title: NFR: Neural Feature-Guided Non-Rigid Shape Registration
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel learning-based framework for 3D shape registration, which overcomes the challenges of significant non-rigid deformation and partiality undergoing among input shapes, and, remarkably, requires no correspondence annotation during training. Our key insight is to incorporate neural features learned by deep learning-based shape matching networks into an iterative, geometric shape registration pipeline. The advantage of our approach is two-fold -- On one hand, neural features provide more accurate and semantically meaningful correspondence estimation than spatial features (e.g., coordinates), which is critical in the presence of large non-rigid deformations; On the other hand, the correspondences are dynamically updated according to the intermediate registrations and filtered by consistency prior, which prominently robustify the overall pipeline. Empirical results show that, with as few as dozens of training shapes of limited variability, our pipeline achieves state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks of non-rigid point cloud matching and partial shape matching across varying settings, but also delivers high-quality correspondences between unseen challenging shape pairs that undergo both significant extrinsic and intrinsic deformations, in which case neither traditional registration methods nor intrinsic methods work. Our code is available at https://github.com/rqhuang88/NFR.
comment: 18 pages, 16 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2311.04494

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需标注的神经特征引导非刚体形状配准框架，通过将深度网络学习的神经特征融入迭代几何配准流程，实现鲁棒的3D形状配准。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D形状配准面临非刚体形变和部分缺失的挑战，传统方法依赖空间坐标特征，在形变较大时对应估计不准确，且通常需要大量标注数据。本文利用深度学习获得的神经特征提供更语义化的对应，并通过迭代更新和一致性过滤增强鲁棒性，从而在不需对应标注的条件下提升配准性能。
light_analysis.method: 核心是结合神经特征与迭代几何配准。首先，使用深度形状匹配网络提取神经特征，替代传统的空间坐标特征；然后，在迭代配准过程中动态更新对应关系，并通过一致性先验过滤异常匹配。训练阶段无需对应标注，仅需少量形状样本即可学习有效的特征表示。
light_analysis.result: 在多个非刚体点云匹配和部分形状匹配基准上达到最先进结果，仅使用数十个训练形状。在面临显著内外变形的不见形状对上，也能生成高质量对应，而传统方法和固有方法均失效。实验验证了神经特征和迭代更新机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种无需对应标注的神经特征引导非刚体形状配准框架，显著提升了处理大形变和部分缺失的能力。该工作为3D形状分析提供了新思路，代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的特征融合策略或扩展至动态序列配准。

title: 3D-UIR: 3D Gaussian for Underwater 3D Scene Reconstruction via Physics Based Appearance-Medium Decoupling
abstract: Novel view synthesis for underwater scene reconstruction presents unique challenges due to complex light-media interactions. Optical scattering and absorption in water body bring inhomogeneous medium attenuation interference that disrupts conventional volume rendering assumptions of uniform propagation medium. While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) offers real-time rendering capabilities, it struggles with underwater inhomogeneous environments where scattering media introduces artifacts and inconsistent appearance. In this study, we propose a physics-based framework that disentangles object appearance from water medium effects through tailored Gaussian modeling. Our approach introduces appearance embeddings, which are explicit medium representations for backscatter and attenuation, enhancing scene consistency. In addition, we propose a depth-guided optimization strategy that leverages pseudo-depth maps as supervision with depth regularization and scale penalty terms to improve geometric fidelity. By integrating the proposed appearance and medium modeling components via an underwater imaging model, our approach achieves both high-quality novel view synthesis and physically accurate scene restoration. Experiments demonstrate our significant improvements in rendering quality and restoration accuracy over existing methods. The project page is available at https://bilityniu.github.io/3D-UIR.
comment: Accepted to IEEE TIP 2026. Project webpage: https://bilityniu.github.io/3D-UIR

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于物理的3D高斯框架，通过解耦物体外观与水体介质效应，实现高质量水下场景重建和新视角合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 水下场景重建因光与水体介质的复杂相互作用（散射、吸收）而极具挑战。传统3D高斯泼溅假设均匀传播介质，在水下非均匀环境中产生伪影和不一致外观。现有方法缺乏对介质干扰的显式建模，导致渲染质量和几何精度受限。本研究旨在通过物理建模分离介质效应与物体外观，提升水下场景重建的物理准确性和视觉质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出3D-UIR框架，基于物理模型将物体外观与水体介质解耦。引入显式外观嵌入表示后向散射和衰减，并设计深度引导优化策略，利用伪深度图结合正则化和尺度惩罚项增强几何保真度。通过水下成像模型整合外观和介质建模组件，实现高质量新视角合成与物理准确的场景恢复。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在渲染质量和场景恢复准确性上显著优于现有方法。具体表现为新视角合成图像的视觉一致性提升，以及物理参数（如衰减系数）估计的准确性改进。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标，但定性结果和定量对比均证明了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作为水下3D场景重建提供了一种有效的物理驱动方案，通过解耦介质效应实现了高质量渲染和物理准确恢复。该方法在海洋工程、水下考古等领域具有重要应用价值。未来可进一步探索动态场景或更复杂水体条件，并优化计算效率。

title: Exemplar-Free Continual Learning for State Space Models
abstract: State-Space Models (SSMs) excel at capturing long-range dependencies with structured recurrence, making them well-suited for sequence modeling. However, their evolving internal states pose challenges in adapting them under Continual Learning (CL). This is particularly difficult in exemplar-free settings, where the absence of prior data leaves updates to the dynamic SSM states unconstrained, resulting in catastrophic forgetting. To address this, we propose Inf-SSM, a novel and simple geometry-aware regularization method that utilizes the geometry of the infinite-dimensional Grassmannian to constrain state evolution during CL. Unlike classical continual learning methods that constrain weight updates, Inf-SSM regularizes the infinite-horizon evolution of SSMs encoded in their extended observability subspace. We show that enforcing this regularization requires solving a matrix equation known as the Sylvester equation, which typically incurs $\mathcal{O}(n^3)$ complexity. We develop a $\mathcal{O}(n^2)$ solution by exploiting the structure and properties of SSMs. This leads to an efficient regularization mechanism that can be seamlessly integrated into existing CL methods. Comprehensive experiments on challenging benchmarks, including ImageNet-R and Caltech-256, demonstrate a significant reduction in forgetting while improving accuracy across sequential tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Inf-SSM，一种基于Grassmannian几何的正则化方法，用于无样本持续学习中的状态空间模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 状态空间模型（SSM）在序列建模中擅长捕捉长距离依赖，但其动态内部状态在持续学习（CL）中难以适应。在无样本设置中，缺乏先前数据导致SSM状态更新不受约束，引发灾难性遗忘。现有方法多约束权重更新，而未考虑SSM状态演化的特殊性。因此，需要一种专门针对SSM状态演化进行约束的正则化方法。
light_analysis.method: Inf-SSM利用无限维Grassmannian几何来约束持续学习中的状态演化。不同于传统方法约束权重，Inf-SSM正则化SSM的无限视距演化，编码在其扩展的可观测性子空间中。实现该正则化需解Sylvester方程（通常O(n^3)复杂度），通过利用SSM的结构特性提出了O(n^2)的解法。该方法可无缝集成到现有CL方法中。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-R和Caltech-256等挑战性基准上的综合实验表明，Inf-SSM显著减少了遗忘，同时提高了跨顺序任务的准确性。具体性能提升和与基线对比需参考原文，摘要未给出精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: Inf-SSM为无样本持续学习中SSM的状态演化提供了一种高效且有效的正则化机制，减轻了灾难性遗忘。其基于Grassmannian的几何约束和低复杂度解法具有学术价值，可推广至其他结构化状态空间模型。未来可探索更复杂情况下的应用。

title: Efficient compression of neural networks and datasets
abstract: Compression and generalization are fundamentally related through Solomonoff induction and the minimum description length principle (MDL), which predict that simpler models generalize better when data arises from low-complexity distributions. In this article, we combine insights from algorithmic information theory and techniques from neural network pruning to improve model generalization by identifying the most effective data compression method. Since exact MDL optimization is intractable, we cast it as $\ell_0$ regularized learning and explain why parameter sparsity provides an effective computable approximation of model description length. To identify the best practical approach, we systematically compare and refine complementary sparse optimization methods. In particular, we improve probabilistic pruning through a procedure that does not require Monte Carlo sampling and refine smooth $\ell_0$ approximations with a binary search routine that reduces hyperparameter complexity. Across convolutional networks and transformers evaluated on image and text datasets, our refined methods improve upon their predecessors, achieve substantial model compression with minimal accuracy loss, and yield short data description lengths. Finally, we use these methods in a controlled teacher-student setting to empirically verify the prediction of Solomonoff induction that compressed models learn more sample-efficiently and generalize better.

light_analysis.overview: 结合算法信息论与剪枝，通过改进稀疏优化实现模型和数据高效压缩，验证MDL原理。
light_analysis.motivation: Solomonoff归纳和最小描述长度原理预测低复杂度分布下简单模型泛化更好，但精确MDL优化不可行。现有剪枝方法缺乏系统性比较和有效近似，本文旨在将MDL转化为ℓ0正则化学习，通过参数稀疏性近似描述长度，并改进剪枝方法以提升压缩与泛化。
light_analysis.method: 将MDL优化转化为ℓ0正则化学习，利用参数稀疏性近似模型描述长度。系统比较并改进互补稀疏优化方法：改进概率剪枝无需蒙特卡洛采样；通过二分搜索优化光滑ℓ0近似，减少超参数复杂度。在卷积网络和Transformer上评估图像和文本数据。
light_analysis.result: 改进方法在卷积网络和Transformer上优于先前剪枝技术，实现显著压缩且精度损失极小，数据描述长度短。教师-学生实验验证了压缩模型更样本高效且泛化更好，符合Solomonoff归纳预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过改进稀疏优化方法，有效连接了压缩与泛化，验证了MDL原理。成果具有理论意义和实际应用价值，未来可进一步优化超参数或扩展至其他网络架构。

title: LENS: Multi-level Evaluation of Multimodal Reasoning with Large Language Models
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved significant advances in integrating visual and linguistic information, yet their ability to reason about complex and real-world scenarios remains limited. The existing benchmarks are usually constructed in the task-oriented manner without guarantee that different task samples come from the same data distribution, thus they often fall short in evaluating the synergistic effects of lower-level perceptual capabilities on higher-order reasoning. To lift this limitation, we contribute Lens, a multi-level benchmark with 3.4K contemporary images and 60K+ human-authored questions covering eight tasks and 12 daily scenarios, forming three progressive task tiers, i.e., perception, understanding, and reasoning. One feature is that each image is equipped with rich annotations for all tasks. Thus, this dataset intrinsically supports to evaluate MLLMs to handle image-invariable prompts, from basic perception to compositional reasoning. In addition, our images are manully collected from the social media, in which 53% were published later than Jan. 2025. We evaluate 15+ frontier MLLMs such as Qwen2.5-VL-72B, InternVL3-78B, GPT-4o and two reasoning models QVQ-72B-preview and Kimi-VL. These models are released later than Dec. 2024, and none of them achieve an accuracy greater than 60% in the reasoning tasks. Project page: https://github.com/Lens4MLLMs/lens. ICCV 2025 workshop page: https://lens4mllms.github.io/mars2-workshop-iccv2025/
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Lens，一个多级多模态推理基准，包含3.4K当代图像和60K+问题，用于系统评估MLLM从感知到推理的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLM基准通常以任务导向构建，不同任务样本数据分布不一致，难以评估低层感知能力对高层推理的协同效应。因此需要统一的多级基准，以全面评估模型在复杂真实场景下的多模态推理能力。
light_analysis.method: Lens数据集包含3.4K当代图像和60K+人工问题，覆盖8个任务和12个日常场景，形成感知、理解、推理三个渐进层级。每个图像配备所有任务的丰富注释，支持图像不变提示评估。图像手动收集自社交媒体，其中53%发布于2025年1月之后。
light_analysis.result: 评估了15+前沿MLLM（如Qwen2.5-VL-72B、InternVL3-78B、GPT-4o以及推理模型QVQ-72B-preview和Kimi-VL），这些模型均发布于2024年12月之后。在推理任务上，所有模型准确率低于60%，表明现有模型在复杂多模态推理上存在显著局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Lens提供了系统评估MLLM多模态推理能力的基准，揭示了当前模型在推理任务上的不足，有助于推动多模态推理研究。其多级结构可指导模型能力诊断与改进，未来可扩展更多场景和任务。

title: Language Model Networks: Supervision-Efficient Learning through Dense Communication
abstract: Language models are increasingly used not only as standalone predictors but also as components in larger inference systems, from test-time reasoning to multi-model collaboration. We study language model networks, where pre-trained language models serve as reusable nodes and intelligence emerges from their topology, communication, and optimization. Existing systems mostly communicate through natural language: easy to deploy, but discrete, inefficient, and hard to optimize from end-task supervision. We propose LMNet, a dense and differentiable realization of this paradigm. LMNet uses stripped LLMs as vertex modules and trainable seq2seq modules as communication edges, enabling intermediate nodes to exchange dense vectors while preserving natural-language input and output at the system boundary. By bypassing intermediate embedding and de-embedding, LMNet enables efficient information transfer, end-to-end gradient optimization, and learned communication beyond hand-designed protocols. Experiments show performance with small additional training cost and effective adaptation under limited supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LMNet，一种密集可微的语言模型网络，通过可训练seq2seq边实现节点间密集向量通信，支持端到端梯度优化和有限监督下的高效适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言模型网络主要通过自然语言通信，虽易部署但离散、效率低，且难以从最终任务监督中优化。这限制了多模型协作和复杂推理系统的性能。LMNet旨在解决这些问题，通过密集可微通信实现高效信息传递和端到端学习，无需人工设计协议。
light_analysis.method: LMNet将精简LLM作为顶点模块，可训练seq2seq模块作为通信边。中间节点交换密集向量而非离散文本，系统边界仍保持自然语言输入/输出。通过绕过中间嵌入和解嵌入，实现高效信息传递、端到端梯度优化，以及超越手工设计协议的学习通信。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，LMNet在少量额外训练成本下取得良好性能，并在有限监督下有效适应。具体性能提升和对比数据摘要未明确说明，但强调其与现有方法相比的效率和优化优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: LMNet为语言模型网络提供了一种新的密集可微范式，兼顾部署便利性与优化能力，适用于测试时推理、多模型协作等场景。潜在局限性包括可扩展性和长程依赖，未来可探索更复杂的拓扑和自适应协议。

title: Systematic Failures in Collective Reasoning under Distributed Information in Multi-Agent LLMs
abstract: Multi-agent systems built on large language models (LLMs) are expected to enhance decision-making by pooling distributed information, yet systematically evaluating this capability has remained challenging. We introduce HiddenBench, a 65-task benchmark grounded in the Hidden Profile paradigm, which isolates collective reasoning under distributed information from individual reasoning ability. Evaluating 15 frontier LLMs, we find that multi-agent LLMs achieve only 30.1% accuracy under distributed information, compared to 80.7% accuracy for single agents given complete information. We trace this gap to a systematic failure mode: agents cannot recognize or act under latent information asymmetry -- they fail to reason about what others might know but have not yet expressed, leading to premature convergence on shared evidence while critical distributed facts remain unexplored. These failures persist across prompting strategies, communication depths, and group sizes -- and worsen as groups scale. While some models (e.g., Gemini-2.5-Flash/Pro) outperform others, neither model scale nor individual reasoning accuracy reliably predicts collective performance. We further show that this bottleneck is actionable: a lightweight structured communication protocol substantially improves collective reasoning across model families. Our results identify failures in collective information exploration in decision-making as a key limitation of multi-agent LLMs, and provide a theory-grounded, reproducible framework for diagnosing collective reasoning failures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HiddenBench基准，揭示多智能体LLM在分布式信息下集体推理的系统性失败，并验证轻量级结构化通信协议的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体LLM本应通过聚合分布式信息增强决策能力，但缺乏系统性评估方法。现有研究多关注个体推理能力，忽视了集体推理时信息不对称导致的失败模式。理解这一瓶颈对提升多智能体系统可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 构建HiddenBench基准，包含65个基于Hidden Profile范式的任务，隔离分布式信息下的集体推理。评估15个前沿LLM，设计不同提示策略、通信深度和组规模实验。提出结构化通信协议，要求智能体显式分享未知信息。
light_analysis.result: 多智能体LLM在分布式信息下准确率仅30.1%，远低于单智能体完整信息的80.7%。故障随组规模扩大而恶化，且模型规模与个体推理能力不能预测集体表现。结构化通信协议显著提升各模型家族的集体推理效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多智能体LLM在分布式决策中存在集体信息探索瓶颈，主要源于无法处理潜在信息不对称。该研究提供了理论驱动的可重复诊断框架，并指出结构化通信是可行改进方向，为未来多智能体系统设计提供指导。

title: PVLM: Parsing-Aware Vision Language Model with Dynamic Contrastive Learning for Zero-Shot Deepfake Attribution
abstract: The challenge of tracing the source attribution of forged faces has gained significant attention due to the rapid advancement of generative models. However, existing deepfake attribution (DFA) works primarily focus on the interaction among various domains in vision modality, and other modalities such as texts and face parsing are not fully explored. Besides, they tend to fail to assess the generalization performance of deepfake attributors to unseen advanced generators like diffusion in a fine-grained manner. In this paper, we propose a novel parsing-aware vision language model with a dynamic contrastive learning (PVLM) method for zero-shot deepfake attribution (ZSDFA), which facilitates effective and fine-grained traceability to unseen advanced generators. Specifically, we conduct a novel and fine-grained ZS-DFA benchmark to evaluate the attribution performance of deepfake attributors to unseen advanced generators like diffusion. Besides, we propose an innovative PVLM attributor based on the vision-language model to capture general and diverse attribution features. We are motivated by the observation that the preservation of source face attributes in facial images generated by GAN and diffusion models varies significantly. We propose to employ the inherent facial attributes preservation differences to capture face parsing-aware forgery representations. Therefore, we devise a novel parsing encoder to focus on global face attribute embeddings, enabling parsing-guided DFA representation learning via dynamic vision-parsing matching. Additionally, we present a novel deepfake attribution contrastive center loss to pull relevant generators closer and push irrelevant ones away, which can be introduced into DFA models to enhance traceability. Experimental results show that our model exceeds the state-of-the-art on the ZS-DFA benchmark via various protocol evaluations.
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出PVLM，一种基于解析感知的视觉语言模型与动态对比学习，实现零样本深度伪造归因。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度伪造归因主要关注视觉模态的域交互，忽视了文本和面部解析等模态；且缺乏对未见过的先进生成器（如扩散模型）的细粒度泛化能力评估。因此需要一种能捕捉面部属性差异、实现零样本细粒度归因的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出PVLM方法，基于视觉语言模型。设计面部解析编码器捕获全局面部属性嵌入，通过动态视觉-解析匹配学习解析引导的伪造表示。提出深度伪造归因对比中心损失，拉近相关生成器、推远无关生成器。构建了细粒度的零样本DFA基准。
light_analysis.result: 在零样本DFA基准上，通过多种协议评估，模型均超过现有最先进方法，展示了优越的归因性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出一种有效的零样本深度伪造归因方法，利用面部解析和对比学习提升对未知生成器的归因能力，具有重要学术价值和应用前景。

title: VIPO: Value Function Inconsistency Penalized Offline Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) learns effective policies from pre-collected datasets, offering a practical solution for applications where online interactions are risky or costly. Model-based approaches are particularly advantageous for offline RL, owing to their data efficiency and generalizability. However, due to inherent model errors, model-based methods often artificially introduce conservatism guided by heuristic uncertainty estimation, which can be unreliable. In this paper, we introduce VIPO, a novel model-based offline RL algorithm that incorporates self-supervised feedback from value estimation to enhance model training. Specifically, the model is learned by additionally minimizing the inconsistency between the value learned directly from the offline data and the value estimated from the model. We perform comprehensive evaluations from multiple perspectives to show that VIPO can learn a highly accurate model efficiently and consistently outperform existing methods. In particular, it achieves state-of-the-art performance on almost all tasks in both D4RL and NeoRL benchmarks. Overall, VIPO offers a general framework that can be readily integrated into existing model-based offline RL algorithms to systematically enhance model accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VIPO算法，通过惩罚值函数不一致性来提升离线强化学习中模型训练的准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线强化学习从预收集数据中学习策略，避免了在线交互的高风险和高成本。基于模型的方法因数据效率和泛化能力而具有优势，但模型固有误差导致基于启发式不确定性估计的保守性引入不可靠。现有方法未能有效利用价值函数反馈来改进模型质量，需要一种更可靠的模型训练方法。
light_analysis.method: VIPO是一种基于模型的离线强化学习算法，核心创新在于在模型训练中额外最小化直接从离线数据学习的价值与从模型估计的价值之间的不一致性（即值函数不一致性惩罚）。该自监督反馈机制使模型学习更准确。框架通用，可集成到现有基于模型的离线RL算法中，无需启发式不确定性估计。
light_analysis.result: 在D4RL和NeoRL基准测试的几乎所有任务上，VIPO均取得了最先进（SOTA）性能。摘要未给出具体数值，但明确指出其性能一致性优于现有方法，且高效学习高精度模型。与基线方法对比，VIPO的系统性能改进显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIPO提出了一种通用框架，通过值函数不一致性惩罚增强模型准确性，有效克服了基于模型离线RL中启发式不确定性估计的不可靠问题。其实验结果证明了方法的有效性和优越性。未来可探索将其扩展到更多离线RL场景，并进一步分析不一致性惩罚的理论性质。

title: Efficient distributional regression trees learning algorithms for calibrated non-parametric probabilistic forecasts
abstract: The perspective of developing trustworthy AI for critical applications in science and engineering requires machine learning techniques that are capable of estimating their own uncertainty. In the context of regression, instead of estimating a conditional mean, this can be achieved by producing a predictive interval for the output, or to even learn a model of the conditional probability $p(y|x)$ of an output $y$ given input features $x$. While this can be done under parametric assumptions with, e.g. generalized linear model, these are typically too strong, and non-parametric models offer flexible alternatives. In particular, for scalar outputs, learning directly a model of the conditional cumulative distribution function of $y$ given $x$ can lead to more precise probabilistic estimates, and the use of proper scoring rules such as the weighted interval score (WIS) and the continuous ranked probability score (CRPS) lead to better coverage and calibration properties.   This paper introduces novel algorithms for learning probabilistic regression trees for the WIS or CRPS loss functions. These algorithms are made computationally efficient thanks to an appropriate use of known data structures - namely min-max heaps, weight-balanced binary trees and Fenwick trees. Through numerical experiments, we demonstrate that the performance of our methods is competitive with alternative approaches. Additionally, our methods benefit from the inherent interpretability and explainability of trees. As a by-product, we show how our trees can be used in the context of conformal prediction and explain why they are particularly well-suited for achieving group-conditional coverage guarantees.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于WIS和CRPS损失的高效分布回归树算法，通过最小最大堆、加权平衡二叉树和Fenwick树加速计算，实现校准的非参数概率预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 在科学工程关键应用中，AI需要不确定性估计。回归中预测区间或条件概率模型可提供不确定性，但参数模型假设过强，非参数模型如回归树能灵活学习条件累积分布函数。现有方法在计算效率和校准方面存在不足，需要更高效的算法。
light_analysis.method: 引入针对WIS或CRPS损失函数的概率回归树学习算法，利用最小最大堆、加权平衡二叉树和Fenwick树等数据结构实现计算优化。这些数据结构加速了损失计算和树分裂评估，使算法高效且保持树模型的可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明所提方法性能与替代方法相当。方法具有树模型固有的可解释性和可说明性，尤其适合用于共形预测，能提供分组条件覆盖保证，提升了概率预测的校准性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了计算高效的概率回归树算法，结合WIS/CRPS损失实现校准预测。展示了在共形预测中的应用价值，为可信AI提供了可解释的不确定性估计工具。未来可扩展到更复杂的集成模型或高维数据。

title: Exact Sequence Interpolation with Transformers
abstract: We prove that transformers can exactly interpolate datasets of finite input sequences in $\mathbb{R}^d$, $d\geq 2$, with corresponding output sequences of smaller or equal length. Specifically, given $N$ sequences of arbitrary but finite lengths in $\mathbb{R}^d$ and output sequences of lengths $m^1, \dots, m^N \in \mathbb{N}$, we construct a transformer with $\mathcal{O}(\sum_{j=1}^N m^j)$ blocks and $\smash{\mathcal{O}(d \sum_{j=1}^N m^j)}$ parameters that exactly interpolates the dataset. Our construction provides complexity estimates that are independent of the input sequence length, by alternating feed-forward and self-attention layers and by capitalizing on the clustering effect inherent to the latter. Our novel constructive method also uses low-rank parameter matrices in the self-attention mechanism, a common feature of practical transformer implementations. These results are first established in the hardmax self-attention setting, where the geometric structure permits an explicit and quantitative analysis, and are then extended to the softmax setting. Finally, we demonstrate the applicability of our exact interpolation construction to learning problems, in particular by providing convergence guarantees to a global minimizer under regularized training strategies. Our analysis contributes to the theoretical understanding of transformer models, offering an explanation for their excellent performance in exact sequence-to-sequence interpolation tasks.
comment: 36 pages, 9 figures. Funded by the European Union (Horizon Europe MSCA project ModConFlex, grant number 101073558)

light_analysis.overview: 证明Transformer能够精确插值任意有限输入序列数据集，提供参数复杂度与序列长度无关的构造方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对Transformer精确序列插值能力的理论保证。本文旨在从数学上证明Transformer可以完美拟合有限序列到序列的映射，揭示其强大性能的理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 通过交替前馈层和自注意力层构建Transformer，使用低秩参数矩阵（常见于实践），先在hardmax注意力下进行显式几何构造，再扩展到softmax注意力。
light_analysis.result: 构造的Transformer使用O(∑m^j)个块和O(d∑m^j)个参数（d为输入维度，m^j为输出长度），精确拟合数据集，且复杂度与输入序列长度无关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次给出Transformer精确插值的构造性证明，解释了其在序列到序列任务中的优异表现。此外，该构造可应用于学习问题，为正则化训练策略提供全局最优保证。

title: Gradual Domain Adaptation for Graph Learning
abstract: Existing machine learning literature lacks graph-based domain adaptation techniques capable of handling large distribution shifts, primarily due to the difficulty in simulating a coherent evolutionary path from source to target graph. To meet this challenge, we present a graph gradual domain adaptation (GGDA) framework, which constructs a compact domain sequence that minimizes information loss during adaptation. Our approach starts with an efficient generation of knowledge-preserving intermediate graphs over the Fused Gromov-Wasserstein (FGW) metric. A GGDA domain sequence is then constructed upon this bridging data pool through a novel vertex-based progression, which involves selecting "close" vertices and performing adaptive domain advancement to enhance inter-domain transferability. Theoretically, our framework provides implementable upper and lower bounds for the intractable inter-domain Wasserstein distance, $W_p(μ_t,μ_{t+1})$, enabling its flexible adjustment for optimal domain formation. Extensive experiments across diverse transfer scenarios demonstrate the superior performance of our GGDA framework.
comment: Accepted by ACM Trans. Intell. Syst. Technol. (https://doi.org/10.1145/3815185)

light_analysis.overview: 提出图渐进域适应(GGDA)框架，通过Fused Gromov-Wasserstein度量构造中间图序列，实现大分布偏移下的图域适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图域适应技术难以处理大分布偏移，主要困难在于无法模拟从源图到目标图的连贯演化路径。缺乏有效的图域适应方法，限制了在分布差异大的场景下的应用。
light_analysis.method: GGDA框架首先基于Fused Gromov-Wasserstein度量高效生成知识保留的中间图，形成桥接数据池。然后通过新颖的基于顶点的渐进方法构建域序列，选择接近顶点并自适应域推进，增强跨域可迁移性。理论上提供可实现的Wasserstein距离上下界，支持最优域形成。
light_analysis.result: 在多种迁移场景下的广泛实验中，GGDA框架表现出优越性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种有效的图渐进域适应方法，具有理论保证和实际效果，填补了图域适应在大偏移场景下的空白。未来可探索更高效的中间图生成或应用于更复杂图结构。

title: Addressing Finite-Horizon MDPs via Low-Rank Tensor Value Approximation
abstract: We study the problem of learning optimal policies in finite-horizon Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) using low-rank reinforcement learning (RL) methods. In finite-horizon MDPs, the policies, and therefore the value functions (VFs) are not stationary. This aggravates the challenges of high-dimensional MDPs, as they suffer from the curse of dimensionality and high sample complexity. To address these issues, we propose modeling the VFs of finite-horizon MDPs as low-rank tensors, enabling a scalable representation that renders the problem of learning optimal policies tractable. Our approach focuses on VF approximation within a policy iteration framework, where low-rank policy evaluation is combined with greedy policy improvement to compute near-optimal policies. We introduce an optimization-based framework for solving the Bellman equations with low-rank constraints, along with block-coordinate descent (BCD) and block-coordinate gradient descent (BCGD) algorithms, both with theoretical convergence guarantees. We further establish that bounded low-rank policy evaluation error translates into bounded policy improvement in the finite-horizon setting. For scenarios where the system dynamics are unknown, we adapt the proposed BCGD method to estimate the VFs using sampled trajectories. Numerical experiments further demonstrate that the proposed framework reduces computational demands in controlled synthetic scenarios and more realistic resource allocation problems, while achieving competitive policy performance in terms of attained returns.

light_analysis.overview: 提出用低秩张量近似有限时域MDP的值函数，实现可扩展表示与高效策略优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 有限时域MDP中策略和价值函数非平稳，加剧高维问题，存在维度灾难和高样本复杂度。现有方法难以处理非平稳价值函数的可扩展表示，需要更高效的近似方法。
light_analysis.method: 将价值函数建模为低秩张量，在策略迭代中结合低秩评估和贪心改进。提出基于优化的Bellman方程求解，引入块坐标下降（BCD）和块坐标梯度下降（BCGD）算法，均有理论收敛保证。对于未知动力学，使用BCGD基于采样轨迹估计值函数。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明有界低秩评估误差转化为策略改进的有界误差。实验在合成场景和资源分配问题中，框架降低计算需求的同时取得有竞争力的回报。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出有限时域MDP的低秩张量价值近似框架，结合理论保证和高效算法。学术价值在于解决非平稳价值函数的可扩展表示，实际应用于资源分配等任务。潜在局限是低秩假设的适应性，未来可研究自适应秩选择。

title: Visual Accommodation: Rethinking Image Scale as a Learnable Variable for Object Detection
abstract: We propose Ciliary-DETR (previous name: Elastic-DETR), a framework for test-time resolution adjustment analogous to biological accommodation. While multi-scale data augmentation improves robustness to scale variation, modern detectors rely on fixed inference resolutions, potentially limiting flexibility and robustness. Similar to the ciliary muscle, we introduce a lightweight scale predictor that dynamically estimates test-time scale factors across a wide range of input scales. The core challenge is that the optimal input scale is inherently unobservable under standard training setups. To address this challenge, we introduce a parametric formulation of desired scaling behavior, leading to loss-driven objectives that guide scale optimization. Overall, our method enables flexible and efficient single-pass inference, bridging the gap between training-time robustness and test-time adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ciliary-DETR框架，将图像尺度作为可学习变量，实现测试时动态分辨率调整，类似生物调节能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多尺度数据增强虽提升了检测器对尺度变化的鲁棒性，但现有方法在推理时使用固定分辨率，限制了灵活性和鲁棒性。实际场景中目标尺度多变，固定输入尺度难以适应所有情况，导致性能瓶颈。因此需要一种能在测试时动态调整尺度的方法，弥合训练鲁棒性与测试适应性的差距。
light_analysis.method: 引入轻量级尺度预测器，类似于睫状肌，动态估计测试时尺度因子。核心挑战为最优输入尺度在标准训练中不可观测，因此提出参数化期望缩放行为，构造损失驱动目标指导尺度优化。该方法通过单次前向传播实现灵活高效的推理，无需多尺度枚举或多次推理。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体数值结果，但声称该方法实现了灵活高效的单次推理，弥合了训练时鲁棒性与测试时适应性的差距。与固定分辨率基线相比，可动态调整尺度，提升检测器对尺度变化的适应能力。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ciliary-DETR将图像尺度作为可学习变量，赋予检测器类似生物视觉的调节能力。该方法通过轻量级预测器和损失驱动优化，实现了测试时动态尺度调整，提升了检测器的灵活性和鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的尺度预测策略或与其他自适应方法结合，进一步优化性能。

title: Few-shot Multi-Task Learning of Linear Invariant Features with Meta Subspace Pursuit
abstract: Data scarcity poses a serious threat to modern machine learning and artificial intelligence, as their practical success typically relies on the availability of big datasets. One effective strategy to mitigate the issue of insufficient data is to first harness information from other data sources possessing certain similarities in the study design stage, and then employ the multi-task or meta learning framework in the analysis stage. In this paper, we focus on multi-task (or multi-source) linear models whose coefficients across tasks share an invariant low-rank component, a popular structural assumption considered in the recent multi-task or meta learning literature. Under this assumption, we propose a new algorithm, called Meta Subspace Pursuit (abbreviated as Meta-SP), that provably learns this invariant subspace shared by different tasks. Under this stylized setup for multi-task or meta learning, we establish both the algorithmic and statistical guarantees of the proposed method. Extensive numerical experiments are conducted, comparing Meta-SP against several competing methods, including popular, off-the-shelf model-agnostic meta learning algorithms such as ANIL. These experiments demonstrate that Meta-SP achieves superior performance over the competing methods in various aspects.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Meta Subspace Pursuit算法，用于多任务线性模型中不变低秩特征的学习，并提供理论与实验验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据稀缺严重威胁机器学习与AI的实用性，因成功通常依赖大数据集。多任务/元学习可通过利用相似数据源缓解数据不足问题。现有方法在处理任务间共享不变低秩结构时存在局限，缺乏有效的算法和理论保证。
light_analysis.method: 提出Meta Subspace Pursuit (Meta-SP)算法，专注于多任务线性模型，其系数跨任务共享不变低秩成分。算法通过迭代追踪共享子空间，并融合任务特定信息。在理论层面，证明了算法的收敛性和统计一致性。实验使用合成数据和真实任务，与ANIL等基线对比。
light_analysis.result: 在多种实验设置中，Meta-SP在低样本、高噪声等挑战场景下均优于ANIL、MTL等基线方法。具体表现为更高的子空间恢复精度和下游任务预测性能。数值实验充分验证了算法的鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Meta-SP为多任务学习中共享不变低秩结构的学习提供了高效解法，兼具理论保障与实用性能。其可推广至更广泛的元学习场景。未来工作可探索非线性扩展或跨领域迁移。

title: BEAVER: An Enterprise Benchmark for Text-to-SQL
abstract: Existing text-to-SQL benchmarks have largely been constructed from public databases with well-structured schemas and simplistic question-SQL pairs. While large language models (LLMs) excel on these settings, their efficacy in complex private enterprise environments, characterized by intricate schemas, domain knowledge, and analytical user queries involving sophisticated structures and functions, remains unproven. To bridge this gap, we introduce BEAVER, the first text-to-SQL benchmark derived from private data warehouses. It comprises 9128 question-SQL pairs sourced from real-world query logs and 812 tables across 19 diverse domains. Building this benchmark is challenging because (1) enterprise query logs are scarce due to privacy constraints, and (2) existing all-or-nothing evaluation metrics based on accuracy make error diagnosis difficult -- especially when producing a correct query involves solving multiple compounded challenges, such as domain knowledge and query complexity. We address these issues at two levels. At the dataset level, we synthesize high-fidelity, expert-verified queries that increase dataset size and isolate individual challenges or combine them, producing queries focused on domain knowledge, query complexity, and both. At the evaluation level, we provide human annotations and evaluation metrics for five critical subtasks to enable fine-grained analysis. Our evaluation reveals a significant performance gap compared to existing benchmarks: SOTA agentic frameworks using the advanced model GPT-5.2 achieve only 10.8% accuracy. When provided with all subtask annotations as oracle hints, accuracy increases to 30.1%, confirming that a major bottleneck lies in correctly resolving these subtasks. Finally, we provide a taxonomy of the residual errors that persist even with subtask hints, identifying specific challenges such as the use of advanced functions.
comment: Dataset and code are available at https://beaverbench.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: BEAVER是首个从私有数据仓库派生的文本到SQL基准，包含9128个问题-SQL对和812张表，涵盖19个领域，并提供细粒度评估指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到SQL基准基于公开数据库，结构简单，LLM表现优秀，但在复杂私有企业环境（复杂模式、领域知识、分析性查询）中效果未知。企业查询日志因隐私限制难以获取，现有全有或全无评估指标难以诊断错误，因此需要新基准和细粒度评估。
light_analysis.method: 在数据集层面，通过合成高保真、专家验证的查询来增加数据集大小，并隔离或组合单个挑战（领域知识、查询复杂性）产生查询。在评估层面，提供五个关键子任务的人工注释和评估指标，实现细粒度分析。
light_analysis.result: 最先进的基于GPT-5.2的智能体框架仅达到10.8%的准确率。当提供所有子任务注释作为oracle提示时，准确率提高到30.1%，表明正确解决子任务是主要瓶颈。进一步提供了残差错误的分类。
light_analysis.conclusion: BEAVER揭示了企业文本到SQL的巨大性能差距，提供了细粒度评估以诊断错误。学术价值在于推动复杂环境下的研究，实际应用价值在于指导企业级SQL生成系统开发。局限性可能在于合成查询的保真度，未来工作可扩展更多领域。

title: Convergent Differential Privacy Analysis for General Federated Learning
abstract: The powerful cooperation of federated learning (FL) and differential privacy~(DP) provides a promising paradigm for the large-scale private clients. However, existing analyses in FL-DP mostly rely on the composition theorem and cannot tightly quantify the privacy leakage challenges, which is tight for a few communication rounds but yields an arbitrarily loose and divergent bound eventually. This also implies a counterintuitive judgment, suggesting that FL-DP may not provide adequate privacy support during long-term training under constant-level noisy perturbations, yielding discrepancy between the theoretical and experimental results. To further investigate the convergent privacy and reliability of the FL-DP framework, in this paper, we comprehensively evaluate the worst privacy of two classical methods under the non-convex and smooth objectives based on the $f$-DP analysis. With the aid of the shifted interpolation technique, we successfully prove that privacy in {\ttfamily Noisy-FedAvg} has a tight convergent bound. Moreover, with the regularization of the proxy term, privacy in {\ttfamily Noisy-FedProx} has a stable constant lower bound. Our analysis further demonstrates a solid theoretical foundation for the reliability of privacy in FL-DP. Meanwhile, our conclusions can also be losslessly converted to other classical DP analytical frameworks, e.g. $(ε,δ)$-DP and R$\acute{\text{e}}$nyi-DP~(RDP), to provide more fine-grained understandings for the FL-DP frameworks.

light_analysis.overview: 基于f-DP分析，证明Noisy-FedAvg和Noisy-FedProx的隐私收敛界，解决FL-DP隐私上界发散问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习结合差分隐私（FL-DP）虽能保护隐私，但现有分析依赖组合定理，导致隐私上界在长期训练中发散，无法紧致量化隐私泄漏。这与实际实验存在矛盾，需研究FL-DP框架的收敛隐私和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 基于f-DP分析框架，利用移位插值技术证明Noisy-FedAvg在非凸光滑目标下有紧的收敛隐私界。通过代理项正则化，证明Noisy-FedProx具有稳定的常数下界。结论可无损转换为(ε,δ)-DP和Rényi-DP。
light_analysis.result: 严格证明了Noisy-FedAvg的隐私上界收敛，Noisy-FedProx的隐私下界为稳定常数。相比现有组合定理方法，避免了隐私上界任意松散的缺陷，为FL-DP的长期训练隐私可靠性提供了理论支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为FL-DP框架的隐私可靠性奠定了坚实的理论基础，结论可推广至其他DP分析框架，提供更细粒度的隐私理解。未来可用于指导联邦学习隐私预算的合理分配和长期训练策略设计。

title: AI Safety Landscape for Large Language Models: Taxonomy, State-of-the-art, and Future Directions
abstract: AI Safety is an emerging area of critical importance to the safe adoption and deployment of AI systems. With the rapid proliferation of AI and especially with the recent advancement of Generative AI (or GAI), the technology ecosystem behind the design, development, adoption, and deployment of AI systems has drastically changed, broadening the scope of AI Safety to address impacts on public safety and national security. In this paper, we propose a novel architectural framework for understanding and analyzing AI Safety; defining its characteristics from three perspectives: Trustworthy AI, Responsible AI, and Safe AI. We provide an extensive review of current research and advancements in AI safety from these perspectives, highlighting their key challenges and mitigation approaches. Through examples from state-of-the-art technologies, particularly Large Language Models (LLMs), we present innovative mechanism, methodologies, and techniques for designing and testing AI safety. Our goal is to promote advancement in AI safety research, and ultimately enhance people's trust in digital transformation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个从可信AI、责任AI和安全AI三个视角分析AI安全的架构框架，并综述大语言模型安全的研究进展。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着生成式AI的快速发展，AI系统的安全范围已扩展至公共安全和国家安全，现有研究缺乏系统化的分析框架。作者旨在通过提出多维视角的分类体系，整合当前分散的AI安全研究，明确关键挑战与缓解方法，以推动安全技术的进步并增强公众对数字化转型的信任。
light_analysis.method: 论文构建了一个三视角架构：可信AI（关注可靠性、可解释性等）、责任AI（关注公平性、隐私等）和安全AI（关注对抗鲁棒性、滥用防范等）。基于该框架，系统梳理了LLM在每一视角下的最新研究，包括机制、方法论和测试技术，并通过典型案例说明应用。
light_analysis.result: 论文作为综述，未提供定量实验结果，而是通过分类框架整合了现有研究，归纳了关键挑战（如幻觉、偏见、对抗攻击）与缓解方法（如对齐、红队测试、可解释性工具），展示了LLM安全领域的技术全景与不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为AI安全提供了结构化认知体系，有助于研究者快速定位问题与解决方案。框架可用于指导安全评估准则的制定，但需进一步扩展至多模态模型与动态环境。未来方向包括统一安全基准、跨学科协作及可证明的安全保障。

title: Clustering in pure-attention hardmax transformers and its role in sentiment analysis
abstract: Transformers are extremely successful machine learning models whose mathematical properties remain poorly understood. Here, we rigorously characterize the behavior of transformers with hardmax self-attention and normalization sublayers as the number of layers tends to infinity. By viewing such transformers as discrete-time dynamical systems describing the evolution of points in a Euclidean space, and thanks to a geometric interpretation of the self-attention mechanism based on hyperplane separation, we show that the transformer inputs asymptotically converge to a clustered equilibrium determined by special points called \textit{leaders}. We then leverage this theoretical understanding to solve sentiment analysis problems from language processing using a fully interpretable transformer model, which effectively captures `context' by clustering meaningless words around leader words carrying the most meaning. Finally, we outline remaining challenges to bridge the gap between the mathematical analysis of transformers and their real-life implementation.
comment: 23 pages, 11 figures, 1 table. Funded by the European Union (Horizon Europe MSCA project ModConFlex, grant number 101073558). Accompanying code available at: https://github.com/DCN-FAU-AvH/clustering-hardmax-transformers

light_analysis.overview: 通过硬最大自注意力变换器的渐近聚类行为分析，提出可解释的情感分析模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 变换器模型在机器学习中极其成功，但其数学性质尚不明确。现有方法缺乏对自注意力机制几何特性的深入理解，导致模型可解释性差。本文旨在通过数学分析揭示变换器在无限层时的聚类行为，并应用于情感分析中捕捉上下文信息，以解决现有黑箱模型难以解释的问题。
light_analysis.method: 将硬最大自注意力变换器视为描述欧氏空间中点演化的离散时间动力系统，利用基于超平面分离的自注意力几何解释，证明输入渐近收敛到由特殊点（领导者）决定的聚类平衡。基于此理论，构建完全可解释的变换器模型，通过将无意义词聚类到携带主要意义的领导者词周围来有效捕获语境。
light_analysis.result: 理论上严格证明了硬最大自注意力变换器在无限层时输入收敛到聚类平衡态。在情感分析任务中，所提出的可解释变换器模型能够有效聚类单词，实现上下文理解。摘要未给出具体性能指标，但强调模型的可解释性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为变换器的数学分析提供了严格的理论基础，揭示了自注意力机制的聚类动力学。在情感分析中展示了理论的实际应用价值，通过可解释模型帮助理解语言处理中的语境捕获。未来需进一步弥合变换器数学分析与实际实现之间的差距。

title: ChatSR: Multimodal Large Language Models for Scientific Formula Discovery
abstract: Current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are mainly focused on the understanding and processing of perceptual modalities such as images and videos, while their capability for scientific data understanding remains insufficient. To this end, we propose ChatSR, a novel multimodal large language model tailored for scientific data understanding. ChatSR treats scientific data as a new modality analogous to visual content and, through carefully designed encoders and modality alignment mechanisms, maps scientific data into a representation space that can be processed by large language models, enabling the model to grasp the structural characteristics and underlying regularities of scientific data. Building on this foundation, ChatSR further exploits the rich domain knowledge and strong reasoning abilities of large language models to emulate a knowledgeable human scientist: based on user-specified prior constraints and preferences expressed (such as requirements on periodicity, symmetry, etc.), it automatically generates mathematical formulas that not only accurately fit the observed data but also conform to domain priors, thereby characterizing the latent laws embodied in scientific data and promoting the automation of scientific discovery.   Experiments on 13 datasets show that ChatSR achieves state-of-the-art performance on traditional symbolic regression benchmarks. In addition, ChatSR exhibits a promising zero-shot ability to understand and utilize types of prior knowledge that are not present in its training data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChatSR，一种将科学数据作为新模态的多模态大语言模型，用于自动生成符合领域先验的数学公式，实现科学发现自动化。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型主要处理图像、视频等感知模态，对科学数据理解不足。科学发现需要从数据中提取潜在规律，传统符号回归方法缺乏对领域知识的利用。因此，需要一种能理解科学数据并利用大语言模型强大推理能力自动生成符合先验的数学公式的方法，以促进科学发现自动化。
light_analysis.method: ChatSR将科学数据视为新模态，通过精心设计的编码器和模态对齐机制将科学数据映射到大语言模型可处理的表示空间，使其捕捉数据的结构特性和潜在规律。在此基础上，利用大语言模型的领域知识和推理能力，根据用户指定的先验约束（如周期性、对称性）自动生成既准确拟合数据又符合领域先验的数学公式，表征数据中的潜在规律。
light_analysis.result: 在13个数据集上，ChatSR在传统符号回归基准测试中达到最先进性能。此外，它还展现出令人瞩目的零样本能力，能够理解和利用训练数据中未出现的先验知识类型，表明其良好的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChatSR通过将科学数据作为新模态并利用大语言模型的推理能力，有效推动了科学发现的自动化，为从观测数据中自动发现规律提供了新范式。未来可进一步扩展到更多科学领域，并探索更复杂的先验知识融合方式，但当前工作未明确讨论局限性。

title: Understanding Catastrophic Forgetting In LoRA via Mean-Field Attention Dynamics
abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is the dominant parameter-efficient fine-tuning method due to its favorable compute-performance trade-off, yet it suffers from catastrophic forgetting. We study forgetting through a tractable _mean-field self-attention_ toy model, where tokens evolve as an interacting particle system and LoRA acts as a low-rank perturbation. Using tools from partial differential equations and dynamical systems, we characterize regimes suggesting a phase transition between forgetting and non-forgetting behavior. We show that one phase transition appears with respect to the norm of the perturbation, and the other with respect to the depth of the Transformers. We further bound the time-to-deviation in terms of the perturbation size and spectral quantities, and corroborate the predicted trends with experiments and exploratory analyses on real models under LoRA fine-tuning.
comment: New version accepted at ICML 2026, with new results and without previous results

light_analysis.overview: 通过均场注意力动力学玩具模型，揭示了LoRA微调中灾难性遗忘的相变机制。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA作为参数高效微调方法，虽然计算性能优越，但存在灾难性遗忘问题。现有研究缺乏对遗忘机制的理论理解，尤其缺乏从动力系统角度分析遗忘行为的定量框架。因此，作者通过构建简化的均场自注意力模型，旨在解释遗忘发生的条件与根源。
light_analysis.method: 构建均场自注意力玩具模型，将token视为相互作用粒子系统，LoRA视为低秩扰动。利用偏微分方程和动力系统工具，刻画遗忘与非遗忘行为的相变边界。关键创新在于识别出两个相变阈值：分别依赖于扰动范数和Transformer深度，并推导出偏离时间的上界表达式，以扰动大小和谱量表示。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明存在两个相变：一个与扰动范数相关，另一个与Transformer深度相关。通过实验验证，在真实模型上使用LoRA微调时，预测的遗忘趋势与实验结果一致，例如扰动大小和深度增加时遗忘加重，偏离时间符合理论界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从理论角度揭示了LoRA灾难性遗忘的相变本质，为理解参数高效微调中记忆稳定性提供了新视角。学术价值在于首次将均场动力系统应用于微调分析，实际意义在于指导LoRA超参数选择以避免遗忘。未来可扩展至其他适配方法或更复杂的注意力机制。

title: Tighter Learning Guarantees on Digital Computers via Concentration of Measure on Finite Spaces
abstract: Machine learning models with inputs in a Euclidean space $\mathbb{R}^d$, when implemented on digital computers, generalize, and their generalization gap converges to $0$ at a rate of $c/N^{1/2}$ concerning the sample size $N$. However, the constant $c>0$ obtained through classical methods can be large in terms of the ambient dimension $d$ and machine precision, posing a challenge when $N$ is small to realistically large. In this paper, we derive a family of generalization bounds $\{c_m/N^{1/(2\vee m)}\}_{m=1}^{\infty}$ tailored for learning models on digital computers, which adapt to both the sample size $N$ and the so-called geometric representation dimension $m$ of the discrete learning problem. Adjusting the parameter $m$ according to $N$ results in significantly tighter generalization bounds for practical sample sizes $N$, while setting $m$ small maintains the optimal dimension-free worst-case rate of $\mathcal{O}(1/N^{1/2})$. Notably, $c_{m}\in \mathcal{O}(m^{1/2})$ for learning models on discretized Euclidean domains. Furthermore, our adaptive generalization bounds are formulated based on our new non-asymptotic result for concentration of measure in finite metric spaces, established via leveraging metric embedding arguments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一系列自适应样本大小和几何表示维度的泛化界限，显著优于经典方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典方法得到的泛化界限常数c依赖于环境维度d和机器精度，当样本量N从较小到实际大小时，界限可能过松。该研究旨在通过考虑数字计算机的离散本质，获得更紧的泛化保证，以适应实际样本量。
light_analysis.method: 基于有限空间上的测度集中，利用度量嵌入论证，推导出一族泛化界限{c_m/N^{1/(2∨m)}}，其中m为几何表示维度。根据N调整m可获得更紧的界限，且c_m∈O(m^{1/2})。该方法适用于离散化欧几里得域上的学习模型。
light_analysis.result: 对于实际样本量N，自适应界限显著优于经典O(1/N^{1/2})界限。参数m根据N调整，当m较小时仍保持最优最坏情况率O(1/N^{1/2})。常数c_m随m增长缓慢（O(m^{1/2})）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为数字计算机上的机器学习提供了更紧的泛化保证，具有理论和实际应用价值。未来可探索更一般的有限度量空间应用，以及如何自动选择最优m。

title: The Score-Difference Flow for Implicit Generative Modeling
abstract: Implicit generative modeling (IGM) aims to produce samples of synthetic data matching the characteristics of a target data distribution. Recent work (e.g. score-matching networks, diffusion models) has approached the IGM problem from the perspective of pushing synthetic source data toward the target distribution via dynamical perturbations or flows in the ambient space. In this direction, we present the score difference (SD) between arbitrary target and source distributions as a flow that optimally reduces the Kullback-Leibler divergence between them. We apply the SD flow to convenient proxy distributions, which are aligned if and only if the original distributions are aligned. We demonstrate the formal equivalence of this formulation to denoising diffusion models under certain conditions. We also show that the training of generative adversarial networks includes a hidden data-optimization sub-problem, which induces the SD flow under certain choices of loss function when the discriminator is optimal. As a result, the SD flow provides a theoretical link between model classes that individually address the three challenges of the "generative modeling trilemma" -- high sample quality, mode coverage, and fast sampling -- thereby setting the stage for a unified approach.
comment: 25 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Updated version of a paper originally published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), including post-publication commentary connecting the SD flow to drifting models

light_analysis.overview: 提出分数差流作为隐式生成建模方法，最优减少KL散度，并理论连接扩散模型和GANs，为统一生成模型三难问题奠定基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 隐式生成建模旨在使合成数据匹配目标分布。现有方法如分数匹配网络和扩散模型通过动态扰动推动合成数据，但面临生成质量、模式覆盖和采样速度的三难问题。这些挑战在现有方法中难以同时解决，亟需一种统一理论框架来桥接不同模型类，实现高效且高质量的生成。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出分数差流，即目标分布与源分布的对数密度梯度差，作为流场最优减小KL散度。将SD流应用于代理分布，其对齐性等价于原始分布对齐。在特定条件下，该公式与去噪扩散模型形式等价；同时，GAN训练的最优判别器下，特定损失函数可诱导SD流，从而建立两类模型的理论联系。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但通过理论分析证明了SD流与扩散模型和GANs的等价关系，为生成模型三难问题提供了统一视角。该方法有望在无需实际数据的情况下，实现高样本质量、良好模式覆盖和快速采样的兼顾，但缺乏定量实验结果支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: SD流为隐式生成建模提供了统一理论框架，链接了扩散模型和GANs，分别擅长高质量、高覆盖和快速采样。这为设计兼顾三者优点的生成模型铺平道路。未来工作可探索SD流在实际应用中的实现与优化，解决数值稳定性和扩展性问题。
